# How to support my race for Spartanburg County Council District 3.
#
Spartanburg County Council District 3 covers the east side of the City of Spartanburg, Pacolet, Cowpens and Mayo. [We need volunteers! ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=f25e5ea9d6&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | | | | [Contribute to Kathryn](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=f7f6152862&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=fd41eda3b6&e=edbde6c9b1)
| Many of you helped me in my run for Congress last year. That campaign built a solid foundation here in the Upstate, and we’ve kept folks engaged and informed ever since.
This local race is an extraordinary opportunity to assume a leadership role in one of the fastest growing counties in the United States - the place I’m proud to call home. And it's also an opportunity to elect another woman to council (we currently only have one serving).
[**Your efforts will help us contact the voters we need to win.**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=d0f5a3b158&e=edbde6c9b1)
If you’re as ready as I am to see a positive change in our community I hope you’ll join us. Thank you for staying with me, we can do this - together. **Join me by**[**donating**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=747b1c1a2e&e=edbde6c9b1)**and**[**signing up to volunteer**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=538e135b08&e=edbde6c9b1)**at**[**kathrynforcouncil.com.**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=121f044f12&e=edbde6c9b1)
---

# Join me this Saturday in Greenville
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=70d9ce3c8f&e=edbde6c9b1)
| [**RSVP here to join us Saturday afternoon at Tacozzini.**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=5a2b77179d&e=edbde6c9b1) We will celebrate the newest members of the Emerge South Carolina sisterhood at our Meet the Class event in Greenville. The Class of 2025 is comprised of 19 women from across the state who are ready to step up and run to lead their communities. They represent the hope and excitement of the changing face of South Carolina politics.

[**Learn more here**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=e8e5719145&e=edbde6c9b1)**June 21** Emerge SC Meet & Greet in Greenville [**Learn more here**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=e5c2616219&e=edbde6c9b1) June 22 Jubilee Juneteenth Worship Service at Macedonia. [**Learn more here**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=0ac70bb884&e=edbde6c9b1)**June 23** Jesse Bobo Town Hall Cyrill Westside Library @ 6pm [**RSVP Here**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=d818957e97&e=edbde6c9b1)**June 24** Pacolet Town Hall at Pacolet Library 5-6pm [RSVP Here](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=25c583c157&e=edbde6c9b1)**June 28** Greenville Black Pride Festival. [**Learn more here!**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=570c8e2d51&e=edbde6c9b1) [**Volunteers Needed**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=28cbcdc7d6&e=edbde6c9b1)**June 30:** Boiling Spring Tow Hall at 6pm[ Boiling Springs Library ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=9f79b539a5&e=edbde6c9b1)**July 7:** SPCDP Monthly Meeting at 6pm Dr. TK Gregg Community Center [ RSVP Here](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=c37c74a316&e=edbde6c9b1)**July 9:** Cowpens Town Hall Cowpens Library 4-5pm [ RSVP Here](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=644006abd1&e=edbde6c9b1)**July 10:** Northside Town Hall Location TBD 5:30pm [RSVP Here](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=4c970471e2&e=edbde6c9b1)

|
---
|
---
|
**What’s at stake with the Big Beautiful Bill?**| In South Carolina alone, 1.1 million people rely upon Medicaid or CHIP for healthcare while 581,000 South Carolinians rely upon SNAP for daily food purchases.

Congressional GOP members voted to strip away funding for these critical programs — all for billionaires in this country to receive tax cuts. The Upstate’s very own [Ralph Norman fell asleep during the budget hearing, and then cast the deciding vote](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=df7ed56e9d&e=edbde6c9b1) on this “Big, Beautiful Bill.”
The time is now. [**Call your senators**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=b4fed2095f&e=edbde6c9b1) and join us in fighting for working-class families across South Carolina. They need to hear from all of us.

| This past week we walked with the Mayor down the Mary Wright Greenway, celebrated the unveiling of the Southside Cultural Monument lead by Rep Henderson-Myers & Rep Brenda Lee Pryce, and finished with the No Kings Protest where over 500 community members came out to make their voices heard in downtown Spartanburg. This week we’re celebrating and honoring Juneteenth. Now is the time for action. Democracy is a participatory experience, join us at [kathrynforcouncil.com](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=ed54c6e113&e=edbde6c9b1).

name: Voter Action Project Team
subject: Stay vigilant
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
With opponents of voting rights on the march, particularly in heavily gerrymandered states and at the federal level, we've got to stay vigilant to make sure people are able to vote next year and have their ballots be counted. State-level Voting Rights Acts are a great way to accomplish that.
We're fighting back across the country, but the battle for our fundamental rights is far from over. Chip in $25 or whatever you can today to help stop the roll-back of voting rights and expand ballot access for all Americans >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2]
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=/54LcSzk5jXHgdGTdIAhs1Phfy+smfFfjircgpGN1iMmdQ5zumZNdGbRZdFX7Z7grefwhagiS00/6+2pV9Q8fSrJpo76eAQ88020DHplBqE=]
Colorado Newsline: Gov. Polis signs voting rights bill, shielding Colorado from federal backsliding [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=25.00&contactdata=/54LcSzk5jXHgdGTdIAhs1Phfy+smfFfjircgpGN1iMmdQ5zumZNdGbRZdFX7Z7grefwhagiS00/6+2pV9Q8fSrJpo76eAQ88020DHplBqE=]
Team,
Colorado's governor signed the Colorado Voting Rights Act into law yesterday, establishing various protections contained in the federal Voting Rights Act at the state level .
This new law prohibits election practices that limit the participation of people of color and other protected groups. It also includes protections for LGBTQ+ voters, expands multilingual ballot access, and requires accommodations for people with disabilities at residential facilities.
Most importantly, this law means Colorado does not need to rely on federal courts to enforce voting protections. The provisions of the law will apply to all state and municipal elections, and voters whose rights are violated under the act can take action along with civil rights groups -- a key right that is being dismantled at the federal level.
We need more states to take action like this, Team. Help us fight for a voting rights act in every state that doesn't have one with $25 or whatever you can today and make every vote count >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2]
If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=15&amtOpts=&recurringAm=15&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&tknfa=zgC1V9w_V3IeE0GKWlTX-i-tcMBXcrPevWixro14V3k=&contactdata=/54LcSzk5jXHgdGTdIAhs1Phfy+smfFfjircgpGN1iMmdQ5zumZNdGbRZdFX7Z7grefwhagiS00/6+2pV9Q8fSrJpo76eAQ88020DHplBqE=] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=25&amtOpts=&recurringAm=25&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&tknfa=zgC1V9w_V3IeE0GKWlTX-i-tcMBXcrPevWixro14V3k=&contactdata=/54LcSzk5jXHgdGTdIAhs1Phfy+smfFfjircgpGN1iMmdQ5zumZNdGbRZdFX7Z7grefwhagiS00/6+2pV9Q8fSrJpo76eAQ88020DHplBqE=] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=50&amtOpts=&recurringAm=50&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&tknfa=zgC1V9w_V3IeE0GKWlTX-i-tcMBXcrPevWixro14V3k=&contactdata=/54LcSzk5jXHgdGTdIAhs1Phfy+smfFfjircgpGN1iMmdQ5zumZNdGbRZdFX7Z7grefwhagiS00/6+2pV9Q8fSrJpo76eAQ88020DHplBqE=]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=100&amtOpts=&recurringAm=100&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&tknfa=zgC1V9w_V3IeE0GKWlTX-i-tcMBXcrPevWixro14V3k=&contactdata=/54LcSzk5jXHgdGTdIAhs1Phfy+smfFfjircgpGN1iMmdQ5zumZNdGbRZdFX7Z7grefwhagiS00/6+2pV9Q8fSrJpo76eAQ88020DHplBqE=] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=250&amtOpts=&recurringAm=250&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=/54LcSzk5jXHgdGTdIAhs1Phfy+smfFfjircgpGN1iMmdQ5zumZNdGbRZdFX7Z7grefwhagiS00/6+2pV9Q8fSrJpo76eAQ88020DHplBqE=] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&tknfa=zgC1V9w_V3IeE0GKWlTX-i-tcMBXcrPevWixro14V3k=&contactdata=/54LcSzk5jXHgdGTdIAhs1Phfy+smfFfjircgpGN1iMmdQ5zumZNdGbRZdFX7Z7grefwhagiS00/6+2pV9Q8fSrJpo76eAQ88020DHplBqE=]
" We should not tolerate dilution or suppression ," said state Rep. Jennifer Bacon of Denver. " The promise of this country is to say that we believe that your voice matters, and that we will take steps to ensure even through our differences ... that we will protect the vote. "
The authors of the law cite the gradual weakening of the Voting Rights Act and recent attacks from the Trump administration on state voting laws to argue that there's a need for state legislation.
We know how critical our fundamental right to vote is. Colorado has now taken big steps to join the other states with their own Voting Rights Act. But we need more states to follow suit.
Please, pitch in $25 or however much you can to help make every voice heard in our elections across the country >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=/54LcSzk5jXHgdGTdIAhs1Phfy+smfFfjircgpGN1iMmdQ5zumZNdGbRZdFX7Z7grefwhagiS00/6+2pV9Q8fSrJpo76eAQ88020DHplBqE=]

clean_body: With opponents of voting rights on the march, particularly in heavily gerrymandered states and at the federal level, we've got to stay vigilant to make sure people are able to vote next year and have their ballots be counted. State-level Voting Rights Acts are a great way to accomplish that. We're fighting back across the country, but the battle for our fundamental rights is far from over. Chip in $25 or whatever you can today to help stop the roll-back of voting rights and expand ballot access for all Americans >> [] Voter Action Project [=] Colorado Newsline: Gov. Polis signs voting rights bill, shielding Colorado from federal backsliding [=] Team, Colorado's governor signed the Colorado Voting Rights Act into law yesterday, establishing various protections contained in the federal Voting Rights Act at the state level . This new law prohibits election practices that limit the participation of people of color and other protected groups. It also includes protections for LGBTQ+ voters, expands multilingual ballot access, and requires accommodations for people with disabilities at residential facilities. Most importantly, this law means Colorado does not need to rely on federal courts to enforce voting protections. The provisions of the law will apply to all state and municipal elections, and voters whose rights are violated under the act can take action along with civil rights groups -- a key right that is being dismantled at the federal level. We need more states to take action like this, Team. Help us fight for a voting rights act in every state that doesn't have one with $25 or whatever you can today and make every vote count >> [] If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [=] OTHER AMOUNT [=] " We should not tolerate dilution or suppression ," said state Rep. Jennifer Bacon of Denver. " The promise of this country is to say that we believe that your voice matters, and that we will take steps to ensure even through our differences ... that we will protect the vote. " The authors of the law cite the gradual weakening of the Voting Rights Act and recent attacks from the Trump administration on state voting laws to argue that there's a need for state legislation. We know how critical our fundamental right to vote is. Colorado has now taken big steps to join the other states with their own Voting Rights Act. But we need more states to follow suit. Please, pitch in $25 or however much you can to help make every voice heard in our elections across the country >> [] = [=] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: It's official:
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-spanberger?refcode=250619em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-spanberger?refcode=250619em]
My name is Abigail Spanberger, and I'm the Democratic nominee for Governor in Virginia's general election. I'm ready to flip the Governor's office blue this November, defeat Trump's agenda at the ballot box, and get to work creating a more affordable Commonwealth for all.
But one lesson I learned during my years in Congress and at CIA is that a strong team beats going at it alone every time, so I hope you will join my campaign today.
Will you become a founding member of my campaign for Governor by splitting a $20 contribution with Tobias Read ? There's no bigger election this year than here in Virginia, and I feel the responsibility to set the tone by winning big — but I can only deliver if we raise the resources to air ads, hire organizers, and turn out voters. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-spanberger?refcode=250619em]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-spanberger?refcode=250619em]
In a few short months, we can start Democrats on a winning streak by flipping Virginia blue.
It's not going to be easy.
Four years ago, we lost this same Governor's race by two points and saw years of progress erased in an instant. And my opponent Winsome Earle-Sears has shown she will indulge in fearmongering and disinformation to keep Virginia under Republican control.
Your contribution today, whatever the amount, will help us rise above the attacks and build a winning campaign that reflects our shared values.
If you're fed up with the chaos coming out of Washington, if you're outraged watching GOP officials bend their knee rather than uphold their oath, I am counting on your immediate and full support.
Click this link to complete your donation and become a founding member of my campaign for Governor. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-spanberger?refcode=250619em] Together, we will flip Virginia blue and send a resounding message to this White House and beyond that voters will not stand for the corruption, the attacks on fundamental rights, and the brazen disregard for the needs of working families.
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-spanberger?refcode=250619em]
I'm honored by the trust you are placing in me. Virginia is where I grew up and where I'm raising my three girls, and I refuse to let far-right extremism win the day.
With immense gratitude,
Abigail Spanberger
Tobias Read is Oregon's Secretary of State. To support him directly, please donate here. [https://www.tobiasread.com]
Abigail Spanberger is the Democratic Nominee for Governor of Virginia. You can support her directly here. [https://abigailspanberger.com/]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States

name: LCV Membership Team
subject: On Juneteenth, A Stark Look at Federal Environmental Justice Rollbacks
body:
Plus an opportunity to push back

If you are unable to see the message below, [click here to view](https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTI2MTc0NDAS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjI0MDk0MDIwNAS2&mt=1&rt=0).
| | | |
---
|
* * *
---
| | | | Peter,
---
| | Juneteenth, a holiday celebrating Black freedom, is also an important day to highlight the continuing fight against the many forms of racial injustice that persist around the country. One of these is **environmental racism — the reality that people of color face disproportionate harm from pollution, toxic waste, extreme weather driven by climate change, and other environmental hazards.** To push back against the discriminatory practices and policies of business and government that drive environmental racism, [**_Black activists launched the environmental justice movement_**](https://links.messages.lcv.) in the 1980s.
---
| | Last Juneteenth [**_we celebrated Justice40, the largest ever U.S. national commitment to environmental justice._**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/X6bzs~4v2Ahb/ZUxGcVBqR29OMFNvbC9WYlV4Y2lhQWFjeXJ3RVkweHhNc3A5TXV4WUlkdWhpOWZBQm93OUpNeEhXVTN3Z3MxRGFJbmlodHNxdUlXQXRIZ3ltR1ZZU1ZkdXg1NGg5eVU1U0hvUHNqekY3RTA9S0/d1hoTEZPcmRJamNMdWlvc256cDIrWUdickl6N1NMZlBLSnFPRVdRMEVlemcwWmtYRFdtVWVadzF6aEJSeUUrYVJ5a0hqdzQvWExhWW1QQi9kS3ZpdnJMdVlSUUF1MTUwS0) Established by President Biden during his first week in office, Justice40 required that at least 40% of the benefits from federal investments in infrastructure and climate go to communities that have been historically underresourced and overburdened by pollution, including Black communities. As of last summer, the administration had achieved **$600 billion in Justice40 investments** across more than **500 federal programs within 19 federal agencies.**
---
| | These investments funded grants to help communities [**_clean up contaminated land_**](https://links.messages.lcv.)**,**[**_replace diesel school buses with cleaner models_**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/L6b_sLpE6kBY/ZUxGcVBqR29OMFNvbC9WYlV4Y2lhQWFjeXJ3RVkweHhNc3A5TXV4WUlkdWhpOWZBQm93OUpNeEhXVTN3Z3MxRGFJbmlodHNxdUlXQXRIZ3ltR1ZZU1ZkdXg1NGg5eVU1U0hvUHNqekY3RTA9S0/d1hoTEZPcmRJamNMdWlvc256cDIrWUdickl6N1NMZlBLSnFPRVdRMEVlemcwWmtYRFdtVWVadzF6aEJSeUUrYVJ5a0hqdzQvWExhWW1QQi9kS3ZpdnJMdVlSUUF1MTUwS0)** _,_ **[**build clean energy infrastructure**](https://links.messages.lcv.)**,** and much more. These projects helped reduce the health hazards created by pollution, reduce energy costs, and create good-paying clean energy jobs in these communities.
---
| | **This Juneteenth, however, the situation is very different. **
---
| | On his very first day in office President Trump rescinded the Justice40 initiative, effectively freezing all funding for current and planned projects and leaving communities in limbo. This executive order was only the beginning of the Trump administration’s attacks on anything they say is related to Diversity, Equity and Inclusion (DEI). Eliminating environmental justice initiatives has been a major prong of those attacks, including:
---
| |
* **Ordering the termination of “all DEI, DEIA, and ‘environmental justice’ offices and positions” ** across the federal government

* Dismantling the **EPA’s Office of Environmental Justice and External Civil Rights** and the **Department of Justice’s Office of Environmental Justice**

* Rescinding the Council on Environmental Quality’s authority to implement the National Environmental Policy Act, removing enforcement of rules directing agencies to consider environmental impacts of their projects — and **urging agencies to stop considering environmental justice impacts specifically**

* Directing the Attorney General to identify and **block all state and local laws addressing environmental justice and climate change**

---
| | **Among the administration’s latest attacks on environmental justice are those in the federal budget reconciliation bill that is currently before the Senate.** The Trump administration has dubbed it their [**“Big Beautiful Bill,” while in reality it is a billionaire tax scam**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/EZ_RcAa6Rkc4/ZUxGcVBqR29OMFNvbC9WYlV4Y2lhQWFjeXJ3RVkweHhNc3A5TXV4WUlkdWhpOWZBQm93OUpNeEhXVTN3Z3MxRGFJbmlodHNxdUlXQXRIZ3ltR1ZZU1ZkdXg1NGg5eVU1U0hvUHNqekY3RTA9S0/d1hoTEZPcmRJamNMdWlvc256cDIrWUdickl6N1NMZlBLSnFPRVdRMEVlemcwWmtYRFdtVWVadzF6aEJSeUUrYVJ5a0hqdzQvWExhWW1QQi9kS3ZpdnJMdVlSUUF1MTUwS0) that will strip away protections against pollution, sell off public lands, and drive up energy costs, all to line the pockets of billionaires and Big Oil. Its environmental justice rollbacks include:
---
| |
* **Canceling environmental justice block grants** funding projects in neighborhoods hardest hit by pollution

* Creating a **“pay-to-play” scheme allowing corporations to pay a fee to fast-track projects and shortcut environmental review,** leaving surrounding communities vulnerable to pollution — and blocking them from challenging projects in court

* **Eliminating clean energy tax credits and incentives** that help local governments, businesses, nonprofits, schools, and families transition to clean energy for cleaner air in their communities

---
| | We have a short window of opportunity to stop this bill. LCV and our partner organizations are showing up on the Hill every week to urge senators to protect our communities by rejecting this harmful bill. Join us!
---
| | If you have 5 minutes: [**_Call your senators (here’s how!)_**](https://links.messages.lcv.) or [**send them a message**](https://links.messages.lcv.) and tell them to vote NO on Republicans’ billionaire tax scam.
---
| | For more resources on our movement’s wins in recent years and the Trump administration’s attacks, [**check out our blog post**](https://links.messages.lcv.)**.**
---
| | LCV Membership Team
---
| | |
* * *
---
| | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,[ _update your contact information_](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=12617440&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjI0MDk0MDIwNAS2&spReportId=MjI0MDk0MDIwNAS2) _._ [_Click here to unsubscribe_](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=12617440&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjI0MDk0MDIwNAS2&spReportId=MjI0MDk0MDIwNAS2) from our supporter list. [_Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here_](mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=) , or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.
**740 15th St NW, Suite 700**
**Washington, DC 20005**
**202-785-8683**
---
| | | [ DONATE ](https://links.messages.lcv.)
---
|
* * *
---

name: Lateefah Simon
subject: What Juneteenth Means to Me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah Simon for Congress
body:
https://www.lateefahsimon.com/ [https://www.lateefahsimon.com/] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-mike-schlossberg-1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-mike-schlossberg-1] [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-website]
Hi Friend,

Juneteenth is a powerful reminder of a moment in history when the promise of freedom finally reached those who had been enslaved—when Union soldiers arrived in Texas on June 19, 1865, to announce that slavery was over.

But even as we honor that moment, I’m reminded that true freedom goes beyond a single day or declaration. The fight for justice, equality, and real liberation continues today. At a time when attacks on basic civil rights increase – our work to protect basic rights and our work to dismantle systemic inequalities is far from over.

Juneteenth is more than a historical milestone; it’s a call to action, a rallying cry. It reminds us that while slavery was formally abolished with the ratification of the 13th Amendment later that year, the struggle for true justice—freedom from oppression and inequality—persists today.

In my journey—from grassroots organizing to serving as the Executive Director of the Lawyers' Committee for Civil Rights of the San Francisco Bay Area to serving in Congress—I’ve seen the power of community-driven change. I believe that by standing together, we can dismantle the barriers that hinder progress and create a society where everyone has the opportunity to thrive.

Let’s honor Juneteenth by committing ourselves to the work ahead. Together, we can transform reflection into action and build a more just and inclusive world.

In solidarity,
Lateefah Simon

clean_body: [] [] [] Hi Friend, Juneteenth is a powerful reminder of a moment in history when the promise of freedom finally reached those who had been enslaved—when Union soldiers arrived in Texas on June 19, 1865, to announce that slavery was over. But even as we honor that moment, I’m reminded that true freedom goes beyond a single day or declaration. The fight for justice, equality, and real liberation continues today. At a time when attacks on basic civil rights increase – our work to protect basic rights and our work to dismantle systemic inequalities is far from over. Juneteenth is more than a historical milestone; it’s a call to action, a rallying cry. It reminds us that while slavery was formally abolished with the ratification of the 13th Amendment later that year, the struggle for true justice—freedom from oppression and inequality—persists today. In my journey—from grassroots organizing to serving as the Executive Director of the Lawyers' Committee for Civil Rights of the San Francisco Bay Area to serving in Congress—I’ve seen the power of community-driven change. I believe that by standing together, we can dismantle the barriers that hinder progress and create a society where everyone has the opportunity to thrive. Let’s honor Juneteenth by committing ourselves to the work ahead. Together, we can transform reflection into action and build a more just and inclusive world. In solidarity, Lateefah Simon [] [] [] Lateefah Simon for Congress 1714 Franklin St #100 - 438 Oakland, CA 94612 info@LateefahSimon.com [info@lateefahsimon.com] [ Simon has spent her career fighting for justice—fighting for folks without a voice. Now, as a 25-year veteran organizer and nationally recognized advocate for civil rights and social justice, she’s fighting this fight from the Capitol. In Lateefah, CA-12 has a proven champion. To learn more about Lateefah, visit: LateefahSimon.com Emails like this are the most effective way to grow our campaign and reach supporters like you. If you no longer wish to receive these messages, click here to unsubscribe: . Paid for by Lateefah Simon for Congress

subject: Trump’s crackdown continues — Marines now on U.S. streets
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-fightback?refcode=061225_2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-fightback?refcode=061225_2]
Peter,
We are watching a real-time authoritarian takeover unfold in Los Angeles — and every moment we fail to act is a moment Trump tightens his grip.
Here’s what’s happening:
🔴 Trump ordered 700 U.S. Marines into L.A. — in addition to 4,000 National Guard troops already deployed
🔴 Peaceful protesters were met with curfews, batons, tear gas, and mass arrests
🔴 Neither Governor Newsom nor Mayor Bass approved the escalation
🔴 And now — Trump is calling for Newsom’s ARREST for speaking out
This isn’t leadership.
This is dictatorship.
And if we don’t organize and fund resistance right now, we risk normalizing the worst abuses of power we’ve seen in generations.
We’re building a war chest to support Democrats at the state and local level who are directly confronting this dangerous power grab — but we can’t do it without you. name: Board President David Canepa
subject: There’s More Work Ahead — Join Me in What’s Next
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, ID# 1399463**
body:
| | | | [ ](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=9ede683d53&e=c0babbc643)
---
| | | Dear Friend, I hope this note finds you well, and that your summer is off to a great start! As I reflect on my work serving San Mateo County, I am grateful for your continued support in helping me achieve so much for our community. Together, we’ve worked to address critical priorities like public safety, housing affordability, the environment, enhancing children, and saving family services. ** [David Canepa — Donate via ActBlue](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=dc15f3cd32&e=c0babbc643)** While my current role has allowed me to make a meaningful impact, I know there is still more work to be done. As I look toward the future and the opportunities ahead, I would love to have your continued support. Your encouragement, ideas, and generosity have always been invaluable, and they will continue to help create a better future. ** [David Canepa — Donate via ActBlue](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=b6c516ba2e&e=c0babbc643)**

I am eager to hear what’s most important to you as we continue working to make San Mateo County a place we are all proud to call home.

In friendship,

David Canepa
Board President, San Mateo County

Together, we’ve worked to address critical priorities like public safety, housing affordability, the environment, enhancing children, and saving family services. While my current role has allowed me to make a meaningful impact, I know there is still more work to be done. As I look toward the future and the opportunities ahead, I would love to have your continued support. Your encouragement, ideas, and generosity have always been invaluable, and they will continue to help create a better future. I am eager to hear what’s most important to you as we continue working to make San Mateo County a place we are all proud to call home. In friendship, David Canepa Board President, San Mateo County Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, ID# 1399463 | | | | | Copyright © 2025 Supervisor David Canepa, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: 20 PARK ROAD, SUITE E BURLINGAME, CA 94010-4443 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: Matthew Frohlich, WAGOP Executive Director
subject: Please Support WAGOP State Senate Candidates Chad Magendanz and Michelle Caldier
body:
Please Support WAGOP State Senate Candidates Chad Magendanz and Michelle Caldier (06.19.25) | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/wsrp/please-support-wagops-election-integrity-efforts-2699170?e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| | **Please Support WAGOP Candidates
Chad Magendanz (LD 5) and Michelle Caldier (LD 26) for State Senate**
**Bellevue** —Please turn out to support WAGOP candidates for state senate Chad Magendanz (LD 5) and Michelle Caldier (LD 26) at two separate, but equally notable events, ahead of the August Primary.

**On Saturday, June 21** , volunteers are asked to arrive at Summit Park in Redmond, WA, at 11 a.m. to support [Chad Magendanz](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=b15edcbbd1&e=6a281f566d) in his bid for WA State Senate to represent LD 5. [Please see flyer](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=2e785c40e0&e=6a281f566d).

**Next, Friday, June 27** , supporters are invited to attend a fundraising reception for [Michelle Caldier](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=d6546205f8&e=6a281f566d), who is running to clinch the WA State Senate seat representing LD 26. [Please see event flyer](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=ed1a145e08&e=6a281f566d).

Both WA State Senate seats are critical to ending the Democrats’ supermajority in Olympia.

Hope to see you there. Thank you.

Best,

WAGOP Executive Director
Matthew Frohlich

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: A verse-by-verse explanation of Revelation
body:
Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return?

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zoa37rnij56gehco0l60d7v3tn11u2icaihftoog_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5i6cor2c3h2bs)
---
Hello Friend,Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return?_When we all get to Heaven, what a day of rejoicing that will be!__When we all see Jesus, we’ll sing and shout the victory!_ The words of this old hymn say it perfectly ... Christ’s return is going to be glorious!**But between now and then, how should we live**? What does God’s Word say about end times? As the world grows increasingly sinful ... **what should our response be?**
---
| | When I have those kinds of questions, I turn to the book of Revelation, which I’ve found helps provide answers and strength in these dark days.And today, I’m pleased to offer you my verse-by-verse study of the book of Revelation entitled _Final Conquest._ Final Conquest is my first commentary on the book of Revelation. It’s all about the return of Jesus Christ, the most hope-filled event in human history.This book will help you face the future with confidence! God doesn’t want you to live in fear. Final Conquest will unpack God’s plan as never before — you’ll be encouraged!
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zec9c1tusi37co7pbmb3s87920le687nierh1d58_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5i6cor2c3h2bs)
---
| | With your generous donation to _Pathway to Victory_ \-- to help keep our ministry strong, for you and your family, and for listeners and viewers across the country--I will send you a copy of _Final Conquest_ for free!You can make your most generous donation here: [https://secure.ptv.org/final-conquest-generous-gift-kit-1](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zltt5b74ru8oa2c29oeadrcsr4a6vcd67mv06i8o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5i6cor2c3h2bs)One day soon the darkness will pass...and our long-awaited King of kings and Lord of lords will return and make His final conquest.Until that moment, we are focusing our hope on Christ and working together to proclaim the gospel and expand His coming kingdom.Sincerely, Dr. Robert JeffressSenior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

---

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: Now Available: “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer”
body:
I am excited to announce that Hillsdale’s online teaching series, “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,” is now available to own as a DVD box set.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvhqvku88lfpbl2nlqaqp6jgh4fd0mml10kfq400_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5i6cor6cth2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zquo12nifj1oh8ebmqft4o440usv2mer6sjks408_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5i6cor6cth2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0u4q4ljh6lkikat9o6nksuci1vqvs8f11ch19d0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5i6cor6cth2bs) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt7p6e5mvmnjls3hbfej4s6s57lrcl9sn7il98dg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5i6cor6cth2bs)

I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support.

Warm Regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

---

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: A verse-by-verse explanation of Revelation
body:
Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return?

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5a8ik0n10rrnkpseik03c8j658aij5qhp5cpr10_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5i62pb2c9h2bs)
---
Hello Friend,Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return?_When we all get to Heaven, what a day of rejoicing that will be!__When we all see Jesus, we’ll sing and shout the victory!_ The words of this old hymn say it perfectly ... Christ’s return is going to be glorious!**But between now and then, how should we live**? What does God’s Word say about end times? As the world grows increasingly sinful ... **what should our response be?**
---
| | When I have those kinds of questions, I turn to the book of Revelation, which I’ve found helps provide answers and strength in these dark days.And today, I’m pleased to offer you my verse-by-verse study of the book of Revelation entitled _Final Conquest._ Final Conquest is my first commentary on the book of Revelation. It’s all about the return of Jesus Christ, the most hope-filled event in human history.This book will help you face the future with confidence! God doesn’t want you to live in fear. Final Conquest will unpack God’s plan as never before — you’ll be encouraged!
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdstiotgrn8plb432tiumjges8v5ns43jl5k0uj0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5i62pb2c9h2bs)
---
| | With your generous donation to _Pathway to Victory_ \-- to help keep our ministry strong, for you and your family, and for listeners and viewers across the country--I will send you a copy of _Final Conquest_ for free!You can make your most generous donation here: [https://secure.ptv.org/final-conquest-generous-gift-kit-1](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z43i2m1bg7ksp7kjhqq0vnkicdbil1pep4n80n4o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5i62pb2c9h2bs)One day soon the darkness will pass...and our long-awaited King of kings and Lord of lords will return and make His final conquest.Until that moment, we are focusing our hope on Christ and working together to proclaim the gospel and expand His coming kingdom.Sincerely, Dr. Robert JeffressSenior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

Pop Acta Media | 1600 Daily
---

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I’m now forced to say it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
........................

........................
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zrj62p449sir5nfonufvr2htqqv4jpjv3rn790lg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5i6eoj6chh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
All of my life, those closest to me – and even those who only knew me from politics – have known me to be a _helper_.
---
I helped take down the mob in New York...
---
I helped unify our city and our country as America’s mayor after tragedy struck on September 11th...
---
I helped keep our streets and our citizens safe... **
---
And I helped successfully defend President Trump from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable.
---
Those were the headlines that defined me to so many Americans like _YOU_.
---
But over the last year, I’ve instead woken up in the mornings to headlines like these:
---

**_“Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...”_**
_[MSNBC]_

**_“Giuliani bankruptcy case dismissed, opening door to creditors pursuing collection”_**
_[CNBC]_

**_“Giuliani Disbarred from the Practice of Law in New York” _**
_[New York Times]_

---
**And sadly, as I stare down the Democrats’ _FINAL_ sham indictment against me, I am now the one forced to ask _you_ to help _me_. **
---
That’s truly something I NEVER wanted to have to say, Friend...
---
_Asking for help as opposed to offering it unsettles me to my core._
---
But I hope you understand that you truly are my FINAL HOPE.
---
_**Right now in Arizona, the Democrat Attorney General is seeking to use a _state-level_ charge that President Trump cannot pardon in order to throw me in prison until I’m 100 years old!** _
---
My crime? Refusing to forsake the TRUTH and standing by the side of my dear friend and our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump.
---
_And the punishment the Left wants in return? My personal, professional, and financial ruin along with me taking my last breath in a prison cell!_
---
Make no mistake, if we can’t beat this sham case here and now, if we fail to secure true justice and my ultimate vindication, then this scheme of the Left’s can be used against every last red-blooded patriot as the Deep State’s bulletproof measure to TAKE DOWN their political enemies.
---
And the _ONLY_ way to defeat a regime like the Deep State is to **NEVER,_EVER_ SURRENDER** to it.
---
_...Just ask President Trump!_
---
The Democrats unjustly filed my MUGSHOT under **booking # 2313757.**
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zihkoq1ltt5sk40hm60k509cn4gsqpavt637voa0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5i6eoj6chh2bs)
__
---
_So, to show these left-wing crooks that good and honest Americans like _YOU_ will also never surrender as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise **$231,375.70** for my Legal Defense Trust to win this last fight for my freedom and justice. _
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me WIN the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice against the Deep State as they attempt to JAIL me for the rest of my life in Arizona.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zt6oat1ppc20f328nf7kn7dvt87tiesmcbieufa8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5i6eoj6chh2bs)

body:
I’ve been in some really rough situations in the past, but this could be the hardest mountain I’ll have to climb

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z71kvt6ep26ov1to869sn9d2d0poj3n9dd4o9498_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5i6eoj6chh2bs)
---
Friend - I've been in some really rough situations in the past, but this could be the hardest mountain I'll have to climb...

My Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was _**RAKING IN**_ hundreds of thousands of dollars while I was barred from accepting any campaign donations during Virginia's legislative session! I'm not kidding - __**a Soros-backed group even dropped $500K on my head all in one shot, Friend!**__

**This is a _BAD_ situation that will spiral out of control if folks like you don't step up to the plate! I am coming to you with a heartfelt plea; [please send in any amount you can to help me and my team close the fundraising gap:](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbgnmqmjrrkmtl6b61vu94lql7slas7dqqqeb80g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5i6eoj6chh2bs)**

If you can't afford to send in even just $17, I'll understand. That's right - **all I 'm asking is that you send in $17 or more to help me catch up with my Democrat opponent's _LUDICROUS_ fundraising numbers! [CHIP IN NOW >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhijpbsqhtbkni69iqmi2n72n3397rqk5vj1f590_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5i6eoj6chh2bs)**

[ DONATE $17 OR MORE RIGHT NOW >> ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4q38s19ltjemnbvhm578mgsifac783acsnnne08_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5i6eoj6chh2bs)

[ HELP WINSOME CATCH UP WITH HER DEMOCRAT OPPONENT >> ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2futm1jo2vf6nlga5el3ma6b3lvjb8rj1gucre8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5i6eoj6chh2bs)
---
Look, this race is **TIED**. There's _ONLY_ one thing holding me and my team back from winning right now; _my liberal opponent's crazy cash advantage. _

[**I know we can close the gap and win this race together, but we need to get to work RIGHT NOW!**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgt7aoq268hhf4frokgr8gpe5sqotm99f129i11o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5i6eoj6chh2bs)

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: A verse-by-verse explanation of Revelation
body:
Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return?

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh9smjn1iad6g670ceh1q3kea6hdg20fo9ah93kg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5i61p32clh2bs)
---
Hello Friend,Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return?_When we all get to Heaven, what a day of rejoicing that will be!__When we all see Jesus, we’ll sing and shout the victory!_ The words of this old hymn say it perfectly ... Christ’s return is going to be glorious!**But between now and then, how should we live**? What does God’s Word say about end times? As the world grows increasingly sinful ... **what should our response be?**
---
| | When I have those kinds of questions, I turn to the book of Revelation, which I’ve found helps provide answers and strength in these dark days.And today, I’m pleased to offer you my verse-by-verse study of the book of Revelation entitled _Final Conquest._ Final Conquest is my first commentary on the book of Revelation. It’s all about the return of Jesus Christ, the most hope-filled event in human history.This book will help you face the future with confidence! God doesn’t want you to live in fear. Final Conquest will unpack God’s plan as never before — you’ll be encouraged!
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu27kk72fgfo6ddi50biaaosv1plnoaa15kh9r6g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5i61p32clh2bs)
---
| | With your generous donation to _Pathway to Victory_ \-- to help keep our ministry strong, for you and your family, and for listeners and viewers across the country--I will send you a copy of _Final Conquest_ for free!You can make your most generous donation here: [https://secure.ptv.org/final-conquest-generous-gift-kit-1](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfgmqubke8rhg2dbf106e12kup545u3v4jfcdpv8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5i61p32clh2bs)One day soon the darkness will pass...and our long-awaited King of kings and Lord of lords will return and make His final conquest.Until that moment, we are focusing our hope on Christ and working together to proclaim the gospel and expand His coming kingdom.Sincerely, Dr. Robert JeffressSenior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

The United States created [over 1,000 new millionaires every single day in 2024](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD-P4yAUxD8N7rCeH9jBBcU17nLtlRZ_nmNOGCIgsfLtV95q--1GGs2MfvPvvt5NiCE9_pqDdNvymuiskVqjsh4htZAeR4gx5GRCoVpfqVJbEXDkMHGE1ZsQP6vsvN6IkERHeriNIAeh1NztehQwwqycdNaPYhPWSkub8V6oWanZdkFfbTAhDABSTj1Ji4MbjRi9UDcHTAL50HLp_-eQ2k5b_OQ3ld7lo4t6b-1ZmfjDcGG4nOfZO1svistnuFyS4TIAAE908p843BUyjTwn43buzYcjoOQvW3mhZy6N4dIV7Z_nFarTjUl4HCbE7-32q8PeGr8CAAD__-jqgAY)—379,000 people who crossed the seven-figure threshold, accounting for more than half of all new millionaires created globally.

# Friday, June 20, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1975, Steven Spielberg's film _Jaws_ was released, transforming the summer movie business and making countless viewers afraid to go into the water. [See the film trailer here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFuwyAUgOHT4C3W8wNjZ2CoVHlom6pVh1RdLGIeMRGGCHAi375Kr9ALfNL_Hw_jQTvvwvldL6SKjWOge_ZUCqVxcaG4cF6c9y4G7RLlvIZMZUTAdgdyhzAa7fw2isooS4TEK1JN14JoeN_vq1k1opdc2qnT3HRwko0EY9DavQGDfY-VUw8NJEIDIISsSZywmVrNW8P7bgImgIwrMdWX6EKZyfot3ijVU1wqr-ZSrpnxJ4YDw2GLa1nrEzEcjq_rz8vl4-vt-5PxwZIuayLGn_OsE5kqKXO9P9Ky7JiA86Kd_yPLvz7cFP4GAAD__yO9cUg). Today marks the summer solstice—the longest day of the year in the Northern Hemisphere. To celebrate, [Stonehenge is livestreaming](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L3unDAQBPCnMR3IrG3gChdp6C5tSmTMAhv542TvHbq3j8gr_PufZjTz57k8HQVKx28X0fKel4RXDciMZYmUmNIRKQTKyVHBWt-pIi8gwbRyaEEum6PwXXSz2R0RUDVo-9FI3atpejSnHTUovT7WdZW7ekwGcVBq6r3ZRqMmgIbsnSYHkL2UWg8d6hV6b5wym5pGL4WWuBHn0v3NlPjEPXzzB0vnc2yCPZlfVahfAmYB83VdnT9dCZkZ8639ie51WwFzfceIpa05VCaPbeWc8MR0oIC5KXZ7XffYOoxCyyM6Cv9L-EfPfCz8CwAA__8N8Hlj) both sunset and sunrise, as we report below. **Big news,_Flyover_ Fans! **The very first podcast episode of the _[Feel Good Flyover](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAYhJ8Gb7bgBwMeGLp4S9eOFjG_47_CYBmSKG9fuaqUB-h6d_pOd1-X6eIpUrp9-g1dXfKU8Fki1orHtFGqlG4bxUg5eTqwlHsqWCfg0Ldct8Cn4Cm-JtUEtyACygadMD1XQlo7NKszV-GDMaYXBjH44ToYu8iZm0FbbXrbkDtpXAMXnCulO1RXEHPvZR-kNTNnimOgmo_uO1OqKy7xlR94dHPemujWWvfC5AeDkcG45zD7Ukvn9z3iGWEw3svbYTDWFds_RvtWKQgrOEgYtGgOF_bnubtowxS_bZ7ib1_910kPBz8BAAD__1qxer4)_ is here! Hosted by the wonderful Amy Hess, this brand-new weekly episode delivers heartwarming, uplifting stories from around the globe, because we could all use [a little more good in our newsfeed.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAYhJ8Gb7bgBwMeGLp4S9eOFjG_47_CYBmSKG9fuaqUB-h6d_pOd1-X6eIpUrp9-g1dXfKU8Fki1orHtFGqlG4bxUg5eTqwlHsqWCfg0Ldct8Cn4Cm-JtUEtyACygadMD1XQlo7NKszV-GDMaYXBjH44ToYu8iZm0FbbXrbkDtpXAMXnCulO1RXEHPvZR-kNTNnimOgmo_uO1OqKy7xlR94dHPemujWWvfC5AeDkcG45zD7Ukvn9z3iGWEw3svbYTDWFds_RvtWKQgrOEgYtGgOF_bnubtowxS_bZ7ib1_910kPBz8BAAD__1qxer4) Join Amy every Friday as she brings you positive headlines and a fresh dose of feel-good news! It's live now—[click here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAYhJ8Gb7bgBwMeGLp4S9eOFjG_47_CYBmSKG9fuaqUB-h6d_pOd1-X6eIpUrp9-g1dXfKU8Fki1orHtFGqlG4bxUg5eTqwlHsqWCfg0Ldct8Cn4Cm-JtUEtyACygadMD1XQlo7NKszV-GDMaYXBjH44ToYu8iZm0FbbXrbkDtpXAMXnCulO1RXEHPvZR-kNTNnimOgmo_uO1OqKy7xlR94dHPemujWWvfC5AeDkcG45zD7Ukvn9z3iGWEw3svbYTDWFds_RvtWKQgrOEgYtGgOF_bnubtowxS_bZ7ib1_910kPBz8BAAD__1qxer4) to listen or watch or go to the _Flyover Podcast_ wherever you get your podcasts. ## Trump to Decide on Iran Strike Within Two Weeks
President Trump [will decide within two weeks](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OozAURp_GdETGPxgKF9vQZdstkbEv4e74J7JvgvL2I-YVpv4-Hemcf_f17jBifvx1CSztZc1wtghEUNeEmTA_EsaIJTus0NorN6BVcKF7PvaCr8Fh_KyqC3YHECA7sIPRXA1ymubusMZI57lxMO9Gm2EeJz_qXfFtm_zmg-rQXjQ-Cj5wrtR4A7WJwWsndZCT8ZwpDgGp1Nv_gpkO2OOnvKHefEldtAfRszH5h4mFiYUOODDGa2NiOUqCS4iJxYWEGRtVR1gyE4uWetbG9FRf6dljdbmns_QnwNf176oNz_NSb6Nhij-Swx9sR7_q9LbiOwAA__-Gin0g) whether the U.S. will join Israel’s military campaign against Iran, according to a statement delivered Thursday by press secretary Karoline Leavitt. Meanwhile, an Iranian [missile struck a hospital in Israel](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuhDAQRL_GdEZmMeaucJGG7tKmRAteH5sY-2Q7h-7vI5JPSDeakWb05uM235ADx_s77mSrT3OkowSqlfK8c6wc7zuHwCkiZyrlOxaqMygYpDIS1OyQw2vWjbOeCKhvyHbjoHTXXy7XZrPe4WgItF-M9uOVwIFB1V-dW71ftGnYnm3KgOqU0tq0pBfo1gH7wfWXcVVCK3JcU24_E8e6kQ-v9KTcrmlvgt1qfRTRvwmYBEzHcbTrUk6KMxcwnVLAxCUjBckZozwwyy2VB1f8cxij3LkUDiRLyukLBUxNtu5xnPDFjEKr-44cfkfrv556WvgJAAD__8jnf-U) on Thursday, causing significant damage and injuring at least 71 people, most with minor wounds. Israeli officials condemned the attack as a war crime. A hacker group believed to be aligned with Israel says it [seized $90 million from Iran’s largest cryptocurrency exchange](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOrCAUxvGnwY4JHkGdguI2dnPbLQ3CQc8uggFmZn37jfsKW3_JL1_-H4_5YShQXP-bHXX1aY74LgFrxTzvFCvFdacQKEVDGUt5xoJ1BgGKi56DmJ2hcM6ycdojAnYN6nZQQrbdON6bTY9uMbC4QSkJflkUCguLV523Qyec9w3pSxM9iFYIKfsbygVaq0ynXDcOVjAp0FFN-faZKNYNfTjTC_PNpr0Jeqv1KKz7x2BiMMXzSKVeE4PpghlMomcwtSODaXkWilgKg-nIiVPJBgPfjP3CXHipaAK_i537nHZO2UQykdt8HjVx_LabiSvyjEfK9TKarN3xvvKUfmBSrLuh8Hur_qnlS8NPAAAA___YY4m2), claiming the platform was being used to help the Iranian regime evade Western sanctions. Meanwhile, German Chancellor Friedrich Merz backed Israel’s offensive, calling it “[the dirty work” the world needs done](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL_u2yAURp8GbzfCQAwZGLp4-3XtaBFzsW_LnwhILPfpK7eP0P18n47Oj6_ly1GkvH13CW0PZcl4tIi9Y10S5U55SxQjleyoYmvv3LAvgos78AkEX7yjeC5q8DYgCpQD2lHfuRqlMY9htw8ntTFaaoejDMasD8GV4Ubj5J9BrwPZ641Pgo-cKzXdUD3FuN6dvHtp9MqZ4uipl3r7WSj3HUM8ywfrbS1piHbv_dWY_MbEzMR8HMetU8JWArXqMF4UE3OkDz5j2RbMvZ5MzBvW5PLZIGH9Dc2dDf4NgBr4QnmDviN4qv2Eo9RfEEoFFyOUAO8GzxPW8s4d64VSdZmJeajWv46rV5s0U3xLjv4aDP2_4n6s-BMAAP__mU6SVw).
## America Minting 1,000 New Millionaires a Day
The United States created [over 1,000 new millionaires every single day in 2024](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD-P4yAUxD8N7rCeH9jBBcU17nLtlRZ_nmNOGCIgsfLtV95q--1GGs2MfvPvvt5NiCE9_pqDdNvymuiskVqjsh4htZAeR4gx5GRCoVpfqVJbEXDkMHGE1ZsQP6vsvN6IkERHeriNIAeh1NztehQwwqycdNaPYhPWSkub8V6oWanZdkFfbTAhDABSTj1Ji4MbjRi9UDcHTAL50HLp_-eQ2k5b_OQ3ld7lo4t6b-1ZmfjDcGG4nOfZO1svistnuFyS4TIAAE908p843BUyjTwn43buzYcjoOQvW3mhZy6N4dIV7Z_nFarTjUl4HCbE7-32q8PeGr8CAAD__-jqgAY)—379,000 people who crossed the seven-figure threshold, accounting for more than half of all new millionaires created globally. This wealth explosion, driven by the [S&P 500's 25% gain and Nasdaq's 30% leap](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuhDAQRL_GdKBlMT5TuEhDd2lTIoMX2MiYE947dH8fkSp96jd6o5mv-3D3HDktn34jJ_M-JDpzJBE6ho2TcFo2jpH35PmgnJ8pkwwI2JZgSoQheI7vQRfBzURITUGuvrWg68barlgdaG2Mh3lsZz-P0NkR22CNt50HGMEW7C4bGIQarnBFesR6an3ThsbeJlAaKLDsR_W9c5KV5vjeX3RU074V0a0ij6yaD4W9wv48z2pK43RBhf2lVtiDUdjXncL-mVgolFm8UC7_TitP8lHWapUtFocLj_OC2dyUhmXzHH_75F8nvRz-BAAA__8bJ3ry), means that now, "everyday millionaires" with $1 million to $5 million in assets collectively control more wealth than all the world's billionaires combined. While just 15 centibillionaires control $2.4 trillion in assets, [women are positioned to be the biggest winners](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O6yAQhZ_G7ohgjLFTUNwmXW67pYVhbM8KQxYmibJPv_JW6bc8Rzo_-j6u09VRpLT-dztaXvKU8FkjMmOZdkpMad0pRsrJUcFa76kiTyChF9IIkFNwFF-TboNdEAG7Fq0aeqlVN47ndrOAoLSftQnoUWEYtFF4Hj2YBbVD1ZI92qQBqaTU2pxQz6B877o-dOPgZaMlBuJcTp-ZEm-4xFd-YDn5vLfRbsy32nT_Grg0cPn6PuwGLvcq3o-L-V3c5yrWmGcXxRNd5E0UvOXCQo29GkY9KNUWG27PI1TN0Gi57o7i7yT_idPDwk8AAAD__yrBfdY) in the coming "Great Wealth Transfer" of $83 trillion expected to pass between generations over the next 20 years. America now hosts nearly 40% of the world's 60 million millionaires, but the tiny countries of Luxembourg and Switzerland still boast the highest concentrations, where more than one in seven adults is a millionaire.
## List: What Each State Pays in Federal Taxes
Delaware leads the nation in federal tax revenue per person at $24,575 per resident in 2023, followed by Massachusetts at $21,747 and Minnesota at $20,728, [according to a new study](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DuO5CAQgOHT4AwL8_AjINjE2Wy6oVUNZbtWGEZQ7lbfftV7hbnAr1_fn6_tCyhRPn7DhZ73smV8tYTMWLeLMlM-LkqJSgaq2NqdG_KmlXZSjVKrLQKl92a76HdEjaZDP0xO2cHM89KdPrplgHFejArGqcE9IEwL7nEenbPGQEf-U1OjVoNS1o492oceggPjopmnoIRVGIlL7f8Wynzint7libUP5eqSP5m_mzC_hF6FXu8GOwRufamH0CtUppCwCb2-TgqnbAyMTYaSudLjZpR8orxKYwk5yoTQWHKRO0askGTFJ-YbhV676uP362PRxklYdVxA6f8D_wju6fW_AAAA__9UxoRh). Washington D.C. is a major outlier, contributing $54,612 per resident—more than double any state—due to its concentration of high-income earners and government-related economic activity. West Virginia, Mississippi and New Mexico paid the least per capita, each contributing under $6,000 per person. [See your state's ranking here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1uhDAUBODTmM7IGAO7hYs0dJs2JfLPY_dFxrbsB2RvH5ErpJhuNCN9X4_lYTBgfH6aDTStaYlw1gBEUJYNI2F8bhgCpmiwQK17rECLFHLgYuRSLN5geC-q8XoFkNA3oLtpEKrrb7d789J26m0_jmCdHAbfuWn0Vq0TOOXtHdTUoL7WxChFJ4RSYwvKys4Nph98f5ucYEqAR0ql_U4Y6QVreKcDSuvS1gT9IsqV9R9MzkzO53m2B9bdBGcykglY6SoyObvM5LyZnMHznVe-godiAifzwwscEHfgGcqVmiK3b17JEDA5N0X7fF4MdZyYEs_NYPi7p3-ZHVr-BgAA__-jAoMv).

America Minting 1,000 New Millionaires a Day The United States created —379,000 people who crossed the seven-figure threshold, accounting for more than half of all new millionaires created globally. This wealth explosion, driven by the , means that now, "everyday millionaires" with $1 million to $5 million in assets collectively control more wealth than all the world's billionaires combined. While just 15 centibillionaires control $2.4 trillion in assets, in the coming "Great Wealth Transfer" of $83 trillion expected to pass between generations over the next 20 years. America now hosts nearly 40% of the world's 60 million millionaires, but the tiny countries of Luxembourg and Switzerland still boast the highest concentrations, where more than one in seven adults is a millionaire. List: What Each State Pays in Federal Taxes Delaware leads the nation in federal tax revenue per person at $24,575 per resident in 2023, followed by Massachusetts at $21,747 and Minnesota at $20,728, . Washington D.C. is a major outlier, contributing $54,612 per resident—more than double any state—due to its concentration of high-income earners and government-related economic activity. West Virginia, Mississippi and New Mexico paid the least per capita, each contributing under $6,000 per person. . | | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21583/6374453/37884f7bd68e6d9517b4c5a7797020b3445cd532/f9d0eeece03986535bc366d5d8805b1998b0bf48)
---
| | |
---
_June 20th, 2025_
---
| | |
---
| | **NEW Solar-Powered
"King of Coolers"
Never Needs Ice!**
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21583/6374453/37884f7bd68e6d9517b4c5a7797020b3445cd532/f9d0eeece03986535bc366d5d8805b1998b0bf48)
---
**No More Soggy Food!** This revolutionary fridge on wheels keeps your food and drinks ice cold... **But it NEVER needs ice!** It may look like an ordinary cooler, but you've never seen anything like this... Instead of ice, it uses advanced technology to keep all your important food and drinks ice cold. So you'll never have to stop for ice every couple of hours... And you'll never have to dip your hands into soggy food or gross puddles of water. And since you'll never need ice, you'll have all that precious cooler space available for MORE of your favorite food and drinks. **And it's super flexible.** This revolutionary Solar Go-Fridge is **not JUST a cooler – it's a refrigerator, freezer, and deep freezer** all in one! It can work as a fridge for hot dogs and drinks, or as a freezer for ice cream, popsicles and frozen meats... And it can even go down to subzero temperatures! **The Solar Go-Fridge
Charges For FREE With
The Power of the Sun!** Unlike other run-of-the-mill coolers, your Solar Go-Fridge... **Charges for FREE in the Sun!** Yes, you can recharge your Solar Go-Fridge using the FREE power of the sun. After all, we couldn’t call it a "Solar" Go-Fridge if it wasn't solar powered... And that's why... **You get a FREE 40-Watt Solar Panel with your Solar Go-Fridge.**
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21583/6374453/37884f7bd68e6d9517b4c5a7797020b3445cd532/f9d0eeece03986535bc366d5d8805b1998b0bf48)
---
You can use your solar panel to power your Solar Go-Fridge on the go... So you can take it to campsites, sporting events, RV trips, tailgates, backyard BBQs, pool parties and so much more... Or use it to power your critical devices. It's like a mini power cell in its own right. It works with phones, tablets and your other critical electronic devices. Plus, if a tree falls on some power lines and cuts the power to your neighborhood, you don't have to worry about the food in your fridge spoiling. **Look What You Can Fit
In Your Solar Go-Fridge** Your Solar Go-Fridge can take any kind of frozen supplies with you. And when we say _any kind of supplies_ , we mean it. It has a small footprint, but has spacious capacity. **You get 42 quarts of space** for your critical items – that's like 46 cans or bottles of water. And no bulky ice bags!
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21583/6374453/37884f7bd68e6d9517b4c5a7797020b3445cd532/f9d0eeece03986535bc366d5d8805b1998b0bf48)
---
Its compact size and all-terrain wheels make it easy to throw in the trunk. Or to bring with you to tailgates. It's truly small, but mighty. Drinks, hot dogs, medicine and more. It can all fit in your Solar Go-Fridge. **[Limited Time] Get
Exclusive Introductory
Pricing, Plus 11 Bonus
Gifts Worth $388 And
FREE Shipping!** Order now to take advantage of our special introductory pricing, 11 free bonus gifts worth $388, and free shipping. Your exclusive 11 FREE Bonus Gifts package includes:
* **FREE** 40-Watt Solar Panel
* **FREE** 72-Hour Survival Food Kit
* **FREE** Survival Coffee
* **FREE** Survival Cocoa
* **FREE** StarFire Camp Stove
* **FREE** Freedom Flame
* **FREE** Multi-Use Flashlight
* **FREE** Solar Power Digital Report
* **FREE** $25 Certificate
* **FREE** Shipping & Handling
* **FREE** VIP Phone Line

Plus there's an easy payment plan available with no credit check... [**Order Now To Lock In Your
Low Pricing, FREE Bonus
Gifts and FREE Shipping!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21583/6374453/d0e0841b635c100f49c680b4af6c3a1260478456/f9d0eeece03986535bc366d5d8805b1998b0bf48)
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21583/6374453/37884f7bd68e6d9517b4c5a7797020b3445cd532/f9d0eeece03986535bc366d5d8805b1998b0bf48)
---
**But Hurry... Last Time
The Solar Go-Fridge
SOLD OUT In 24 Hours** **There is one catch:** We can't reserve any Solar Go-Fridges or give out any IOUs. You'll need to ACT FAST... Because the last version of the Solar Go-Fridge sold out in 24 hours after only a couple of text messages... And that version couldn't do half the things this NEW model can. So when people find out about this space-age ice chest, there could be a mad rush. **So don't wait...** If you miss out on this special Introductory Pricing, there's nothing we can do. There's only one way to guarantee your Introductory Pricing, FREE gifts and FREE shipping... And that's by clicking the link below to grab your Solar Go-Fridge while they're in stock and ready to ship: [**Order Now To Lock In Your
Low Pricing, FREE Bonus
Gifts and FREE Shipping!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21583/6374453/d0e0841b635c100f49c680b4af6c3a1260478456/f9d0eeece03986535bc366d5d8805b1998b0bf48) So make sure to grab yours now. **I know you'll love it!** Stay safe and have fun out there,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. **Customers Are
Raving About Their
Solar Go-Fridge** **Kristen G.**
"It was super fun to use. We were gone for four nights, and didn't have to get ice at all. Not having to deal with ice the whole time was amazing. I was worried that it wasn't big enough. But it held absolutely everything I was planning to take because I didn't have to put any ice in there. It didn't have to be as big as my regular cooler." **Randy M.**
"You cannot beat it. It is awesome. No running around, looking for drinks. No more opening up your drink and setting it on the tractor and coming back 20 minutes later and it's warm. Everything's cold. Everything's cold all the time. Just a wonderful, wonderful unit. I am a Type 1 diabetic. It's been keeping my insulin cold to the point where I don't worry about my insulin. I know it's good." **Damon H.**
"We all have lots of coolers. But this is a cooler extraordinaire. Not only is it a cooler, it's a fully-functioning refrigerator. It's great for me being a fisherman and an outdoor guy. I can put a bunch of fish in here and set it at freezing temperatures. And when I get home, my fish will stay frozen and I don't need any ice. It's a great tool. It's absolutely a must for campers and fisherman. It looks like a cooler, but it's actually a refrigerator which makes it a really special thing." **Lisa W.**
"You don't have to stop and get ice anymore. That was one thing I hated to do early in the morning when we had to leave to go out of town to play in a baseball tournament. We had to leave at 5 or 6 or sometimes 4:30 in the morning and had to stop to get ice for our cooler. So this is nice because you just have to set it on refrigerator mode and you get your cold drinks or whatever you put in your cooler. People are already taking pictures with it, trying to find out more information so they could get their own." **Lou H.**
"Please get one or two of them like I did. They will come in handy next time you have a power failure or going on a trip. I use mine whenever we travel or recently when we had a power failure a few weeks ago. You won't be sorry." [**Order Now To Lock In Your
Low Pricing, FREE Bonus
Gifts and FREE Shipping!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21583/6374453/d0e0841b635c100f49c680b4af6c3a1260478456/f9d0eeece03986535bc366d5d8805b1998b0bf48)

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: Learn economics with Art Laffer
body:
I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer," is now available to own as a DVD box set.

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/63sQ5_M11jP114_BRWqAFA~~/AARclBA~/6jNnPg59okAFTNEmRg9QbX3ITnNfR5XUMb2HFkBtcxtiCgTwATbWf1EXTjYgHfTix5cfZY_zxLFS0cGsJ8zSlzOoiOJPKiToL0MJJdz0-rKL0LxLrGAWWC29m-SVnGUu3tPkkjnh0x-Qj3pOud-Egea-2whneizJin-PElUZGLl_vdLb0UD_lz4FqhGS9fYv2aXlWw-dgdB49A9SAdgQKutXlZTsJi9XEpJOcV6zQ5zubdeLmPAYrI1zj5jTNkmG3txdOGkxJCnL4Q_J9RvxqdYtZcl6zQ_NUAMmegJyXVXpBkYh6XfbkW572u-6U79uUKxFlyAV5Gm5tX2kN3MdoXePzOn_C6438RmdwT_QmRc~)
---
| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/63sQ5_M11jP114_BRWqAFA~~/AARclBA~/6jNnPg59okAFTNEmRg9QbX3ITnNfR5XUMb2HFkBtcxtiCgTwATbWf1EXTjYgHfTix5cfZY_zxLFS0cGsJ8zSlzOoiOJPKiToL0MJJdz0-rKL0LxLrGAWWC29m-SVnGUu3tPkkjnh0x-Qj3pOud-Egea-2whneizJin-PElUZGLl_vdLb0UD_lz4FqhGS9fYv2aXlWw-dgdB49A9SAdgQKutXlZTsJi9XEpJOcV6zQ5zubdeLmPAYrI1zj5jTNkmG3txdOGkxJCnL4Q_J9RvxqdYtZcl6zQ_NUAMmegJyXVXpBkYh6XfbkW572u-6U79uUKxFlyAV5Gm5tX2kN3MdoXePzOn_C6438RmdwT_QmRc~) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/63sQ5_M11jP114_BRWqAFA~~/AARclBA~/6jNnPg59okAFTNEmRg9QbX3ITnNfR5XUMb2HFkBtcxtiCgTwATbWf1EXTjYgHfTix5cfZY_zxLFS0cGsJ8zSlzOoiOJPKiToL0MJJdz0-rKL0LxLrGAWWC29m-SVnGUu3tPkkjnh0x-Qj3pOud-Egea-2whneizJin-PElUZGLl_vdLb0UD_lz4FqhGS9fYv2aXlWw-dgdB49A9SAdgQKutXlZTsJi9XEpJOcV6zQ5zubdeLmPAYrI1zj5jTNkmG3txdOGkxJCnL4Q_J9RvxqdYtZcl6zQ_NUAMmegJyXVXpBkYh6XfbkW572u-6U79uUKxFlyAV5Gm5tX2kN3MdoXePzOn_C6438RmdwT_QmRc~) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/63sQ5_M11jP114_BRWqAFA~~/AARclBA~/6jNnPg59okAFTNEmRg9QbX3ITnNfR5XUMb2HFkBtcxtiCgTwATbWf1EXTjYgHfTix5cfZY_zxLFS0cGsJ8zSlzOoiOJPKiToL0MJJdz0-rKL0LxLrGAWWC29m-SVnGUu3tPkkjnh0x-Qj3pOud-Egea-2whneizJin-PElUZGLl_vdLb0UD_lz4FqhGS9fYv2aXlWw-dgdB49A9SAdgQKutXlZTsJi9XEpJOcV6zQ5zubdeLmPAYrI1zj5jTNkmG3txdOGkxJCnL4Q_J9RvxqdYtZcl6zQ_NUAMmegJyXVXpBkYh6XfbkW572u-6U79uUKxFlyAV5Gm5tX2kN3MdoXePzOn_C6438RmdwT_QmRc~)

I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support.

Warm Regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pop Acta Media | Conservative Broadcast
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: The Maine Wire
subject: Maine Pledges Real Probe into Death Of Police Pup in a Cop Car – Meanwhile, Dog Owners Beware the Heat
body:
Here's the latest breaking news at The Maine Wire

** Maine Pledges Real Probe into Death Of Police Pup in a Cop Car – Meanwhile, Dog Owners Beware the Heat (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=f89b006b93&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Ted Cohen on Jun 19, 2025 04:47 pm
Maine’s top police spokeswoman promised Thursday that an investigation into the death of a chocolate-lab police pup will not be just a whitewash. “Yes, this is a legitimate investigation,” Shannon Moss, spokeswoman for the Maine Department of Public Safety, told The Maine Wire in response to questions about how seriously authorities with conduct the probe. [...]

The post Maine Pledges Real Probe into Death Of Police Pup in a Cop Car – Meanwhile, Dog Owners Beware the Heat (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=2ded17da65&e=f093fa355c) appeared first on The Maine Wire (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=692fa04727&e=f093fa355c) .
Read the full story » (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=94e5b1d0f7&e=f093fa355c)

** Maine Cities and Towns Will Not Be Allowed to Collect an Extra Tax on Temporary Rental Accommodations (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=6f187d4ed5&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Libby Palanza on Jun 19, 2025 04:42 pm
Both the House and Senate have failed to adopt a measure that would have authorized cities and towns throughout Maine to collect up to a two percent local option sales tax on temporary rental accommodations. Sponsored by Rep. Gary Friedmann (D-Bar Harbor), LD 746 would have allowed municipalities to generate revenue from this tax and [...]

The post Maine Cities and Towns Will Not Be Allowed to Collect an Extra Tax on Temporary Rental Accommodations (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=9f155ccc47&e=f093fa355c) appeared first on The Maine Wire (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=e4eacbb103&e=f093fa355c) .
Read the full story » (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=1ff464884d&e=f093fa355c)

** Biddeford Big Shots Convicted on Drug Trafficking and Firearms Charges Following Violent Robbery (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=0098ad600c&e=f093fa355c)

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: I’m getting primaried by RINOs
body:
[https://secure.winred.com/marjorie-taylor-greene-s-people-over-politicians-c/mtg_don_wmb_er_mg-prim_rs_20250620?recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]

The RINOs, Neocons, and Never Trumpers in Washington, D.C. hate me
because I have the courage to call for peace and refuse to take their
dirty money. _They are fake people_,_ they are liars_,_ and they hate
you and me_.

WHICH IS EXACTLY WHY THEY ARE ACTIVELY FUNDING A PRIMARY OPPONENT
AGAINST ME
[https://secure.winred.com/marjorie-taylor-greene-s-people-over-politicians-c/mtg_don_wmb_er_mg-prim_rs_20250620?recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active].

They are trying to take over our America First MAGA movement and usher
in a new era of warmongers in Congress. In their minds, President
Trump is a speed bump in history, and the Republican Party will return
to the party of Neocons and forever wars.

DONATE NOW
[https://secure.winred.com/marjorie-taylor-greene-s-people-over-politicians-c/mtg_don_wmb_er_mg-prim_rs_20250620?recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]

I’ve been fighting against these evil people since the day I first
announced for Congress, and I’m still fighting them today.

They are slandering me as an anti-Semite because I don’t want to go
to war with Iran, and nothing could be farther from the truth.

I SUPPORT ISRAEL.

_I DON’T SUPPORT THE SECULAR ISRAELI GOVERNMENT TRYING TO DRAG
AMERICA INTO ANOTHER ENDLESS FOREIGN WAR._

Being America First isn’t anti-semitic, and I refuse to be branded
as a hateful person for standing up for my country and my Christian
faith which teaches me “thou shall not murder”.

I HAVE THE COURAGE TO STAND ON MY CONVICTIONS, AND THE RINOS AND
NEOCONS ARE COMING AFTER ME BECAUSE I HAVE THE COURAGE TO STAND UP TO
THEM.

Friend, I’m asking you to stand with me at this moment as I face the
biggest political fight of my life.

IF YOU’RE ABLE, PLEASE CONSIDER MAKING A DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT TO
MY PRIMARY CAMPAIGN
[https://secure.winred.com/marjorie-taylor-greene-s-people-over-politicians-c/mtg_don_wmb_er_mg-prim_rs_20250620?recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active].

DONATE NOW
[https://secure.winred.com/marjorie-taylor-greene-s-people-over-politicians-c/mtg_don_wmb_er_mg-prim_rs_20250620?recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]

_In One Nation Under God,_

[https://secure.winred.com/marjorie-taylor-greene-s-people-over-politicians-c/mtg_don_wmb_er_mg-prim_rs_20250620?recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]

MARJORIE TAYLOR GREENE

subject: Learn economics with Art Laffer
body:
I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer," is now available to own as a DVD box set.

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College

A SpaceX Starship rocket exploded in a massive fireball Wednesday night at Starbase during a routine test of its engines.
