## SpaceX Rocket Explodes During Test
A SpaceX rocket exploded in a massive fireball Wednesday night at Starbase during a routine test of its engines. No one was hurt in the explosion, which the company described as a "major anomaly." See the video [here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L-O8jAQBPCncTqi9Tp_Cxd8-kTHtVda63ghFgZH8ULg7U-5V7h2RvppNN9nd6aY4uP6RXe28r5k9-CtJBbh1ZWFJn6vebqx8HtJOXApM_nsELA9QHdAcIFi-rimCtZDGHXFVvctNLo3g6lm22uEsZsC-gDAw6S59ZrpMjZmaKgNVbQ7Bh2C1mAA60DsB2NGRPCj1qQa4BAlr7XM-w4ql_TJL17rKd-rZGeRpShzVHhSeNq2rf7kpzw97_2ekEyzMqeXMv97fdxu_8Q4KdVqw7LFlGLpetXA9U4x_ZLytyNeFn8CAAD__xy9cgc). Locals reported hearing a "huge boom" around 11 p.m. and posted videos of the incident on social media. "_Our whole neighborhood felt it, and all the neighbors went outside to see what had happened because it shook all the houses_ ," said [Brownsville resident Arely Cantu](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDHOnDAQRk9jOtB4DAYKF2noNm1KNMazixWDke0su7eP4Ap_Oxo9vff9ecwP8sHvr9-0sSmfZ5x3PnPgUjjN-aCFPykuf7nw5wjRcc4r2TgjYFeDrhFmRz5857ZyxoIbZcVG9h20sleDqlbj5OgU9NRqq1vQIz-t7mgZtFtGa-VYeXPBQCNICQqwccR2UGpEBDtKSaIFdr7E1JT18qD8DN_45tQscauCWUs5slC_BE4Cp_M8m-2baae9xN3H60ngdFUJnHL8V9b6hgicKBW_BL7ud2l9R2Yf9zoXSpYy1zbFc89vHwLXCGpoO9TNsR5VMu44fQg-61608NrIh9uo_GzHt8H_AQAA___yU4nh). SpaceX conducts a "static fire" test of its Starship megarocket and Super Heavy booster before test flights. Starship's next launch has not been scheduled, but SpaceX has [received FAA approval](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2upDAMhZ8GuiAn4bdIsQ3d3XZLZIgh0WYISnwH5u1Xw2qe4HaWjvX58_nzNX2hD37ffuODDF9rnHY6cyBmSlM-cKErxeUvMV1HiJZydjjHSYFqBLRCwWTRh9dUl9bMYAdZkpFdA7XsdK9LZ7BfZ9VhY2er63nQfdMiDFAPuNKCQ1t684ZBq0BK0KAqizT3Wg9KwTxIiUUNZD3HVLF7e2Bewys-KVVLfJTBOOYjF_pXocZCjed5Vrf3Oy3UeM_itk_IPu6FGgN-74ujLO5wSbjyZ_PKIjOm7PwhPi8Lv4v7rrDfye-bOBId-J-WxRqTkMBOMGUWa_Cb4zIZe5w-BJ_brqhhe6APty7_rOSnUf8CAAD__1p7lnM) for up to 25 a year. In a social media post, SpaceX CEO [Elon Musk joked](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHSoyAUhZ9GOxy4qMSCYpt02XZL5wI3kQ2KA3di8vY7Zh_h78-c73znz22-YUxxe_zGlSy_73ne6KiJmKnMdUdP75L9k5jee8qBal3Q5RkkDEKOAuQcMKbP3LfBOhkm1ZJVZpC9Mvqi28VOzhk9DORpNN55hcprH4IBhzD1QbfRnmVyBKmU1BK6gOQuWk8A0k1KYdNLCpFz6Xg5d2C9p09-Uel8XttkF-a9NvpXA9cGrsdxdKfCQfQ8Aw1c_2sIpsrinuJjYVEZS13iLr5aNeZNrPg3F4FbXnP6iC9HgLwYo6e22LAfMaVYR9P08rFiTF86_-yzl4V_AQAA__8z8IOd) that the explosion was "just a scratch."
## Ken Paxton Updates
Attorney General Ken Paxton has been the subject of several reports this week. Paxton is [challenging John Cornyn](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFugzAYhJ_GbEb2Dxg8eEgHOqVSpo7I4D_BrbER_hOSt6_IK3Q76aS77-77PJytDz7evuyChp7XNETcc0Ai3Ia82gmfW5p-kfC5huQw59mOaQABDReKgxic9eE11IUzo3BaFmhk24hatlVXFbPRXQN6nGrdOt11V62ha5xtVNWoViqlCm-OMKFASCkqAaWzOHZVpQHEqKW0rBboPKWtpPngsPkaXumBWzmlpQhmJlozq04Megb9vu_lkuPhMegx8ntm0B-jGPRrCp78dEiakd_SmvmUFuSU-A_me-ZLWjAST5G_m3jGaAn5Zidk0NuNn07y8xIvH8Vm3Lr7EHxWLavFbbE-vInofz8-DPwFAAD__89sh24) for his seat in the U.S. Senate. On Tuesday, Paxton’s office opened an [investigation into 33 potential noncitizens](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2unTAQBOCngc5H9toHDoWLNHQ3bUrknwVWMTbCK-Dm6SPyCqlHGn0zv76mL0eJ8vLTbWj5nsuU8aoJmfGY6u4C3kcJv5Hx3lOJWOvqfJlAwlvIToCcoqP0PZk2Wi_joFq0qn9Lo3r90e1qPz52wXyC99079PNgjH-rGKJDkIC6b8k-ZbIDqZTUEl7Rof9oPQBIPyjlGiMxEpfjxevjcHVO3-XE4xXK1ia7Mu-10T8aGBsYr-t6zeV-Vjx5A-NeEjGF2sB4YBSVHaNwi6B8YmVaHFNexFYOFLy6LLQUe2HMTC6JXHIgpj-Yq7jWIs7CGAVIMAITBqaS28PG_aKUqHZ9Y-SyOUr_bPx_j54W_gYAAP__F-yOfQ) who allegedly voted in last November’s elections. Texas Secretary of State Jane Nelson shared the list with Paxton after identifying the voters through a federal database. The same day, General Mills announced an agreement to [remove petroleum-based food dyes](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSrCAURL9GM60LCGhA8BKzeemG1hWuI7UoFrCj8_dbzi9s3nW6-3w9pgf64Pfnf9zIlGuJ005nDlQKpSkfaOlK0X5ToesI0VHOK85x4sBlA6rhMDn04T11tTMzuIHVZJiW0DEtelGvRspeWuyWHgdgWjOmFFglBbcK5GJ17c0NA8WBMRDAW4c090IMnMM8MIZVB-R8iakt670D8xLe8UWptXGrg1lLOXIl_lV8rPh4nme7xEvjTy5-vyMVH-9PFR-ftFPC0Gw-hNxgKn7x1mNo3Jty80E3B14l7nUy7jh9CD4rXXXw3NCHT1_5m6WX4b8BAAD__6B4fXQ) from their products within two years. Paxton’s office launched an investigation of the company in May, targeting its marketing claims that products containing such dyes are "healthy." On Wednesday, Paxton’s attorney announced that a 2015 felony securities fraud charge had been dismissed after Paxton [completed a pretrial diversion program](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGO5CAQRU-Ds2pBYdomcLCJs9l0Q6uAchsNbSxgxt23X3muMPGXnv57_z6WD4op7o-_9OSpvda87HzWxK1xWepBnl8l-09u_DpSDlzrRi4vKNGAvAPKJVBM76XvwuRksKrjSQ1G9mrQo-62yWrnvQl-1WEkF7SRNihj9OACrd7ILk4XTN5RKiW1xFsgdqPWFlE6qxSJXnKILZdb264fVNf0zt9cbj4_uzRtrR1V6D8CZ4HzeZ63cyW6RoEzlRZ9YoHz5SVwTtlTEjj_gIBay2XnNzx450IJPnmHg14t71DZf5XYIldYC30F8FQZ_EblwRVCrM9YKweBM44D9Fp5ixrBrANCb-QAlh2DIsLBjNZap7oyheOMKcV6H0QvH0-K6cei_a7994T_AwAA__-G85jO) that required him to perform 100 hours of community service, 15 hours of legal ethics training, and pay restitution to the alleged victims.
## Music Video Shuts Down Dallas Highway
A major bridge in Dallas was partially [shut down Tuesday afternoon](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGu4yAURVeDOyJ4YDCFi2nc_WmntB7wbKMhwTIkTmb1I_8t_PpKV-ecP1_zF6acHutvvNPY3kuZH3TWTK3RMdcdA72PEv5So_eeS6RaN_RlBgE9F4aDmCOm_Jl1F0cvopMdjdL2QkurBtVto9HODYtWodeij1qFMKAanDZBG6Eddmm8zoQBIaVQAm4RyQ9KOQDhnZTItKCYWjlubbs4sC75U1503EK5d3ncWtsrU78YTAym8zxv54J4jQwmPFoKmRhMlxeDKZeAmcH07VH-0Yf7tL7bhnt-rrxuz8ZjOR88Ys5YuT9SXInfnzUF_kqRCq9bKY3BBIPloZcKNCD3xkqujbXcWWs4xl74xbkIRnbHGPcz5ZyqsUyL9Y4pf7O3nxV_jfA_AAD__3ask4w) for country music artist Shaboozey to shoot a music video for his song _Highway_. Local rapper BigXthaPlug was also on scene. The Margaret Hunt Hill Bridge, which connects downtown with West Dallas and spans the Trinity River, was closed to eastbound traffic for the music video, which the city [confirmed was authorized](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHSmzAQBOCngU7M6YRtVFCkofvTpmQO6TCaCImRLj8mT5-xXyH9zs63--tr_qIQQ3r-pJ1Hea15TnzWyCJc5nqQ41fJ7jcLv46YPde60ZJnBLwpuCuE2VOI19y3flzAW93yqB836PXDDKbdRrt69GbQ6J221gL3q7U3vD_ghj0414bxXQZ3BK3BAHaeeBmMsYiwWK2p6YF9kFw62d4Oqmu88jeXzuW9jeMmctTG_GhwanA6z7Pbr0qJkuQU8jvU4MRJuAiFtHOSBicqElzkBqfPoPyXL-UpRqpKCq1rcGqn8qTCorY_SdQWYlRLCf7JCsEMaAfTHdvRltEfZ4gx1Puj6eG5U4gfmfzfn98j_gsAAP__sG2MLQ) through the Office of Special Events. Some commuters stuck in traffic complained about the bridge being shut down during rush hour. "_I 'm sweating right now. It's really hot out here. People were all hot too trying to get home_," [said Jesse Sanchez](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LvOnDAUBOCnMZ2RfcxyKVykcbdpUyJfDmDlgJHtXXbfPiKv8Ncjjb6ZP8_5aSPFY_1td9T1s6T5wKsQ1op5Lqf1-MnJ_8WKn5NSwFI269IMAh5c9BzEHGyk79w1QTsRJtmglsNDdHJQo2o2HeSA2KF0KLsFpPPhEdQ02X5R4IbRN1HfZaIHIaVQAtpg0Y1KTQDCTVJa1gkMsabc1u122LLQN70xtz7tDemt1rMw9YuBYWCu62oP58Ny3TEDc-9hYCh5SwzMbvNqM1a-vY7Kt0jEXY5hRV5O9NESxzcelXtK5ZWRgVFj34sRGJgm63BekSiWfmCdWHcb6b-i_uy7t4Z_AQAA__8cTYQ6). name: Team Sheri Biggs
subject: Introducing Congresswoman Sheri Biggs’ Salute to Liberty - Reserve Your Seat Today!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHERI BIGGS FOR CONGRESS
body:
You're cordially invited to a special evening celebrating the values that make America strong.
---
| | | | | [ ](https://cgnb9.r.ah.d.sendibm5.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsDg0cEbC62mBi3KJrKWON/B5-0lGFLD5an)
---
| **Dear Friend** , I am proud to announce - and cordially invite you to - my inaugural signature event, **Congresswoman Sheri Biggs'**_**Salute to Liberty!**_ The inspirational, family-friendly celebration of freedom, service, and American exceptionalism, will take place on _Monday, August 18, 2025_ at the Anderson Sports & Entertainment Center. We've designed the _**Salute to Liberty**_ to feature a keynote speaker - announced at a later date - and offer a powerful tribute to the men and women who serve our nation, the principles that founded the Republic, and the enduring spirit of the American people.
---
| [ CLICK HERE TO RESERVE YOUR TICKET](https://cgnb9.r.ah.d.sendibm5.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsE8LKR1aS8hLy79hgJG6R/9jhexRiLMv4m)
---
Tickets are only $30 per person, $55 per couple - which will include dinner, drink, and dessert - and may be purchased online [HERE](https://cgnb9.r.ah.d.sendibm5.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsEag2dRyoEcWEAz5VHzoV/U0YRJsuTQZoE). To honor those who serve our nation and our communities to defend our freedoms and keep us safe, veterans and first responders are invited to attend for only $1. **Seats are limited so you will want to reserve your space TODAY!** *Table sponsorships are available. Please reach out to [events@SheriBiggs.com](mailto:events@SheriBiggs.com) for more information or additional questions. ** _Congresswoman Sheri Biggs' Salute to Liberty_** Monday, August 18, 2025Doors Open at 5:30 PMProgram Time from 6:30PM - 8:00PMAnderson Sports & Entertainment Center3027 Martin Luther King Jr Blvd - Anderson, SC 29625 **I hope to see you there!**
|
---
| ### _Sheri Biggs is a member of the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense._
---
| | | | PAID FOR BY SHERI BIGGS FOR CONGRESS
---
| | | | P. O. Box 2685Anderson, SC 29622
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com
---

name: Team Jon Ossoff
subject: Overwhelming victory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
When thousands of grassroots supporters are all chipping in, it adds up fast!
#

Good morning, Peter. We’re asking you for $1. Yes, just $1.
**[Use this link or the buttons below to give $1 — or more if you want — to Jon Ossoff’s re-election campaign.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-june25.2OdyOr&refcode=em250620-1-a&t=1&akid=486%2E5691347%2EAjR0A9)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $1](https://act.electjon.com/go/2469?c0=ossoff-em-june25.lPnOEP&t=2&akid=486%2E5691347%2EAjR0A9)**
---
****
| **[DONATE MORE](https://act.electjon.com/go/34?c0=ossoff-em-june25.tT3IqI&refcode=em250620-1-a&t=3&akid=486%2E5691347%2EAjR0A9)**
---
****
**$1** to build the _largest grassroots organizing and mobilization program_ Georgia — or any state for that matter — has ever seen.
**$1** to stop a far-right Trump loyalist from becoming Georgia’s next U.S. Senator and deal a major blow to MAGA’s plan to take over Georgia.
**$1** to win back Democratic control of Congress and hold Trump and his administration accountable for their cruelty and corruption.
_**$1** because at the end of this month, Jon is facing the most important fundraising deadline of the race so far. And after it passes, we’ll be legally required to report what we’ve raised, and how many people have donated to Jon._
**So please: $1 might not seem like much compared to the millions that right-wing Super PACs are already pouring into this race, but when thousands of grassroots supporters are all chipping in, it adds up fast!**
**[Make a $1 contribution — or more if you can afford it — to Jon Ossoff’s campaign today. Chip in now and we’ll put it directly to work building a campaign and a movement that will win an OVERWHELMING victory on Election Day.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-june25.2OdyOr&refcode=em250620-1-a&t=4&akid=486%2E5691347%2EAjR0A9)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $1](https://act.electjon.com/go/2469?c0=ossoff-em-june25.lPnOEP&t=5&akid=486%2E5691347%2EAjR0A9)**
---
****
| **[DONATE MORE](https://act.electjon.com/go/34?c0=ossoff-em-june25.tT3IqI&refcode=em250620-1-a&t=6&akid=486%2E5691347%2EAjR0A9)**
---
****
Thanks in advance for chipping in. Whether it’s $1 or $100, please know that we are incredibly grateful for your support and to have you on our team.
Team Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate

name: Team Freedom Virginia
subject: ☀️Summer… Where Do We Begin? 🏖️
body:
Today is the first official day of summer, and already so much has happened!
| | |
---
| |
---
| ☀️Summer... Where Do We Begin? 🏖️
---
| Friends-
Today is the first official day of summer, and already so much has happened! First, congratulations to the following candidates who won their primary elections this past Tuesday:
Statewide:
* Attorney General: Former Delegate Jay Jones

House of Delegates:
* Delegate Patrick Hope (HD-1)
* May Nivar (HD-57)
* Leslie Mehta (HD-73)
* Lindsey Dougherty (HD-75)
* Delegate Delores McQuinn (HD-81)
* Kacey Carnegie (HD-89)

At the beginning of June, we had the opportunity to honor our Legislators of the Year, Senator Jennifer Boysko and Delegate Briana Sewell. These two legislators have been fighting for Paid Family & Medical Leave, and we are so excited to continue working with them and to recognize them for everything they do. Thank you to Peter Appel for hosting, and to everyone who came to celebrate and contribute to our organization; we are so grateful for you all!
---
| |
---
Our Organizing Director, Eddie Seay, joined other organizations at a Protect Our Medicaid event in Norfolk. We know that Medicaid is facing cuts right now, and how devastating these cuts will be for the 2 million Virginians and over 71 million Americans who benefit from Medicaid. Healthcare is a human right!
---
| |
---
We will be at this year's Women's Summit hosted by NetworkNOVA; come out and see us and support NetworkNOVA!
---
| |
---
| [LEARN MORE](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001M1Q3CZhctVuaxe2SCQMozcWEIkYewJoN_8un4rn4Z6Sgi3A2hGrAQbTkZIxNKNol5x9kCfQoRyv6MmeJSZUZEt3i4xsj0cpE5KXjiQwvLGFcOgMZ-vO_sIllqzGji7N7Dy1gsJcfqrfl8G5uwBUYJBB1F5DfQMu0&c=vUVnVYujeCIFGT8mYsEA8TtWDhJSKDnb_iV0d8nUhErpn8h_Hzb3Gw==&ch=aBgtJjFNyAxPPFEUbuNgly-BygjDmntV8yT454ReCNJwgLauBPMwuw==)
---
Summer can sometimes feel slow, with the warm weather making us all yearn for a lazy day at the beach, but we still need your support! Join us at an event or share your story with us; every season is the season for action!
---
| | [SHARE YOUR STORY](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001M1Q3CZhctVuaxe2SCQMozcWEIkYewJoN_8un4rn4Z6Sgi3A2hGrAQUj8uufTNJX9s6-Cx0P6KWVkGeSAC9nwjKeOvxxUCTZ9WQgmP5wIYUwSWMhUWwQOJLJnS2qj0vFa8KF-dkPpzNU-k-MSdH9cifWmHsHZm5cnkkmVryMaMxIuK4po0NSq42PiCMjp9QZ-y9LtPQogeoW3JIg-R1NTMgg8Zmxw4wGf9rF_odU82l5dTB3YrHJhn15QdmYrzIL7epw4bq0-I_0=&c=vUVnVYujeCIFGT8mYsEA8TtWDhJSKDnb_iV0d8nUhErpn8h_Hzb3Gw==&ch=aBgtJjFNyAxPPFEUbuNgly-BygjDmntV8yT454ReCNJwgLauBPMwuw==)
---
Let's make this the best summer ever!

subject: [ACTION NEEDED] Tell the Senate to BLOCK the "Big Beautiful Bill" >>

body:
| | | |

| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T50a52a66-1962-42a2-b3f5-8a7ad3942862/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| Peter, we cannot BELIEVE our eyes! [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8c8f6dcc-e64f-40da-97ee-f2adfe1fef0b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [We have to act FAST if we want to save Medicaid and food assistance programs TODAY. Will you add your name telling the Senate to BLOCK the "Big Beautiful Bill" that would gut healthcare and life-saving services for millions of Americans? We need your signature by midnight tonight!!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf0150158-1e01-4846-8b5d-908f8826ccef/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [TELL THE SENATE TO VOTE "NO"](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tebdc902d-f847-4c2d-8f05-5bf756942154/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Trump and his MAGA cronies are THRILLED that they are one step closer to ending health care coverage and food assistance programs to MILLIONS of Americans. But let's call this "Big Beautiful Bill" what it really is, Peter: A tax break for Trump's billionaire buddies. That's right, you read that correctly – Trump and his MAGA cronies are willing to put millions of elderly Americans, low income parents, disabled folks, and more at risk of losing life saving services so a couple of their rich friends can get a tax cut. Just take a look: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbdd4d404-d270-4007-b38a-d91caa3cc079/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) If we don't act NOW, the Senate could pass this DANGEROUS bill and leave millions without the life-saving services they so desperately need. We cannot let MAGA Republicans hurt working families by passing the "Big Beautiful Bill" so their billionaire pals can get a tax break. And the Senate is our last hope to STOP this bill. [Please we need 10,000 signatures from 22122 to tell the Senate to vote "NO" on this bill and protect Medicaid and food assistance programs! Will you sign on by midnight tonight?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta9052aee-db31-41fa-b1c5-86a03fde7c4a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T982e080d-7ee4-4c20-bbc5-d9ce24f9aab5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | Fellow Conservative, I'm reaching out to warn you about some upcoming far-Left rallies organized by Bernie Sanders. The Vermont Democratic-Socialist is bringing his "Fighting Oligarchy" tour to Texas, Oklahoma, Louisiana, and maybe other states as well... He has already gone to Montana and Michigan! As we all know, recent far-Left rallies have turned into violent riots with many radical malcontents looking for trouble and an excuse to vent their rage at normal Americans. On the "Fighting Oligarchy" tour website, it states: _" Bernie is counting on all of us **to continue fighting for our progressive agenda**. There is only one way we will **transform this country.** "__ _ I won't be attending and I don't expect you with either, but this is a good reminder that the radical progressive left never sleeps, they're always out organizing and looking to fund and force their agenda on America 24/7- even in deep red Texas, they never give up. Bernie Sanders is already raising MILLIONS to re-take the Senate ($11.5 as of Q1). AND he just endorsed a candidate that is running as a SOCIALIST - not even hiding the fact. So today I'm asking you to rush an extra contribution to support me and our America First agenda. We must use every resource available to fight back and to prevent the Democrats from retaking the United States Senate--and most crucially ,we cannot allow them to build momentum at all this year. **[Please chip in now before the weekend>>](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9CZXJuaWUtU2FuZGVycy1SYWxseS1BbGVydF8yMDI1MDYxOSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUJlcm5pZS1TYW5kZXJzLVJhbGx5LUFsZXJ0JnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcmYW1vdW50PTc1In0/LgcMvdjzSOR8Vyg2cyyzFw)** Thank you- and stay safe out there,**_ _** Ted Cruz

" I won't be attending and I don't expect you with either, but this is a good reminder that the radical progressive left never sleeps, they're always out organizing and looking to fund and force their agenda on America 24/7- even in deep red Texas, they never give up. Bernie Sanders is already raising MILLIONS to re-take the Senate ($11.5 as of Q1). AND he just endorsed a candidate that is running as a SOCIALIST - not even hiding the fact. So today I'm asking you to rush an extra contribution to support me and our America First agenda. We must use every resource available to fight back and to prevent the Democrats from retaking the United States Senate--and most crucially ,we cannot allow them to build momentum at all this year. Thank you- and stay safe out there, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265 | | | To stop receiving emails from Ted Cruz for Senate, to unsubscribe. | id: 2025-03-18-13:03:40:205t

name: Rebecca Hardy
subject: Ignored and Injured—Now She’s Speaking Out
body:
| |
---
Voices for Vaccine Choice | | [View in browser](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU3NzI5NTQxNjM0MTMxNjU3LFwiclwiOjE1NzcyOTYwNTk2NDI2OTI2MH0iLCJzIjoiOTc1OThiYmFlNzdkYWZjMCJ9)
| |
---
| [ ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU3NzI5NTQxNjQwNDIzMTE1LFwiclwiOjE1NzcyOTYwNTk2NDI2OTI2MH0iLCJzIjoiNjU5ZDIzYmU2NmI2NDc3YSJ9)
---
|
---
Peter, Now that session is behind us, TFVC is eager to place renewed emphasis on a core part of our mission: **sharing the stories of the vaccine-injured** —individuals whose injuries were ignored and whose voices were silenced. The latest release from our **Voices for Vaccine Choice** campaign just dropped. Catch Brianne Dressen's powerful story below!

|
---
| [ ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU3NzI5NTQxNjQ2NzE0NTczLFwiclwiOjE1NzcyOTYwNTk2NDI2OTI2MH0iLCJzIjoiMjI3ZmUyNzRmZjdhNjM4OSJ9)
---
|
---
**Brianne's journey is both devastating and uplifting.** She went from being a vibrant mother and active member of her community to fighting every day just to get out of bed. She was healthy, happy, and leading an active life. _And then, it all changed._ What makes Brianne’s story especially remarkable is what she chose to do next. After experiencing a life-altering injury, she channeled her pain into purpose—founding a vaccine injury advocacy organization and becoming the heroine in the award-winning film TFVC co-produced, _**Follow the Silenced**_. TFVC believes in telling the truth and ensuring no one else is silenced. For far too long, these stories have been buried. **That ends now. ******

|
---
| | [ **Share the Truth!** ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU3NzI5NTQxNjUwOTA4ODc5LFwiclwiOjE1NzcyOTYwNTk2NDI2OTI2MH0iLCJzIjoiYjc1ZWFmNDgyODhiYmQ5ZiJ9)
---
|
---
We are not _just_ telling stories. **We are reclaiming truth, restoring dignity, and fighting for what is right. ** And the good news is, _[you can help us do it!](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU3NzI5NTQxNjU2MTUxNzYwLFwiclwiOjE1NzcyOTYwNTk2NDI2OTI2MH0iLCJzIjoiN2UyMzhjYTViNGQ0NWMwYSJ9)_ We want to reach as many people as possible, but we cannot do it alone. [Your generosity](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU3NzI5NTQxNjYzNDkxNzkzLFwiclwiOjE1NzcyOTYwNTk2NDI2OTI2MH0iLCJzIjoiNmIwYWFlNzRlYmZkYmQyNiJ9) helps us tell these stories and give a voice to the voiceless.

|
---
| | [ **Help Us Give a Voice to the Voiceless!** ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU3NzI5NTQxNjY4NzM0Njc0LFwiclwiOjE1NzcyOTYwNTk2NDI2OTI2MH0iLCJzIjoiYmJiYzYxYzRhN2ZiYjdkZSJ9)
---
|
---
The vaccine-injured were dismissed, but TFVC is here, and we’re fighting back.

|
---
| | | **Gratefully,
Rebecca Hardy
President, TFVC**

---|---|---
|
---
P.S. If you or someone you know has suffered from a vaccine injury, we want to tell your story.

|
---
| | [ **Tell Your Story** ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU3NzI5NTQxNjcyOTI4OTc5LFwiclwiOjE1NzcyOTYwNTk2NDI2OTI2MH0iLCJzIjoiMzc5MDYyODFiMmIyNmU4NiJ9)

Patriot,

Our once great American cities - like Los Angeles - have been invaded and occupied by Illegal Aliens and Criminals.

name: Tony Johnson
subject: Do you stand with ICE?
body:
Do you support the Trump-Vance Administration’s efforts to secure our borders and deport illegal aliens?

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlgngjlpjv8um52crs3tstbqcj4stq8jtvgp2138_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5j6eo36cph2bs)
---
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

Do you support the Trump-Vance Administration’s efforts to secure our borders and deport illegal aliens?

The liberal media certainly doesn’t.

That is why they’re writing vicious hit pieces against America’s Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) agents who are courageously carrying out the immigration policies the American people demanded in 2024.

In the face of these attacks, we want to know what you think of ICE’s recent actions.

That’s why my colleagues and I at The Heritage Foundation created **The Heritage Foundation’s ICE Survey** —to give patriots like you an opportunity to express your opinions on these immigration enforcement actions.

**You can complete this survey using the secure link below. **

[**https://secured.heritage.org/take-the-heritage-ice-survey/**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8d2likor47p721gt0gpbo4rea5i49m283vifrqo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5j6eo36cph2bs)

Thank you for supporting this crucial effort to secure our borders.

Best,

Tony Johnson
Director of Membership

**P.S. Show your support for America’s ICE agents as they work to secure our borders and deport illegal aliens by completing The Heritage Foundation’s ICE Survey:[https://secured.heritage.org/take-the-heritage-ice-survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zuevgegapr8ou6roeoql3v748ij2tigund2r0aeg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5j6eo36cph2bs)**

body:

Peter,

Will Ainsworth here.

I've spent years fighting for conservative values here in Alabama, and I know a fighter when I see one.

**That 's why I'm proud to endorse Coach Tommy Tuberville for Governor of Alabama. **

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=05bfe6780f064dc7b181df1133edb06f&_e=TCQZa2no2FWtg3T08ypp0e_gSV48rnCchaLxooZUj5123KzfQH18Maq95RD0ynvhaBKf5iFviq8R2t5K6hXu9gxXIII4MA_Vh2tlUbg4Zmfcp46-COCZyuHpkU3oJvtu8udCKTkys3V2CafFxrcab9OAic1jTCrd1M6xzPJMKlUirdksbQWuQh9RB-K-mby8BEtSa-X2cb6fKo3rbBLQFhLq6UMRRC9tfG3Pmf4p27KkqCYMTFq4HMS4ZnrTPgOscnt3O8tT8tyegNKyypd5pCVmJ9ENK9E2YA4pYsPTgS0PtrunzFG-aU3YVFJlvPDBi7me5eRmEgBHADdbNs9xFM6h5tta_Mv4NkZPz2Xz2XP1gY2qMwH1EAEvf1cGIXrrEcXnkf1yr4R7EyuxNtQRxNXAU23-o2s6lYfU0HLv66k_NDYBV1Lmu59ilkX3ZLk2Fajz4biN95wav5cEARJyXF4mSuwXUn4t7gMCcwkSBMbgK6TDYgoaWoA2cCSlVRh9i90LEhUcd45it-fiGP1QnflVcvrZ3iGa-WF303WPbzU%3D)

| [ **SUPPORT COACH FOR GOVERNOR** ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=05bfe6780f064dc7b181df1133edb06f&_e=TCQZa2no2FWtg3T08ypp0e_gSV48rnCchaLxooZUj5123KzfQH18Maq95RD0ynvhaBKf5iFviq8R2t5K6hXu9gxXIII4MA_Vh2tlUbg4Zmfcp46-COCZyuHpkU3oJvtu8udCKTkys3V2CafFxrcab-R4YLNSunCIcafMFzD6Hk6miAf_igO9dlkZe0vukCJeBDm8adMc5OLu4_Lt1sWMo1NmBGTzwxOKlJy25MhY-IzrvYbHfvxGvaYoleoVaABGXOWxMp2GG3KLZTspjIQZxpyoqNIorB9WHDaRFQuyH_ZYFE603nhmM9F9_IPQ-KIIAeJlBUKVeJgBKG4wE-BhStZhnIy-h8pd_1DDaJcYjUD5uu-VoP91d-C8GATgIHlzyhEdsMiWMFa_zxocztENLqlyF_6qwhBGwq3kwgDM4eRkeTtr4XHAR5B8YEExUXqH-ABHoY56C8lnY5rtENhRI1n_31L_k2vDLXL40lOm0vPnSgVDMLpxk6FmN_UxvkfdvTMDROB8QqQvATzc5P3z12L6d6OUF7h1sMtFJsltOGgDlpvu50Se27mEhFWjMUQN)
---

Coach isn't your typical politician, and that's a good thing. He's tough and tested. Whether it was building champions on the field or standing up for our values in Washington, Coach Tuberville knows what it takes to lead and win.

He's not running to play nice with the establishment.

**He 's running to defend our way of life and make sure Alabama stays the beating heart of the America First Movement. **

**[But he can’t do it alone.](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=05bfe6780f064dc7b181df1133edb06f&_e=TCQZa2no2FWtg3T08ypp0e_gSV48rnCchaLxooZUj5123KzfQH18Maq95RD0ynvhaBKf5iFviq8R2t5K6hXu9gxXIII4MA_Vh2tlUbg4Zmfcp46-COCZyuHpkU3oJvtu8udCKTkys3V2CafFxrcab-R4YLNSunCIcafMFzD6Hk6miAf_igO9dlkZe0vukCJeYLQKjbs9emJ5cCrmVpMZDnJWSkKJAiJ8wyidFpvKLwdj_nwLhLbi-ght2ArVwhLzFuOcdAEEEH7GTXyMQ_60MV7jp9dY0Rd7vMsr7bOmWixMleiNhyI_DlcN1-jMjrV3BcHT-ZG09M1z8SDiPvzZmPhywu5PXuTof4cUOeQlEXwfZR945EJfwTgrZ_sXCq5AvihPAR01PfgpI8iAhXvnU5m71lUGRDiGGDmDnzInCiXSmQkCuo7fDODjABQsBi-IekT5E4iPymbbmnV-LkKnZXJZrv4jYsI11wrVcEfiqjA22OGbwUbOTgbpQMZ5BTfv2J2rVsxKgtIh-7Uw8uTax3qhDAI6iaayQlZeSsgF2j9da_YAaRW2CcvireDKM3Ji)**

_Let 's be clear, the Left would love nothing more than to flip Alabama blue. They want to gut our energy industry, cancel our values, and turn us into California with humidity. Not on our watch. _

**[Coach Tuberville has my full support, and I hope he’ll have yours too.](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=05bfe6780f064dc7b181df1133edb06f&_e=TCQZa2no2FWtg3T08ypp0e_gSV48rnCchaLxooZUj5123KzfQH18Maq95RD0ynvhaBKf5iFviq8R2t5K6hXu9gxXIII4MA_Vh2tlUbg4Zmfcp46-COCZyuHpkU3oJvtu8udCKTkys3V2CafFxrcab-R4YLNSunCIcafMFzD6Hk6miAf_igO9dlkZe0vukCJeUUd5wansdGgAgTa7XyH7ScKGtfER3lKiw55GtSqnTjyZ9eC80Dv3yu2LZKQ08h_nfCsFuKeZhSwo2CbofNpY93nQpzmj9kmksMucxRVVH1ZkjGEZ25kvvmMU0mkYVf7yGt3khb2PzgvZVf_rXX9xMv81A8jwBwsT3itUTK_aKexquIHIk3wIFQTo7c-6rT26XsawZOnB7WhaSxF47O_F_QlHRSDUnvQFepZg5DHOW8_xGjIEE9-pzZ71tPVvIpjBeiDo40eVecZV29qNWG4QqWV_Ddkz9PDCbmtQ7F5UR-A7xdhN5cAMkuO_7VbdxMWmwVwLGVpsSaqL6cyxWpcSrqruwXdq_oXSJ2hq88zOGGARL5T0NogSfhordn7Kyct9)**

When I meet with Coach Tuberville next, I want to give him a list of his top supporters.**[Will you chip in anything you can spare and add your name to my list here?](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=05bfe6780f064dc7b181df1133edb06f&_e=TCQZa2no2FWtg3T08ypp0e_gSV48rnCchaLxooZUj5123KzfQH18Maq95RD0ynvhaBKf5iFviq8R2t5K6hXu9gxXIII4MA_Vh2tlUbg4Zmfcp46-COCZyuHpkU3oJvtu8udCKTkys3V2CafFxrcab-R4YLNSunCIcafMFzD6Hk6miAf_igO9dlkZe0vukCJeEVeQsz0OgRmaP98CKmCWRNWlRJyrR9UpZCjo0shaMLdoxsXZQLE7tL67oPiT-73YtLzWT7gz6BPRxtxSHLGOsshvvMCXNPndjLQaRrH_-9ySG-M8_BvbGBqe72a9-MLJuPgU_v2VreWkmhoc0pu-HaoizhmWDONinIJyG5HK3RKyvDwfVy3JZu7qVuDY3sSFx8m5PQvioUDD25GOAytPKlXMrGSN0Fiafr0FP9OBENAg9XBvBaDyloo15Tz3dfxhm02l8rlQ5iZHXnR5Pzzsi_fkAy6OtAn9lbBuevVc2JPv6kJ26Ro7DVHK-pv1UohNFhrq78SCWtRwMjLYQV_nsCAQPsrD7Op9UKxtb8hEsdfB4dHJu9eqjFTHXPpbzxBe)**

With your help, we can show Coach that Alabama's got his back. Let's bring that same grit and fight to Montgomery.

_Will Ainsworth
_ Lt. Governor of Alabama

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=05bfe6780f064dc7b181df1133edb06f&_e=TCQZa2no2FWtg3T08ypp0e_gSV48rnCchaLxooZUj5123KzfQH18Maq95RD0ynvhaBKf5iFviq8R2t5K6hXu9gxXIII4MA_Vh2tlUbg4Zmfcp46-COCZyuHpkU3oJvtu8udCKTkys3V2CafFxrcab-R4YLNSunCIcafMFzD6Hk6miAf_igO9dlkZe0vukCJe6Hg4JaPHo1PcoSJhjLs46boPeXiU9xNOTy3vZZMRE-QuaujAhUWeCeDpz4brZQi1lgf0LnHKk-9UuwWkFvHHa5k673NEON1s81fGJoJiJf66s_n2-bPPomOsUDCEX8sObaOWaSVKLE577deUcDiZY3VvKTRRrdGg3B_-MZQoziSO09E0Bm3CYGmfX8iKu1GLhRcS8jgXfGgttgEAhFO7susiKtMy5ufPHE8WvRShp9otuVG7hApoJ2-dtyfafLWW4SVVgwWfJ3vPJHbUNkxKHwq0qlhMNqm9_6nOPzsYtPOBF1oGsVROMsBzfzdVK502XE3EztbVo4fir2F9QZF918vlaK8lRE0h7p6zTLAfIvkj6Eq7Rea8fYz_Jty8Nl3-)

clean_body: I know a fighter when I see one. | Peter, Will Ainsworth here. I've spent years fighting for conservative values here in Alabama, and I know a fighter when I see one. That 's why I'm proud to endorse Coach Tommy Tuberville for Governor of Alabama. | Coach isn't your typical politician, and that's a good thing. He's tough and tested. Whether it was building champions on the field or standing up for our values in Washington, Coach Tuberville knows what it takes to lead and win. He's not running to play nice with the establishment. He 's running to defend our way of life and make sure Alabama stays the beating heart of the America First Movement. Let 's be clear, the Left would love nothing more than to flip Alabama blue. They want to gut our energy industry, cancel our values, and turn us into California with humidity. Not on our watch. When I meet with Coach Tuberville next, I want to give him a list of his top supporters. With your help, we can show Coach that Alabama's got his back. Let's bring that same grit and fight to Montgomery. Will Ainsworth Lt. name: Sarah McBride
subject: I wasn’t sure this country’s heart was big enough to love someone like me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
I’ve never felt alone because I have people like you standing with me.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89759?refcode=em20250620-9035&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9035%2E614464%2Esp5ju9)
Hi Peter, it’s Congresswoman Sarah McBride.
Right now, the GOP is using LGBTQ+ people as pawns. They’re not offering solutions to make everyone's lives better. Instead, they’re busy launching attacks — on our rights and yes, on me.
**As the first openly trans member of Congress, I knew there would be moments like this. But I didn’t run for Congress to debate which bathroom I use or entertain cruelty from my Republican colleagues.**
I ran to deliver for working families. To fight for paid leave. To protect our freedoms. And I will never stop defending the LGBTQ+ community from attacks, manufactured distractions, and the hostility too many of us endure every day.
I won’t let the GOP’s pettiness and bullying derail my work. Has it been easy? No. These fights never are. But I’ve never felt alone — because I have people like you and Heartland Patriots standing with me.
**[If I can count on your support this Pride Month, split a donation of $10 or whatever you can between my campaign and Heartland Patriots today. Every donation helps me defend the LGBTQ+ community and keep up the fight for working families in Congress.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89759?refcode=em20250620-9035&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9035%2E614464%2Esp5ju9)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89759?refcode=em20250620-9035&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9035%2E614464%2Esp5ju9)**
Growing up, I couldn’t imagine a future like mine. I wasn’t sure this country’s heart was big enough to love someone like me.
Over the last decade, though, I’ve been able to bear witness to change that once seemed so impossible to me as a kid that it was almost incomprehensible. **Because people believed it could. Because we fought for it.**
That’s what Pride means to me. It's a call to action and a reminder that even in the face of hate, we have the power to fight back with love, with truth, and with unshakable resolve.
**[So this Pride Month, if you’re ready to do your part to create a better future for all of us, please consider making a split donation of $10 between my campaign and Heartland Patriots.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89759?refcode=em20250620-9035&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9035%2E614464%2Esp5ju9)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89760?refcode=em20250620-9035&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=9035%2E614464%2Esp5ju9) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89760?refcode=em20250620-9035&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=9035%2E614464%2Esp5ju9) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89760?refcode=em20250620-9035&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=9035%2E614464%2Esp5ju9) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89760?refcode=em20250620-9035&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=9035%2E614464%2Esp5ju9) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89760?refcode=em20250620-9035&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=9035%2E614464%2Esp5ju9) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89760?refcode=em20250620-9035&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=9035%2E614464%2Esp5ju9) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89759?refcode=em20250620-9035&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=9035%2E614464%2Esp5ju9)

Sarah

name: Seth Koslow
subject: No plan from Bruce. Here’s mine.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Koslow for Nassau
body:
| | Dear Friends,

In just seven days, the deal Bruce Blakeman once called “ _transformative_ ” for Nassau County will officially fall apart. The $6 billion casino proposal he promised for the Hub has no interested buyer, no future – and no plan to replace it.

**[I’m running for County Executive to deliver results – not hollow promises. Chip in today if you agree it’s time for new leadership and a new direction for Nassau.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109911203/552675034/-1414184198?contactdata=V/QwSmiZ5QwIarSfadvhkZHDyIbCim9pC4F+Z5v0WSTUXWK7smWG6d3F6FNmP0rGYXQOHSsYwh1JI9ugsN3zTeLxHkcAYx5+/6QnFXwnFf8=&am=50.00&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTYyMTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2UwODQ3N2QtZDY0ZC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KBr57B2eRBIDaELMdq3UQcMbvERDDEMHGvaqR5wIlPY=&emci=de2f6e1d-5f4d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ce08477d-d64d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=17551891)**

It’s time to face the facts: **Bruce’s plan is dead**. What comes next is up to us.

Here’s my plan to move forward:

As County Executive, I’ll launch a task force made up of real estate developers, business leaders, organized labor, and members of the community – all at the table, working together on a new, forward-looking plan for the Hub. Not another political stunt – a real strategy that creates jobs, grows our economy, and makes Nassau stronger for the long term.

Blakeman had his chance. He stood in front of the cameras and talked big. But when it came time to do the work – manage partnerships, listen to stakeholders, and secure real commitments – he failed.

**[If you agree Nassau deserves better, I hope you’ll chip in today to support this campaign and help us bring real results to our county.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109911204/552675035/-1414184198?contactdata=V/QwSmiZ5QwIarSfadvhkZHDyIbCim9pC4F+Z5v0WSTUXWK7smWG6d3F6FNmP0rGYXQOHSsYwh1JI9ugsN3zTeLxHkcAYx5+/6QnFXwnFf8=&am=50.00&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTYyMTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2UwODQ3N2QtZDY0ZC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KBr57B2eRBIDaELMdq3UQcMbvERDDEMHGvaqR5wIlPY=&emci=de2f6e1d-5f4d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ce08477d-d64d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=17551891)**

Let’s turn the page – and build the future Nassau deserves.

Thank you,
Seth Koslow

clean_body: | | Dear Friends, In just seven days, the deal Bruce Blakeman once called “ transformative ” for Nassau County will officially fall apart. The $6 billion casino proposal he promised for the Hub has no interested buyer, no future – and no plan to replace it. It’s time to face the facts: Bruce’s plan is dead. What comes next is up to us. Here’s my plan to move forward: As County Executive, I’ll launch a task force made up of real estate developers, business leaders, organized labor, and members of the community – all at the table, working together on a new, forward-looking plan for the Hub. Not another political stunt – a real strategy that creates jobs, grows our economy, and makes Nassau stronger for the long term. Blakeman had his chance. He stood in front of the cameras and talked big. But when it came time to do the work – manage partnerships, listen to stakeholders, and secure real commitments – he failed. Let’s turn the page – and build the future Nassau deserves. Thank you, Seth Koslow | * | Paid for by Koslow for Nassau Koslow for Nassau 998 Old Country Road STE C Box 152 Plainview, NY 11803 United States We try to send only the most important info and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can .

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: BREAKING: Democrats could FLIP Texas Senate seat
body:
https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/2026-texas-defense-fund/?utm_campaign=20250611&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

Peter,

You may be wondering why radical liberals like Colin Allred and Beto O’Rourke are once again sniffing around Texas politics after years of humiliating defeats.

Here’s your answer:

“Democrats Could Win First Texas Senate Race in 33 Years” - Newsweek

“History in the making? Democrats poised to flip Texas Senate seat...” - The Economic Times

They see an opening. And if we don’t act now, they just might take it.

That’s why I’m stepping up early and launching my 2026 Texas Defense Fund — and I need patriots like you to stand with me.

[Please make a contribution of $25, $50, $100, or even $250 right now to help launch my 2026 Texas Defense Fund and keep Texas RED.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/2026-texas-defense-fund/?utm_campaign=20250611&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

[CONTRIBUTE $100 >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/2026-texas-defense-fund/?utm_campaign=20250611&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=100)

[CONTRIBUTE $250 >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/2026-texas-defense-fund/?utm_campaign=20250611&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=250)

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/2026-texas-defense-fund/?utm_campaign=20250611&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A/&amount=other)

Democrats have been obsessed with flipping Texas for years.

They tried to buy it with George Soros’ billions. They ran Beto. They ran Allred. And they failed again and again.

But now, with polling showing a Democrat could win a Texas Senate seat for the first time in over 3 decades, they smell blood in the water.

Make no mistake, if the Left flips Texas, President Trump will still be in the White House. But it will become 100x harder to keep our America First majorities in Congress.

That means:
❌ Sham impeachment hearings
❌ Nonstop witch hunts
❌ Endless political warfare
❌ And total gridlock that would undo every bit of progress we’ve made

We cannot allow this to happen.

[DONATE: 2026 TEXAS DEFENSE FUND >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/2026-texas-defense-fund/?utm_campaign=20250611&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

As a Navy SEAL, I know you don’t wait until the enemy is at your doorstep, you take the fight to them.

That’s what my 2026 Texas Defense Fund is all about – getting ahead of the Left’s assault and defending Texas the conservative majorities we’ve built in Washington.

And I, along with all Texans, are counting on patriots like you to help us defend our great state from the Left.

[Please rush a contribution today to help us launch the 2026 Texas Defense Fund and stop the radical Left from flipping Texas and destroying everything we’ve fought for.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/2026-texas-defense-fund/?utm_campaign=20250611&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

Dan Crenshaw

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn9t88mntrd2v4e39817q5j6r7knl4cdim5i1lng_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5j61o76c1h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zg3f3f7f3v4tu7ouef11rca4ubajk5ua4vgt8pc8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5j61o76c1h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z17uep0h2vdklf6nub469b5hu70tuanekmcf1rk0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5j61o76c1h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zto7oj40sbmvdng0m2oldomrp6dm9nirfl8v13v8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5j61o76c1h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcsvb5lsj4mpcp7ej6rds0em1n2l8gr8sr2ivo3o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5j61o76c1h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpodom38h1pm2jr0713fe27ttn6g92q4akkdkjag_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5j61o76c1h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zq0htk9mvluf9javqqjtnle4lh1o9e0isgvv0kd0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5j61o76c1h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zu06mhqhf24or561mtpsbt9ue2dimnv78rp84kq8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5j61o76c1h2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3hr3hg7sb2gvdg9h4p365ursh7ic7okj3rr3k28_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5j61o76c1h2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---

Pop Acta Media | Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z62u5easf0hi0t539vjfkfcjk20fdfl975fip34g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkjrrasjk6mqj4t5m6gpq7d9neprqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshgm6o34c9hm48d245p25oh4ctim0ob6c3geco324no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdrp3n7q0a663f52s7ipo8njjlrlkb06sjh910to_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5j61o76c1h2bs)_

[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ze222s2v8t2phb71an8ru6uakamv2qr5gdvn40rg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr5c1gmco70spg649fg)

subject: Padilla just broke his silence!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Sign on to thank him now >>
| **_HEROIC Sen. Alex Padilla just broke his silence:_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91210?t=6&akid=20268%2E878179%2Ecze80R) [**We need EVERY Democrat reading this to join the fight and THANK Alex Padilla for taking a stand against Trump and his MAGA mob! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91210?t=7&akid=20268%2E878179%2Ecze80R) | [**THANK ALEX PADILLA: DONATE $3 TO SIGN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91210?t=8&akid=20268%2E878179%2Ecze80R)
---
TO: Alex Padilla
FROM: A proud supporter
Subject: THANK YOU! Dear Sen. Padilla,

**Seeing you DETAINED and HANDCUFFED for simply asking a question shook me to my core.**

This is exactly the kind of unchecked power we need to fight back against — because if Trump can do this to you, he can get away with ANYTHING.

Please know that you’re not alone in this fight.

**We know Trump and his minions will _lie, break the law,_ and even _arrest his enemies_ to get his way — but they don’t have an army of grassroots support behind them the way that you do!**

[**So I'm signing this letter and donating $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show that I stand with you, and to THANK YOU for putting it all on the line to save our country! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91210?t=9&akid=20268%2E878179%2Ecze80R) | [**RUSH $3 TO SIGN ON BEFORE WE CLOSE THIS LETTER AT MIDNIGHT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91210?t=10&akid=20268%2E878179%2Ecze80R)
---
**_X A proud Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20268%2E878179%2Ecze80R). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20268%2E878179%2Ecze80R).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20268%2E878179%2Ecze80R) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=20268%2E878179%2Ecze80R). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20268%2E878179%2Ecze80R)

This is exactly the kind of unchecked power we need to fight back against — because if Trump can do this to you, he can get away with ANYTHING. Please know that you’re not alone in this fight. We know Trump and his minions will lie, break the law, and even arrest his enemies to get his way — but they don’t have an army of grassroots support behind them the way that you do! | X A proud Democrat \- The Voter Protection Project | | Paid for by VPP (www.protectvoting.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104 The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps. Please, consider making a . Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a. to request fewer emails. Click here to . | |

name: Maud Maron
subject: A wave of crime and violence
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAUD FOR MANHATTAN
body:
The George Soros elected, Pro-Criminal, Trump-Deranged DEI hire that has turned my beloved New York City into a third-world Hellscape.

| | |
---
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zu23gu09skq9t7g5i27bpift6lehselq64htuc70_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5j61o76c1h2bs)
---
| | My Dear Friend, [**My name is Maud Maron, and I need your help to defeat Alvin Bragg and replace him as the District Attorney of Manhattan.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmtch6dc284e2bcgag887b1kpt4ihkhs1c4dn4jg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5j61o76c1h2bs) You know Alvin... The George Soros elected, Pro-Criminal, Trump-Deranged DEI hire that has turned my beloved New York City into a third-world Hellscape.If you think that sounds too dramatic, just look at a few examples of what Alvin Bragg’s “weak-on-crime,” Trump-obsessed tenure has brought to the law-abiding citizens of New York:
---
* An innocent woman set on fire by a Guatemalan Illegal Alien who had already been deported at least once before...
* A mob of Illegal criminals caught on video assaulting two New York City Law Enforcement officers outside a “Migrant Shelter,” all **released without bail by Alvin Bragg!**

---
Instead of working for the last 4 years to make the Citizens of New York safe and secure, Alvin has been on a singular, sick, twisted mission and one mission only -- TAKE DOWN DONALD TRUMP.That’s what he ran on...Those were his marching orders from George Soros and his Radical donors...And those are orders he dutifully followed -- at the expense of not only those of us who live in New York, but every single American that deserved to vote in a fair election not tainted by a ridiculous set of trumped-up charges made up out of thin air.New Yorkers deserve better...Americans deserve better.That’s why -- whether you live right here in Manhattan, a thousand miles away in Des Moines, Iowa, or anywhere else in our great country -- I hope you’ll help me defeat Alvin Bragg. **[Would you consider helping my campaign with a one-time $28 contribution today?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zqbivoevm3uqqv6t294i1p73uijhilai9mh289mg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5j61o76c1h2bs)** I could really use your help.Alvin Bragg has millions of dollars pouring into his campaign by the same Radicals who put him there the first time around...
---
* George Soros
* Hollywood Celebrities
* Elites right here in New York and Hollywood
* The deep pockets of the Democrat election machine

---
I don’t have any of that on my side -- but I hope I’ve got YOU on my side.To have any chance of beating the Democrat machine funding Alvin Bragg’s run for re-election, I need a nationwide army of Americans to rally by my side...A nationwide army of Americans who understand how toxic it is having a Radical like Alvin Bragg in charge of the criminal justice system of one of our largest cities...Who know how close Alvin Bragg came to knocking Donald Trump out of the 2024 Presidential election and what that would have done to our country... Who watched in disgust as Alvin Bragg conjured up a 34-count felony conviction against a man whose only real crime was trying to Make America Great Again!This is our chance to send a clear message not only to the people of New York -- but the nation -- that these Radicals put into place by George Soros to do his bidding are not invincible...That they CAN be defeated! Alvin Bragg is the perfect example of why I left the Democrat party.I think it all started when my 11-year-old got COVID... We were told to mask in the house and give my son meals in his room for 10 days. Instead, we cuddled up & watched TV together -- unmasked in the living room and ate our meals as a family at the dinner table. That was a watershed moment for me.What were we doing?When did the United States of America turn into a place where the Government told us how to live?When I dared to suggest that it may not be the best idea for biological boys to participate in girls’ sports, I was all but run out of town on a rail... Then I dared suggest that the complete failure of our school system might be due to something other than racism, I -- after a lifetime of considering myself a liberal Democrat -- was labeled a “Right Wing Extremist” by the New York Times!The blinders came off -- suddenly, I realized that if simply acknowledging the truth, calling out corruption and challenging the long-held beliefs of the Democrat machine disqualified me from being a Democrat.The truth will set you free -- and it’s an honor to represent you on the “Freedom Side” of the wall.I’ve been in their camp.As a former Democrat and as a mom raising four kids in Manhattan. I know how much they are getting wrong. And how bad it is for our children. **[That’s why I’m asking good folks like you to help me.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z70qckkv3if6k54b202850jfe18p7u6oanolqfog_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5j61o76c1h2bs)** It’s going to take all of us to take down Alvin Bragg -- but this has been a season of political miracles!I humbly ask for your help today. I hope you’ll find it in your heart to send a one-time $28 contribution to help me pull off one more political miracle......and send Alvin Bragg back to obscurity where he belongs.He’s bad for New York...He’s bad for America...And he needs to go.One last favor...I know not everybody is going to be able to give that I write to today. **[So if you think you could spare a larger gift -- of $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1,000 or more, a few of those would really help right now.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zq1pg9rreoggpr1vp6urj98t4n7kc6ni315dh168_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5j61o76c1h2bs)** We need a good, strong launch -- and without a few of those larger gifts, we’ll already be behind.Please just send what you can, My Friend.Just reading my email today is a tremendous favor, and I really appreciate it.Thank you, Wish Me Luck, and God Bless You!
---
---
**Maud Maron**

P.S. I guess Alvin Bragg has just been too darn busy to concentrate on the wave of crime and violence washing over New York...While he has spent the last 4 years prosecuting and persecuting President Trump, New York has become a third-world hellscape!New York deserves better...Our Country deserves better...

Will you help me take the place of Alvin Bragg by supporting my campaign to become the District Attorney of Manhattan?**[If so, please rush a one-time gift of $28, $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1,000 or more -- I could really use your help!](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zlph8b76c4p3u3p8ooi6cc4sqvtsaboo1nsujmk0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5j61o76c1h2bs)**
---
|
---
| | PAID FOR BY MAUD FOR MANHATTAN
---
P.O. Box 274New York, NY 10013-0274
---

Pop Acta Media | First Look News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=bd84b56572ad4a08918b9017244b7b88&_e=hB3PfJaZfElLqZfh15i1i5ns5ZGf6ostdkdSXL3m3oejiYx0vpeMhBdJlyjxy1Q910FgX8HK6I6sdgmeeSkx0ID4X6AE54cFI9vlTOJec9D6ASnNpF2BCYhQSjHEMEElvqOR1mpomVw4EK7aALDRHszBW5A6NxmHf8hYCB-ti_kGwAnygNc3SrLIC1e4ib8BcM07vKw5MSnGLUKxyfv1sSFa9DS15VQzoPqCjKfXC274l7ztls-_JJsoJEJM0_VAD6M8P24_2gJeCP8PnzCxhnxc2dnP8QRzQgPNjnlX36vASgf8hQAm4vE9kwLR6kXzIxQZsZh1OwC_3_ogQ2O1LaHW1PxsAi9ljBa2sPy8QGc7FSx_c-kfVvT5vE2CAbuaC-S20PXrKiHppLmm7M0ZYRB-0xR5HSfD_prcVWrjQFh7cHydRRkOF0EcyCxvJC0PTPYj5BsKBp2RueIC2OlgZX0XJeEA2L6M1rqArDdMEF6OHaNaz_LrMH49_GtAOThREhKd9cNxi4CyxSjg_ZO_wzw_pNICR-5MALr_CWp4A-6omUGWbVHy2B1_vMxQa-KWsfgLksYOJISII0ZDmi71wPGfhYnZNdYLVpsFXUtkMVK5mjsU-sI3zyoiRyhSJky4WxiydtQLKSv9KH119Hnt2SaJNu9wUS_ftIlCYXXhF7_aErVhM-MRJA2PWQ2QGsQ9Bi6_9GoLJXyjTV_SJZbjig%3D%3D) Peter,

The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures.
Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=bd84b56572ad4a08918b9017244b7b88&_e=hB3PfJaZfElLqZfh15i1i5ns5ZGf6ostdkdSXL3m3oejiYx0vpeMhBdJlyjxy1Q910FgX8HK6I6sdgmeeSkx0ID4X6AE54cFI9vlTOJec9D6ASnNpF2BCYhQSjHEMEElvqOR1mpomVw4EK7aALDRHszBW5A6NxmHf8hYCB-ti_kGwAnygNc3SrLIC1e4ib8BcM07vKw5MSnGLUKxyfv1sSFa9DS15VQzoPqCjKfXC274l7ztls-_JJsoJEJM0_VAFMWtNP_sv_lC6jMXB_lqNMSYyStFoG0MkzN_qqYk_sU037v-L0v4_Y1kih1QqoMNzGi3qExze9hl91cym1r-_slpHWTmy3IVvsvxx5K1XqdbWYsufQRmsS9eTszkLBoQpHDclnlzksLWqwZMUYcAIGpmbQdinzfKytAFCQzf3CopkruHA7Z3rRZSl3eFrsUtzWutgPSiFGyzckURQ-aha3Q-i-Ghg8se4yNr_P6JQGIBdGd78hBVb95AbULcGTZ05KGPgfHyLx-bsVOn_4BE9dvqTmEFbQp-RsSdCeKAOrYW_JsMAGGbKFwhTO67x1PfM3sI8D_8tkCfObg3F0hX3qhaEVGXFDBuyEG-pfz9cORW44lH_3q4aydSZoj5OM0wU_bysE8VHPGvgvaODReT4uIPSRktyT-FACE9CI2lsQFvQZVJRUTIh-t3hSZSvsKL0Qa7RRy9awxR_JbH4WlOXQ%3D%3D)

By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic, and, conversely, how a republic may lose its way.

That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"** and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Sen. Jon Ossoff
subject: My decision...
body:
Let me lay this out, clear as day:

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ossoff-dnc?refcode=em250620&refcode2=655_2563979_v6YEe6&akid=655%2E2563979%2Ev6YEe6)
---
Let me lay this out, clear as day:
I am the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won in 2024.
This Senate race in Georgia will be the most competitive and most expensive in the nation.
If you’re outraged by what’s happening to our country — and you’re ready to fight -- please rush $5 to my re-election campaign and the Democratic National Committee today.
Here’s the link to donate:[**https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/defend-Jon](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ossoff-dnc?refcode=em250620&refcode2=655_2563979_v6YEe6&akid=655%2E2563979%2Ev6YEe6)**
Otherwise, let me remind you why I ran for Senate — and why this moment is just as urgent.
Before I was elected, I led investigations of corruption and human rights abuses worldwide. We exposed wrongdoing in countries where criticizing the government is dangerous, where whistleblowers and witnesses will only meet in secret, where protest carries the risk of prosecution.
More and more, the atmosphere under Trump reminded me of those places where dissent was silenced by intimidation.
Trump’s rise wasn’t just a crisis. It was a warning.
I ran for Senate because I saw the danger in electing someone so profoundly unfit for the presidency and I wanted to confront the corruption that made his rise possible.
I also ran -- years before the Dobbs decision -- because it was already clear the GOP was coming for reproductive rights. I saw Georgia as the front line in that fight. With a six-week ban now in place here, and Republicans pushing for a national abortion ban, it still is.
Now this President is staging a power grab unprecedented in our history. In his first 100 days:
* He’s freed violent criminals who attacked the Capitol on his behalf.
* Purged independent watchdogs across government.
* Stacked key agencies with loyalists—and called on them to investigate his political opponents.
* Defied and threatened federal judges.
* Undermined the press.
* Handed sweeping, unaccountable power to the billionaire who spent $300 million to elect him.

Trump’s goal isn’t just revenge. He wants to use the government to crush the opposition. And now, Americans are living in fear of their own government.
This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream. As citizens, it is the test of our lifetimes.
In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history—and we won. That victory won the Senate majority.
Now we must win again. And we will win again.
Just like last time, I can’t do it alone.
So I’m asking:
[**Please make a contribution to my re-election campaign and the Democratic National Committee today of $5 or any amount that works for you.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ossoff-dnc?refcode=em250620&refcode2=655_2563979_v6YEe6&akid=655%2E2563979%2Ev6YEe6)
The average online donation to our campaign is around $30. Many give less. Some give more.
All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can to power our grassroots campaign. Please, contribute today.
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ossoff-dnc?refcode=em250620&refcode2=655_2563979_v6YEe6&akid=655%2E2563979%2Ev6YEe6)**
Thanks for being part of this team.
As always,
Jon Ossoff

Paid for by Harris Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Harris for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY.
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. Thank you so much for being a supporter. But we don't want to bother you. If you’d like to unsubscribe, you can **[click here.](https://harris.actionkit.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=655%2E2563979%2Ev6YEe6)**

The George Soros elected, Pro-Criminal, Trump-Deranged DEI hire that has turned my beloved New York City into a third-world Hellscape.If you think that sounds too dramatic, just look at a few examples of what Alvin Bragg’s “weak-on-crime,” Trump-obsessed tenure has brought to the law-abiding citizens of New York:
---
* An innocent woman set on fire by a Guatemalan Illegal Alien who had already been deported at least once before...
* A mob of Illegal criminals caught on video assaulting two New York City Law Enforcement officers outside a “Migrant Shelter,” all **released without bail by Alvin Bragg!**

---
Instead of working for the last 4 years to make the Citizens of New York safe and secure, Alvin has been on a singular, sick, twisted mission and one mission only -- TAKE DOWN DONALD TRUMP.That’s what he ran on...Those were his marching orders from George Soros and his Radical donors...And those are orders he dutifully followed -- at the expense of not only those of us who live in New York, but every single American that deserved to vote in a fair election not tainted by a ridiculous set of trumped-up charges made up out of thin air.New Yorkers deserve better...Americans deserve better.That’s why -- whether you live right here in Manhattan, a thousand miles away in Des Moines, Iowa, or anywhere else in our great country -- I hope you’ll help me defeat Alvin Bragg. **[Would you consider helping my campaign with a one-time $28 contribution today?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvm8vm3ttr2s6m3mgrt481p6mn98fk037kq2oe50_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5j69pr6c9h2bs)** I could really use your help.Alvin Bragg has millions of dollars pouring into his campaign by the same Radicals who put him there the first time around...
---
* George Soros
* Hollywood Celebrities
* Elites right here in New York and Hollywood
* The deep pockets of the Democrat election machine

---
I don’t have any of that on my side -- but I hope I’ve got YOU on my side.To have any chance of beating the Democrat machine funding Alvin Bragg’s run for re-election, I need a nationwide army of Americans to rally by my side...A nationwide army of Americans who understand how toxic it is having a Radical like Alvin Bragg in charge of the criminal justice system of one of our largest cities...Who know how close Alvin Bragg came to knocking Donald Trump out of the 2024 Presidential election and what that would have done to our country... Who watched in disgust as Alvin Bragg conjured up a 34-count felony conviction against a man whose only real crime was trying to Make America Great Again!This is our chance to send a clear message not only to the people of New York -- but the nation -- that these Radicals put into place by George Soros to do his bidding are not invincible...That they CAN be defeated! Alvin Bragg is the perfect example of why I left the Democrat party.I think it all started when my 11-year-old got COVID... We were told to mask in the house and give my son meals in his room for 10 days. Instead, we cuddled up & watched TV together -- unmasked in the living room and ate our meals as a family at the dinner table. That was a watershed moment for me.What were we doing?When did the United States of America turn into a place where the Government told us how to live?When I dared to suggest that it may not be the best idea for biological boys to participate in girls’ sports, I was all but run out of town on a rail... Then I dared suggest that the complete failure of our school system might be due to something other than racism, I -- after a lifetime of considering myself a liberal Democrat -- was labeled a “Right Wing Extremist” by the New York Times!The blinders came off -- suddenly, I realized that if simply acknowledging the truth, calling out corruption and challenging the long-held beliefs of the Democrat machine disqualified me from being a Democrat.The truth will set you free -- and it’s an honor to represent you on the “Freedom Side” of the wall.I’ve been in their camp.As a former Democrat and as a mom raising four kids in Manhattan. I know how much they are getting wrong. And how bad it is for our children. **[That’s why I’m asking good folks like you to help me.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4e2gfs0b3erbn03odddn64kri3gt314onj0ik5o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5j69pr6c9h2bs)** It’s going to take all of us to take down Alvin Bragg -- but this has been a season of political miracles!I humbly ask for your help today. I hope you’ll find it in your heart to send a one-time $28 contribution to help me pull off one more political miracle......and send Alvin Bragg back to obscurity where he belongs.He’s bad for New York...He’s bad for America...And he needs to go.One last favor...I know not everybody is going to be able to give that I write to today. **[So if you think you could spare a larger gift -- of $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1,000 or more, a few of those would really help right now.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfglr5dpsisbukrdsg34fq1rmbq2gsh6o12noseg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5j69pr6c9h2bs)** We need a good, strong launch -- and without a few of those larger gifts, we’ll already be behind.Please just send what you can, My Friend.Just reading my email today is a tremendous favor, and I really appreciate it.Thank you, Wish Me Luck, and God Bless You!
---
---
**Maud Maron**

P.S. I guess Alvin Bragg has just been too darn busy to concentrate on the wave of crime and violence washing over New York...While he has spent the last 4 years prosecuting and persecuting President Trump, New York has become a third-world hellscape!New York deserves better...Our Country deserves better...

Will you help me take the place of Alvin Bragg by supporting my campaign to become the District Attorney of Manhattan?**[If so, please rush a one-time gift of $28, $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1,000 or more -- I could really use your help!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z796dn6o0a85k5aj390ju2rgf9ka2hlstpuf9sg8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5j69pr6c9h2bs)**
