A precinct in Rockland County, New York registered 80% of votes cast for Senator Gillibrand, but 0 votes for Vice President Harris in the 2024 election.
Yesterday, the New York State Supreme Court[ ordered a lawsuit demanding a hand-recount of the results to continue](https://substack.com/redirect/54f92c18-26ce-47ec-8f92-2a97c16a120e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to discovery.
Precinct Ramapo 35 registered 552 for [votes for Trump](https://substack.com/redirect/1e5639c9-1104-4cbd-9f1e-6ee08aa33e9a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) but only 82 votes for [the Republican ](https://substack.com/redirect/1872a599-39b0-435b-afd4-0d76a7cf266e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[Senate](https://substack.com/redirect/1872a599-39b0-435b-afd4-0d76a7cf266e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ candidate](https://substack.com/redirect/1872a599-39b0-435b-afd4-0d76a7cf266e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), while Kirsten Gillibrand received 331 votes.
Not only would the 0 votes for Harris be a statistical improbability, but so is the over-vote or "drop-off" for Trump...

Special Presidential Envoy Richard Grenell **[exposed the extremism that has taken over the LGBTQ movement](https://substack.com/redirect/848176e3-2f89-4d4c-b839-e6ba5eb12c76?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , telling woke Politico reporter that "normal gays" have had enough.
He held NOTHING back...
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/848176e3-2f89-4d4c-b839-e6ba5eb12c76?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/848176e3-2f89-4d4c-b839-e6ba5eb12c76?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
During an interview at the Kennedy Center in Washington D.C., Grenell told the reporter that Pride parades and the politics behind the LGBTQ movement have gone way overboard, and it's time for a return to sanity.
"I think the gay community has to police itself," Grenell explained.
"What do you mean by that?" the reporter asked.
**["I mean, you go to a Pride parade and it's embarrassing](https://substack.com/redirect/848176e3-2f89-4d4c-b839-e6ba5eb12c76?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to be honest, it's real fringe and it's too sexual,... and by the way this is extremely popular among normal gays," he said.
"What's a normal gay?" the reporter challenged.
"It's not a radical gay that says 6-year-olds should get their boobs cut off or have hormone replacement therapy," he fired back.
Watch Grenell put the Politico reporter in her place:
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/848176e3-2f89-4d4c-b839-e6ba5eb12c76?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

* * *
# **Iran rejects nuclear talks with U.S. despite Trump's two-week deadline**
Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araqchi said **[there's "no place for talk of dialogue"](https://substack.com/redirect/45587f6a-8d05-42aa-b4c3-771fd040dcec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** as long as Israeli aggression continues, even though Americans have "sent messages several times" requesting negotiations.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/45587f6a-8d05-42aa-b4c3-771fd040dcec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Israel intensified strikes on Iran with orders to completely "destabilize" the regime** \- Israeli forces received Friday orders to increase attacks on Iran, continuing a week-long military campaign that began with a barrage of missiles targeting Tehran and Iranian nuclear facilities.
* **Trump set a two-week timeline to decide whether the U.S. will strike Iran directly** \- The president said Thursday he would make a "final decision" on whether to attack Iran within two weeks, holding out hope that negotiations over Tehran's nuclear program could still take place despite the ongoing conflict.
* **Trump's special envoy for Iran negotiations is notably absent from potential talks** \- Steve Witkoff, who has been in charge of negotiations with Iran, is not scheduled to attend any upcoming discussions, raising questions about the administration's commitment to diplomatic solutions.

* * *
# Steve Bannon meets Trump before decision to extend Iran timeline
Steve Bannon **[met privately with Trump at the White House](https://substack.com/redirect/b4b3de65-be4b-49d4-8668-fddad7c2904f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Thursday, just hours before Trump delayed his Iran strike decision, the New York Daily News reports.
* **Trump extended his decision timeline from days to two weeks, citing potential negotiations with Iran** \- The president said there's a "substantial chance of negotiations that may or may not take place with Iran" and he'll "make my decision to go within the next two weeks," marking a significant departure from the shorter timeline many expected.
* **Bannon represents the anti-interventionist wing pushing against Middle East involvement** \- As a former White House adviser and key voice warning against U.S. involvement in another Middle East conflict, Bannon's meeting comes amid internal debates among Trump allies about avoiding "forever wars" and the extent of American engagement in the region.

Peter, we have an update about this horrible story out of Georgia that we wanted to share with you today.

Earlier this year, a Georgia woman named Adriana Smith was rushed to the hospital at eight weeks pregnant after she woke up gasping for air. The hospital diagnosed her with blood clots in her brain. Hours later, she was declared brain-dead.

Due to Georgia’s abortion ban, doctors were required to keep her on life support to preserve the pregnancy, even though she no longer had brain function. **This week, her baby was delivered, weighing just 1 pound and 13 ounces, and is currently in the neonatal intensive care unit, according to _NBC News_.**

This whole ordeal has been so cruel to everyone involved.

**As a reminder, Smith’s family did not get a choice or say about the decision.** The decision about Smith’s body was made by the Georgia state government, **which consists of an almost entirely male executive branch and a state legislature that is more than 65% male.**

**_We are heartbroken and enraged by this story. We’ve said it before, and we’ll say it again: men should not be making laws that infringe on women’s bodily autonomy._**

[**Research shows that getting __more__ __women__ elected to government – at all levels – is our best defense against laws that threaten women’s rights. Her Bold Move

\----------- Forwarded message ---------
Hi Peter,

Earlier this year, a Georgia woman named Adriana Smith checked into a hospital with what she thought was an intense headache. At the time, Smith was about eight weeks pregnant.

The next day, she was rushed back to the hospital after she woke up gasping for air. The hospital diagnosed her with blood clots in her brain. Hours later, she was declared brain-dead.

Georgia’s abortion ban contains provisions about “fetal personhood”, a doctrine that entitles embryos and fetuses to full legal rights and protections. Since Smith was 8 weeks pregnant, the law has required doctors to keep her on life support to preserve the pregnancy, even though she no longer has brain function. Doctors will deliver the baby, who experts say will have medical challenges and may not survive, through a caesarean section...

**Smith’s family did not get a choice or say about the decision. The decision about Smith’s body was made by the Georgia state government – which consists of an almost entirely male executive branch, and a state legislature that is more than 65% male.**

**_We’ve said it before, and we’ll say it again: men should not be making laws that infringe on women’s bodily autonomy._**

[**There are far too many new laws across the country that give embryos more rights than women. At Her Bold Move, we are working to elect pro-choice, pro-women women who will fight for our daughters, sisters, mothers, grandmothers, neighbors, and friends. Every woman deserves bodily autonomy – and we know that getting more women elected to government will be our best defense against any law that threatens that right. Monica Simpson, Executive Director of SisterSong, the lead plaintiff in a lawsuit challenging Georgia’s abortion law, said Smith’s family, "deserved the right to have decision-making power about her medical decisions. Instead, they have endured over 90 days of retraumatization, expensive medical costs, and the cruelty of being unable to resolve and move toward healing.”

**Georgia state Senator Ed Setzler,_who sponsored the state’s abortion ban_** , has taken the opposite view. He told the _Associated Press_ that “it is completely appropriate that the hospital do what they can to save the life of the child.”

_Why is a man sponsoring a state’s abortion ban???_ Something is deeply wrong with this picture and, at Her Bold Move, we’re on a mission to solve it.

[**We desperately need more women in office advocating for women constituents and their bodies. We cannot allow this to continue. Rush $20.25 or whatever you can now to help us fight back with the best defense we’ve got: more qualified WOMEN in the rooms where decisions about our bodies are being made. →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109918891/552697697/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250620fwd_N_JZ_90DO_7_NG_N_L3&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxYzI5MmE4LWRhNGQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cOLVq9JMvfNHZ8gE9aruL6vnTIrGRqXphX97kDZjGAY=)

clean_body: Her baby was delivered...| | | | | = Peter, we have an update about this horrible story out of Georgia that we wanted to share with you today. Earlier this year, a Georgia woman named Adriana Smith was rushed to the hospital at eight weeks pregnant after she woke up gasping for air. The hospital diagnosed her with blood clots in her brain. Hours later, she was declared brain-dead. Due to Georgia’s abortion ban, doctors were required to keep her on life support to preserve the pregnancy, even though she no longer had brain function. This week, her baby was delivered, weighing just 1 pound and 13 ounces, and is currently in the neonatal intensive care unit, according to NBC News. This whole ordeal has been so cruel to everyone involved. As a reminder, Smith’s family did not get a choice or say about the decision. The decision about Smith’s body was made by the Georgia state government, which consists of an almost entirely male executive branch and a state legislature that is more than 65% male. We are heartbroken and enraged by this story. We’ve said it before, and we’ll say it again: men should not be making laws that infringe on women’s bodily autonomy. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = In solidarity, Jordan Zaslow Founder & Executive Director Her Bold Move \----------- Forwarded message --------- Hi Peter, Earlier this year, a Georgia woman named Adriana Smith checked into a hospital with what she thought was an intense headache. At the time, Smith was about eight weeks pregnant. The next day, she was rushed back to the hospital after she woke up gasping for air. The hospital diagnosed her with blood clots in her brain. Hours later, she was declared brain-dead. Georgia’s abortion ban contains provisions about “fetal personhood”, a doctrine that entitles embryos and fetuses to full legal rights and protections. Since Smith was 8 weeks pregnant, the law has required doctors to keep her on life support to preserve the pregnancy, even though she no longer has brain function. Doctors will deliver the baby, who experts say will have medical challenges and may not survive, through a caesarean section... Smith’s family did not get a choice or say about the decision. The decision about Smith’s body was made by the Georgia state government – which consists of an almost entirely male executive branch, and a state legislature that is more than 65% male. name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Take Action: Sign Up To Support Only Citizens Vote Month
body:
It’s time to stop noncitizen voting once and for all!
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** **** It's finally arrived--you can help us get the SAVE Act across the finish line and signed into law by signing up to participate in **_Only Citizens Vote Month_** in August!
**[Only Citizens Vote Month](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794ac15d96f/1edb9794ac15593b "https://www.teapartypatriots.org/only-citizens-vote-month/")** will take place during the August Congressional recess, which means you have the opportunity to speak directly with your representatives through actions like sign waving, visiting local offices, and mobilizing other concerned patriots. While election security has improved since 2020, our system still requires further reforms to be fully secure.
However, more voters need to understand that loopholes exist that allow noncitizens to register to vote, and subsequently to cast a ballot. If they don't understand what's happening, they won't join us in advocating for the SAVE Act's passage. Additionally, members of Congress need to fully comprehend that the mass majority of Americans want this passed and signed into law.
Though it might seem like August is a long way away, we want to show up big and that means planning cannot start soon enough. When you **[sign up on our website](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794ac15d96f/1edb9794ac15593d "https://www.teapartypatriots.org/only-citizens-vote-month/")**[**,**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794ac15d96f/1edb9794ac15593f) you're telling us that you want to do _something_ to support election integrity in August, no matter how big or small. We will provide more details, resources, and suggestions as we get closer to August, but we need to know if you are willing to join us in this endeavor to secure American elections.

__ **__****__****__****__** __ **__** **** ************
---
| | [ SIGN ME UP ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794ac15d96f/1edb9794ac155941)
---
| **** ********************We are also hosting training sessions to answer all of your questions and help you plan your activities. See below for the July training schedule.
**Dates for Training Sessions (all times listed in eastern time):**
1. Tuesday, July 8th at 2:00 pm
2. Thursday, July 17th at 6:00 pm
3. Tuesday, July 22nd at 6:00 pm
4. Thursday, July 31st at 2:00 pm
**[Sign up today](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794ac15d96f/1edb9794ac155943 "https://www.teapartypatriots.org/only-citizens-vote-month/")** to let us know that you want to make sure only U.S. citizens vote in U.S. elections, and then send the link to everyone you know who cares about election integrity!
In liberty,Jenny Beth Martin __ **__****__****__****__** __ **__** **** ************
---
| | [ CONTRIBUTE ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794ac15d96f/1edb9794ac155945)
---
|
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794ac15d96f/1edb9794ac155947)
---

**We’ve been in awe of how organizers and supporters like you have rallied behind our democratic values, our collective goals, and our shared future.** We want to thank you for powering our end-of-quarter goal to elect state Democrats who will stand up in the face of division, fear, and authoritarianism. You’ve shown up for our party, so we want to do a little something to stand with you: **A coalition of donors has agreed to match all gifts to the DLCC Victory Fund FIVE times.** That means by working together, every grassroots contribution will be 5X as impactful through our end-of-quarter deadline. **[Make a 5X-matched contribution today →](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDrlfwLFRup_C-Uxypt_ZFiP02ytnZvCXzT_BzpW4IYW4z3uttBwUccWJjv7nT2QBf_aci5IDK30zhPHqfZwBlzsVV2qkr7P0XXdkIFgK6xsebyABevsd8BK4M85BQp9VaVZTEfZzZBCCSWfwZQk4Z0F5RQb3KTtF5LL-w7hTJUN65t896pUKATMyYEppQ1d66D1V2Nk_ij18rHKHW3mtN59TyKgXXD9hrnYHGrKumRzbQPT86SYdlDxG1tSxkI_wTjxVNc2xsuyhMfjq-UYpxibpgFFVX6o9JFd3M1uLAUBbdgTYVr3bsuYyX17z8mwD8Fieyjl9P8QyVelLdkZBdzAzRDlKmpdPAFMxwJ_wLmYScAEtUQ1vHYRloVfprHthF7XXrBO_JhAd5B8dmixREDA/4hi/r7nWH-WWQ5SN1i4RyHmgyw/h0/h001.R7DysIBE-3QqAIlnncKk7Uale-ya6peQMpmXOX53k94)** The stakes in the states are high, and they’ll continue to rise ahead of this fall’s consequential elections in Virginia. clean_body: Will you rush a 5X-matched $7 gift right now to help hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal to elect state Dems and show MAGA Republicans that we’re NOT backing down? | | | | | ---|--- We’ve been in awe of how organizers and supporters like you have rallied behind our democratic values, our collective goals, and our shared future. We want to thank you for powering our end-of-quarter goal to elect state Democrats who will stand up in the face of division, fear, and authoritarianism. You’ve shown up for our party, so we want to do a little something to stand with you: A coalition of donors has agreed to match all gifts to the DLCC Victory Fund FIVE times. That means by working together, every grassroots contribution will be 5X as impactful through our end-of-quarter deadline. The stakes in the states are high, and they’ll continue to rise ahead of this fall’s consequential elections in Virginia. State Democrats are competing in ultra-competitive races in the coming months, and we need to be ready to compete and win nationwide. We’ve fallen short of our fundraising goals all quarter – but if we work together, we can hit our $150,000 EOQ goal to power Democrats to victory and show the GOP we’re not backing down. Don’t miss this opportunity to optimize your gift to the DLCC. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | If we fall short of our goal again , we may not have the resources in place to beat our extreme opponents in upcoming elections. Our future is worth standing up for, and it starts with folks like you taking action today. Together. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: We need an offense to go along with our defense
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Democrats have been on their heels.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2292%2E135344%2EJf1VBc)

Friends -
Democrats have been on their heels. We’ve spent so much time responding to the daily barrage of BS from Donald Trump that we find ourselves playing defense all the time.
We need to own that.
But what we owe the American people is not just a good defense -- but we also have to have an alternative Democratic vision to what is being provided to us every day.
We need an offense.
I was recently asked a great question about this at a town hall recently. Here’s my quick answer:
[**Watch the clip here:**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/3791?t=2&akid=2292%2E135344%2EJf1VBc)
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/3791?t=3&akid=2292%2E135344%2EJf1VBc)
Our middle class needs to grow, and we need to have a plan to do that. Democrats need to chart the way forward, not the BS that's been given to us by Donald Trump.
\- Elissa
* * *

👋🏻 **Wait, before you click away!** 🇺🇸
United States Senators often keep on fundraising after their election ends, but Elissa doesn't want to keep bombarding your inbox with fundraising requests.
What we will do is send you good, timely content - like this message. Stuff you might open without dread.
But she does hope you may consider making a small, monthly recurring contribution. Even just $5 or $10 - so we don't have to send those mass fundraising emails while Elissa is focused on her work as a Senator.
[**Make a recurring contribution to Elissa Slotkin's campaign here.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1960?c0=ebs-em-june25.1m9fWS&refcode=em250620-1&t=4&akid=2292%2E135344%2EJf1VBc)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your recurring contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $10 MONTHLY](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/3243?c0=ebs-em-june25.8pUC7M&refcode=em250620-1&t=5&akid=2292%2E135344%2EJf1VBc)**

name: Mark Harris
subject: Support the One Big Beautiful Bill – Secure Our Future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Harris for Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/markharrisforcongress.com/support-the-one-big-beautiful-bill-secure-our-future?e=4024c5123e)
---
| | [ ](https://markharrisforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=82117f51bb8b79bb18d514427&id=3292b5b551&e=4024c5123e)
---
| **Dear Friend,** I’m reaching out today because we are at a critical juncture in our nation’s history. As your representative, I am committed to fighting for policies that protect our borders, uphold the rule of law, and ensure a prosperous future for all Americans. That’s why I’m asking for your support to help pass the One Big Beautiful Bill – a landmark piece of legislation that will fund mass deportations and make President Trump’s border security measures permanent.

**Why This Matters :**
* **Permanent Border Security : **This bill will provide the resources needed to deploy thousands of additional ICE agents, expand detention capacity, and complete the border wall – measures that are essential to securing our nation and protecting American citizens.
* **Economic Stability :** By addressing the challenges posed by illegal immigration, we can safeguard jobs for American workers and reduce the strain on our social services, ultimately strengthening our economy.
* **Fiscal Responsibility : **While the bill includes significant cuts to address past spending, we must continue to push for deeper reforms to tackle our $34 trillion national debt. Your support is crucial in this effort.

**[This week I joined OAN to discuss all of this, view it now!](https://markharrisforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=82117f51bb8b79bb18d514427&id=ec63a65a39&e=4024c5123e)

[](https://markharrisforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=82117f51bb8b79bb18d514427&id=9a41a9208c&e=4024c5123e)**

---
| _Thank you for standing with us._

Sincerely,

Mark Harris

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Our big deadline in one month
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Why my upcoming fundraising deadline is so important →
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=430%2E181023%2Ek220Vs)
Hi there — Time is short so I’ll get right to the point: One month from now, we are facing the most critical fundraising deadline for our campaign. And I need your help making sure we hit our goals and send a clear message to all who have eyes on this campaign: we are the front runner in the race to be Michigan’s next governor, and we have the resources it will take to win.
Let me explain why this deadline is so important, _especially_ right now [**(but if you’re running short on time, you can chip in right here, right now!).**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/269?c0=jmb-em-q22025.A8dvHW&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250620_AM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=430%2E181023%2Ek220Vs)
Over the last few weeks, Michigan House Republicans have repeatedly come after me.
They voted to hold me in contempt and sued me — all for doing my job to keep our elections safe and secure.
**_Really — this is how they’re choosing to spend their time, instead of working on passing a state budget that will ensure comprehensive funding for our schools and improving health care access in Michigan._**
While these Michigan Republicans play political games, we are building a movement for Michigan — powered by people like you who believe in our work to make Michigan the best place for all of us to call home.
Now, back to that fundraising deadline I mentioned: On July 20, just one month from now, our campaign will prepare our public fundraising report for _everyone_ to see.
Will that report show our strength? Well, that's up to you.
I want everyone to see how powerful our movement is. I want people to know that thousands of Michiganders believe in our message and stand with us as we fight for secure elections, affordable housing and childcare, and more accessible health care.
[**So please, help me show our strength. In honor of our big fundraising deadline in one month, will you pitch in to my campaign for governor today?**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/269?c0=jmb-em-q22025.A8dvHW&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250620_AM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=430%2E181023%2Ek220Vs)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/263?c0=jmb-em-q22025.lB2dD6&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250620_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=430%2E181023%2Ek220Vs)
---
[CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/264?c0=jmb-em-q22025.a7vAC6&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250620_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=430%2E181023%2Ek220Vs)
---
| [CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/265?c0=jmb-em-q22025.QdisXL&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250620_AM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=430%2E181023%2Ek220Vs)
---
[CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/266?c0=jmb-em-q22025.YpMn4N&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250620_AM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=430%2E181023%2Ek220Vs)
---
| [CHIP IN $250 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/605?c0=jmb-em-q22025.YCwtNX&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250620_AM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=430%2E181023%2Ek220Vs)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q22025.rGq0NW&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250620_AM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=430%2E181023%2Ek220Vs)
---
Thank you. I’m grateful to have you on my team.
— Jocelyn

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you.
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-jbmi/?t=10&akid=430%2E181023%2Ek220Vs)

23133 Woodward Ave, Number 116,
Ferndale, MI 48220

When there's an emergency, our clients know exactly what to do. ✔ Make sure all staff & patients are safe

✔ _Call the Center for Reproductive Rights_ Our longtime client Renee Chelian, founder of Northland Family Planning Centers in Michigan, put it simply: _"I have the Center's attorneys on speed dial."_

We answer every call. Fellow American,

TRAPPED behind enemy lines... Pinned down by heavy fire... Nearly overrun by dangerous insurgents...

_No, this is not a story from my time fighting in the War on Terror as a Navy SEAL..._

_**This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester.**_ I’m proud to say we flipped the Senate RED, thanks in part to this win in Montana.

Winning this race wasn’t a “gimme.” We had to claw, scratch, and fight for every single vote. _**That’s because Tester had a WAR CHEST of $25,000,000**_. He threw money at anybody and everybody who’d smear my good name.

It was truly one of the hardest battles of my life.

_Despite all the obstacles_ , I was able to keep fighting to the end because of _one man_ :

**Senator Steve Daines , now my fellow Republican Senator from Montana.**

As Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC), he not only gave me the ammunition we needed to win this fight, _**but he was also instrumental in flipping four Senate seats, giving Republicans the Senate Majority.**_

[**Now I’m writing you because Steve NEEDS our help.**](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=beb8456cdf154c60a3a23431af4272c9&_e=IctMiKrb2nXWH1kcP4HbkbgQwYRmucXI2-0VEpIopN7byaoAUn4_zhjSRa7YP-gPXoL3ZEOUWIr-K83Kw2bfzx-sXFtLXlOySCw4i3SK56vT00lvg7apsYFJHHVpHJ7idrLxgadW-lBIB20YIZbenPsrkMg1ii9kj017svNL9lkVaAm_FDkG0065OFfI4PJx2NRqW0W-YNKTfqrL0Zk1JSz4JBq1UlAgi9MA8mde2f5mIZevhMltHCLxzvfmct1Jro657xj3s8Yrcz6tDb-lUDfkCYq5Uv2B6x9J3aId7IWH9Nvu9rKC7z8UpLG3VE2aU3nRA8YcPE5Boho2swfnBBdieIgKSE508QaBO9vNg1gW-YfOGudxe4LhUghR3LFsYWM8qF0qK0bhw4tQFMrm1xA6y-TJbdPJTogcOwiy-8BtxF2tYdmBSkIF52ZNTwEfVprIE_1t8Xskh1fvg-6cObr8Zzho-haaM7C2PmKl4ANVIENt-LL1jd-yolU5pQ4AYLarOkmNs9dXh1ODzPwQaye8-yKIqnVL7dZtptVs1aGNarRhcF41UIIlrQmBlimdF-ezpm3laKLua5JCXBLaaJqteOsg-dgjdLtXt6ZW7FGJc6GSasPGWdh0qGiaseHN1fjXuxlWx67zMO5iryjZhaPEjZPqOdO9vOLLcKSL8i0-EYbdhC3Xm7URLZ2L8j9EevQwfPDePAsYohcdCACPsUWzFAmXBg8zldAbn9swX8kpRYQhgt6DF_ROE8p1BPmD)

clean_body: This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester | Fellow American, TRAPPED behind enemy lines... Pinned down by heavy fire... Nearly overrun by dangerous insurgents... No, this is not a story from my time fighting in the War on Terror as a Navy SEAL... This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester. I’m proud to say we flipped the Senate RED, thanks in part to this win in Montana. Winning this race wasn’t a “gimme.” We had to claw, scratch, and fight for every single vote. That’s because Tester had a WAR CHEST of $25,000,000. He threw money at anybody and everybody who’d smear my good name. It was truly one of the hardest battles of my life. Despite all the obstacles , I was able to keep fighting to the end because of one man : Senator Steve Daines , now my fellow Republican Senator from Montana. As Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC), he not only gave me the ammunition we needed to win this fight, but he was also instrumental in flipping four Senate seats, giving Republicans the Senate Majority. Steve is up for re-election in 2026. Chuck Schumer and every Democrat in the nation would love nothing more than to see Steve Daines – the Republican Senate Majority Maker! – booted from Congress. 2026 is right around the corner. Steve’s radical opponent has already told the media that every minute since 2024, she’s been building a plan to win in 2026. That means Democrats are already funneling money and resources into this race. The fight to keep this Senate seat in Republican hands will be another knock-down, drag-out fight. For America's Future, Senator Tim Sheehy (R-MT) Former Navy SEAL Purple Heart Recipient P.S. We all have Steve to thank for booting Chuck Schumer out of the Majority Leader’s chair! The radicals in the Democrat party are FUMING. They’d love nothing more than to send Steve packing for his role in producing the 2024 Republican Trifecta. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana -

name: Sherrod
subject: They're taking away Americans’ health care to pay corporations and billionaires
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dignity of Work PAC
body:
| | |
---
Friend, there’s nothing beautiful about Donald Trump’s so-called Big, Beautiful Bill.
In fact, it’s a terrible piece of legislation. It guts Medicaid and SNAP, handing working people’s tax dollars over to billionaires and big corporations. It rips away health care from working families who are already struggling and could force countless parents to skip meals – while their tax dollars go to pay for more tax cuts for billionaires and corporations that continue to raise prices.
We can’t sit back and do nothing. That's why I started the Dignity of Work PAC and why I'm asking for you to join me in this fight.
So here I am, friend, personally asking you to raise your voice with me. **[Will you take a moment to answer our new survey before midnight tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109924431/552711768/-514624745?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk38-su-nd&code=jtk38-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTNlMDY4ZS1kZjRkLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3PnCaWm6IRmaFKHY93S7B7hqzEEHWEOl2X0gmQTDWPk=&emci=5d5057eb-e24a-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ba3e068e-df4d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=18332626)**

I grew up in the union town of Mansfield, Ohio, where I saw firsthand what happens when politicians like Trump put billionaires and corporate profits over workers – communities fall apart, jobs vanish and kids grow up thinking they’ll never have any real shot at a better life.
But I’ve also seen what happens when we fight back – when we organize, stand up and elect leaders who fight for the folks who make this country work.
That’s what the Dignity of Work is about. It means you shouldn’t have to choose between buying groceries and going to the doctor. It means your hard work should pay off, no matter who you are or what you do. That’s what we’re fighting for.

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: Medicare is next on the GOP's chopping block, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
I urgently need your help to fight back.
| | |
---
Friend, after pushing for the largest cuts to Medicaid and SNAP in history, Senate Republicans are now discussing potential cuts to Medicare, too.
They _don’t care_ that more than 71 million people rely on Medicaid. Or that 42 million Americans receive food stamps. Or that 68.5 million people get their health care through Medicare.
**In fact, the** _only_**person Senate Republicans are worried about right now is Donald Trump – who is ready to harm hardworking families to pay for **$3.8 trillion in tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy.
But let me tell you, friend: I wasn’t elected to the Senate to please Donald Trump or his billionaire buddies. I am fighting alongside Senate Democrats with everything I have to help more people access health care, get enough to eat, and care for their families.
**If you're with us, will you help me reach my midnight fundraising goal? I'm counting on your immediate grassroots support to help me close our $750 shortfall and take on the GOP’s budget cuts and Trump's disastrous agenda.**

clean_body: I urgently need your help to fight back. | | | Friend, after pushing for the largest cuts to Medicaid and SNAP in history, Senate Republicans are now discussing potential cuts to Medicare, too. They don’t care that more than 71 million people rely on Medicaid. Or that 42 million Americans receive food stamps. Or that 68.5 million people get their health care through Medicare. In fact, the onlyperson Senate Republicans are worried about right now is Donald Trump – who is ready to harm hardworking families to pay for $3.8 trillion in tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy. But let me tell you, friend: I wasn’t elected to the Senate to please Donald Trump or his billionaire buddies. I am fighting alongside Senate Democrats with everything I have to help more people access health care, get enough to eat, and care for their families. If you're with us, will you help me reach my midnight fundraising goal? I'm counting on your immediate grassroots support to help me close our $750 shortfall and take on the GOP’s budget cuts and Trump's disastrous agenda. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for being in this fight with me. – Jacky | | = A note from Sen. Jacky Rosen: Friend, I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to deliver progress for people across Nevada and our country. But with Donald Trump in the White House and Republicans in control of both houses of Congress, I need your grassroots support to keep up the fights that matter most. Senate Democrats like me are the only thing standing in the way of Trump's extreme agenda that will hurt everyday Americans. name: Office of U.S. Senator Angela Alsobrooks
subject: Senator Alsobrooks Newsletter – GENIUS Act
body:
|

---
Friends and neighbors, I am excited to share the bipartisan Guiding and Establishing National Innovation for U.S. Stablecoins of 2025 (GENIUS) Act - a bipartisan bill I cosponsored alongside Senators Gillibrand (D-N.Y.), Hagerty (R-Tenn.), and Lummis (R-Wyo.) - passed the United States Senate on Tuesday. This is critical stablecoin legislation, and I want to tell you why this is so important for Maryland and American consumers. I believe this legislation is a good first step for determining how we as a country will regulate stablecoins, an important piece of the broader crypto market. This marks the first time the Senate has ever passed comprehensive legislation to address digital assets. I am excited by this emerging technology and will continue to work with my colleagues on both sides of the aisle to keep America and Americans at the forefront. My priorities throughout this process have been spurring innovation, ensuring that innovation stays in America, and making sure this multi-billion dollar emerging market remains fair, competitive, and accessible for each and every American. What are Stablecoins? Stablecoins are digital currencies tied to the U.S. dollar that facilitate easier, quicker, and cheaper payments between people or companies. Stablecoins make it easier for people to send money to loved ones overseas and provide a new form of payment structure that ensures the U.S. dollar's global dominance. Why is this legislation important? I don't want Maryland families to live on the margins - I want all of you to be able to build wealth, and live beyond your wildest dreams. Far too often, when there is an emerging market, we wait too long to regulate that market, make it safe for consumers, and accessible for those who should have the chance to access its benefits. I cosponsored this legislation, because I firmly believe it is crucial we develop regulations and consumer protections that foster innovation in the U.S., including for stablecoins. It's clear that more and more Americans view the broader digital asset market as a genuine opportunity to build wealth, create jobs, and more. I don't believe it is the government's place to advise the public on what and how to invest, but it is our duty to make sure every marketplace has protections and guardrails. I am particularly proud of the language I secured through hard-fought negotiations to protect consumers and community banks. As more Marylanders and Americans participate in this emerging market, it is crucial that we in Congress do not drag our feet. Stablecoins are already a $250 billion industry, and these technologies are growing. Without this bill, the public will continue to engage with a rapidly growing industry with no guardrails and no regulatory framework. The GENIUS Act changes that. What About Corruption? I joined all Democrats in voting NO on a previous version of the bill because it did not do enough to fight corruption, protect consumers, and prevent Big Tech companies from interfering in the U.S. financial system. This bill does not include everything I would have liked - namely preventing President Trump and his family from using their position to profit off the stablecoin market. To that end, I have cosponsored the End Crypto Corruption Act, which bans the President, Vice President, Senior Executive Branch Officials, Members of Congress, and their immediate families from financially benefiting from issuing, endorsing, or sponsoring crypto assets, such as meme coins and stablecoins. The GENIUS Act represents an important first step in protecting consumers and promoting innovation. Our work is not done, and I will continue to advocate for legislation that advances American interests, protects consumers, and fights corruption. **Fighting Through Legislation** It has been a busy week here in Washington, and I wanted to share additional bills that I have cosponsored this week, including pieces of legislation to require the President, his family, and public officials to be held to a high standard, preventing them from capitalizing from various interests while in office. Presidential Conflicts of Interest Act of 2025
* This bill would require the President and Vice President to divest from conflicting financial interests through a qualified blind trust.

COIN Act
* This bill would create commonsense guardrails to prevent the financial exploitation of digital assets by public officials, including the President and their immediate family.

CDFI Bond Guarantee Improvement Act
* Community Development Financial Institutions (CDFIs) are specialized financial institutions that provide affordable loans and financial services to underserved communities. The CDFI Bond Guarantee Program (BGP), created under the Small Business Jobs Act of 2010, offers long-term, low-cost capital to eligible CDFIs. This bipartisan bill would permanently reauthorize the CDFIs BGP, specifically reducing the minimum issuance amount from $100 million to $25 million and eliminating the cap on the number of guarantees.

Bring Animals Relief and Kibble (BARK) Act
* This bipartisan bill would allow individuals, nonprofit organizations and governments to make good faith donations of food and other pet supplies to local shelters, with the intent that those donations would be provided to the animals, without facing civil or criminal liability should something happen to one of the animals as a result of the donated items.

Canyon's Law
* This bill would require that no later than 30 days after the date of the enactment, any federal, state, or county agency that has prepared, placed, installed, set, or deployed an M-44 device on public land must remove it. These devices are only about 50% effective in killing their intended targets. However, estimates show that more than 50 family dogs have been killed since 1990, and those numbers are believed to be higher.

World Sickle Cell Awareness Day Resolution
* This resolution designates June 19, 2025, as World Sickle Cell Awareness Day. It also recognizes the urgent need to expand access to screening, treatment, and cures for sickle cell disease (SCD) and calls for coordinated federal leadership and global partnerships to address the burden of SCD.

**Here to Serve You** Our constituent services team stands ready to assist you! If you are a veteran who needs help navigating the Department of Veterans Affairs, if you're having trouble navigating Social Security, the IRS or immigration, please reach out to our team by filling out the applicable form [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14095.9762311.5461312.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.alsobrooks.senate.gov%2fservices%2fcasework%2f&redir_log=48139330565369). **Stay Informed** I know these are difficult times. But please know that I will continue fighting for you every step of the way. We will not give up. We will not give in to this Administration, and I ask that you continue to fight alongside us. Please continue to reach out to us. You can call the office, connect with us, or find resources for those who have been laid off at [alsobrooks.senate.gov](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14095.9762311.5461312.7190525&report_id=&redirect=http%3a%2f%2falsobrooks.senate.gov&redir_log=983830187668200). You can also follow us on Bluesky, Instagram, Facebook, Threads, YouTube, and X. We are in this TOGETHER. Sincerely, Angela D. Alsobrooks
United States Senator

name: The Democrats
subject: Mikie Sherrill
body:
---
Derek, As you read this email, Democrats in New Jersey are beginning a sprint to Election Day. **[Now that the general election is underway, we’re reaching out to ask if you can make a $3 contribution to help Democrats reach as many voters as possible in states like New Jersey in the coming weeks:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-june-2025?refcode=em_20250620_3541_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3541_22930333_8ygQrt&akid=3541%2E22930333%2E8ygQrt)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-june-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250620_3541_fr&refcode2=3541_22930333_8ygQrt&akid=3541%2E22930333%2E8ygQrt)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-june-2025?refcode=em_20250620_3541_fr&refcode2=3541_22930333_8ygQrt&akid=3541%2E22930333%2E8ygQrt)**
---
****
If you’re undecided, we hope you’ll give us a chance to explain why your support makes a difference, especially right now:
In November, voters in New Jersey will elect their next governor. If history is any indication, this will be a tight race that could very well come down to a few thousand votes.
Democrat Mikie Sherrill — a U.S. Naval Academy graduate, Navy helicopter pilot, former federal prosecutor, wife, and mother of four — currently serves New Jersey in Congress and is running on a platform to make life easier and more affordable for Garden State families.
Meanwhile, her opponent fully supports the disastrous policies Trump is implementing in Washington, saying, “When I’m president, we’re gonna do the same in New Jersey.”
The choice in this election couldn’t be clearer, but in a race this close, it’s going to take all hands on deck to make sure Democrats have the resources we’ll need to reach as many voters as possible in the lead-up to Election Day.

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 6/20/2025
body:
SCOTUS backs states protecting minors from transgender treatment—Colorado lawmakers say HB25-1312 defies it
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Happy Friday,
TOMORROW IS THE BIG DAY and we are [SOLD OUT](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! We can’t wait to welcome you to the **Mountain Majesty Gala** for an unforgettable evening of patriotism, community, and celebration. A huge thank you to our amazing sponsors—this night wouldn’t be possible without your support. Can’t make it? Be sure to follow along live on our social media channels for behind-the-scenes moments and real-time updates!
---
Now to the news. Listen to today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** HB25-1312 is under fire by four Colorado lawmakers as they weigh in on the []()[recent Supreme Court ruling](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) backing states that protect minors from transgender medical interventions. Meanwhile, CEO Jennifer Sey is [suing the state over HB25-1312](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), saying it punishes businesses for using biologically accurate language. Colorado’s economy is flashing warning signs: [recession odds are up](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), TABOR refunds may vanish, and Denver faces major layoffs amid a [$250M deficit](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). A state audit also uncovered [$29M in prison budget errors](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and severe staffing gaps.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** New federal rules require student visa applicants to make their [social media public](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). At the same time, a [SALT tax cap hike](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) is being slammed as a giveaway to blue-state elites at red states’ expense.
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** Miranda Devine reveals how Biden’s DOJ tried to charge Trump [over the J6 choir](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—based on nothing more than a partisan news clip. Rep. Ryan Gonzalez argues Congress must step up on [immigration reform](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). And Russ Andrews makes the case that illegal immigration [isn’t just a border issue](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—it’s a strategic play to shift congressional power by inflating population counts in deep-blue sanctuary cities.
This is the Mountain Minute for Friday, June 20, 2025.
– Team RMV
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[SCOTUS backs states protecting minors from transgender treatment—Colorado lawmakers say HB25-1312 defies it](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
A landmark U.S. Supreme Court decision upholding Tennessee’s restrictions on gender-related medical interventions for minors has reignited scrutiny over Colorado’s HB25-1312, with several Republican lawmakers calling the ruling a clear rebuke to the law’s premise—and a warning to parents.
“I was so happy with the Supreme Court’s ruling. I hope it leads to the State of Colorado being sued for the passing and the Governor’s signing of HB25-1312,” said Sen. Janice Rich (Mesa County).
That ruling, issued June 18 in U.S. v. Skrmetti, affirmed that Tennessee’s restrictions on puberty blockers and hormone treatments for youth were constitutionally sound because the state had a legitimate interest in protecting minors from harm.
The majority opinion, authored by Chief Justice John Roberts, noted Tennessee had determined such treatments “can lead to the minor becoming irreversibly sterile, having increased risk of disease and illness, or suffering from adverse and sometimes fatal psychological consequences.”
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Andrews: Every illegal immigrant counted helps the left keep power](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Russ Andrews argues that illegal immigrants are shifting political power—not through voting, but by inflating Census counts that determine Congressional districts, disproportionately benefiting sanctuary cities and blue states.
* Roughly 34 million illegal immigrants are estimated to be in the U.S., and even after accounting for some in red areas, Andrews estimates they help the left retain about 27 Congressional seats.
* He warns that mass deportation is essential before the 2030 Census, as each 760,000 illegal immigrants removed could eliminate one left-leaning district's advantage.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Free Speech on Trial: Colorado Pushes Ideology, CEO Pushes Back](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE WASHINGTON TIMES](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Jennifer Sey, CEO of XX-XY Athletics, is suing Colorado over HB25-1312, arguing it forces her company to use language that contradicts its core values and violates the First Amendment.
* The law expands anti-discrimination protections to include “chosen names” and pronouns, which Sey says undermines biological reality and women’s sports.
* Represented by Alliance Defending Freedom, Sey filed a preemptive federal lawsuit to challenge the law before enforcement, echoing past successful free speech cases in Colorado.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[“Too many wolves”: Congress and DOI signal shift on gray wolf policy](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN****| NATIONAL | JUNE 18** _At a House Natural Resources Committee hearing last week, frustration among ranchers, landowners and state officials across the West boiled over. What followed wasn’t just venting—it was a coordinated push by lawmakers and the Interior Department to delist the gray wolf and rein in the Endangered Species Act’s long hold on predator policy._
__
**[Montrose Commissioner Pond: GORP Is a Land Grab. Period.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY SEAN POND | COMMENTARY | JUNE 18** _The Gunnison Outdoor Resources Protection Act GORP is being advertised as a community driven conservation success story. It’s not. It’s a federal land grab wrapped in pretty paper, designed to sell the illusion of balance while slowly destroying everything that makes Western Colorado worth living in._
__
**[Garbo: If true, it’s the greatest violation of American sovereignty in modern history](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY C. J. GARBO | COMMENTARY | JUNE 18** _According to new reports, the FBI has obtained intelligence confirming that China has produced and distributed fake U.S. driver’s licenses to facilitate fraudulent mail-in ballot voting. Let that sink in._
__

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**🚊 DID YOU KNOW?** In honor of Eric Trump keynoting our Mountain Majesty Gala, here's a fun fact! The Trump siblings all have **Secret Service code names** – Eric’s is reportedly “Marksman,” fitting his outdoorsy persona. Growing up, Eric spent his summers in the Czech countryside near Zlín with his maternal grandparents—where he learned to hunt and fish from his grandfather. Donald Trump’s Secret Service code name was “Mogul,” and Ivanka’s is “Marvel.”
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "Under President Trump, freedom will never be a thing of the past." – Eric Trump
|

| | Team, events in Mississippi should give us all pause and show us why we need to fight in every state nationwide. **Mississippi has an egregious voting rights record** and has the highest level of felony disenfranchisement in the country. A Jim Crow-era constitutional provision enables Mississippi to disenfranchise more than 10% of its total voting-age population and _its disenfranchisement of Black voters exceeds 15%_. Mississippi has no early voting opportunities and a narrow set of qualifications for those seeking to vote absentee, meaning that the vast majority of ballots are cast on Election Day. **This inaccessibility contributes to the state’s notoriously dismal voter turnout:** In 2024’s primary election, only 30% of those registered to vote turned out, the lowest rate since 2007. This is nothing new. On Election Day 2023, **at least nine polling locations in the state’s most populous county** — _Hinds County, home of the city of Jackson_ — **ran out of ballots multiple times throughout the day**. The fight to extend polling hours became a confusing jumble of legal filings and contradicting orders all as voters waited in line -- _and many left entirely due to the lack of ballots_. Also in Hinds County, opponents of voting rights in the state legislature have previously taken aim at Jackson and its over 80% Black population by **creating a new court system with an unelected judge** in a portion of Jackson and expanding the state-run Capitol Police force’s jurisdiction to cover the entire city rather than just a handful of government buildings. Mississippi's playbook is clear: Disenfranchise, limit ballot access, obscure legal pathways for justice, rely on Jim Crow laws still on the books, and codify control for decades. **Their endgame is power and control** , not fairness or freedom. [**Team: Mississippi's voters deserve a real democracy. Stand up to make every vote count and every voice heard in Mississippi and beyond with $25 or whatever you can today >>**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109930912/552726420/1723810624?am=25.00&contactdata=0nj3bCyrMSztrhAVu/T4oBENSmQ0S2LNoMmJIIXO000mKMZTBp7vhAhOGJdvn2h+gT/4BnG1vtft5ncyiu5Z93S4re6IhVKpTZD2pMgmAzI=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEyN2E1YmE5LWU3NGQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Ln77hjor8l6V7M-GNzTNy90hz-WwTtjWquw8cqfDnYQ=&emci=8c069fdd-de4d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=a27a5ba9-e74d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=33603084)

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.

Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. [**Your support is crucial to our efforts. clean_body: AP: Mississippi has a history of voter suppression. Many see signs of change as Black voters reengage.| | | Team, we're intimately aware of the challenges we need to overcome to make sure our voices are heard in our elections -- because our partners on the ground have been facing down the opponents of voting rights for years. | | | | | Team, events in Mississippi should give us all pause and show us why we need to fight in every state nationwide. Mississippi has an egregious voting rights record and has the highest level of felony disenfranchisement in the country. A Jim Crow-era constitutional provision enables Mississippi to disenfranchise more than 10% of its total voting-age population and its disenfranchisement of Black voters exceeds 15%. Mississippi has no early voting opportunities and a narrow set of qualifications for those seeking to vote absentee, meaning that the vast majority of ballots are cast on Election Day. This inaccessibility contributes to the state’s notoriously dismal voter turnout: In 2024’s primary election, only 30% of those registered to vote turned out, the lowest rate since 2007. This is nothing new. On Election Day 2023, at least nine polling locations in the state’s most populous county — Hinds County, home of the city of Jackson — ran out of ballots multiple times throughout the day. The fight to extend polling hours became a confusing jumble of legal filings and contradicting orders all as voters waited in line -- and many left entirely due to the lack of ballots. Also in Hinds County, opponents of voting rights in the state legislature have previously taken aim at Jackson and its over 80% Black population by creating a new court system with an unelected judge in a portion of Jackson and expanding the state-run Capitol Police force’s jurisdiction to cover the entire city rather than just a handful of government buildings. Mississippi's playbook is clear: Disenfranchise, limit ballot access, obscure legal pathways for justice, rely on Jim Crow laws still on the books, and codify control for decades. Their endgame is power and control , not fairness or freedom. If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). name: AMAC Action
subject: President Trump only has 18 months.
body:
My friend, President Trump only has 18 months left until the midterm elections.

| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8o13e2rp5boc35lkorf4sf4ctegggkl40qrt7s0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5gm6o34c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, **[I’m writing to you today because I need your help to secure our elections once and for all and keep America on the path to greatness.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9t4vv6re7akpddraa0vnubnreteb7e43uu8q1r8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5gm6o34c3h2bs)** My friend, President Trump only has 18 months left until the midterm elections. **That’s 18 months to push through as much of his America First agenda as he can while we have a majority in the House and Senate.** I don’t mean to be pessimistic about our chances in the midterms. I’m just being a realist.Historically, the party not in the White House wins control of the House of Representatives in the midterms. That means, in just 18 months we could be right back where we started if young radicals like Hakeem Jeffries and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez regain power and start blocking every one of our efforts. **[That’s why our election integrity efforts must be a priority right now._election integrity efforts_ must be a priority right now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpn0gj1ecd31cou0u8s4hanie4omsqbdr8tss6co_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5gm6o34c3h2bs)**_If we can’t get the SAVE Act through the Senate...__ _ _If we can’t cement President Trump’s “Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections” executive order through legislation...__ __If we can’t stop non-citizens from being counted towards the apportionment of congressional seats and electoral vote counts..._ ...the Left will be free to use every dirty trick in the book for the midterms in 2026, the presidential election in 2028... and beyond.[**AMAC Action, will never give up. But my friend, as a strong conservative senior, we NEED you right there beside us.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z04933juac9hthmcqun77rbpl2636669h4ekp5qg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5gm6o34c3h2bs) My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action****is****the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.** **We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.****Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.** **And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the****is****sues.** Friend, with the support of patriotic seniors like you, in just the past few months AMAC Action has been able to:
---
** Hold 100 meetings with Congress -- this year alone! And send 40 Letters of Support on a variety of issues that are important to you including opposing benefits for non-citizens. ** Support President Trump’s executive order “Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections.” This order requires that all mail-in and absentee ballots be received by Election Day, directs the DOJ to enforce laws prohibiting noncitizen voting, and instructs federal agencies to maintain accurate voter rolls. ** Answer the call from Speaker Johnson to mobilize our supporters and get 7,000 messages sent to Congress to help get the SAVE Act passed in the House of Representatives. The SAVE Act ensures only American citizens vote in American elections.** Launch calls-to-action in individual states to stop illegal immigrants from voting. ** And unite thousands of Americans around our “BAN NONCITIZEN VOTING” petition drive that calls for an amendment to the United States Constitution that expressly forbids illegal aliens from voting and from being counted in the census that determines congressional seats and electoral votes.
---
All our work is made possible by brave AMAC Action patriots. But with the stakes higher than ever, we need every conservative freedom fighter standing with us.That means YOU, friend.**[That’s why I hope you’ll click this link to support AMAC Action during this critical time for your sacred vote.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbg31tuk48cqt7nvhfqkgbradumg8jd3va0ut490_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5gm6o34c3h2bs)** We’ve got our work cut out for us as we fight to stop the 11.5 million illegals Joe Biden and Kamala Harris let into our country from:
---
* voting in our elections
* taking benefits reserved for you
* being counted the same as citizens when it comes to apportioning seats in the House of Representatives
* and being counted as citizens when it comes to giving states electoral votes.

---
Letting illegals change the balance of power in Congress and the electoral college means your vote may be fully **canceled out in all future elections**.The Left thinks they can pull a fast one on the American people.You, me and AMAC Action... we can’t let up for one minute. **[And that’s why I hope you’ll pledge your support for AMAC Action with your very best gift today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z39ccdcmghe9sktj5il9acttdboikg47dpprc6oo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5gm6o34c3h2bs)** AMAC Action is taking every step possible to secure our elections because no matter what issue you care about the most – inflation, crime, the 2nd Amendment, Social Security and Medicare solvency, even the right to life......if you and I don’t have a vote... none of it matters. **[That’s what makes your best gift to AMAC Action so important today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zquohm9gsbuc4vgdlsod6q2rvireem4uqd2fnnsg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0c5gm6o34c3h2bs)** So whatever critical amount you decide to return to help us secure our elections and your vote, please respond as soon as possible. We have an ambitious battle plan for the rest of the year—but first I must know that we have the resources to make it happen.I look forward to your response.
---
| | For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**

I’m just being a realist.Historically, the party not in the White House wins control of the House of Representatives in the midterms. That means, in just 18 months we could be right back where we started if young radicals like Hakeem Jeffries and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez regain power and start blocking every one of our efforts. we can’t get the SAVE Act through the Senate... name: Sen. Tim Sheehy
subject: Trapped behind enemy lines
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester |
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=646ef24e8c98408db03a1b3a0af29cd1&_e=gPayBMwJdJHH7WZUjnVj8-XjQpoKmA6KQZNrWapgpv8h2WZAOiEC9bjBvsJTyyYaA0wjdc_qrHktrgbVBTHceK9HWpzeeP3_CJ8WVNQnbGm3DzqcPipHsjMKjvJSaYoyRO-_2onfRt3ZmZbtof4osOmhmXK3-DWqMgIY1fiZfQhQiOOIg7P7oFwSDI8vd_6tXrbe6wFVAEbxrIPuiJu-LaWZvFSVZ_zaoLQ_0mxvAlQc_1farsjbdmOvGb5PL3DBJPMaDyXI62Ek_ZfYUt8X0AUS9pcpi3xELQXtZcgknWFHiM4koK4A0anQOdpjGB9x7Ua3lvE3kA1yi6ff2w_qtSHPk0veDV7n_OhFLV27lQ-wFzCwJxcIuRCYGraKWFJVbBaOzVNHdqUFtYtV5bm6bAkeamTio6FNIZA4my2jgtj13CjdSIO8sOJdjSJBxu3m0ShpRDbLwBEtGCHXr0RcWLWYY0fuJTjOAXXeO6_TlJiUTZ-wTazz5kkvsoTfUZZDr0z6nQmr72K5om8hQBDf4RacDxjJIk-WY2xtujxqKduzeyiQlWZ4kja1b2gjNdx6boQmQCidVMHHQOBdSlV0kmXAdqgIRc5cU387a125LDKx3o-qyS66sWrWxa_-bcXhZbep5P58HS_I4NIsxiMld81LYHOJ4K-k9_uipCm2j3RefK2MbqsAGrZhZ1BVfscnpBZSqGA7jfrc_vjdxJPec5toA8S5cfs5Z3tzEnSH7IQrCJoos8fOVX37BSsAQu3ZP4g77n1VRNTjsmifmCNBlw%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

TRAPPED behind enemy lines... Pinned down by heavy fire... Nearly overrun by dangerous insurgents...

_No, this is not a story from my time fighting in the War on Terror as a Navy SEAL..._

_**This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester.**_ I’m proud to say we flipped the Senate RED, thanks in part to this win in Montana.

Winning this race wasn’t a “gimme.” We had to claw, scratch, and fight for every single vote. _**That’s because Tester had a WAR CHEST of $25,000,000**_. He threw money at anybody and everybody who’d smear my good name.

It was truly one of the hardest battles of my life.

_Despite all the obstacles_ , I was able to keep fighting to the end because of _one man_ :

clean_body: This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester | Fellow American, TRAPPED behind enemy lines... Pinned down by heavy fire... Nearly overrun by dangerous insurgents... No, this is not a story from my time fighting in the War on Terror as a Navy SEAL... This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester. I’m proud to say we flipped the Senate RED, thanks in part to this win in Montana. Winning this race wasn’t a “gimme.” We had to claw, scratch, and fight for every single vote. That’s because Tester had a WAR CHEST of $25,000,000. He threw money at anybody and everybody who’d smear my good name. It was truly one of the hardest battles of my life. Despite all the obstacles , I was able to keep fighting to the end because of one man : Senator Steve Daines , now my fellow Republican Senator from Montana. As Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC), he not only gave me the ammunition we needed to win this fight, but he was also instrumental in flipping four Senate seats, giving Republicans the Senate Majority. Steve is up for re-election in 2026. Chuck Schumer and every Democrat in the nation would love nothing more than to see Steve Daines – the Republican Senate Majority Maker! – booted from Congress. 2026 is right around the corner. Steve’s radical opponent has already told the media that every minute since 2024, she’s been building a plan to win in 2026. That means Democrats are already funneling money and resources into this race. The fight to keep this Senate seat in Republican hands will be another knock-down, drag-out fight. For America's Future, Senator Tim Sheehy (R-MT) Former Navy SEAL Purple Heart Recipient P.S. We all have Steve to thank for booting Chuck Schumer out of the Majority Leader’s chair! The radicals in the Democrat party are FUMING. They’d love nothing more than to send Steve packing for his role in producing the 2024 Republican Trifecta. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

I've heard from Vermonters across the state who are concerned about Trump's dictator-like crackdowns, disastrous billionaire-first budget, and dangerous disregard for due process. I want to hear from you, too. clean_body: | = Hey Peter, It’s finally starting to feel like summer in Vermont, but our work in the House isn't slowing down any time soon. I've heard from Vermonters across the state who are concerned about Trump's dictator-like crackdowns, disastrous billionaire-first budget, and dangerous disregard for due process. I want to hear from you, too. I wish we could talk face-to-face, Peter, but this survey is the best way for us to check in. | In Congress, I'm doing everything I can to stand up to the Trump administration and their Republican enablers. But I also want to empower folks like you to use your voices and demand better. By , you’re helping me better address the impacts of this regressive and lawless administration. Thanks for making your voice heard. — Becca = mailto:beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont P.O. Box 291 Burlington, VT 05402

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: My op-ed in the New York Times
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

After President Trump’s assassination attempt in September, I wrote an op-ed for the New York Times talking about how we can take action to make our communities safer.
The through line is, as it always is, guns. I believe it is still relevant today. I’ve attached it below.
* * *
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june25.m4W6Vr&refcode=em250620-1-b&t=1&akid=10594%2E3935704%2EzMP7uG)
**Gabby Giffords: It’s the Guns. It’s Always the Guns.**
Sept. 16, 2024
After every shooting, blame and rationalizations fly. I know, because I was shot in the head at a 2011 congressional event near my home in Tucson, Ariz. Eighteen other people were shot at that event, six of whom died. In the weeks that followed, there were all kinds of arguments as to why and how that could have happened. To me, only one rang true: Someone dangerous had access to a gun.
There have now been two assassination attempts on former President Donald Trump in just over two months. Two separate assailants, in possession of semiautomatic weapons, came terrifyingly close to inflicting great harm on him. But the through line here isn’t Mr. Trump. The through line isn’t the Secret Service. The through line isn’t heated rhetoric. The through line is, as it always is, the guns.
We are a country weary of repetitive gun violence. When that happens, you have a school shooting on a Wednesday and the country’s attention has moved on by Friday. You have a country where shootings on interstate highways appear to be a pattern and students in Kentucky miss several days of school during a manhunt for the perpetrator of the most recent interstate shooting. I imagine many people reading this right now might not even know about that shooting, or that manhunt, or those kids in Kentucky, doing schoolwork at home because it’s not safe to go to school.
Political rhetoric matters — but rhetoric wasn’t in the bushes around Mr. Trump’s golf course, or on the interstate in Kentucky, or in the school hallways in Georgia, or at the Trump rally in Butler, Pa. Dangerous people with guns were. The most recent would-be attack on the former president, on Sunday, is an indicator of where we are as a nation: a place where no one is safe from gun violence.
There’s no doubt that our political debate needs to cool down. We live in a participatory democracy with a wide range of opinions. We always have times when emotions are running hot; it’s inevitable.
What’s not inevitable is angry or inexplicably violent people having such easy access to guns. In Pennsylvania, a gunman too young to buy a beer nonetheless got his hands on a semiautomatic rifle. In Georgia, the high school shooting suspect was 14, and used an AR-15-style rifle. In Kentucky, the suspected gunman reportedly sent a text message declaring his intention to “kill a lot of people” and then opened fire with an AR-15-style rifle. Nothing about these episodes was inevitable.
I didn’t grow up in a country with a lot of school shootings, or mass shootings generally. The gun industry was granted broad legal immunity by Congress in 2005 through the Protection of Lawful Commerce in Arms Act, a major contributing factor to the soaring number of gun sales. That was great for gun company profits, and terrible for public safety. With the saturation of guns and loosening of gun laws came, unsurprisingly, a saturation of violence. Gun deaths have skyrocketed since the gun industry received that immunity. So when Senator JD Vance, the Republican vice-presidential nominee, says school shootings are a “fact of life,” he should know: They weren’t a fact of life in this country until guns proliferated and loopholes in our laws allowed dangerous people to get them.
I am, at heart, a political moderate. I believe that successful governing requires a measure of moderation — pragmatic concessions that lead to the breakthroughs that move us forward. The value of moderation is that it allows us to find common purpose and to act on solutions. But moderation without action is merely a different kind of talk, and talk is not what’s wanted or needed now.
How can we tell Americans it’s safe to send their kids to school, to head to the grocery store, to attend concerts or houses of worship — or political events with their families — if we won’t acknowledge the danger that weak gun laws present, and won’t take reasonable steps to keep them secure? All over the country parents are having to answer their children’s questions about whether school is protected, about why these guns threaten their childhoods and their lives.
One thing I learned as a candidate and elected official myself was never to try to talk people out of their own reality. Americans know the dangers of gun violence. They see it in their communities and on their news every week. Now they’ve seen a heavily guarded former president as the target of gun violence twice in just over two months.
And Americans know the difference between action and inaction. Recent research from my gun violence protection organization, Giffords, found that 95 percent of likely voters in battleground House districts — including 91 percent of people who voted for Mr. Trump in 2020 — support background checks on all gun sales, which would make it harder for dangerous people to get guns. Seventy-four percent of those survey respondents support banning weapons like the AR-15 and the AK-style rifles, the weapons implicated in the events this week, last week and the week before.
I have fought so hard to recover from my grievous wounds. I’ve fought hard to work, to stand shoulder to shoulder with other survivors and demand different gun laws. I’ve worked so hard to find my voice — as hard as it is, as much as I struggle to find the right words — to share not just my story of violence but also my deep belief in the American people, that we can find a different, safer way of living.
It’s Monday morning as I write this. Earlier today, students threw books and papers into their backpacks, grabbed lunch or their water bottles and headed out to school. We have promised them safety, but how can we look them, or their parents, in the face and pretend that the answer is anything other than changing easy access to guns? Our path forward requires us all — leaders, voters, Americans — to name the problem clearly and to take action.

Hello: Please, take a minute to read this...
Gabby Giffords has led the fight against the gun lobby for more than a decade, but she can't do it alone.
If everyone reading this donated just $17, we'd have the resources to take on the gun lobby in Congress and states across the country. But not everyone gives -- making it even more important for people who care and understand the stakes of our struggle to pitch in what they can.
[**If $17 seems worth it to you to change our gun laws in order to make our communities safer from gun violence, we're asking you to contribute to GIFFORDS PAC today. _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | **[DONATE $17](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-june25.CEhNxI&amount=17&refcode=em250620-1-b&t=3&akid=10594%2E3935704%2EzMP7uG)**
---
**** | **[OTHER AMOUNT](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-june25.CEhNxI&refcode=em250620-1-b&t=4&akid=10594%2E3935704%2EzMP7uG)**
---
