We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=10594%2E3935704%2EzMP7uG) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

body:
We don’t agonize, we organize. |
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109933637/552733201/-1175830425?refcode=header&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGNlZmFkYy1lYjRkLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YLnp0WsYgM2FXlPv-46GT7sqpfbORYCSSsyoqNG4PNA=)

| Here’s the truth: When Donald Trump unleashed the U.S. military on Los Angeles in response to protestors, Governor Gavin Newsom _**refused to stand down**_. He immediately filed a lawsuit. He spoke the truth. He opposed Trump’s chaotic order to crush dissent. _Trump’s response?_ Call for Newsom’s arrest. _Speaker Mike Johnson’s response?_ Suggest he be “tarred and feathered.” _Our response?_ We didn’t agonize, **we organize**. He immediately filed a lawsuit. He spoke the truth. He opposed Trump’s chaotic order to crush dissent. Trump’s response? Call for Newsom’s arrest. Speaker Mike Johnson’s response? Suggest he be “tarred and feathered.” Our response? We didn’t agonize, we organize. Because when we organize, we win. = = Let’s be absolutely clear: ❌ Using the military to suppress protest is authoritarian. ❌ Calling for a governor’s arrest over dissent is despicable. ❌ And threatening violence against elected officials is not normal. But this moment proved something else. When California is under attack, we don’t flinch. We organize. We mobilize. name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Pete Hegseth Needs to Go NOW
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Pete Hegseth needs to go NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc913322d-588f-4980-b274-736f41fa444e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6cd5a82a-e6bf-4b9d-ba77-e9c25ae286c9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Pete Hegseth was spectacularly unqualified when Trump nominated him, and he's proven himself to be an [unmitigated disaster as Secretary of Defense.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tafce94b2-9ca0-44de-85b0-bd4e2f690a62/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) He has divulged critical military secrets via a public chat app, he has mismanaged the Pentagon into chaos, and he has told Congress that he will ignore judicial orders if he feels like it. **With America perilously close to war with Russia, Iran, and God only knows who else, we can't have a guy in charge of our armed forces who thinks if he just arches his eyebrow and talks like Clint Eastwood enemy armies will run away in terror.** We need someone who actually knows how to do the job, not just kiss Trump's ass. [**Add your name, and demand that Hegseth be removed and replaced NOW. **](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7c7ba513-f557-4282-9300-148865abc22e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---
| | | Thank you, Left Action

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Will you join my focus group? —
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi friend, it's Senator Kirsten Gillibrand. I am excited and honored to serve as your Chair of the DSCC.

My entire career, I've believed in **the power of grassroots activism.** I know that campaigns -- and Senate majorities -- are won by the people who put in the work, from volunteers knocking on doors and stuffing envelopes to supporters sharing their priorities. _And that last piece is why I want to hear from you._

**[Today, I'm pleased to invite you to join my official DSCC Focus Group. Flipping the Senate depends on knowing what issues and messages matter most to this team, so it's important that I personally hear from top supporters like you. Your feedback will enable us to build our strategy to take back the majority -- so please, will you take my survey before midnight?](http://go.dscc.org/go/21372?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250620-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250620-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=20558%2E9716520%2EbfUNex)**

| | [ENTER FOCUS GROUP](http://go.dscc.org/go/21372?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250620-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250620-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=20558%2E9716520%2EbfUNex)
---

Donald Trump has spent years attacking your personal freedoms, and now that he's back in office, that will only continue.

The Senate is our _best chance_ at stopping the MAGA agenda and putting forth a positive Democratic vision. Together, we can flip the Senate and pursue that bold path, but we'll only be effective if we incorporate _your_ invaluable knowledge of the landscape we face.

**[So please, will you take a few moments to join my DSCC Focus Group by completing a brief survey before midnight? Democrats are at our strongest when we hear from supporters like you, so I'm humbly asking you to take a few moments to share your thoughts on how we can win.](http://go.dscc.org/go/21372?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250620-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250620-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=20558%2E9716520%2EbfUNex)**

The path forward starts today. It's a privilege to be your DSCC Chair, and **[with your input](http://go.dscc.org/go/21372?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250620-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250620-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=20558%2E9716520%2EbfUNex)** , we'll build our strongest majority yet.

With gratitude,

Kirsten

Kirsten Gillibrand
DSCC Chair

[](http://go.dscc.org/go/21372?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250620-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250620-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=20558%2E9716520%2EbfUNex)

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.

clean_body: | | | Hi friend, it's Senator Kirsten Gillibrand. I am excited and honored to serve as your Chair of the DSCC. My entire career, I've believed in the power of grassroots activism. I know that campaigns -- and Senate majorities -- are won by the people who put in the work, from volunteers knocking on doors and stuffing envelopes to supporters sharing their priorities. And that last piece is why I want to hear from you. | | Donald Trump has spent years attacking your personal freedoms, and now that he's back in office, that will only continue. The Senate is our best chance at stopping the MAGA agenda and putting forth a positive Democratic vision. Together, we can flip the Senate and pursue that bold path, but we'll only be effective if we incorporate your invaluable knowledge of the landscape we face. The path forward starts today. It's a privilege to be your DSCC Chair, and , we'll build our strongest majority yet. With gratitude, Kirsten Kirsten Gillibrand DSCC Chair If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! #### **Fascism 's Long Game, Trump's Weakness, and Why We Fight Anyway**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/22452f39-3ffe-4328-99de-c9c5dcceb3df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In yesterday's episode of _Amped Up_ , Cliff Schecter and David Shuster welcomed Dr. Ruth Ben-Ghiat--historian of authoritarianism made for this moment. Their convo concerned our ongoing flirtation with fascism in the form of a thin-skinned, senility-soaked, "President." They discussed the calculated cruelty of Trumpism, and how elites _always think_ they can "control the monster"--til the monster has 'em for lunch.
Immediately, Cliff asked a question most of us are thinking: If Trump's flailing--legally, physically, mentally--why do our institutions still kowtow to him? Dr. Ben-Ghiat was clarifying: fascists survive not just on violence or propaganda, but loyalty of elites who think they'll be ok, or benefit It's not just Trump--but the MAGA machine and long game. Having written six books on Italian fascism, she knows a bit here :)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/05cf9840-e2af-4b86-9c51-2a04fb754e2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
They dug into Project 2025, which Ben-Ghiat warned isn't just a policy blueprint, but a roadmap to autocracy. She broke down how regimes like this hollow out democracy from the inside, replacing courts, the bureaucracy, and independent watchdogs' loyalty to law with loyalty to one anti-social, grievance-filled buffoon. Sound familiar?
One of the most powerful exchanges came when they discussed how MAGA's eating itself alive over Iran. The grift, disinformation, wildly contradictory narratives, all are starting to combust under their own weight. And yet, that's precisely when these movements can be most dangerous.
Cliff tied it back to a truth we can't repeat too often: we're not powerless. We _can and must_ resist. Dr. Ben-Ghiat emphasized that history shows strongmen only win when the people give up--become too exhausted, cynical, or scared to act. But those who stand up--fighters, organizers, and truth-tellers--they can shift the tide.
Perhaps the most interesting part, was that during the entire conversation Dr. Ben Ghiat used her wealth of information on the subject to make a series of fascinating comparisons from history and our current moment. From the likes of Mussolini, Hitler and Amin, to Orban, Putin, and Erdogan.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c8ab9fa2-183f-4aa6-b8a3-25adfb3813a5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This was one of those episodes that leaves you shaken _and_ stirred. **If you needed a reminder that this fight is worth it, and that knowledge is power in the face of creeping tyranny, this one 's for you!**

name: George Latimer
subject: Five months since Trump’s second inauguration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by George Latimer for Congress
body:
George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=42M63ymzwn7dhYrCShd5fsPjyqhp0HAiY4hHr12tbD1hz%2F9jyHlf8vR28flbOILE94bLfCHvnw6%2FlzFFa5ty9exn89%2FlQfkJmKv0JxLauONz51v4RQFeC02ZPXPBnyml6LaWljknVd%2BiHNNgFMXDcSaKhQONBk8uPSrdb9Sz9z4sOA6X5yUOmqm6tpDaKPPhr1wXc9tFWmBIJ4QdpBY0OxuW7jT09W8ykXOuy2UJP8cJ8tJ%2B0Ui3qu0pRmIA2VB3XwI0bijOJuRtIXesB1ulav8jHhsPpNco0zr2TVUvlx%2BI5SmdlqFRjEiHHI6CgFPFt1LWzgAfBjqT3usHNRE64HLHK3rZg6wClXgRMnnoBh1%2FkLW0iLraJmEwzouHHJCxswIXMwnOsiFHJhxmeSneZRLqEvBVsi2QnzZfP%2BQqORQxz4lJsjC0ZZBEtHFyoYWe)
---
| |
---
Peter, five months ago, Trump took office for his second term. Since then, Trump has chosen time and time again to stretch the limits of his power and blatantly disregard the Constitution to line the pockets of the ultra-wealthy and to deny working people and families the rights and freedoms they are entitled to as Americans. The Trump administration has come with massive layoffs, dismantling of critical government services and agencies, attacks on birthright citizenship and immigrant communities, and more - the worst of which is surely yet to come. Most recently, Trump’s cruel spending bill, which would not only strip millions of Americans of the healthcare and food assistance they rely on, but **would also severely restrict the court’s power to enforce its rulings against government officials.** In addition, Trump’s recent deployment of the National Guard against protesters **reflects a clear disdain for both our First Amendment right to protest and the Constitution as a whole.** The courts have stepped in to pause or halt many of Trump’s illegal policies and orders, **but we need YOUR help to stand up and hold the administration accountable.** **[I, along with my Democratic colleagues in Congress, am fighting back against Trump’s unconstitutional overreach of power. Will you chip in $10 to fuel our movement headed into midterm elections next year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109934924/552736843/1711749452?amount=10&source=SBD_GL_EM_FR_062025_5MONTHS_120DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmRhOTQ3YjgtZWU0ZC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=362b-a2ZT9kGbxzEtu2o12Ub0-OVhjEoh5fRn-m1RIU=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

clean_body: George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, five months ago, Trump took office for his second term. Since then, Trump has chosen time and time again to stretch the limits of his power and blatantly disregard the Constitution to line the pockets of the ultra-wealthy and to deny working people and families the rights and freedoms they are entitled to as Americans. The Trump administration has come with massive layoffs, dismantling of critical government services and agencies, attacks on birthright citizenship and immigrant communities, and more - the worst of which is surely yet to come. Most recently, Trump’s cruel spending bill, which would not only strip millions of Americans of the healthcare and food assistance they rely on, but would also severely restrict the court’s power to enforce its rulings against government officials. In addition, Trump’s recent deployment of the National Guard against protesters reflects a clear disdain for both our First Amendment right to protest and the Constitution as a whole. The courts have stepped in to pause or halt many of Trump’s illegal policies and orders, but we need YOUR help to stand up and hold the administration accountable. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = In solidarity, George * | | ---|--- = For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality. | = = Paid for by George Latimer for Congress George Latimer for Congress PO Box 789 White Plains, NY 10602 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =.

Here's the thing, Peter: Recurring contributions allow us to give our endorsed candidates a clearer picture of the support they can count on each month — helping their campaigns plan better, budget more effectively, and ultimately, WIN.

**When you become a Friend of the List, you're helping Democratic pro-choice women run WINNING campaigns.**

So, Peter, here's just a glimpse of what we could accomplish together:
* **We can help elect pro-choice champions up and down the ballot in Virginia** — the LAST state in the South without an abortion ban, where EMILYs List women just won their primaries and are advancing to their general elections THIS November. There's no such thing as an "off year" at EMILYs List!

* **We can elect more Democratic pro-choice women governors** , like **Rep. Mikie Sherrill**(NJ-GOV) and **Deb Haaland**(NM-GOV), who will stand up to the Trump administration.

* **We can take back the U.S. House in 2026** by supporting our incumbents and recruiting more women to run and flip red seats.

* **We can elect more pro-choice women to state Supreme Courts**. We already helped fuel two _huge_ state Supreme Court victories this year, and we just endorsed **Justice Christine Donohue** in Pennsylvania!

And so much more!

clean_body: | = Peter, this is how impactful our Friends of the List are: If everyone who opens this email became a Friend of the List,we would hit our TOTAL 2025 fundraising goal TODAY. I know that sounds impossible — but that's the power of recurring donations. And having that financial security this early in the election cycle would make all the difference for EMILYs List-endorsed women. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Here's the thing, Peter: Recurring contributions allow us to give our endorsed candidates a clearer picture of the support they can count on each month — helping their campaigns plan better, budget more effectively, and ultimately, WIN. When you become a Friend of the List, you're helping Democratic pro-choice women run WINNING campaigns. So, Peter, here's just a glimpse of what we could accomplish together: We can help elect pro-choice champions up and down the ballot in Virginia — the LAST state in the South without an abortion ban, where EMILYs List women just won their primaries and are advancing to their general elections THIS November. There's no such thing as an "off year" at EMILYs List! We can elect more Democratic pro-choice women governors , like Rep. Mikie Sherrill(NJ-GOV) and Deb Haaland(NM-GOV), who will stand up to the Trump administration. We can take back the U.S. House in 2026 by supporting our incumbents and recruiting more women to run and flip red seats. We can elect more pro-choice women to state Supreme Courts. We already helped fuel two huge state Supreme Court victories this year, and we just endorsed Justice Christine Donohue in Pennsylvania! And so much more! = = Thanks, Callie Fines (she/her/hers) Chief Financial Officer, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. subject: Your opinion on the courts needed
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch is urgently requested.

_Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/TzffquhnfOE4agRur3apMvHqafCDMfZX_jt7uJ1U2Rl00Z63PCyh330ycbDivPmIab-VedSXsozM5RVanvty4sw1HGdQo_ESWgQ3bxIdNceEwr8Y8RLn2S-_0VzExAsUC6Iui72q4A6Hf4DYxWN7vlcWYQVkOvMsQo1VmkggPYCJFooqDWM2PATH/S86p6MGbAtBtBJ98JWXIhwF21Do6lKDr/10)_
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/WBRRMEJlXI8ZqCZ4FDMmw6jjODsXvrjlsuI8mthw9x8O9YuntdCKYKdmG5OCl7m1vQXE0qLZKl9qk9UONvSOqbAgpPXZDTO0GE6LfHXKW64j1UQR5bH7uuJVnVkpqtGTrC5AW-o9pDp_-Lz4-kzSm0YR8s0MMDEjMVg6Q1UBY9CTteanYwnU5h_BiHl4WdmsPb5EbwsIP9O1C9GqH_S5lNwxL7wRmfQ6g1oehwgAJGTpNWdR1HDU3rq34c3F7ZQ3-09Xu-GhkiQWL4aRcGs5oKweP2EW1qqTQDIqXbEyEXmTmip-nLYDB7DsPBDl639sURZfwXks2jjCcZZouLKcq4T5IXZoBpW9RZheojtuji5huhZFWryPDBfZc_HL2gdPOY2WP2TZfyWrxi-J7bNbYk0xNquGeThwesmHtlEnfxmxbTf47E_rw6_bfY9cfElGwGkqqjM5eY24QxFYMUjuBUYiB59Y3SPAXuDFuKlYl-kP4AupQ396-NzW0UAt42seTfj3gwgEEjHQDkrqZ8GD8INyWHATDhHxUktha5Ls1fGBRh4B8iiIHA-AQ7yqlqxA710M4Dcq8uq5uvEDa8kW5obhExPfhjGdelSe1J25Ja3i8ZCWYzGUSP-jsIQDukTRU7IwTiHsSgGR8qoONExUbpMz67JvhaWiPOQQjt-t79dd7nRTNIk2mEsw9nDryVQ63aOYaBrraCD17lXSdNaz0GxuB6tXYVhPIE2DXqTOJ7CkJPXG4hPSXyoAucFMwP1LCnLw1PHAsHoabr4SzMeO/vBnIQj066CinPgeUasOPT0kkY39RjEmQ/10) Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **[National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/uNQnH_N8Xll7PgDPIPX_57xtye0k2jusgsycC_PR76guL8bIy12WLHmwahFoxb3l69ygumwj0evk70mqDXbwBChzIkCW9KsHyEaOJTxs-jCIFmgXVoBRQgA1XHUvzeHBY7EsuFUT9oHb6L1vG-ttpbJz6TU-50-60ib46-46VSnCoB3V6hgMZdpiEJg8rmMkiBjiHRzcaPiipMvlUdwsjhfrCzcKMC0uAs0eUSMYpD4DsLvECfBFNKWXXaMUXgJZuqyua77-yXCIolBx8Mdsa20aFv6gRd7VIviMd5l7H3a5uo0-tvxMtmvAWnwggSSb8J7y8keL52Yts6NfTFcGe70ugxKQn6YkVgjqKojFm_6kxIUebKztKw8hiEvilSivAlkFnmKzdpovIkWiDXHDWxA2kQwa2ZOqq57oBLgNrPhs1sS6TFtmWHyESMByKIXxWi6BBmWGGtkgiHuGhdkPMOQb5CWynYcEpJ-uTT8AX65Hwn79jhWl5YBH9i_w_qw3JcYtbjoKWTDZLnsW4yxN4RSuUYAmuaHMoVD4Xrh0fbLHCjY2EuTe6GyaN0ft-0rjj7pMv6pDtibbVKe3j4mn2LOpW4C66M7gz3R7HwRPhVp9C6FWtYkkZK6P5d2EW-_SGVFq8Kr1rrk6KgTONzu8gH_Ykro-3dOyKigF_Yl8byGdbr9ypyQp0Zv36twevj_wWQuzKlbDdtVhJMso5oX9DJ2DMr7VTydqOiQhbumHwXSCBwAUTSuL74tCaaxbF9WQplYFxOYghhgyDm0dtXmK/dotwjVPNTUUv8CS0d92l30o8ICe-nQ0X/10)** is urgently requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, and the survey topic is crucial to the future of liberty and separation of powers in America.

Our country is in the midst of a constitutional crisis. Federal judges have issued a flood of injunctions aimed at subverting the will of a majority of Americans.

To give you a sense of the magnitude of the problem we're facing, consider that federal judges have BLOCKED the following...
* An executive order regarding the waste of your tax dollars in federal grant spending

* The return of "trans-identifying" male inmates to male-only prisons where they belong

* An executive order regarding buyouts for federal workers aimed at reducing the size of the administrative state

* An executive order ending birthright citizenship, a policy that poses a threat to our national sovereignty

* An executive order suspending USAID funding of foreign coups and transgender theater productions

The U.S. Constitution does not give judges the power to prevent the president from exercising his constitutional authority based on anecdotal evidence provided by far-Left activists.

**If we don 't fix this crisis ...**

**> >>** We will not be able to defeat bureaucratic despotism and reestablish a government that operates with the consent of the people.

**> >>** We will not be able to defeat the far-Left ideologies that are taught in far too many classrooms.

**And, most importantly, we will not be able to preserve liberty in America.**

That's why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the role of the judiciary in our constitutional republic?_

Your response will help Hillsdale College form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the separation of powers and checks and balances--including the judiciary's proper role in our government.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch** using this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-the-us-judicial-branch**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/9JNI4u-NBCJEiOm2LsPfFgVPAk2Upetn8H_eADlm303_KkUwJEHtkVuujMnHJjovFVnI2Xs2qsD1poktaCqOD95FPHfopV7bHy3CjuTfShIzaI5NOo3X5gP9w60X7fIcYA8wynZgvQAaQM5hmPfZbmC5KSYxxOqoJhp0B9duInhq_-bYGtPpc8Rm4sc8vAIQj8Avb2DXvqhjkLO_JdC4A4fzC0HdGZlEir_DQluZ3fs8kp7wmUeUw9yGwuKehic0VI0T-V2UjiMB7QXCCqXi7pth7mFSRAiMEW34actKisPWHS2DYn7RYVzcgK6nMofpoB8dYka6xtKU6pQ2m8p5KV1HXTchIyNEIG3Ohy2aS-94Mj7o4ngTAKy8uVCs1MxL1U3drC9904wD6FNNfLRvPJQEwtdQG8NMs_DzK6zkbWVlBJkEFOEXyR0uy4AkR1VL1q_tfkdROVNI87TC2MUfccdCQNGU2UOEkxg8k0OYtuPg1uCmxvh_8DdVx2x5SpfwUUQd7MRVu8f0OdC4HDseTwE8GhuIH3TpfLSElYd57JI07s4d4LC02ySGoP3w22ec9OZRD1PVwC_bMX3lZmctlVMJIuZ3Ny766XDkR9yacwjijQG75jt5a0Z7MVSIcrB8Xs9wc-yxWT73-8ItofYx2HW_QeDE0lYrWq4-uY6VOjeEbQC0zbSf7I7L5gepn2SOfUOPruM2Z7DGm4KJp9dHqjIb0Hag20Nyyov5fxoXMowbusqD3N2GOKcbSglzudDk-EZi4mw-1ORd4yjv1AeE/kOFmL04RblkBP0mRRWVVu1EQP4j_F5Uq/10)

And after you complete your survey, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of so many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for far-Left activists to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the proper role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of the anti-American ideologies that are being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Founding and guiding additional classical K-12 schools nationwide.** In addition to expanding the number of Hillsdale-affiliated K-12 schools, you will help us restore love for our country among young Americans by distributing _The Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum_ free of charge to thousands more parents, homeschoolers, and concerned citizens.

* **Expanding the circulation of _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is currently mailed free of charge to more than 6.7 million American households and businesses ten times per year.

* **Producing and promoting additional free online courses** on topics such as "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism," "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," and "The Presidency and the Constitution." Your generosity will help us expand this education on behalf of liberty to millions more Americans.

* **Sending FREE copies of the U.S. Constitution and Declaration of Independence** to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America. Since last year's election, the number of requests for our pocket Constitutions has increased significantly. You will help us meet this rising demand.

We undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale by filling out the College's **National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch** --the link is below.

clean_body: Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch is urgently requested. Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's is urgently requested. Your response will only take a few minutes, and the survey topic is crucial to the future of liberty and separation of powers in America. Our country is in the midst of a constitutional crisis. Federal judges have issued a flood of injunctions aimed at subverting the will of a majority of Americans. To give you a sense of the magnitude of the problem we're facing, consider that federal judges have BLOCKED the following... An executive order regarding the waste of your tax dollars in federal grant spending The return of "trans-identifying" male inmates to male-only prisons where they belong An executive order regarding buyouts for federal workers aimed at reducing the size of the administrative state An executive order ending birthright citizenship, a policy that poses a threat to our national sovereignty An executive order suspending USAID funding of foreign coups and transgender theater productions The U.S. Constitution does not give judges the power to prevent the president from exercising his constitutional authority based on anecdotal evidence provided by far-Left activists. If we don 't fix this crisis ... >> We will not be able to defeat bureaucratic despotism and reestablish a government that operates with the consent of the people. >> We will not be able to defeat the far-Left ideologies that are taught in far too many classrooms. And, most importantly, we will not be able to preserve liberty in America. That's why I'm reaching out to you today... What is your opinion about the role of the judiciary in our constitutional republic? Your response will help Hillsdale College form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the separation of powers and checks and balances--including the judiciary's proper role in our government. You can easily complete your National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch using this secure link: And after you complete your survey, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. The failure of so many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for far-Left activists to undermine the separation of powers at the heart of limited government. I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the proper role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order. That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, reaching and teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours! These efforts counter the influence of the anti-American ideologies that are being taught in classrooms all across America. Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including: Founding and guiding additional classical K-12 schools nationwide. In addition to expanding the number of Hillsdale-affiliated K-12 schools, you will help us restore love for our country among young Americans by distributing The Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum free of charge to thousands more parents, homeschoolers, and concerned citizens. Expanding the circulation of Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is currently mailed free of charge to more than 6.7 million American households and businesses ten times per year. Producing and promoting additional free online courses on topics such as "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism," "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," and "The Presidency and the Constitution." Your generosity will help us expand this education on behalf of liberty to millions more Americans. Sending FREE copies of the U.S. Constitution and Declaration of Independence to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America. Since last year's election, the number of requests for our pocket Constitutions has increased significantly. You will help us meet this rising demand. We undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. That means our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale by filling out the College's National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch** --the link is below. Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to help us preserve liberty for future generations through education. Thank you for your time and attention--and for joining us in the defense of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | .

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109936253/552740656/-1960556440?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20250620_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTIxMjVhNS1lZjRkLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-5c-CPQNhFPQ9mra9PCy3BJheyJeJl_9wWzv50pX1M8=)

Peter, Thom Tillis sent out an email full of attacks on Wiley Nickel’s track record. Here’s a quick rundown of the claims made in Thom Tillis’s email:
1. _“Wiley Nickel is a failed politician.”_ FALSE. From serving in President Obama's administration, to representing North Carolina for two terms in the State Senate, to flipping an ‘unwinnable’ district to serve in Congress where he fought to make life more affordable and end partisan gerrymandering — Wiley is the real deal.

2. “Wiley Nickel is too extreme for North Carolina.” FALSE. Wiley has reached across the aisle many times to find solutions for everything from housing affordability to paid family leave to childcare costs to economic policies for working families.

3. “This is the most competitive Senate race in the country.” TRUE! A broken clock is right twice a day, Peter. Tillis knows that spreading lies about Wiley’s record is the only way he’ll win this race — let’s show him that North Carolinians aren’t buying what he’s selling.

[You can help us beat back the attacks, right the record, and win the most competitive Senate race in the country. All you have to do is pitch in before our campaign’s end-of-quarter deadline. ## The DISGRACEFUL Biden cover-up...
On Wednesday, the Senate Judiciary Committee held a hearing titled: _Unfit to Serve: How the Biden Cover-Up Endangered America and Undermined the Constitution._
I was invited by the committee to share my experience as a senior White House staffer with respect to the interactions that I and other senior staff had with President Trump during his first term.
I explained that during my tenure as press secretary, I interacted with the President multiple times every day.
Most days, I would talk to him by phone or in person in the morning and then multiple times throughout the day, including weekends.
For the most senior positions in the White House-those designated by the rank of Assistant to the President, which includes White House Chief of Staff, White House Counsel, and Press Secretary-it is critical to have regular interaction with the President...

Stories I'm reading... \- via Politico \- via Politico \- via Politico \- via Politico \- via AP News \- via Wall Street Journal \- via Politico This week on The Sean Spicer Show... TONIGHT -- Former Trump National Security Advisor Robert O'Brien will bring s inside the decision making process on what to do about Iran -- trust me this is a must watch. If I can ask a favor (or two) please join us for the premiere at 6pm ET. It is super helpful for the algorithm on YouTube if people are watching the show when its going - -- subscribe and hit the notification button so you get alerted to new content. My second favor is to ask you to share the link with 5 friends, co-workers or family members. Thank you! Coming up next week, James O'Keefe joins us on Tuesday to talk his effort to reclaim Project Veritas. Wednesday, Senator Ron Johnson is on to discuss the status of the big beautiful bill, and more. Thursday we've got a great panel, featuring Patrice Onwuka with the Independent Women's Forum, radio host Chris Stigall, and journalist Breanna Morello. Call Bishop Gold! I'm glad I bought my gold because its continued to grow -- its now over $3000 per ounce! NOW is the time to invest in gold and precious metals, and if you call my friends at Bishop Gold, you'll get FREE silver included. | | ---|---|--- The DISGRACEFUL Biden cover-up... On Wednesday, the Senate Judiciary Committee held a hearing titled: Unfit to Serve: How the Biden Cover-Up Endangered America and Undermined the Constitution. I was invited by the committee to share my experience as a senior White House staffer with respect to the interactions that I and other senior staff had with President Trump during his first term. I explained that during my tenure as press secretary, I interacted with the President multiple times every day. Most days, I would talk to him by phone or in person in the morning and then multiple times throughout the day, including weekends. For the most senior positions in the White House-those designated by the rank of Assistant to the President, which includes White House Chief of Staff, White House Counsel, and Press Secretary-it is critical to have regular interaction with the President... body:
Secure Monte Rio today.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109937245/552743656/-1299648888?contactdata=M5Dt3XwdXw0wXWY/i16EFS0aRtw6ADk4hecXnDgtUHvIMPtUHANbSmKoYqK15IlSJoKulwk5vg0vDyEueTbPsKMXmiz1XUkXfOFnJNEs6QRdM3LM742XDOoquDvxdW7LZCnuwLyLq0O3CLLCKUA89ZetBFuslL5QBfcmfkdKeco=&sourceid=1166936&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlOTMzOTU3LWYwNGQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Zsf3aSdrx6YpmRanIh43k-AjvHMW4KNpRuZlVbcVO-Q=&emci=a3933957-f04d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ae933957-f04d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1504551)

Peter,
As someone who has explored many of California’s public parks and trails since moving here, I can tell you this: places like Monte Rio Redwoods are truly one of a kind.
**Save the Redwoods League is seeking to conserve this unique land, and today is our final day to secure the funds and preserve it forever.[We’re almost there—help us push past the finish line with your gift now and it will be matched.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109937246/552743657/2018652235?contactdata=M5Dt3XwdXw0wXWY/i16EFS0aRtw6ADk4hecXnDgtUHvIMPtUHANbSmKoYqK15IlSJoKulwk5vg0vDyEueTbPsKMXmiz1XUkXfOFnJNEs6QRdM3LM742XDOoquDvxdW7LZCnuwLyLq0O3CLLCKUA89ZetBFuslL5QBfcmfkdKeco=&ms=MonteRio10_Link1&sourceid=1166936&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlOTMzOTU3LWYwNGQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Zsf3aSdrx6YpmRanIh43k-AjvHMW4KNpRuZlVbcVO-Q=&emci=a3933957-f04d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ae933957-f04d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1504551)**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109937247/552743658/2018652235?contactdata=M5Dt3XwdXw0wXWY/i16EFS0aRtw6ADk4hecXnDgtUHvIMPtUHANbSmKoYqK15IlSJoKulwk5vg0vDyEueTbPsKMXmiz1XUkXfOFnJNEs6QRdM3LM742XDOoquDvxdW7LZCnuwLyLq0O3CLLCKUA89ZetBFuslL5QBfcmfkdKeco=&ms=MonteRio10_Image1&sourceid=1166936&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlOTMzOTU3LWYwNGQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Zsf3aSdrx6YpmRanIh43k-AjvHMW4KNpRuZlVbcVO-Q=&emci=a3933957-f04d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ae933957-f04d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1504551)
_Photo by: Justin Lewis_
Monte Rio Redwoods is a recreation enthusiast’s dream, full of rolling meadows and beautiful lands that showcase the might and height of California’s redwoods. Let me show you exactly what makes this land so special, and why preserving it is so important.
[LAST CHANCE: Secure Monte Rio Redwoods](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109937248/552743659/2018652235?contactdata=M5Dt3XwdXw0wXWY/i16EFS0aRtw6ADk4hecXnDgtUHvIMPtUHANbSmKoYqK15IlSJoKulwk5vg0vDyEueTbPsKMXmiz1XUkXfOFnJNEs6QRdM3LM742XDOoquDvxdW7LZCnuwLyLq0O3CLLCKUA89ZetBFuslL5QBfcmfkdKeco=&ms=MonteRio10_Button1&sourceid=1166936&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlOTMzOTU3LWYwNGQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Zsf3aSdrx6YpmRanIh43k-AjvHMW4KNpRuZlVbcVO-Q=&emci=a3933957-f04d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ae933957-f04d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1504551)
If Save the Redwoods League can purchase Monte Rio Redwoods, we will immediately transfer all 1,517 acres to Sonoma County Regional Parks. This will go toward a future expansion of Monte Rio Redwoods Regional Park and Open Space Preserve, [**increasing public land access _fourfold!_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109937249/552743660/2018652235?contactdata=M5Dt3XwdXw0wXWY/i16EFS0aRtw6ADk4hecXnDgtUHvIMPtUHANbSmKoYqK15IlSJoKulwk5vg0vDyEueTbPsKMXmiz1XUkXfOFnJNEs6QRdM3LM742XDOoquDvxdW7LZCnuwLyLq0O3CLLCKUA89ZetBFuslL5QBfcmfkdKeco=&ms=MonteRio10_Link3&sourceid=1166936&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlOTMzOTU3LWYwNGQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Zsf3aSdrx6YpmRanIh43k-AjvHMW4KNpRuZlVbcVO-Q=&emci=a3933957-f04d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ae933957-f04d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1504551)
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109937250/552743667/2018652235?contactdata=M5Dt3XwdXw0wXWY/i16EFS0aRtw6ADk4hecXnDgtUHvIMPtUHANbSmKoYqK15IlSJoKulwk5vg0vDyEueTbPsKMXmiz1XUkXfOFnJNEs6QRdM3LM742XDOoquDvxdW7LZCnuwLyLq0O3CLLCKUA89ZetBFuslL5QBfcmfkdKeco=&ms=MonteRio10_Image2&sourceid=1166936&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlOTMzOTU3LWYwNGQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Zsf3aSdrx6YpmRanIh43k-AjvHMW4KNpRuZlVbcVO-Q=&emci=a3933957-f04d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ae933957-f04d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1504551)
_Photo by: Max Whittaker_
Monte Rio Redwoods is the missing piece to a puzzle that will connect 22,000 acres of protected lands, some of which forest lovers like you have already helped the League purchase and secure. In an era of habitat fragmentation and human intrusion into wild lands, [**Monte Rio Redwoods represents our chance to create a massive, contiguous wildlife corridor, and a more resilient future for the unique flora and fauna that make this region so special.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109937251/552743689/2018652235?contactdata=M5Dt3XwdXw0wXWY/i16EFS0aRtw6ADk4hecXnDgtUHvIMPtUHANbSmKoYqK15IlSJoKulwk5vg0vDyEueTbPsKMXmiz1XUkXfOFnJNEs6QRdM3LM742XDOoquDvxdW7LZCnuwLyLq0O3CLLCKUA89ZetBFuslL5QBfcmfkdKeco=&ms=MonteRio10_Link4&sourceid=1166936&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlOTMzOTU3LWYwNGQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Zsf3aSdrx6YpmRanIh43k-AjvHMW4KNpRuZlVbcVO-Q=&emci=a3933957-f04d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ae933957-f04d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1504551)
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109937252/552743690/2018652235?contactdata=M5Dt3XwdXw0wXWY/i16EFS0aRtw6ADk4hecXnDgtUHvIMPtUHANbSmKoYqK15IlSJoKulwk5vg0vDyEueTbPsKMXmiz1XUkXfOFnJNEs6QRdM3LM742XDOoquDvxdW7LZCnuwLyLq0O3CLLCKUA89ZetBFuslL5QBfcmfkdKeco=&ms=MonteRio10_Image3&sourceid=1166936&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlOTMzOTU3LWYwNGQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Zsf3aSdrx6YpmRanIh43k-AjvHMW4KNpRuZlVbcVO-Q=&emci=a3933957-f04d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ae933957-f04d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1504551)
_Photo by: Max Forster_
From the winding headwaters that flow into the Russian River to the redwood canopy sheltering wildlife below, Monte Rio Redwoods forms a living tapestry that enriches and sustains our region.
**Now—TODAY—is our chance to conserve Monte Rio Redwoods & have your gift matched courtesy of the Visser Family in honor of J. Hugh and Eleanor Visser. [Be part of something incredible and help get us over the finish line with your gift!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109937253/552743691/930498260?contactdata=M5Dt3XwdXw0wXWY/i16EFS0aRtw6ADk4hecXnDgtUHvIMPtUHANbSmKoYqK15IlSJoKulwk5vg0vDyEueTbPsKMXmiz1XUkXfOFnJNEs6QRdM3LM742XDOoquDvxdW7LZCnuwLyLq0O3CLLCKUA89ZetBFuslL5QBfcmfkdKeco=&ms=MonteRio10_Link5&sourceid=1166936&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlOTMzOTU3LWYwNGQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Zsf3aSdrx6YpmRanIh43k-AjvHMW4KNpRuZlVbcVO-Q=&emci=a3933957-f04d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ae933957-f04d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1504551)**
With gratitude,
| Elias Berbari
Digital Fundraising Manager

clean_body: Secure Monte Rio today. Peter, As someone who has explored many of California’s public parks and trails since moving here, I can tell you this: places like Monte Rio Redwoods are truly one of a kind. Save the Redwoods League is seeking to conserve this unique land, and today is our final day to secure the funds and preserve it forever. Photo by: Justin Lewis Monte Rio Redwoods is a recreation enthusiast’s dream, full of rolling meadows and beautiful lands that showcase the might and height of California’s redwoods. Let me show you exactly what makes this land so special, and why preserving it is so important. If Save the Redwoods League can purchase Monte Rio Redwoods, we will immediately transfer all 1,517 acres to Sonoma County Regional Parks. This will go toward a future expansion of Monte Rio Redwoods Regional Park and Open Space Preserve, Photo by: Max Whittaker Monte Rio Redwoods is the missing piece to a puzzle that will connect 22,000 acres of protected lands, some of which forest lovers like you have already helped the League purchase and secure. In an era of habitat fragmentation and human intrusion into wild lands, Photo by: Max Forster From the winding headwaters that flow into the Russian River to the redwood canopy sheltering wildlife below, Monte Rio Redwoods forms a living tapestry that enriches and sustains our region. Now—TODAY—is our chance to conserve Monte Rio Redwoods & have your gift matched courtesy of the Visser Family in honor of J. Hugh and Eleanor Visser. With gratitude, | Elias Berbari Digital Fundraising Manager ---|--- P.S. We CAN safeguard the future of Monte Rio Redwoods, but we need your help. | | | | ---|---|---|--- Save the Redwoods League 111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor San Francisco, CA 94104 United States |

Team, One in four New Mexicans rely on Medicaid — **and the GOP’s so-called _“Big, Beautiful Bill”_ puts their health care on the chopping block.** This bill is a handout to billionaires disguised as a budget. It slashes funding for Medicaid, guts vital services, and leaves our most vulnerable communities — kids, seniors, and families — to fend for themselves. **In New Mexico, we know what’s at stake. ** These cuts would devastate rural clinics, worsen health disparities, and rip coverage away from those who need it most. Let’s call this what it is: _a cruel, calculated attack on working people._ [_**Martin is fighting every day to hold this administration accountable to New Mexicans and working families. Donations from supporters like you help us tell that story and keep Martin in this fight, so please: Can you make a grassroots donation today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109938178/552746443/-1386246667?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250620_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTg4OTY0Yi1mMTRkLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iGv0FH1QMGxk80U5VpVWr6okwG-TFJuybcx_gO7gevg=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109938187/552746445/-1386246667?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250620_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTg4OTY0Yi1mMTRkLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iGv0FH1QMGxk80U5VpVWr6okwG-TFJuybcx_gO7gevg=)

In a powerful letter to President Trump, they called it “a betrayal to the more than 640,000 postal employees who work tirelessly every day to ensure mail is delivered to every corner of the country.”

The effort to privatize the USPS would **raise costs on everyday Americans, undermine mail-in voting, and weaken essential services for rural communities.**

The USPS is one of the most trusted public institutions in America — and privatization would put that trust, and our democracy, at risk.

**[If you believe every American deserves reliable mail service and the freedom to vote by mail, we need you with us: Add your name to defend the USPS now! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109938750/552748288/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250620_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTUwY2QyNC1mMjRkLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KdTsWg3N6AOi1YD5RLn1CnTNZ5orD4jV9PHByOemsJ8=&emci=5b884a1d-724c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=9a50cd24-f24d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=48524772)**

clean_body: 159 members of Congress spoke out. Now we need your voice. >> | New Dems like Nikki Budzinski are leading the fight against Trump’s plan to privatize the USPS! | In a powerful letter to President Trump, they called it “a betrayal to the more than 640,000 postal employees who work tirelessly every day to ensure mail is delivered to every corner of the country.” The effort to privatize the USPS would raise costs on everyday Americans, undermine mail-in voting, and weaken essential services for rural communities. The USPS is one of the most trusted public institutions in America — and privatization would put that trust, and our democracy, at risk. body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMFu6jAQRb_G3hHZ48TmLbx4lIa2SKibqoWdM3aKUYyDHRLx9xWUsp05M_fomtB3vr1oohYEYO9tJgBE_CcAp-0U0vkQ1qvZaopsdpKbUF238HRHR3jARzQ7vhneQ_-xzXZ3aE8x2ZE_8OHSuwd8Dy1cML67TtWSWi1ay0rqNFcVK4WshKR77doK5w1gY-dg5D-UnDFlRMMBTYVOUa-BQcUkMC4BuCika0FKgMYIzlE0pGS3nMIElzwanofJpBRjKDAG2un9MPT5JlYTqKcUi-MZO3fOv2cYA4H6rkygHgnUaf75hUN-eVZE1LfSxPJts5teV2u-oEnbfvJd57NUpGTff2_oqOEnAAD__4MNb7M)
| | Dear Friend, Are you looking for a way to protect your children and grandchildren from the lies they’re hearing at school?
---
| | Friend, Are you looking for a way to protect your children and grandchildren from the lies they’re hearing at school? Believe me, I know firsthand how bad things are. I’m Riley Gaines, the University of Kentucky swimmer who was forced to compete against a 6’4’’ man at the NCAA women’s championship. Yes, I even had to change in the same locker room with him. I kept thinking my coaches would do something. Or the NCAA would say, “this is insane.” But our “cancel culture” has people scared. Too scared to simply tell the obvious truth that a man can’t turn himself into a woman. So, I stood up and started speaking out. At first, I was the only one and it was terrifying. I’ve been cancelled, punched, and threatened. But more and more Americans are finally waking up. And they’re realizing that speaking out is how we’re going to stop this madness. That’s why I’m so grateful for the patriots at **Brave Books** who are publishing books that teach kids to love God and our country – and to be brave about it! I’ve partnered with **Brave Books** to write _Happy No Snakes Day_ , a Christian children’s book that teaches the importance of standing up for the truth. **[And in appreciation of your gift of $100 or more, I would love to send you a copy of my book to share with your children or grandchildren and protect their hearts and minds from our toxic culture.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j0GPmzAQhX-NuRnZY8dkDxySAlHVdlXRNlL2gow9bLzFMTEQtP--Io1ymcOb782bp_3Qu-4zJ9meAJydHQkAETsCcD0tPs4f_tuBHpbA6FW9-s26hS8P9AZP-GL0G3-dfvrhz2m0bx_dNUR74098-hzwCT9CU_Ta9auaFYnNRWeZTDDn2YZJoTZCJecc5UvXWtACQRnDtO7ki7YgrX2RYAxPXA4MNkwB4wqAi1RhB0oBtFpwbkRLJLvnpNpjdEbzcVp0jCH41ASf9Pl5mobx_lhFoBrRzBFTfUEbppUgULVR35C2IfwdCVQ267ZoWkM7YyyVNkO6bRlSteXcMJQABtZbopon34xhjgaJKPbFgdblkYBaZY_WzZ6IovzxUIz2g3bvFyKK_434ttkXh2Zf745lU3_9Xp6aujw2v37varqOh2_C6O-eTLFmiTyJuR0W1_duVBmR7P1efq16y-FfAAAA__9QTpZT)** **Brave Books** has a plan to equip the next generation to be truth-tellers. And you can be a part of it. Let’s get busy taking back America! In truth and love,

|

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109939102/552749964/131323729?refcode=em-6.20.25-all-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTkwNmNjMS1mMjRkLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4oo_0tV7z1lsN-Wce2_x0qc_JSAsoix6EqXdtShGfE8=) Peter, it's Senator Bernie Sanders. I’m reaching out to make sure you saw the news that I have endorsed Rebecca Cooke in Wisconsin’s 3rd Congressional District. I’m hoping you will support her campaign with a [**donation of $3**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109939103/552749965/131323729?refcode=em-6.20.25-all-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTkwNmNjMS1mMjRkLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4oo_0tV7z1lsN-Wce2_x0qc_JSAsoix6EqXdtShGfE8=) today. But first, let me tell you why your support is important: At a time when the very rich are getting much richer while 60% of Americans live paycheck to paycheck, we need fighters in Congress who will stand up for working families and take on the greed of powerful special interests. That’s exactly what Rebecca will do. Rebecca is the daughter of farmers, a waitress, and a small business owner -- someone who has lived through the failed policies coming out of Washington, and is ready to deliver outcomes that working people can feel. **She will be an ally in the House as she takes on corporate monopolies that are bankrupting family farms, fights to raise the minimum wage to a living wage, and works to expand Medicare to include vision, dental, and hearing.** But let me be clear: Rebecca is not up against some run-of-the-mill Republican. She’s taking on an incumbent backed by billionaires like Elon Musk and is more interested in protecting the powerful than representing the people of Wisconsin. With a critical FEC fundraising deadline coming up, it’s _absolutely essential_ we show Rebecca has the grassroots support it takes to win this race. clean_body: | = Peter, it's Senator Bernie Sanders. I’m reaching out to make sure you saw the news that I have endorsed Rebecca Cooke in Wisconsin’s 3rd Congressional District. I’m hoping you will support her campaign with a = today. But first, let me tell you why your support is important: At a time when the very rich are getting much richer while 60% of Americans live paycheck to paycheck, we need fighters in Congress who will stand up for working families and take on the greed of powerful special interests. That’s exactly what Rebecca will do. Rebecca is the daughter of farmers, a waitress, and a small business owner -- someone who has lived through the failed policies coming out of Washington, and is ready to deliver outcomes that working people can feel. She will be an ally in the House as she takes on corporate monopolies that are bankrupting family farms, fights to raise the minimum wage to a living wage, and works to expand Medicare to include vision, dental, and hearing. But let me be clear: Rebecca is not up against some run-of-the-mill Republican. She’s taking on an incumbent backed by billionaires like Elon Musk and is more interested in protecting the powerful than representing the people of Wisconsin. With a critical FEC fundraising deadline coming up, it’s absolutely essential we show Rebecca has the grassroots support it takes to win this race. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | **= | = **** | | = | = **** | | = | = Thank you, Bernie Sanders | = = Rebecca Cooke is a small business and nonprofit leader who has focused her career on building community and serving others. She was born and raised on an Eau Claire dairy farm and was appointed by Governor Tony Evers to the Wisconsin Economic Development Corporation. name: Stasha Rhodes, United for Democracy
subject: Taking our democracy back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
After yesterday’s horrifying Supreme Court ruling, we joined hundreds of allies to take to the streets. | |
---
Peter, On Wednesday, the MAGA Supreme Court ruled against trans kids—ripping away critical healthcare and allowing discrimination on the basis of sex. **Within hours,****we had taken to the streets with hundreds of allies.** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtF2RAGUPzOZ3k2_Nsqc_k2YWPlEa8ed2NcdjI2IKEjSfESAn45NvJzQDg-fszI7XgaGVwPbtraGfHH4Jq71ZATLKadS_IRJ7eK-MtxcCkiqhv5PpvNC0GBrmnWqjZ7_1VRJOZHwdZGo7hxsdMrbPdek92jYjIfjIqZQWPRaFMh-kBEtbgOYRpPrUDmTDDRy_yQ89HC0BND_PaRDJ8UfLIZbCPBvLNx2tGFvI9T9A_C6u4mJTt4qQ2uXikh8w9vfRe52iu8zETHG_PrKOhWzr39GbrSmdBjMTtrVXXoPAP_sLKM4dJT1DAed9PVAuJRWSY/4hi/U6MbnqUBRVixkpxQ4w2_7Q/h0/h001.wDwQkkUnCmjU6pzrZ62Z7JOw-u5o0p6R4P3oe9cq17w) [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtF2RAGUPzOZ3k2_Nsqc_k2YWPlEa8ed2NcdjI2IKEjSRIU4Mhsl_bHBJgh_IGEjxax6OagjbQspg9ywXo7Arzfqhztrg_Pg-yedCCmL2-abt6GgTnstkGg1LwZ3EFzGJcRkQiaTz9CimiJsfQK0wj9FoadOk9xVEJmCZX_I6oRmQDVEVjMNqE3wxLg7t6AzIuC6UWpqCDyGYHyf1BwoZaR0ptvNX6lAFxyrRHfdpNRBpMV9Fvu2JNhpEPQQm-I8KkKihdL150_UO270xz37pTOcG0e2F2_iD05kFVc5QHCagLOOTm2B5TxLbCLvnshqIo/4hi/U6MbnqUBRVixkpxQ4w2_7Q/h1/h001.AuywuxhPcM5vaZkeg4vYPb_tzPfQBVyOLH5VXojPt64) **The moment these awful decisions drop is critical to protecting our democracy.** We can’t afford to get complacent, shut down, or become overwhelmed by the sheer number of terrible things happening. The MAGA justices on the Supreme Court must hear loud and clear that we won’t stand for their attacks. **That’s what United for Democracy is here for.** **Joining our coalition allies from the ACLU and others, UFD leapt into action.** We spread rapid response messaging and talking points to thousands of allies across the progressive movement. And we got bodies in the streets to shape the public reaction to this horrifying decision. **[We’re organizing the fight to stand up and fight back. clean_body: After yesterday’s horrifying Supreme Court ruling, we joined hundreds of allies to take to the streets. | | Peter, On Wednesday, the MAGA Supreme Court ruled against trans kids—ripping away critical healthcare and allowing discrimination on the basis of sex. Within hours,we had taken to the streets with hundreds of allies. The moment these awful decisions drop is critical to protecting our democracy. We can’t afford to get complacent, shut down, or become overwhelmed by the sheer number of terrible things happening. The MAGA justices on the Supreme Court must hear loud and clear that we won’t stand for their attacks. That’s what United for Democracy is here for. Joining our coalition allies from the ACLU and others, UFD leapt into action. We spread rapid response messaging and talking points to thousands of allies across the progressive movement. And we got bodies in the streets to shape the public reaction to this horrifying decision. This case made it clearer than ever that theMAGA Roberts Court isn’t on our side. The Court chose to side with MAGA and anti-trans propagandists over our most vulnerable youth population—because their wealthy extremist handlers had manufactured a fake crisis targeting trans youth. And while they did it, they struck a dangerous blow to equal protection under the law. We can’t allow these blatant politically motivated attacks on our friends and neighbors and our democracy to pass by quietly. This ruling is the Court’s opening salvo—and the public’s reaction will either allow them to continue harming Americans, or force them to give our democracy back. With three words, our Founders made clear who comes first in our country: We The People. In America, we have no emperors, we have no dictators, we have no kings – and we plan to keep it that way. That’s why I was proud to join over 800 of our neighbors in Annapolis at our No Kings Rally to make clear that dissent cannot be silenced by this Administration. Thank you to everyone who showed up in Annapolis – and across our country – for a weekend of hope and optimism. We will always stand together and make our voices heard, and we will work together to regain the majority in 2026. **** | **[_We have to channel and sustain this moment for 2026. body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109941612/552752210/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2VkNTRmZC1mMzRkLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J6LnpRrORC_CBHTPuASpluQ6VwyDJ6lc28RCk_MhDJg=&emci=20ed54fd-f34d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=37ed54fd-f34d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13185894) _**BREAKING: Senate Republicans propose deeper Medicaid cuts in reconciliation bill**_ Derek, After House Republicans voted to cut billions in Medicaid funding last month (that would take away healthcare from millions), I didn’t think Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” could get any worse. But Senate Republicans just unveiled even steeper cuts to Medicaid—funding for healthcare for kids with disabilities, opioid addiction treatment, pre-natal care for moms, and nursing homes for seniors—all to help pay for tax handouts to the rich and powerful. I’m sick and tired of this grift that rips off the American people and strips away healthcare to give more tax handouts to billionaires and big corporations. [**I’ve been in this fight from the very beginning, and I won’t back down now. We’ve got to protect healthcare for folks right here in Western Pennsylvania and across the nation. If you’re with me in this fight, please chip in now to help me stop Trump’s reckless agenda →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109941615/552752212/-1558066259?refcode=email_062025_medicaid-cuts&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2VkNTRmZC1mMzRkLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J6LnpRrORC_CBHTPuASpluQ6VwyDJ6lc28RCk_MhDJg=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109941617/552752214/-1558066259?refcode=email_062025_medicaid-cuts&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2VkNTRmZC1mMzRkLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J6LnpRrORC_CBHTPuASpluQ6VwyDJ6lc28RCk_MhDJg=)

If the Senate passes Trump’s bill, 15 MILLION Americans, including 300,000 Pennsylvanians, could lose their healthcare coverage. And on top of that, reports show that the bottom 20% of Americans would lose money, while the top 20%—millionaires and billionaires—would profit.
**Derek, let’s call this what it is: a massive tax giveaway to the ultra-wealthy, paid for by ripping healthcare away from working people, kids, and seniors. It is fiscally reckless crap—and we should do all we can to stop it.**
**[That’s why I need you with me in this fight. We have to send a message loud and clear to Donald Trump and Republicans: We won’t let them get away with this. name: Wes Moore
subject: We are grateful for your support
body:
Thanks to people like you, we’re able to defend all of Maryland.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=201%2E1086043%2E9_J_Cl)
Peter, because of support from people like you, we are able to do so much to defend Maryland.
We know that making a donation is not an easy decision, especially in times like these. And I know you probably get a lot of emails like this from campaigns like ours.
**You are not an ATM, and we won’t treat you like one.** We won’t use scammy tactics or misleading requests to get you to donate to our campaign. When we ask for a donation, it’s because grassroots money really does power everything we do.
Our supporters are the most important part of this campaign. Donations to emails just like this one fuel the fire to win this decade.
**[So, Peter, I don’t come to you lightly when I ask this question: Will you make your very first donation to my campaign? Every dollar donated goes towards our reelection effort and the fight to defend Maryland.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250620-1?refcode=em-20250620-1&refcode2=201_1086043_9_J_Cl&akid=201%2E1086043%2E9_J_Cl)
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250620-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20250620-1&refcode2=201_1086043_9_J_Cl&akid=201%2E1086043%2E9_J_Cl)**
Thank you for all that you do, together we will accomplish our goals and more.
Elevate,
Wes
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20250620-1&t=2&refcode2=201_1086043_9_J_Cl&akid=201%2E1086043%2E9_J_Cl)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=201%2E1086043%2E9_J_Cl)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=201%2E1086043%2E9_J_Cl)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

Peter,

It’s officially been 5 months since Donald Trump took office for his second term, and in that time we’ve seen attacks on everything from federal jobs to healthcare to voting rights and more. **The changes and policies he and his GOP colleagues are implementing in government every day will be felt for years to come if we don’t act fast.**

[The time to act is now. Will you chip in $10 to help Valerie and her Democratic colleagues continue to fight against Trump’s abuse of power?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109943500/552754793/-1306430819?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_062025_5Months_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDdlZTE2Zi1mNTRkLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7J-ZDY1gwLiFdsW-d5A2zXp-OVZgEBWUiT6Q_E7qAJk=) | | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109943502/552754795/-1306430819?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_062025_5Months_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDdlZTE2Zi1mNTRkLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7J-ZDY1gwLiFdsW-d5A2zXp-OVZgEBWUiT6Q_E7qAJk=)
---
Republicans in Congress and Donald Trump think they can get their Big Ugly Bill passed by July 4th - _**that’s in just 3 weeks.**_

The spending bill would not only add $3 TRILLION to the national deficit, but it would strip millions of Americans of their access to healthcare through medicaid, as well as remove access to food assistance from families across the country. **These government programs provide _life-saving_ services to folks across the country, and cutting them serves only to further line Trump’s pockets.**

On top of that, Trump’s deployment of the National Guard in Los Angeles serves as a blatant violation of Americans’ right to protest. Not only is it an attack on our rights and freedoms as civilians, it is an attack on the Constitution and rule of law. **Make no mistake - Trump’s actions in LA are unconstitutional and were intended to incite violence, not quell it.**

[We’re working to build a movement to fight Trump’s attacks on our democracy and flip the House in 2026. Your grassroots support is the base of this movement - chip in $10 to help us reach our goal »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109943504/552754797/-1306430819?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_062025_5Months_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDdlZTE2Zi1mNTRkLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7J-ZDY1gwLiFdsW-d5A2zXp-OVZgEBWUiT6Q_E7qAJk=)

clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter, It’s officially been 5 months since Donald Trump took office for his second term, and in that time we’ve seen attacks on everything from federal jobs to healthcare to voting rights and more. The changes and policies he and his GOP colleagues are implementing in government every day will be felt for years to come if we don’t act fast. = | | = Republicans in Congress and Donald Trump think they can get their Big Ugly Bill passed by July 4th - that’s in just 3 weeks. The spending bill would not only add $3 TRILLION to the national deficit, but it would strip millions of Americans of their access to healthcare through medicaid, as well as remove access to food assistance from families across the country. These government programs provide life-saving services to folks across the country, and cutting them serves only to further line Trump’s pockets. On top of that, Trump’s deployment of the National Guard in Los Angeles serves as a blatant violation of Americans’ right to protest. Not only is it an attack on our rights and freedoms as civilians, it is an attack on the Constitution and rule of law. Make no mistake - Trump’s actions in LA are unconstitutional and were intended to incite violence, not quell it. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for your support, Team Foushee * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. I have to tell you, in my time in the Senate, maybe in my time in politics, there has simply never been anything as hard, as bizarre, and as holy sugar as the last 151 days of the second Trump administration.

Yet, so many of my Republican colleagues can’t find their voice at this moment – and I don’t say that lightly, Derek. I’m proud to find bipartisan solutions. I’ve been involved in every bipartisan deal made in the past decade.

But I’m getting tired of my Republican colleagues who publicly stay silent but quietly come up to me and say “Mark, keep at it.” I even had a colleague tell me the other day, “Mark, you’re like our conscience.”

**Well, I don't want to be your damn conscience. I want you to vote your conscience.**

Democrats want our girls competing against biological boys in sports, sharing bathrooms with trans individuals, and now the governor of Minnesota can’t even define what a woman is. | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0b277fd0907640369cb1a2617e23620a&_e=JmyrUo-tefN90hcUPKxhUWu5pjgKX8d7zCdMc95v8dSmtUMjIv_pKgmD_wT-YNzFyNDqZhOsCvc0Xw2lmhjLQdrEYcdD15UU1PT0sDRvHVude2FaVW2lW8uLn-jhDSZqRt3wcTedlqsPnpAgdE8t4m9cO8pcFVK-3dFCPBsExNj3Zcf-1HsmMATYE77nlHzoP5F6MlB6phSWME9sg49dkpyLfivM2UzIP80UM9thTNAOXzs50AZUjvy8ofa2gCZYqbOmmlw2mgYkuiwJ8LxTpOGunNC6GRkiPf7Dv0RN34Ga0br9dmeQiAMOwk2IuG7j9gjLMAVC82Zq8fcVkgXF1mEk5lZgV1J-mu3rvC-lJRlX13ji2QdXbYILaKrUPe6jsT9TZbcAEJj5oOAIze6pehqe9754kf4qSrIYC0J8Y2s1xM_VlqY2W4kulwoq0DHp4d0icxCCErgXnOtuUs2_i7NxskRio0Tr9ahdqFwgcflnfhL_llLb_9yRpoQtWhSFRnGfSWMI7h338Lxm6JEKplQNMuHIZIiMZmKJTNboZm9PySzsGMCg-96JnR2KTsqD5frJd-axJJFDfGTYGi7-_YVpmsey3O_32eGEtVDwkfa1O5K4HHGOIH1pC3le34tsRZhsqTq3PXlNa85i2DLoiuMnhCpT8rKzhAzGCXzP5slMyJ7aIh6yYeZG20Mh1PXAfK9n7tjaGzYiWkHdClVZ3Weh0FVt-IbXsdr6g8Edt3569fkQssyc93LxcAYvWcS5)

---

Fellow Conservative,

Figuring out where to start writing this email has been tough because the content of the copy you’re about to read is, quite honestly, absurd.

I’ve spent most of my adult life in some of the world’s most dangerous places. **I’ve seen what happens when governments collapse, the truth is suppressed, and strong men choose silence instead of standing up. But I never thought I’d see it here, not in America.**

And yet last week, sitting in a congressional hearing, Minnesota Governor Tim Walz was asked a straightforward question:

_**“Can you define what a woman is?”**_

_**He couldn’t.**_
_**He wouldn’t.**_

He dodged. He deflected. And then he sat in silence.

Let me be clear — this wasn’t a trick. This wasn’t a “gotcha” question. This was the easiest test a leader can face: tell the truth, or bow to the mob.
**
Governor Walz chose the mob.**

That moment — that silence — wasn’t just embarrassing. It was dangerous.

Because when leaders abandon truth to protect their politics, it’s the people who suffer. And right now, our daughters, wives, sisters, and grandmothers are being erased in real time—not just from locker rooms and playing fields but from language itself.

My name is Adam Schwarze.

**I’m a proud Minnesotan and a retired Navy SEAL.** I joined the Marine Corps after 9/11 and served in special operations, deploying 13 times to over 70 countries.

_**I didn’t just fight for this country — I bled for it.**_

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0b277fd0907640369cb1a2617e23620a&_e=JmyrUo-tefN90hcUPKxhUWu5pjgKX8d7zCdMc95v8dSmtUMjIv_pKgmD_wT-YNzFp9HpRmb5YWYVjdTWwP2coE7lokbAwGkxkOdXpSp9Ok7Q9zTmAlG4hklODh2TvgHA6LDtxQcLzJvnBRm5UQtKxXVDvOvsGMygUp4G2tBQqDwS4PBj2mFAmTxkTuHcmuZUZH9lLE5UqzVczI0n9lj8TnZbOGusUEwMZbnM7HtTE1-u3xjwrWNGPsrWqaehbIT0hX_jULmQ8A8LSWuuvvbhRmUrNkR69tS2TkK-XMWoeSwnKLyxpv-TLQiw2sJywduvNrBV41tUYspQQPtyrj3xYDhP341fX1jVJ7Qb5MxKW6I_P8Mq1ZJGwVb47EQledn26nSJvblsIxpC-rGqN88nj6GMDxvaeUq61LTWQqBFvlZM0ILjcjGQyh7cFKGJiA3J-66hqMjxm9FXt3LUzxvFzPMBwq5l8uyEeri9eD_m3foKNWTcNl-DSCno-Qj0Y5QMVBKLSTFwkPdbzfb98WRNpkUda0FFDIUGb54K8HOgPTuoxLpm6xgBfVBgfmVU7nJLGv41U_5093pAeIGhFqWyKidAUcT3WGv6filiKCN3u415-1r-9GK_VSY2VNVF20KGHOgcuTJSVaagdAU_cQVMrnVwMqWCnyytCowciiYIRHEEg0yNkb2GBXKQfGX8yEXIaR4YiZnvBJ4Cw3-mba5cJ-tjFzEUE5wk7MDHa1cU5UCAQmIG-t3S0QVqVuqlxycAjhgnZe6IwIbfrBBVxaUpO4WstzIse_Im1dzmASdaRho%3D)

And I never imagined I’d be running for public office. But something has changed. Something fundamental.

When a governor can’t say what a woman is...
When “men in women’s sports” becomes policy...
**When the truth becomes optional, and lies become virtue, that’s when I knew I had one more mission.**

I’m running for the United States Senate because I believe America is worth saving. But it’s going to take more than votes — it’s going to take backbone.

I’ve seen the cost of freedom. I’ve watched friends give everything so that future generations could live in a country built on truth. I won’t let their sacrifice be undone by a political class too cowardly to speak plainly.

That’s why I need your help today.

**[Could you chip in $5 or even $10 right now to help me get my U.S. Senate campaign in Minnesota off the ground?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0b277fd0907640369cb1a2617e23620a&_e=JmyrUo-tefN90hcUPKxhUWu5pjgKX8d7zCdMc95v8dSmtUMjIv_pKgmD_wT-YNzFyNDqZhOsCvc0Xw2lmhjLQdrEYcdD15UU1PT0sDRvHVude2FaVW2lW8uLn-jhDSZqRt3wcTedlqsPnpAgdE8t4m9cO8pcFVK-3dFCPBsExNj3Zcf-1HsmMATYE77nlHzoP5F6MlB6phSWME9sg49dkpyLfivM2UzIP80UM9thTNAOXzs50AZUjvy8ofa2gCZYqbOmmlw2mgYkuiwJ8LxTpOqGHlYruZqbhqc0xmFDlNTkrMbCqybAAIvmkOlEHlHQvNjKsiM6R2rffaXYjJpYZXZb8od9esPB9ZPIUbOCBhvo-rlyM75vQ3_ZiT9f30Ou8_-cyQDa8BM_xMSwzEhhshGW2a_G5JNkCba4pyNxEbVP9HdGs7f-GsK-A2OWAL9HWsz_Kg-lK3CjYXsiumw7kJomqS6Ke6rCAkLU6wTgTm3ITud9i2woy-czyu7QFDr9BaXq6c1Jqg03FJMofdPtRo6DoGCsDQnYEPM6W14gjNlbW2KojUrdeLRK_dCO8pEqf0etzq5hWHp5cDLKsOmMgTYy4DmV_Z_4pteY6HGF4dKfuRoiu5lEWN488MKmMurpsJFimMujZEJOZAI7nnBtprxthwX-xuPW3CNlAwgpOsnB1cLF9oZuk6iSJkSiNyy1R5iyAcl4GcnWIqhu9uOO9eUJFz8KDRSQiBGX0pPwPzTzRnI_turoSH8x_75Ggt06) **

The Democratic Party isn’t just drifting — it’s sprinting toward something unrecognizable. First, they said men could use women’s bathrooms. Then they demanded that girls compete against biological males in school sports. Now, they claim they don’t even know what a woman is. And Governor Walz?

**He’s not a bystander. He’s a willing participant in this charade.**

His likely successor — my opponent — is even more radical.

So if you’re like me — and **[you believe that biology isn’t bigotry, that America deserves leaders who know right from wrong, and that the truth is still worth defending — then I’m asking you to take action.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0b277fd0907640369cb1a2617e23620a&_e=JmyrUo-tefN90hcUPKxhUWu5pjgKX8d7zCdMc95v8dSmtUMjIv_pKgmD_wT-YNzFyNDqZhOsCvc0Xw2lmhjLQdrEYcdD15UU1PT0sDRvHVude2FaVW2lW8uLn-jhDSZqRt3wcTedlqsPnpAgdE8t4m9cO8pcFVK-3dFCPBsExNj3Zcf-1HsmMATYE77nlHzoP5F6MlB6phSWME9sg49dkpyLfivM2UzIP80UM9thTNAOXzs50AZUjvy8ofa2gCZYqbOmmlw2mgYkuiwJ8LxTpEbHbO0vyhd5kNKuVBLkThnQewNcaNJTCbcRelo4b6snBojH_IO3Ilh3q5ZX0KIAQRPwWUR8Vjpb-ioxMnhRhC3sAA6FN7xklKW1q8UwGJotZu82VLR7wsJlqenrbiE1f8J1FWLQ_xF4eNXk817ue1ARgtilUwZjUBDExgy9B_lK0kP4Sr4o4kxOaDmrENyKr3U6gbg_YnBJDxBzHV_qSqPjbAk-gyOgs8SKnR1K0sFUuuLuDMNKJAknYcgehhJ64IWAN8pB9GPBcmq3zNwjcrREpe35IlgU9izNeiO2aL5-cf-cc3kCxq4vEHsp91ABouDzPDKaS7OPVtHt8oATcxeMm_H3Oibo4Grr2rS8we8m179PVtFJlNhCNbers3AgO2p5e1YypTVwd0cH2SfXXtbiYrq5Iws-0L35PI3dLAbCHY-nbTgNEPK5D8V3ePt4cQZsXTuNvMM2KUmRFm74gRR-lhQrKpZfOVo6UJ4n67Jy)

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Today is the first day of summer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
Scientists keep sounding the alarm year after year: the relentless burning of fossil fuels is driving global temperatures higher and accelerating the consequences.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109943917/552755850/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDEwN2FlNi1mNTRkLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OBmb77MJJQ8pDGiTvk8B5EC5yOVRpDQ95LRJ-6eoP8o=&emci=7789fdc2-8b4c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=80107ae6-f54d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7731215)
