| | Today is the first day of summer, and we can feel the temperatures heating up — with some parts of the country already experiencing extreme heat with temperatures over 100 degrees. These hotter summers are a flashing red warning light that we are not doing enough to address climate chaos. **Scientists keep sounding the alarm year after year: the relentless burning of fossil fuels is driving global temperatures higher and accelerating the consequences.** Across the country, we live with the effects of climate chaos every day. Wildfire smoke blankets our communities with air pollution, extreme drought threatens our food supply, and intensifying storms leave behind record-level flooding and damage. In the face of all this, the Trump administration is eagerly rolling back hard-won regulations that protect our air and water, stopping funding for clean energy projects, and reopening our public lands to drilling. He's selling out our planet to enrich his billionaire cronies. **_The bottom line is we can't keep living like this._** We need leaders who are unafraid to take on Trump and Republicans who deny climate science, prop up fossil fuel giants, and rig the system for corporations contaminating our communities. Our future is on the line, and I won't stop fighting for bold legislation that puts people over polluters and protects our planet for generations to come. Mike Turner tried to clarify, “It is not your testimony today that there are plans at the Pentagon for taking by force or invading Greenland, correct? I sure as hell hope that is not your testimony.” Hegseth refused to say there were no plans for a Greenland invasion but did say, “We look forward to working with Greenland to ensure that it is secured from any potential threats.” Stunning. We must stop felon Trump and his fools from gutting federal spending that improves the lives of everyday Americans so he and his MAGA thugs can enrich themselves** and fund the invasion of our allies! subject: Fighting back against GOP attacks →
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109945653/552759106/2039042026?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDdjZWEwMDgtZjg0ZC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_pgFKUC-78AIZpO3KyAQHZyXOZNQMfccANviCEmx4B4=)
It’s no secret that the national GOP is targeting Derek. He flipped one of the most competitive seats in the country by 653 votes, and now Republicans are out for revenge.

It’s why the NRCC, super PACs, and other powerful Republican groups have started launching baseless attacks against him.

**So we’ve put up digital ads of our own – highlighting just how critical Derek’s work in Congress is not only for CA-45, but for our democracy.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109945666/552759121/2039042026?refcode=em-6.20.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDdjZWEwMDgtZjg0ZC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_pgFKUC-78AIZpO3KyAQHZyXOZNQMfccANviCEmx4B4=)
Unlike those GOP groups, Derek doesn’t have millions in outside funding to spread the word about his critical re-election campaign.

Derek even refuses to accept a cent from Big Pharma and Oil, because he’s representing the people he was elected to serve – not special interests.

**[If everyone reading this email chipped in just a few dollars to keep our ads running, we’d hit our end-of-quarter goal instantly. Will you chip in today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109945671/552759131/2039042026?refcode=em-6.20.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDdjZWEwMDgtZjg0ZC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_pgFKUC-78AIZpO3KyAQHZyXOZNQMfccANviCEmx4B4=)**

clean_body: | = It’s no secret that the national GOP is targeting Derek. He flipped one of the most competitive seats in the country by 653 votes, and now Republicans are out for revenge. It’s why the NRCC, super PACs, and other powerful Republican groups have started launching baseless attacks against him. So we’ve put up digital ads of our own – highlighting just how critical Derek’s work in Congress is not only for CA-45, but for our democracy. = Unlike those GOP groups, Derek doesn’t have millions in outside funding to spread the word about his critical re-election campaign. Derek even refuses to accept a cent from Big Pharma and Oil, because he’s representing the people he was elected to serve – not special interests. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Team Tran | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. * * *
In the face of troubling trends in our national leadership, local officials must rise to the occasion and push back against harmful policies like Trump’s “Strengthening and Unleashing America’s Law Enforcement” executive order. _This directive barrels us further toward a fascist police state._ It seeks to militarize and bolster police powers, which can lead to increased surveillance, aggressive policing, racial profiling, and a chilling effect on community trust. As we've seen, these measures disproportionately impact marginalized communities, exacerbating systemic injustices rather than promoting safety and equity. **Your support can help elect local officials who will RESIST Trump’s authoritarianism and implement fair policing practices, foster inclusive policies, and build resilient communities.** [**Join us and resist the encroachment on our rights and ensure that democracy thrives at the local level. clean_body: | | | In the face of troubling trends in our national leadership, local officials must rise to the occasion and push back against harmful policies like Trump’s “Strengthening and Unleashing America’s Law Enforcement” executive order. This directive barrels us further toward a fascist police state. It seeks to militarize and bolster police powers, which can lead to increased surveillance, aggressive policing, racial profiling, and a chilling effect on community trust. As we've seen, these measures disproportionately impact marginalized communities, exacerbating systemic injustices rather than promoting safety and equity. Your support can help elect local officials who will RESIST Trump’s authoritarianism and implement fair policing practices, foster inclusive policies, and build resilient communities. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Our local governments have the unique ability to advocate for policies that prioritize community well-being and civil rights. By engaging in community dialogues, implementing effective oversight mechanisms, and supporting transformative justice initiatives, local leaders can counteract the negative repercussions of such federal directives. The Local Democracy Project is dedicated to empowering local officials who reflect our values and building a resilient democracy from the ground up.** Together, we can ensure that local leaders stand firm against detrimental policies and work towards a more equitable future for all. -Local Democracy Project supports down-ballot races and empowering communities across the country. body:
FIRST: Trump launched a war on the free press - smearing journalists, silencing dissent, and undermining public trust in truth itself.
NEXT: He tried to overturn the election, fueled an insurrection, and installed loyalists across government to shield himself from accountability.
NOW: He’s targeting ActBlue with an Executive Order that instructs the DOJ to target and investigate it.
ActBlue is the infrastructure that powers everyything from school board races to the fight to flip the House. It’s the tool MILLIONS of grassroots donors use to fight for reproductive freedom, LGBTQ+ rights, climate action, and more.
And Trump has declared war on it.

The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

TONIGHT, Bernie Sanders is going DIRECTLY into the heart of Trump
territory – and we’re with him in this fight to defeat oligarchy,

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25041?source=email-20250620&t=1061&akid=8898%2E5885482%2ESeDvc3 ][IMG]

Starting TONIGHT, the Fighting Oligarchy Tour will stop in Texas,
Louisiana, and Oklahoma, bringing thousands of regular Americans together
to say NO to billionaire control of our country and YES to progressive
change.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250620nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8898%2E5885482%2ESeDvc3 ]Bernie’s powerful tour shows that resistance to Trump and hope for real,
progressive change is possible beyond traditional blue states – but to
turn rallies into lasting power, we URGENTLY need your support. Will you
chip in today and help scale up Our Revolution's crucial work in

From coast to coast, Bernie is proving that progressive values resonate
with all Americans – not just those in liberal strongholds. His
record-breaking tour is sparking grassroots energy in GOP strongholds,
building momentum to stand up to Trump and his oligarchs and turn
resistance into real change.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25041?source=email-20250620&t=1060&akid=8898%2E5885482%2ESeDvc3 ][IMG]

That’s why Our Revolution is deploying our 60,000-person-strong Citizen
Action Team right now across the country to organize local activists,
elect progressive candidates, and build power in states the political
establishment has ignored.

But scaling up to meet this moment comes with a cost. Sending organizers
to battleground states, mobilizing volunteers, and funding local campaigns
is resource-intensive – and Our Revolution has never depended on

Will you chip in today and help scale up Our Revolution's crucial work in battleground communities nationwide? name: Tom Barrett
subject: BREAKING: Joe Biden’s Ambassador to Ukraine is running against me
body:
She carpetbagged into a district she’s never lived | | | [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6855975eaada1466154914df&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftombarrettforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D685573adfa522a4a8ab014f1%26ss_email_id%3D6855975eaada1466154914df%26ss_campaign_name%3DBREAKING%253A%2BJoe%2BBiden%25E2%2580%2599s%2BAmbassador%2Bto%2BUkraine%2Bis%2Brunning%2Bagainst%2Bme%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-06-20T17%253A16%253A20Z&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_685573adfa522a4a8ab014f1&l=en-US&s=QtX4DkakcaWdWCKFNIRj5Rr0U9A%3D)
---
| **I NEED YOUR HELP**
---
Joe Biden’s Ambassador to Ukraine just announced she’s running against me.
---
|
---
[_ _**Donate to Tom** _ _](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6855975eaada1466154914df&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fbidens-ambassador&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_685573adfa522a4a8ab014f1&l=en-US&s=mzO9Wbt9GPse56ytff67vfatY04%3D)
---
My opponent has no ties to the 7th District. She’s never lived in any part of the district. But last month she bought a house between the Governor’s Mansion and the Country Club in the middle of the 7th District in order to run against me.**And in the first 24 hours of her campaign, she’s raised $250,000.**
---
[_ _**Stand with Tom** _ _](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6855975eaada1466154914df&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fbidens-ambassador&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_685573adfa522a4a8ab014f1&l=en-US&s=mzO9Wbt9GPse56ytff67vfatY04%3D)
---
|
---
**In her announcement, she says Ukraine seven times before she bothers to say Michigan.** She’s not running to represent the people of the 7th District, she’s running to advance her own agenda at the expense of our communities.
---
[_ _**Fight for the 7th** _ _](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6855975eaada1466154914df&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fbidens-ambassador&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_685573adfa522a4a8ab014f1&l=en-US&s=mzO9Wbt9GPse56ytff67vfatY04%3D)
---
Help me fight back against the Deep State Democrats and Washington DC Elites who care more about their interests than our interests.[Please donate today.](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6855975eaada1466154914df&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fbidens-ambassador&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_685573adfa522a4a8ab014f1&l=en-US&s=mzO9Wbt9GPse56ytff67vfatY04%3D)
---
|
---
|
---

name: With Honor Action
subject: Bipartisan Veterans on Political Violence
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WITH HONOR ACTION, INC
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0c63a0809382/bats-brews-and-a-birthday-salute-to-the-us-army-14053105?e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| | | |
---
| | | | **Rep. Miller-Meeks: "Politically motivated violence is unacceptable, period. Full stop."**
---
| [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=19c19f5a33&e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| Friends,

Over the weekend, Army veteran and For Country Caucus Member Rep. Mariannette Miller-Meeks joined Fox News Live to speak about the Army's 250th Birthday.

Miller-Meeks also responded to the tragic killings of two Minnesota lawmakers that took place the day before her appearance, saying:
> "We have to be careful with our language, and this includes us as elected officials. We need to tone it down [and we] need to set the stage for the American people, that **we can disagree, we can carry out differences at the ballot box, but political violence is not acceptable**."
As political tensions continue to rise, members of the For Country Caucus have made clear that violence has no place in American democracy. Rep. Chrissy Houlahan, an Air Force veteran and fellow caucus member, shared this [message](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=909d014276&e=33f53a5b1a):
> “No matter party or ideology, political violence and the rhetoric inflaming it has no place in America. I urge us all to stand united against it, condemn it when we see it, and resolve political differences at the ballot box.”
As advocates for civility and bipartisanship, we believe that Rep. Miller-Meeks' and Rep. Houlahan's answers encapsulate why **civility** is one of the three core pillars of the [With Honor Pledge](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=4f434718a4&e=33f53a5b1a), and why the For Country Caucus remains resilient and bipartisan, despite these political times.
---
|
---
| **ICYMI: With Honor Action VP Sean McClintock Speaks at the AI+ Expo**
---
| [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=06246b7f04&e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| **Veterans make up about two percent of congressional staff, despite the Department of Veterans Affairs and Defense's budgets comprising more than half of Congress's discretionary budget.**

This disparity was a key takeaway from one of the panels With Honor Action participated in during the Special Competitive Studies Project's annual AI+ Expo in Washington, D.C. Click on the video above to watch Sean McClintock, With Honor's V.P. of Government Affairs, speak on the importance of veterans continuing to serve after leaving the military, including the views of Lt. Gen. (Ret.) Michael Groen, who last served as the Commander of the Joint Artificial Intelligence Center, and Charles Correll Jr.
| | Susan Forbes
V.P. of Communications & Marketing
With Honor Action
---
| | | |
---

and consider forwarding this to a friend who may be interested in learning -- and doing -- more for our country.

subject: She did it again!

name: Team Bennet
subject: What Mike Lee is up to
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250620_publiclandsnotforsale_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250620_publiclandsnotforsale_act]
Hi folks,
Utah Senator Mike Lee and Senate Republicans are trying to sneak the sale of nearly 3.3 million acres of protected public lands into Trump’s “big beautiful bill.” This land, some of which is in Colorado, would be auctioned off to fossil fuel companies and real estate developers—all to help pay for tax giveaways to the ultra-wealthy and giant corporations.
Not on Michael’s watch.
Michael is raising the alarm on this issue and working with Democrats and Republicans to ensure that this public lands fire sale never sees the light of day.
If you support Michael and his efforts to protect our public lands, chip in what you can today. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250620_publiclandsnotforsale_act]
Mike Lee’s provision, which he added in the hopes nobody would notice, would threaten some of Colorado’s most precious public lands, harm some of our most accessible places to hunt and fish, and potentially damage our state’s water supply.
In Colorado, our public lands are the foundation of our economy. Their historical, cultural, and recreational value is priceless. That’s why Michael has worked alongside outdoor champions, state and local leaders, small business owners, and tribal nations for years to protect them, including 53,000 acres within the Camp Hale-Continental Divide National Monument.
We must honor our history and protect these lands for our children, grandchildren, and future generations.
Mike Lee must know: our public lands are not for sale. Not now, not ever.
Our public lands should be protected, not used as political bargaining chips. Join Michael today in his effort to DEFEAT Trump and Mike Lee’s "big beautiful bill". [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250620_publiclandsnotforsale_act]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

After promising "No More Foreign Wars" in his presidential campaign, Trump has MAGA feeling betrayed. But that's not the only bad news for Trump, voters are also frustrated with his handling of the economy and inflation, and it's driving his approval ratings into the ground:
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DaYvb3cG4AgnaAd1KsuObgA2K6-IhBoCR6ELn9YFAvouNbAwTCB8W1z69ePuOMmUd-_vRUKwXhupG1d5b1f6yARjHjKdJBxj5djx3GoiE4HtWxVh_SOBfEG1sbpcs8P5BLXifzeNn_JtjWuMGyPzp__YquDPNJrI_invd-E1u_ENkMDSR8xlFJjQi9Roind2oQc5ncyP1ex9Z6XLguPrKjXpP_pPPMiFZ1BHyR7CMnaa2QE7CAeCn3g08NinAVO7v3uvhWABRyiXS9kSLtk5toMiQurMpcR9krHAafY7zLP2iFKdzLZLa3nyQmgZD1ApSop3Smo8AQY1Q4m5BXByHgwniple-8zxvX13CSdjcbvbM64OP1f48Sir3kOQgJNEG/4hi/dQuBDLiOTyO-sX3-m94UPw/h2/h001.wT-eK5UexN7b9a8cn3Z59WshC7OquiFftXqDgijts00)
---
2026 is shaping up to be a disaster for the GOP. _If Trump does invade Iran_ , his approval ratings are likely to plummet even further, giving democrats the opportunity to flip an unprecedented amount of red districts blue. During Bush's presidency in 2005, Howard Dean became the Chairman of the Democratic Party and implemented an ambitious plan for Democrats to tap into the public backlash to the Iraq War - _the "50 state strategy."_ The goal of this plan was to contest Republicans everywhere by investing in Dem campaigns in long neglected and ignored deep red areas. The results were a resounding success. In 2006, Democrats won control of Congress for the first time since the 1994 election. For the first time since the creation of the Republican party in 1854, no Republican captured any House, Senate, or Gubernatorial seat previously held by a Democrat. In 2008, the 50 state strategy helped propel Barack Obama to his historic victory in the presidential election. **No Dem Left Behind is building a modern day 50 state strategy.** MAGA is on the ropes and fighting amongst each other, _they won 't even see us coming._ **[We are helping Dems in unglamorous red and rural districts by giving them the resources they need to effectively campaign - allowing Dems to contest Republicans in every single state and setting the conditions for massive upsets in MAGA held territory. Will you rush a donation to help us capitalize on Trump & MAGA's collapse?](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DaYvb3cG4AgnaAd1KsuObgA2K6-IhBoCR6ELn9YFAvouNbAwTCB8W1z69ePuOMmUdbLQWOXd54RBDRbVYJKvKM1LtXJDGXMRSqHqr8KxKqUjHP4QtBoRB25xpURtZHqmE2zHlSoWkj6hHY19wi-Mn9ydauK0Wy-bB_BLqZaZ1AxfUdODZbv0HaBH05_Oypukgf7N1GHoBPJdwg1VWBRdD0_SFK8kx3TdZPkcdlTQ7BU3-Jvhhvf9TUyJ6iM6JxmD3S_tc4w_nmbumb9v10SoELPrXXPZ3qUKkrbTvXgKYrrXCSj4QaKnuyR7yz0jGUa4vfRE8P_9UzFRnKnTpgenIRcQBVtyrCybkMBtbAvhfD9cfXu5rJFKMl9exCbnEC5O5/4hi/dQuBDLiOTyO-sX3-m94UPw/h3/h001.oRkLxr5YPw3jIADbQbqb1qyhNqRTH9fCBZgT5tGMt8I)**

clean_body: The worst people you know are fighting | | Friend, While the American people revolt against Donald Trump's attempt to get America involved in yet another war in the Middle East on behalf of Israel, MAGA is turning on each other: | After promising "No More Foreign Wars" in his presidential campaign, Trump has MAGA feeling betrayed. But that's not the only bad news for Trump, voters are also frustrated with his handling of the economy and inflation, and it's driving his approval ratings into the ground: | 2026 is shaping up to be a disaster for the GOP. If Trump does invade Iran , his approval ratings are likely to plummet even further, giving democrats the opportunity to flip an unprecedented amount of red districts blue. During Bush's presidency in 2005, Howard Dean became the Chairman of the Democratic Party and implemented an ambitious plan for Democrats to tap into the public backlash to the Iraq War - the "50 state strategy." The goal of this plan was to contest Republicans everywhere by investing in Dem campaigns in long neglected and ignored deep red areas. The results were a resounding success. In 2006, Democrats won control of Congress for the first time since the 1994 election. For the first time since the creation of the Republican party in 1854, no Republican captured any House, Senate, or Gubernatorial seat previously held by a Democrat. In 2008, the 50 state strategy helped propel Barack Obama to his historic victory in the presidential election. No Dem Left Behind is building a modern day 50 state strategy. MAGA is on the ropes and fighting amongst each other, they won 't even see us coming. Team No Dem Left Behind | | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 2003 | Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee. | | Sent via . name: David
subject: 76% of Americans agree. Do you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Club for Growth Action and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | | Peter – Democrats are coming for the House Majority. They’ve zeroed in on 35 Republican congressional seats—and they’re armed with lies, misinformation, and millions in attack ads. **But Club for Growth just released new polling that shows exactly how conservatives can fight back and WIN:** ✅ Stop all tax increases – Voters support it 76% to 12%.✅ Cut waste, fraud, and abuse in programs like Medicaid.✅ Support work requirements for able-bodied adults receiving benefits. This poll covers every single battleground district targeted by the Democrats. And the message from voters is crystal clear: **Republicans who make tough, fiscally responsible votes will be rewarded—not punished—at the ballot box.** That’s why we’re publicizing this data now, as President Trump’s “One, Big, Beautiful Bill” moves forward. These votes matter. And the fight to keep the majority starts here.
---
[ **FIGHT FOR THE MAJORITY** ](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/hs37PX2i2sdKyJXCRbERw4e-UMwsAF1PUh_Hqo-C2fg4NrK1BLy8bsnk5aK1JymCoil4D5tNo3l8yZH2R3UnA0Qh7yYPiUJrGOz_6SrfH0aHu_7h1si9T5klh-K16uNuSNMT5AxlUkijGLqmDz9ieNHQgfYBuDY0xHHB1lwPEMeJMKwpITKXgwEL6WSJDh0sQb67wkH3BO5P1grcmXRVS_AMuGnnixWkEiHGM812YxdkxZlj1sUVjlqw7AMAWYFZYX4m0C_elDFftn6ocMKCe3-vwFYCMoJ2zgDIH8XloP68kcDaUP82EOAy4NY5zOTuz6cqn1SJt_ta5bQIMhN39jvShb7qD7muNLLcH2SE1VhYdw4x0RcLbm6UnaobqNe3N4wY4WQmcCrCVZHTU_SeKnbGvBIId3bfFKXcxQKCc2kwMW2LiE3LqCkwpbFs9E6FYWH46Ho24MD1GXcZD6995XBKmBqxcBldG0nIjfKWKCMyoBWCE_LG__v1Givfij3Or1nfhmlfhxpJn_HBL7-5UcfM4XQQ7PY96z1byRNIilufdIbhmxoXq9L25b7KK3N_ts53ERHmFzuvJe8iWru8oKEUi0ltQRfdj2eSfWAlYIJKgt5_7S4XczpXXYTqKFgAAxVri_F9xCQONIvATAIneYXngdaL2uw6hl5l4CaHdxqEa8aQfHiuIZMAxTs3sN0v4mjmkOIvAO0pmR_pimIs6uiT7MWwtKWTVgec5fkNwEneKYJzpnLOzTwwBevaDXk2nMkZm-NdqBGIWq2X5dDuEtHYyY3G03nQSYVPb6Qg7IuVZdUOrIA5s8LzB15hd-1N_DHfy1PHV8F5IIbiunZlEYhBEvsDSRYjprHeDmaY4mi4MUk/HCI5azosE7rOiClHAiYqJEIXaGQbil_R/10)

clean_body: | | | Peter – Democrats are coming for the House Majority. They’ve zeroed in on 35 Republican congressional seats—and they’re armed with lies, misinformation, and millions in attack ads. But Club for Growth just released new polling that shows exactly how conservatives can fight back and WIN: ✅ Stop all tax increases – Voters support it 76% to 12%.✅ Cut waste, fraud, and abuse in programs like Medicaid.✅ Support work requirements for able-bodied adults receiving benefits. This poll covers every single battleground district targeted by the Democrats. And the message from voters is crystal clear: Republicans who make tough, fiscally responsible votes will be rewarded—not punished—at the ballot box. That’s why we’re publicizing this data now, as President Trump’s “One, Big, Beautiful Bill” moves forward. These votes matter. And the fight to keep the majority starts here. Democrats are already dumping cash into these districts. We need to be ready with ads, mail, and grassroots organizing to expose their lies and defend conservatives who do the right thing. | | | | | | | If Republicans take bold action—cut spending, balance the budget, and hold the line on taxes—they will win. Now it’s time to put those numbers to work and unleash a major VICTORY! Thank you for standing with us, David McIntoshPresident, Club for Growth Action | | Club for Growth Action 2001 L St. NW, Ste 600 Washington, DC 20036ph 202.955.5500

If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Peter - House conservatives voted to make the Trump Tax Cuts PERMANENT, delivering a CRUSHING DEFEAT to the radical left's plan for a 22% TAX HIKE --the largest in American history--that would've GUTTED your wallet and our economy! Club for Growth 's relentless grassroots warriors stood with us to get the job done, but now the fight moves to the SENATE, where spineless RINOs and socialist Democrats are itching to DERAIL our progress! The Club for Growth was pivotal in helping us with language to extend and expand the Trump Tax Cuts, but we're not done yet. We 're working to get the Senate to take up this important legislation as well - and we need YOU on our side. | | The Left and their weak-kneed allies are plotting to sabotage our victory, dreaming of taxing you into oblivion. Club for Growth has been our FIREBRAND in this fight, rallying patriots to defend economic freedom. Together, we'll FORCE the Senate to deliver, SLASH taxes, and keep America ROARING! FUEL THIS FIGHT with your contribution TODAY and let 's make the Senate FINISH THE JOB! For freedom, Rep. At a time when so many forces aim to divide and isolate us, canvassing is how we come together: creating human connection amongst other canvassers who match our passion, amongst neighbors who are feeling scared and confused, and even amongst neighbors who don’t necessarily agree with us all the time. Canvassing gives us the time and space to cut through the (mis)information that we're bombarded with to share good-faith, honest ideas – building real connections, listening to each other, and engaging voters face-to-face. **It’s also how we win tough races.** We must flip the House next year. It’s our best chance at putting a check on the Trump Administration. To do that, we need resources to organize aggressively: hiring staff, training volunteers, and winning votes one door at a time. That’s why we’re laser-focused on key races like Arizona’s 6th, where Joanna Mendoza is running to flip the district blue. But the only way we win is with a strong grassroots movement in full force: turning out voters, organizing block-by-block, and meeting people where they are. [_**Will you chip in $6 or whatever you can to fuel our canvassing and outreach efforts? Every dollar powers the work to win close races and protect democracy.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109950385/552770671/1131891713?amount=6&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.06.18_MikaylaCanvassing_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDRhNzg0ZC1mZTRkLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y0YwLA8lMpq8Kt0aRZ4LikTFhSW1YK05NoUpUCB_TY4=) [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109950387/552770673/1131891713?amount=6&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.06.18_MikaylaCanvassing_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDRhNzg0ZC1mZTRkLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y0YwLA8lMpq8Kt0aRZ4LikTFhSW1YK05NoUpUCB_TY4=) Together, by going door-to-door and mobilizing our communities, we will build an unstoppable movement – flipping the House, standing up to the Trump administration, and delivering real change. subject: Trump’s economic plan: Set fire to money, hand marshmallows to the rich
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Don't let Trump add trillions in debt to give tax cuts to billionaires](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1f1ceaa2-245d-4fc3-89a3-db3a9800a61e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T98739d2b-817e-4d31-9eb7-6d1e55c3a8d5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Donald Trump added more to our national debt in his first term than any other president. And he's about to break his own record with an enormous tax cut for the wealthy that will add trillions to the debt, and take it to its highest level ever. **In what bizarro world does this make sense? Trump is essentially picking the pockets of 340 million Americans, and handing the money over to the top .0001%.** They don't need it, it puts America into an even deeper hole, and on a stupidity scale of 1 to 10, "it goes to 11." [**Add your name: Call on Congress to reject Trump's "big beautiful bill", and don't let him add trillions in debt to give tax cuts to billionaires.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb98f5028-8f4b-42d2-b1a6-9549fcbefaa6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Lily Franklin via Jane Fonda Climate PAC
subject: This fight is personal for me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
We have to flip this seat.

| Hi there, it's Lily Franklin. I'm a JanePAC-endorsed candidate running to flip Virginia's 41st District **blue**. Today, I want to tell you about a number that changed my life: **183**. **That's how many votes I lost this race by in 2023.** I'll never forget that number because it showed me exactly how much every single voice, every door knock, and every grassroots donation matters. In a race this close, your support can be the difference between winning and losing. Now, I'm running again to finish what I started. Virginians deserve a leader who will put us first. Our communities are built on grit, resilience, and hard work, but too many families are being left behind while corporations poison our water, contaminate our farmlands, and buy influence to sell us out in Richmond. **[So I need your help to cross the finish line this time. Will you make a split contribution — just $10 or $20 — between my campaign and JanePAC? Together, we can flip this district and support other candidates like me who are running to take a stand against the fossil fuel industry.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109950410/552770727/-743469624?refcode=ea.54ced960-fe4d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.54ced960-fe4d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU0Y2VkOTYwLWZlNGQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZAZufOKNrij2wSWobMny5WVS96NfS-JHWsc3yqH2Uck=)** | [**SPLIT A DONATION →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109950411/552770728/-743469624?refcode=ea.54ced960-fe4d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.54ced960-fe4d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU0Y2VkOTYwLWZlNGQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZAZufOKNrij2wSWobMny5WVS96NfS-JHWsc3yqH2Uck=)
---
As a Chief of Staff in the Virginia House of Delegates, I spearheaded meaningful climate legislation, like securing microgrants for farmers and limiting cancer-causing forever chemicals in Roanoke's drinking water.
For too long, I've seen politicians ignore climate change — even as the evidence mounted and the consequences became more severe. Now, we're left to confront the fallout of their devastating inaction for the rest of our lives.
If elected, the inaction ends. I promise to be a relentless fighter for our planet. I'll take on the corporations polluting our communities, push to shut down dangerous pipelines, and lead the charge for clean energy investments that create good-paying jobs right here in Virginia.
But first, we have to flip this seat.
**The real battles for climate progress are won or lost in tight races like mine. And with every Virginia House seat on the ballot this November, the stakes couldn't be higher. This race will help decide whether we keep Virginia blue — or hand power back to Republicans.**
**[Your support today could put us over the edge. Will you make a split contribution between my campaign and the Jane Fonda Climate PAC? clean_body: We have to flip this seat. | Hi there, it's Lily Franklin. I'm a JanePAC-endorsed candidate running to flip Virginia's 41st District blue. Today, I want to tell you about a number that changed my life: 183. That's how many votes I lost this race by in 2023. I'll never forget that number because it showed me exactly how much every single voice, every door knock, and every grassroots donation matters. In a race this close, your support can be the difference between winning and losing. Now, I'm running again to finish what I started. Virginians deserve a leader who will put us first. Our communities are built on grit, resilience, and hard work, but too many families are being left behind while corporations poison our water, contaminate our farmlands, and buy influence to sell us out in Richmond. = | = As a Chief of Staff in the Virginia House of Delegates, I spearheaded meaningful climate legislation, like securing microgrants for farmers and limiting cancer-causing forever chemicals in Roanoke's drinking water. For too long, I've seen politicians ignore climate change — even as the evidence mounted and the consequences became more severe. Now, we're left to confront the fallout of their devastating inaction for the rest of our lives. If elected, the inaction ends. I promise to be a relentless fighter for our planet. I'll take on the corporations polluting our communities, push to shut down dangerous pipelines, and lead the charge for clean energy investments that create good-paying jobs right here in Virginia. But first, we have to flip this seat. The real battles for climate progress are won or lost in tight races like mine. And with every Virginia House seat on the ballot this November, the stakes couldn't be higher. This race will help decide whether we keep Virginia blue — or hand power back to Republicans. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = With gratitude, Lily Franklin Candidate for Virginia House of Delegates, District 41 = | | Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

I know tough fights and even if the path is hard, I believe Lindsey Graham has to be held accountable. He doesn’t deserve a free pass back to D.C. for six more years. The George Soros elected, Pro-Criminal, Trump-Deranged DEI hire that has turned my beloved New York City into a third-world Hellscape.

| | |
---

---
| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/3XK8Vx6QyQ-qmW_4sn5hlA~~/AARclBA~/W9ttiY-HRKqJUjaOXwxxQPR3IavvoBPL_s5xNE2mgRCa4WpcHbDzXQe6l3wGsMd_QoWCv6oeP6eZ6lNRVk7qKEC_GbbFRxGBIEqCWhvUiOzXOJ2KVsVhZGTQX0cLx80m8lNOYkunXTVqvcVc7VWGB08vfiGmlfhcFi7na_Ao_CVtaYUdIYr4z3gnSvYRR-DQUAxTKLochkXmLNgGtqEgNZaz_nr0hC0GroxGInmd8ssH-JEvVPsh8C5gfJKodaFk0q6drD-u_L1GmeANa2u92W2qcMlCIWzkCv3ueM93n1eScQjjgHFqK_IHyxbT9x6k)

| | My Dear Friend, [**My name is Maud Maron, and I need your help to defeat Alvin Bragg and replace him as the District Attorney of Manhattan.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/3XK8Vx6QyQ-qmW_4sn5hlA~~/AARclBA~/W9ttiY-HRKqJUjaOXwxxQPR3IavvoBPL_s5xNE2mgRCa4WpcHbDzXQe6l3wGsMd_QoWCv6oeP6eZ6lNRVk7qKEC_GbbFRxGBIEqCWhvUiOzXOJ2KVsVhZGTQX0cLx80m8lNOYkunXTVqvcVc7VWGB08vfiGmlfhcFi7na_Ao_CVtaYUdIYr4z3gnSvYRR-DQUAxTKLochkXmLNgGtqEgNZaz_nr0hC0GroxGInmd8ssH-JEvVPsh8C5gfJKodaFk0q6drD-u_L1GmeANa2u92W2qcMlCIWzkCv3ueM93n1eScQjjgHFqK_IHyxbT9x6k) You know Alvin... The George Soros elected, Pro-Criminal, Trump-Deranged DEI hire that has turned my beloved New York City into a third-world Hellscape. If you think that sounds too dramatic, just look at a few examples of what Alvin Bragg's "weak-on-crime," Trump-obsessed tenure has brought to the law-abiding citizens of New York:
---
* An innocent woman set on fire by a Guatemalan Illegal Alien who had already been deported at least once before...
* A mob of Illegal criminals caught on video assaulting two New York City Law Enforcement officers outside a "Migrant Shelter," all **released without bail by Alvin Bragg!**

---
Instead of working for the last 4 years to make the Citizens of New York safe and secure, Alvin has been on a singular, sick, twisted mission and one mission only -- TAKE DOWN DONALD TRUMP. That's what he ran on... Those were his marching orders from George Soros and his Radical donors... And those are orders he dutifully followed -- at the expense of not only those of us who live in New York, but every single American that deserved to vote in a fair election not tainted by a ridiculous set of trumped-up charges made up out of thin air. New Yorkers deserve better... Americans deserve better. That's why -- whether you live right here in Manhattan, a thousand miles away in Des Moines, Iowa, or anywhere else in our great country -- I hope you'll help me defeat Alvin Bragg. **[Would you consider helping my campaign with a one-time $28 contribution today?](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/3XK8Vx6QyQ-qmW_4sn5hlA~~/AARclBA~/W9ttiY-HRKqJUjaOXwxxQPR3IavvoBPL_s5xNE2mgRCa4WpcHbDzXQe6l3wGsMd_QoWCv6oeP6eZ6lNRVk7qKEC_GbbFRxGBIEqCWhvUiOzXOJ2KVsVhZGTQX0cLx80m8lNOYkunXTVqvcVc7VWGB08vfiGmlfhcFi7na_Ao_CVtaYUdIYr4z3gnSvYRR-DQUAxTKLochkXmLNgGtqEgNZaz_nr0hC0GroxGInmd8ssH-JEvVPsh8C5gfJKodaFk0q6drD-u_L1GmeANa2u92W2qcMlCIWzkCv3ueM93n1eScQjjgHFqK_IHyxbT9x6k)** I could really use your help. Alvin Bragg has millions of dollars pouring into his campaign by the same Radicals who put him there the first time around...
---
* George Soros
* Hollywood Celebrities
* Elites right here in New York and Hollywood
* The deep pockets of the Democrat election machine

---
I don't have any of that on my side -- but I hope I've got YOU on my side. To have any chance of beating the Democrat machine funding Alvin Bragg's run for re-election, I need a nationwide army of Americans to rally by my side... A nationwide army of Americans who understand how toxic it is having a Radical like Alvin Bragg in charge of the criminal justice system of one of our largest cities... Who know how close Alvin Bragg came to knocking Donald Trump out of the 2024 Presidential election and what that would have done to our country... Who watched in disgust as Alvin Bragg conjured up a 34-count felony conviction against a man whose only real crime was trying to Make America Great Again! This is our chance to send a clear message not only to the people of New York -- but the nation -- that these Radicals put into place by George Soros to do his bidding are not invincible... That they CAN be defeated! Alvin Bragg is the perfect example of why I left the Democrat party. I think it all started when my 11-year-old got COVID... We were told to mask in the house and give my son meals in his room for 10 days. Instead, we cuddled up & watched TV together -- unmasked in the living room and ate our meals as a family at the dinner table. That was a watershed moment for me. What were we doing? When did the United States of America turn into a place where the Government told us how to live? When I dared to suggest that it may not be the best idea for biological boys to participate in girls' sports, I was all but run out of town on a rail... Then I dared suggest that the complete failure of our school system might be due to something other than racism, I -- after a lifetime of considering myself a liberal Democrat -- was labeled a "Right Wing Extremist" by the New York Times! The blinders came off -- suddenly, I realized that if simply acknowledging the truth, calling out corruption and challenging the long-held beliefs of the Democrat machine disqualified me from being a Democrat. The truth will set you free -- and it's an honor to represent you on the "Freedom Side" of the wall. I've been in their camp. As a former Democrat and as a mom raising four kids in Manhattan. I know how much they are getting wrong. The George Soros elected, Pro-Criminal, Trump-Deranged DEI hire that has turned my beloved New York City into a third-world Hellscape. A mob of Illegal criminals caught on video assaulting two New York City Law Enforcement officers outside a "Migrant Shelter," all released without bail by Alvin Bragg! Instead of working for the last 4 years to make the Citizens of New York safe and secure, Alvin has been on a singular, sick, twisted mission and one mission only -- TAKE DOWN DONALD TRUMP. That's what he ran on... Those were his marching orders from George Soros and his Radical donors... And those are orders he dutifully followed -- at the expense of not only those of us who live in New York, but every single American that deserved to vote in a fair election not tainted by a ridiculous set of trumped-up charges made up out of thin air. New Yorkers deserve better... Americans deserve better. We were told to mask in the house and give my son meals in his room for 10 days. Instead, we cuddled up & watched TV together -- unmasked in the living room and ate our meals as a family at the dinner table. That was a watershed moment for me. What were we doing? When did the United States of America turn into a place where the Government told us how to live? clean_body: | | | I have some good news and bad news for you. Thanks to the support of conservatives like you, we hit our mid-month fundraising goal. Supporters from across the Nation donated their hard earned dollars to support our fight to keep North Carolina RED and hold onto our America First Senate Majority. However, there is some bad news. In 2020, Democrats spent $84,859,944 to try and take back North Carolina and are already devising plans to spend even more in 2026. This means we have a lot of ground to make up. With Democrats in charge, Americans will face higher taxes, woke DEI policies, open borders, and yet another impeachment attempt of President Trump. That is why we need to keep our foot on the gas. Thank you, Abby (Team Tillis) | | Paid for by the Thom Tillis Committee Copyright © 2025 Thom Tillis Committee, All rights reserved.You are receiving this email because you support Thom Tillis Committee. . | | | |

name: TN House Democratic Caucus
subject: Tennessee and our democracy are under attack
body:
They limited voting rights. They gerrymandered districts. They’re afraid of your voice.
| | | | Can't see this email? [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JY77C2SHRWHJBF9NA4CAKJCQ_0)
---
| | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JY77C2SHRWHJBF9NA4CAKJCQ_1)
---
| | | | Dear Peter, What happened in our state government wasn’t just an overreach — it was an assault on democracy. Republicans limited voting rights. They drew rigged maps to silence your vote. They criminalized voter registration. They banned books. They restricted peaceful assembly. Let’s be clear: this isn’t just about partisanship — it’s about power. They’re abusing it, because they know they’re losing it. Tennessee Democrats are fighting back. We're: 🔵 Challenging unlawful bills in the courts;
🔵 Fighting for voting rights and your voice; and,
🔵 Electing leaders who speak truth and stand up for every family. Fighting back costs money — and we need grassroots donors like you to help us protect our democracy. If you believe in a Tennessee where every voice matters and every vote counts, **[donate now.](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JY77C2SHRWHJBF9NA4CAKJCQ_2)**
---
| | [ Defend Democracy ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JY77C2SHRWHJBF9NA4CAKJCQ_3)
---
| For the people, Tennessee Democratic House Caucus

SAY NO TO KING TRUMP ❌

Join our fight to stop KING TRUMP by adding your signature NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/nokingsact?source=VPP_20250620_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=20272%2E878179%2EJq7M4D) | [10,000 SIGNATURE GOAL: DEMAND CONGRESS PASS THE NO KINGS ACT IMMEDIATELY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/nokingsact?source=VPP_20250620_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=20272%2E878179%2EJq7M4D)
---
Donald Trump is threatening to ARREST Gov. Gavin Newsom...
He threw himself a $45 million military parade...
_He even said he “doesn’t know” if he should uphold the Constitution..._

**But if there’s anything last week's protests proved, it’s that we can make a REAL DIFFERENCE when we stand together.**

[**10,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED TODAY: Demand Congress pass the “No Kings Act” IMMEDIATELY to put a MASSIVE check on tyrant Trump’s power and SAVE our fragile democracy! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/nokingsact?source=VPP_20250620_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=20272%2E878179%2EJq7M4D)

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20272%2E878179%2EJq7M4D). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20272%2E878179%2EJq7M4D).**

subject: Re: Take action: tell legislators to pass SB 1153 and protect our rivers!
body:
Hi Peter,
I’m following up on my email about SB 1153 [https://olis.oregonlegislature.gov/liz/2025R1/Measures/Overview/SB1153] to give you an update: SB 1153 has still not been sent to Ways and Means, meaning that it is stuck in the legislature and needs help moving forward. We need your help to protect Oregon’s streams and rivers and get this bill moving. Will you reach out to your legislator today? [https://secure.everyaction.com/IWpYjDKzqkqpGNsvolITYA2]
Take action [https://secure.everyaction.com/IWpYjDKzqkqpGNsvolITYA2?contactdata=uP/IcCsoSxeJoIzCqAAjNVsNjQMBYAubvdPSBd+MWa7CBGaVJsUH9ToDjUTZHMgOzgqogf2BGNCGHVKXuK3l0IzMJttJW9eSQIZonKVs6in3Bj4AOSqbRO8/whM/EAFw]
Together,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Eliza.png]
Eliza Walton (she/they)
OLCV Coalition Director
P.S.: OLCV’s spring membership drive is going on now, click here [https://secure.everyaction.com/TDc4a2r_QEugjeZtF01ipw2] to renew your membership and support important legislation, like SB 1153, getting across the finish line!
https://secure.everyaction.com/IWpYjDKzqkqpGNsvolITYA2?contactdata=uP/IcCsoSxeJoIzCqAAjNVsNjQMBYAubvdPSBd+MWa7CBGaVJsUH9ToDjUTZHMgOzgqogf2BGNCGHVKXuK3l0IzMJttJW9eSQIZonKVs6in3Bj4AOSqbRO8/whM/EAFw [https://secure.everyaction.com/IWpYjDKzqkqpGNsvolITYA2?contactdata=uP/IcCsoSxeJoIzCqAAjNVsNjQMBYAubvdPSBd+MWa7CBGaVJsUH9ToDjUTZHMgOzgqogf2BGNCGHVKXuK3l0IzMJttJW9eSQIZonKVs6in3Bj4AOSqbRO8/whM/EAFw]
Dear Peter,
Clean water, strong rivers, and healthy fish and wildlife are part of Oregon’s identity — yet many of our state’s outdated water laws are at odds with those values. Right now, with SB 1153 [https://olis.oregonlegislature.gov/liz/2025R1/Measures/Overview/SB1153] , we have a chance to protect the public benefits our rivers provide: by tightening a dangerous loophole that currently allows the Oregon Water Resources Department to approve water right changes even if they hurt our streams. Will you send your legislators a message to pass SB 1153? [https://secure.everyaction.com/IWpYjDKzqkqpGNsvolITYA2]
Right now, the state can approve applications to change existing water rights without any consideration of environmental harm. In other words, owners of water rights can modify how water is used without considering impacts to fish, wildlife, water quality, and recreation.
Many of our streams are at risk of running dry, so reforms are critical for our shared water future.
That’s why we need your help now to pass SB 1153 [https://secure.everyaction.com/IWpYjDKzqkqpGNsvolITYA2] , which would require the Oregon Water Resources Department to consider potential streamflow impacts as part of its existing process for reviewing proposed water right changes (called “ transfers [https://oregonwaterpartnership.org/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/OWP-Fact-Sheet-Transfers.pdf] ”).
Take action [https://secure.everyaction.com/IWpYjDKzqkqpGNsvolITYA2?contactdata=uP/IcCsoSxeJoIzCqAAjNVsNjQMBYAubvdPSBd+MWa7CBGaVJsUH9ToDjUTZHMgOzgqogf2BGNCGHVKXuK3l0IzMJttJW9eSQIZonKVs6in3Bj4AOSqbRO8/whM/EAFw]
There have been recent amendments made to SB 1153 that reflect months of hard-fought negotiations and narrow the bill to focus on non-municipal water changes with the highest risk of harm — moving streamflow diversions further upstream, and moving groundwater wells within 1⁄4 mile of a stream. SB 1153 just made it out of committee and will now be moving through the Senate and House for votes in the weeks ahead, so it needs your help now. Please take a moment to tell your legislators that you support this commonsense bill, and they should too! [https://secure.everyaction.com/IWpYjDKzqkqpGNsvolITYA2]
Take action [https://secure.everyaction.com/IWpYjDKzqkqpGNsvolITYA2?contactdata=uP/IcCsoSxeJoIzCqAAjNVsNjQMBYAubvdPSBd+MWa7CBGaVJsUH9ToDjUTZHMgOzgqogf2BGNCGHVKXuK3l0IzMJttJW9eSQIZonKVs6in3Bj4AOSqbRO8/whM/EAFw]
Thank you for your support,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Eliza.png]
Eliza Walton (she/they)
OLCV Coalition Director
https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv [https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv] https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org [https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org] https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F [https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F] https://x.com/OLCV [https://x.com/OLCV]

Oregon League of Conservation Voters
1110 SE Alder Suite 220
Portland, OR 97214
United States

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Will you sign on to demand Congress take action on gun violence?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I’m asking you to raise your voice and demand Congress take action to keep our communities safe.
#
Every day, too many families in Delaware and across the country wake up to an empty seat at the table. This Gun Violence Awareness Month, I’m thinking of the lives stolen, the futures lost, and the far-too-familiar heartbreak so many families know.
**But I’m also thinking of what’s possible when we act.**
In the Delaware State Senate, I helped pass one of the most significant gun safety packages in our state’s history, banning assault weapons and strengthening background checks. Taking on the NRA wasn’t easy, but it was worth it.
Now Congress needs to act to do the same thing on a national scale — and I’m counting on your support to get it done.
[**Will you add your name to my petition demanding Congress pass stronger gun safety laws to keep our communities safe?**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/em-gun-safety/?source=em20250620-2109&akid=2109%2E21716%2EplzwoQ)
**[Add your name »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/em-gun-safety/?source=em20250620-2109&akid=2109%2E21716%2EplzwoQ)**
Despite what the NRA wants you to believe, the truth is that the overwhelming majority of Americans, including gun owners, support common-sense reforms. But a handful of extremists in Congress are standing in the way.
They want us to believe this crisis is too big, too complicated, and too entrenched to fix. But I don’t buy that — and I know you don’t either.
[**Help me send a clear message to my colleagues in Congress: It’s time to put people over gun lobby profits and take action to end this crisis.**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/em-gun-safety/?source=em20250620-%7B%7Bmailing_id}&akid=2109%2E21716%2EplzwoQ)
In solidarity,
Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250620-1&t=1&refcode2=2109_21716_plzwoQ&akid=2109%2E21716%2EplzwoQ)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=2109%2E21716%2EplzwoQ)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=2109%2E21716%2EplzwoQ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2109%2E21716%2EplzwoQ)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

name: Royce White
subject: Help me get Trump’s help
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
This is the ONLY WAY to stop the Radical Left's takeover
| [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=440397d3fa2c4275bec788d4d4fc253c&_e=6IHQopepUWVpWoYr7eYV1WCnsu49Mpz7fKqv769c1EhyLFpcJk_GChDSOZ2qInNIZS7sbOvhcEykVrZjWxuEXr3xDHVGs4Zr5g_53bUu82mcCzn5q3f0jmdHI48jZ5R2yvar-i96VPecP4tSs0fg3izrh0SdTpItE-G19YVEgXkE-bFYliTkmKRX-7hqV4pNpqiKmpPj2wHW94vK4DpbchpZadracJt0j2UjVz5m-HcjaKp_hfs_g19kAlGhRCEQhh2FLFFqwrLZGOv_iScSETh9FCRg1yxNxkgN6eK9zAR0xNvKCL0kaskp_AzcTc1O1iDNBBgztuBSEdc0qA9xZ2mtkhyCtnEGPDTk_eH9-HINt1F2LrQDzlQe_rBnmGoZ12fhvNIYrWqDUUGyKYk-c40t9JtvdB2CH7cN5LpcGG6vpgtl87VutPTvypdl1Iwu2wpn4hwxco7wJWyil_98aGT-BX5m6WVb5H8QSyD9SmJkli3u9yPHrNLmiQGqr04aCxh6hgXnW0aqvOWgJ39EbU920je-7PKDiOl4hiDl6gdugYd98PyBjBDSTKp6OrMB)
---

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA 's collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation - not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read "Free The Uyghurs." After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

body:
Folks - it's John Kennedy.[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=067cd904792d44899b15b1f84a678ab9&_e=5o00cFydpvy-Y2myjFLJo89ibKWzrctQDFqQS7dyQbPM265QAksTwvIz8tWP5ioQWHG1vaaapyh3Uzi0EC79157-Eq0SXPb1zngfhkA8jDZwazChQybZ90KsPM0OyL7X1rMg0iOHIoru2TlKOkhMZma5FR4PFf1iVPO88NkkujMOe2UG6oFgFzbl6g7wk1u8IkWHCxJroYRAe5r2YGE1PAtYC5qDzv_i0b0qdBdjcsaozYUkfh5CBKLcFGHE3-B5NYlzNzewrG3-HT0jDvP2s3zfKJt4WEKqANSLzycN_vsoXB7uPOAB4AH2ogBa9leimGZc7t-LWoYQ-DhApXlksjLe8IhhtztF6JfI7ZG6qG8OB4U2LUdHwzyyYQbMGV5wRUUXWPuPljeXE-xNFd4wR7B-9t0OgQuxRhrdrLkTY15E_ZFHHOybERYUeY8q2vMzv_ErVoqLjpFXvFBuMaqM6oFWVKTlz4ADoEtt3GC6yyT9qHsTjujnzMRcQj1Gzf-KEfcvKRO_OtvmEmloTAJj2iR1YNpRYGxqZzixQuIgz4sZWBEBZ-zp0J6AmtVnpXQskUSH4ADHfM97ixsIA55UOsVbb7HWBeX1QYqAXekThP5Z4xaelJxdxD4al4HLyLXit2OByrY3vHLDXIHFAg9tL7AR7pVal8gv_HE6dRFxjrc%3D)I'm told my reputation precedes me.
I hope that's a good thing.
I try not to sound like some stuffy politician - I like talking in plain English and speaking from the heart.
So believe me when I say that I'm deeply concerned right now.
My friend, Steve Scalise, just informed me that the top House Democrat Super PAC is already unloading $50,000,000.000 (and no, this ain't a typo) into key battleground districts. They're hitting us harder and earlier than ever before.
That's enough cash to completely overwhelm DOZENS of our most vulnerable Conservatives!
_And to make matters even worse, my buddies in the House have a HUGE deadline coming up, and I just got word they 're falling 15-20% behind their goal.__

name: Forward Party
subject: Forward Thinking - Education Reform?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Education of our kids is among the most important things we can do - how should it be changed if at all?

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=education_follow_up&n=1)
---
| Peter -- It's time for the newest installment of **Forward**** _Thinking_**(previously known as Control What You Can - but it's time to look to the future)_._ After a few weeks of diving into the US's fiscal situation, we're pivoting to a new topic: Education. Educating our children is among the most important tasks for society. Teaching them the skills they need to be successful and happy is no easy feat, and over the past decades, we have built a public education system to ensure Americans are ready for the workforce. Today, we're asking you the first in a series of questions about our education system and where we should focus efforts for improvement. New for this week are links to this poll on other social media sites. We listened to the many of you who no longer engage on X, and we'll aggregate responses across all platforms (and we'll take a screencap of the results from the place with the largest number of responses). clean_body: Education of our kids is among the most important things we can do - how should it be changed if at all? | | | Peter -- It's time for the newest installment of Forward Thinking(previously known as Control What You Can - but it's time to look to the future). After a few weeks of diving into the US's fiscal situation, we're pivoting to a new topic: Education. Educating our children is among the most important tasks for society. Teaching them the skills they need to be successful and happy is no easy feat, and over the past decades, we have built a public education system to ensure Americans are ready for the workforce. Today, we're asking you the first in a series of questions about our education system and where we should focus efforts for improvement. New for this week are links to this poll on other social media sites. We listened to the many of you who no longer engage on X, and we'll aggregate responses across all platforms (and we'll take a screencap of the results from the place with the largest number of responses). Please find the polls below on whichever social media you like best and let us know your thoughts! Answer on: | | | you've answered the poll, please leave a comment and tell us why you selected the answer you did. What would you change? How would you fix it? What does the world look like with your solution in place? Are there any interesting articles on the topic you want to share with other Forwardists? We want to hear from you! subject: Know when to “shut up and color”

body:
My 40 years in the Army National Guard taught me to run toward tough problems and solve them head-on. |
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5f95b021f69545d9952645539618cf3f&_e=UtPK4EY0WcoMUpEf3bS30AdqS9snL6Y2mH0FUQITMB1m97QQao8lR5x6O1xJ9ATHrj6TN_dGmWYrk070uhlMKfhDNZplg-QlHIi7o_S1n02hcsMTbbfiW7oU5ggy-yXMLg8pBZ6TQb6SvRQZ7-cQXfOhXk7_1ZeI3BUQ2-bJbYB07Cn1L1JXEvO1_9QY4DySHtrJjapLHOYKTqxj9VH6dhqui0Ji7TVC-hCDbmLBB6O3lmBY77edTUVxmXWgNApQ_DWKztTyZT71pswO4SDiMqguq4qVbWQuPY5RfKJQ7CBXqD_RNjYGj9kggoXLeCHjzdd_zqCXbJFXs5F4D8BXlVrM3OYa2e6zQE8xMcXceMA84LDB3leT7fYLiOOWpreDYt6THGLxNdhzydIj3IvIzkKAbOW4kQwpRBqZ4jfaPaUqUvXL_IiX0F0lscT4pmz-72EvRF-cQ-bxX8L-Kwv7jZ1wQBCe2VCDnjds9GqNfJy-oRiHkhVI18vZLGIBGCgReZRo893BopRGUkCQpVi-qHJT63HzIoJWDLqkohLYh-vQAfH72XHFySrDenO9iz573A4OszsA1ywkz8C1U1SZxKO0JM2nCmnrB4rYLjJLl33-1bAwKQEVoUdpElGucRYZit5tl4cLLwtTMitZb9MDPfhxVQzKXNI319MRj1MtVKA5ZLfbHHD-1W8mgarqm5gupZ0hhxauoXASPLJmnJq0a3fwElCCaQjizUrXKrmAVUCM9S1-6ERBaYGdWBvTfwyFwLGgurhDKgfcF7ypJ-Qjwg%3D%3D)

---
_**"Shut up and color."**_

That’s what my drill sergeant used to say, Peter. To get things done, you have to work hard and earn it. **In other words, you have to know when it’s time to shut up and color.**

I’ve carried that with me ever since, from spending four decades in the Army National Guard to serving as a police chief. I don’t owe my success to generational wealth or being well-connected. I owe it to hard work.

_**Only in America could a kid born and raised in Mexico come here at age 17, learn English, and enlist as a private and retire as a two-star major general.**_

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5f95b021f69545d9952645539618cf3f&_e=UtPK4EY0WcoMUpEf3bS30AdqS9snL6Y2mH0FUQITMB1m97QQao8lR5x6O1xJ9ATHrj6TN_dGmWYrk070uhlMKfhDNZplg-QlHIi7o_S1n02hcsMTbbfiW7oU5ggy-yXMLg8pBZ6TQb6SvRQZ7-cQXfOhXk7_1ZeI3BUQ2-bJbYB07Cn1L1JXEvO1_9QY4DySHtrJjapLHOYKTqxj9VH6dhqui0Ji7TVC-hCDbmLBB6O3lmBY77edTUVxmXWgNApQ_DWKztTyZT71pswO4SDiMjz8ikq5QIw02KzUAhq4_CXJ5Oddo4EeIhmzz6TRgzWPReii6_krCXajhhBlMpZb6sbopzu3GCjVk18ntyp6WtNFvRRhTTvBh4wqwaDdbitQklT81HBXu4Zndw9zSUcrCuZxhvOaHSdsOebk-MNC-C1Cst8c06P6OVSjAXEFw5mo43gm9e5qcr2DbHQpH66bPC9cjaFbZlk8MPAVuzcsTRAsXGF-TUwDOQwRvgNHRO5eCgQgR_3UPmnJhmxx2uGKA91nsQufOBkZyC65Gxnh4ZvBjuCdNWg-eR5O_cxOt0J94OAS_8hsvsIYGNCIBg0W0vldUkK24YtYxwp_o6ryTkCkWu1GDe79LyH_X38DzQ3mhl828_E6BNcW5dYJAxuPfDTRc-fy9PqimFdiMKxecUygSolUmF0HHJBhgeqJLhinFKB2If7sIPL9EP033J0ebFZzPeb7xvWhbzDJWTdIR-_ABSo6vZacFpNVeKUN18gHBVIQm93ZqvR7lQnX5zSjOw%3D%3D)
I can’t wait to put my resume up against Jon Ossoff. He’s a left-wing filmmaker and privileged elitist with no accomplishments to speak of.

_He's been an AWOL senator. All he does is vote however the liberals want, and that’s why he’s already raised $11 MILLION from far-left donors to defeat me._

Since I got into this Senate race, I’ve followed my drill sergeant’s advice, Peter. We’re earning support and gaining in the polls. I’m already within the margin of error against Ossoff.

But truth is, Ossoff is the best Democrat fundraiser in the country. [**To keep it up, I need all the reinforcements I can get.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5f95b021f69545d9952645539618cf3f&_e=UtPK4EY0WcoMUpEf3bS30AdqS9snL6Y2mH0FUQITMB1m97QQao8lR5x6O1xJ9ATHrj6TN_dGmWYrk070uhlMKfhDNZplg-QlHIi7o_S1n02hcsMTbbfiW7oU5ggy-yXMLg8pBZ6TQb6SvRQZ7-cQXfOhXk7_1ZeI3BUQ2-bJbYB07Cn1L1JXEvO1_9QY4DySHtrJjapLHOYKTqxj9VH6dhqui0Ji7TVC-hCDbmLBB6O3lmBY77edTUVxmXWgNApQ_DWKztTyZT71pswO4SDiMlVsoOK0m-9GuXVry3FCFrbiUWRNoXALTToGKHX1UhG4WrIcDm_lt54ya1di4GUnDLVxwTDjgCoraZXnzRrDjDN2Kfad1PGDQjBj2Qjbi9C1s4K1-IRKiFyIZr9ua0ES3hUG-wWWukxkJhODh5W-MhURLqwzyQOjZeRXodGYJBvoB0n6PYuPOZRQv07S2B4Ubn1wEBE8wlkG3mlyqEvINUyb0T24Y7Be06jg4cFg0EfRhG1ml1df55rePO5a4XHPJdqYa34pHexQo6nFP-AqZuzdNrwjMvLnovK_1FvX294KdAanaXn92n6jjdcb5EUM1bY7a8nP2EOnJ8L9dXoUufAGtte8PObwQ5J4MKjXLj0DjhhcoVkQHcZF0zUK_BmBwmAZLSHeHHgHOseRGf4sl-qfs-I-_w71PC0GzxIAUQykTStu-Qh4ywj43Nz3sluvYAD2nGFuJJwZGEnwjRrIxIopVcut9TWeAvdqJCmrdlEBn2vyZmjcNdiXC7EYHgqK8w%3D%3D)

[**PITCH IN »**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5f95b021f69545d9952645539618cf3f&_e=UtPK4EY0WcoMUpEf3bS30AdqS9snL6Y2mH0FUQITMB1m97QQao8lR5x6O1xJ9ATHrj6TN_dGmWYrk070uhlMKfhDNZplg-QlHIi7o_S1n02hcsMTbbfiW7oU5ggy-yXMLg8pBZ6TQb6SvRQZ7-cQXfOhXk7_1ZeI3BUQ2-bJbYB07Cn1L1JXEvO1_9QY4DySHtrJjapLHOYKTqxj9VH6dhqui0Ji7TVC-hCDbmLBB6O3lmBY77edTUVxmXWgNApQ_DWKztTyZT71pswO4SDiMoFA4K1x5KsGO3QbZ44L9E1jylFL_hLd8exChzLYEO3aVSQn_rhg4z6RkWXsbM5oo5knN75bsSJHBGnxUqNQYJJRL-zUJzYsIcPfdVhYXtg7xebu5zkwsW5Bz0EShZl5UUyQfiLknH_jcya85s_5SLNReyXkGGlg4zjDbRx7lwYISZBxbKGGmTHN1V9A50iq7omtTH9VCOca5uMzHKUXLnAX1tixu8jYUzO-SHZuNBH1FLeupC7GsBbCFwbvvvdcosoZtYvtCntpZNNf-A9suJyIripkmZ1IS7-hq0GJUv1Q6C-CURV6UuDA1J599dgEqfhMrFksIxExhAQW5X5oaXwmRS0vKWyUHwcu38JrMOo2quSPU2lkgPNott2YeqBASjGlu8DDX7ITdCwCtU3Xx7Z_WQMZb3eqiS8xptV0dzqEP7-rHLKHQ81bsuVK5SXldcMhEbgiQpwkCkzIukWUakEO7o_KtD2-uc6-JzYFDXPtMUE5g6JfqKNjaEAi_OMJzg%3D%3D)
**I’ve been shot and stabbed in the line of duty, and I survived four IED explosions in Iraq.**

Running against Jon Ossoff doesn’t scare me. Giving him six more years in the Senate does.

The only way to stop that from happening is for us to raise as much as we can now, so we have the resources to expose just how AWOL Jon Ossoff has been.

[**Will you join the mission and help me win the #1 Senate race in the country?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5f95b021f69545d9952645539618cf3f&_e=UtPK4EY0WcoMUpEf3bS30AdqS9snL6Y2mH0FUQITMB1m97QQao8lR5x6O1xJ9ATHrj6TN_dGmWYrk070uhlMKfhDNZplg-QlHIi7o_S1n02hcsMTbbfiW7oU5ggy-yXMLg8pBZ6TQb6SvRQZ7-cQXfOhXk7_1ZeI3BUQ2-bJbYB07Cn1L1JXEvO1_9QY4DySHtrJjapLHOYKTqxj9VH6dhqui0Ji7TVC-hCDbmLBB6O3lmBY77edTUVxmXWgNApQ_DWKztTyZT71pswO4SDiMhcbE_4hG25xjsQTukemI93PGaR0zm7SfpeqqlpyFvL3mZgRdpYQ5tPBhAVyvU3y0KsZIdsHK9W4R7Riu9RG3zJmIx2ckwzUqjdDZnqRfC_FGlHEQrVol8QdYOWKKEJF7m6BtbRT0bompItODo1L5p4NLoNvvt7k3FgKavNFUOWN6s8PsROfGDtPksXzbW-tNTLoSBJI_7Iop-jm4F5pvk8Jld29oWKbXQCpW_LQZERSVT595Jp3M8GF8h2HpP5EQYGBy0DXEVuoU1iYqWUeZAdqL27kq5RfHNJ6Do5EmTAMl8uqhK0se8_0qneMqOjoycMkEV6sl-7u1UsvwyzqNZ89Fp9aaAaUMbHoaavYAW0CylowAfpuompaxUJowO1arh-wD4gwRydTKrGUMJT8YIHAmncLsFxSBM8SOfl1cnV4wZtFzH3SHbGdnlK29DTEkC5a-r38L922p_dp4zoce0VT2Jl6kBUrRjWRz5WIGdz0XfRBqaTgL5yitlvWfJeXMQ%3D%3D)

That way we have a senator who knows when it’s time to shut up and color, and put America First.

Thank you,

clean_body: My 40 years in the Army National Guard taught me to run toward tough problems and solve them head-on. | "Shut up and color." That’s what my drill sergeant used to say, Peter. To get things done, you have to work hard and earn it. In other words, you have to know when it’s time to shut up and color. I’ve carried that with me ever since, from spending four decades in the Army National Guard to serving as a police chief. I don’t owe my success to generational wealth or being well-connected. I owe it to hard work. Only in America could a kid born and raised in Mexico come here at age 17, learn English, and enlist as a private and retire as a two-star major general. I can’t wait to put my resume up against Jon Ossoff. He’s a left-wing filmmaker and privileged elitist with no accomplishments to speak of. He's been an AWOL senator. All he does is vote however the liberals want, and that’s why he’s already raised $11 MILLION from far-left donors to defeat me. Since I got into this Senate race, I’ve followed my drill sergeant’s advice, Peter. We’re earning support and gaining in the polls. I’m already within the margin of error against Ossoff. But truth is, Ossoff is the best Democrat fundraiser in the country. I’ve been shot and stabbed in the line of duty, and I survived four IED explosions in Iraq. Running against Jon Ossoff doesn’t scare me. Giving him six more years in the Senate does. The only way to stop that from happening is for us to raise as much as we can now, so we have the resources to expose just how AWOL Jon Ossoff has been. That way we have a senator who knows when it’s time to shut up and color, and put America First. Thank you, Maj. Gen. John King (retd.) | General John King is a soldier, lawman, and the first Hispanic elected statewide in Georgia history. He’s running for the Senate now because Georgians need a leader who will fight for them, fight for President Trump’s agenda, and put America First. | | | Paid For By John King For Senate Inc. name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: He was speechless

body:
I didn’t risk my life across 70 countries to come home and be told the truth no longer matters. | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a384600184994e1db9d3d9fbbd9bc56d&_e=27bG9RPY1le6BY_DBNM2FwXrnDD7bO2qr83xdgQlU6RjKiUzDZoZ05RzlJOm_j_8hCX8wm7R4swB03Ylnwsk8iP64RtUic22jVoqs6_TMLBpszjJAwMU1XL1B_P6grTmM1MWDq7UFJraoTFlBWJMPrtpfw0O32HC63SZlZgktMuynoyjwihlJ3pFaWR4y1YRBwoXza0XD0bQ5EEI8IQ12vOd1zSxEuLbqzMSP_DgsMO3-Zj6Ap2G1RHa1zIQ4zIRKvv9UscUK7Rc656BSXU9Klg7HoFdDgsfjjhxtGT5tuJ-E6fCAUMfmR7Xj67OLASAluoALILVIFYM2qH40tFCygWhzdXaGexXKBAPLhUx0iO4vlwGvRHXWpLIgQGn7arOxfS_ucsVPr-4E_PcAo90XSZ4qAFxlG5x1wnbNHsafZ-AlDR3jBEn4Le91THJD74Ws-Q_rB55EX8FscmS17Q_epExP_iaZBZS6TfA78yc4GFpwMc9rqoTAqvnJnGSot1Y2W0I99YGV4pDf3BZX0FnvUCfQumWjhm5aJ-iDw0tD2lgN92P0d_IwiR7XfZT19D_FkfVtZAvSUsVoEmgF5rrsBCwLGvkxb11U9FA9_lWFW6B7zsdSm4CJlVB-_Dr1-CcJ1-pCIuOjDdPTqm8QnUqqxEn1S_k_JQ0K75-xkf3ajOGPkSQ-2ZOMq6-x5vZdmNiWUdfvAAw3QUD9JbDI4Svgg1wVEpIW7rsVzv6d0af-pyJsaQHo8DcJXKaChfuJbJ5)

Peter,

Figuring out where to start writing this email has been tough because the content of the copy you’re about to read is, quite honestly, absurd.

I’ve spent most of my adult life in some of the world’s most dangerous places. **I’ve seen what happens when governments collapse, the truth is suppressed, and strong men choose silence instead of standing up. But I never thought I’d see it here, not in America.**

And yet last week, sitting in a congressional hearing, Minnesota Governor Tim Walz was asked a straightforward question:

_**“Can you define what a woman is?”**_

_**He couldn’t.**_
_**He wouldn’t.**_

He dodged. He deflected. And then he sat in silence.

Let me be clear — this wasn’t a trick. This wasn’t a “gotcha” question. This was the easiest test a leader can face: tell the truth, or bow to the mob.
**
Governor Walz chose the mob.**

That moment — that silence — wasn’t just embarrassing. It was dangerous.

Because when leaders abandon truth to protect their politics, it’s the people who suffer. And right now, our daughters, wives, sisters, and grandmothers are being erased in real time—not just from locker rooms and playing fields but from language itself.

My name is Adam Schwarze.

**I’m a proud Minnesotan and a retired Navy SEAL.** I joined the Marine Corps after 9/11 and served in special operations, deploying 13 times to over 70 countries.

_**I didn’t just fight for this country — I bled for it.**_

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a384600184994e1db9d3d9fbbd9bc56d&_e=27bG9RPY1le6BY_DBNM2FwXrnDD7bO2qr83xdgQlU6RjKiUzDZoZ05RzlJOm_j_8O44tJRxaicdDJhffWFnEATb2Dkg_uFzRhuSj17Z9dn7RYIRC8TRtzRbzMX1vElTYsp2JkvIeMbnJ8VlcQ9XUkZ0nNk7fSuXtyb6pt6C5KUG6T_NYg-NSzuLkuJRMvEUOmTnOsTOjXhKetGZDLVlkjdu_TbnXDejyJShZ7akVN9p3ZDi_2kGOvBpJfQOVuPpoelxMPIMcA5fCljh7mxG0kA7d5u7H15hogBxxwiI5HbZ-N3k4osmRyykoQxE6yl_wZ65gV3I-28PwDxhA0G9FZCKFiNA96BWwxuRjRttSmmd9Aod1r9K2E9RlgPU_cPpjIFX7eYToBFDCm5SEKI451HJJsQq4dJ_-YewRbitelzUZcr2lAOHRDomssjVhP8QgbaTTlfHHRlVUCDe90UJg9xKx2SpGPGPHUZc6uPjrUmqz5jR2u2ZUcKW-zN--1JTfkhQAxctvJJaj2RSYFH2736RuWuPwT77KAX6CBqhIR_XErcMHidMpIdLAM2KyfqyY9K15EpOL9-IShrFvbXIZfH_X8HtVXdkrGlaOQODCCvdAV43tjUEjTFHoqf8BnDDcC86CDNgfu3dyNgXP1MDI0EIl_qYFEmV0uAfnOywt7q0UKjtDSIofQKrWc9AKzHMvcT7Q47oqgeWchCIqA72hN4AZluxqCXV6Kaow-vayMcKO-3KHVfa2VJzUOhUjtOw5qWWJvtSjNQpn1R_x06HROeByyEGaqNdA6_q6WCNXjb0%3D)

And I never imagined I’d be running for public office. But something has changed. Something fundamental.

When a governor can’t say what a woman is...
When “men in women’s sports” becomes policy...
**When the truth becomes optional, and lies become virtue, that’s when I knew I had one more mission.**

I’m running for the United States Senate because I believe America is worth saving. But it’s going to take more than votes — it’s going to take backbone.

I’ve seen the cost of freedom. I’ve watched friends give everything so that future generations could live in a country built on truth. I won’t let their sacrifice be undone by a political class too cowardly to speak plainly.

That’s why I need your help today.

clean_body: I didn’t risk my life across 70 countries to come home and be told the truth no longer matters. | Peter, Figuring out where to start writing this email has been tough because the content of the copy you’re about to read is, quite honestly, absurd. I’ve spent most of my adult life in some of the world’s most dangerous places. I’ve seen what happens when governments collapse, the truth is suppressed, and strong men choose silence instead of standing up. But I never thought I’d see it here, not in America. And yet last week, sitting in a congressional hearing, Minnesota Governor Tim Walz was asked a straightforward question: “Can you define what a woman is?” He couldn’t. He wouldn’t. He dodged. He deflected. And then he sat in silence. Let me be clear — this wasn’t a trick. This wasn’t a “gotcha” question. This was the easiest test a leader can face: tell the truth, or bow to the mob. Governor Walz chose the mob. That moment — that silence — wasn’t just embarrassing. It was dangerous. Because when leaders abandon truth to protect their politics, it’s the people who suffer. And right now, our daughters, wives, sisters, and grandmothers are being erased in real time—not just from locker rooms and playing fields but from language itself. My name is Adam Schwarze. I’m a proud Minnesotan and a retired Navy SEAL. I joined the Marine Corps after 9/11 and served in special operations, deploying 13 times to over 70 countries. I didn’t just fight for this country — I bled for it. And I never imagined I’d be running for public office. But something has changed. Something fundamental. When a governor can’t say what a woman is... When “men in women’s sports” becomes policy... When the truth becomes optional, and lies become virtue, that’s when I knew I had one more mission. I’m running for the United States Senate because I believe America is worth saving. But it’s going to take more than votes — it’s going to take backbone. I’ve seen the cost of freedom. I’ve watched friends give everything so that future generations could live in a country built on truth. I won’t let their sacrifice be undone by a political class too cowardly to speak plainly. That’s why I need your help today. The Democratic Party isn’t just drifting — it’s sprinting toward something unrecognizable. First, they said men could use women’s bathrooms. Then they demanded that girls compete against biological males in school sports. Now, they claim they don’t even know what a woman is. And Governor Walz? He’s not a bystander. He’s a willing participant in this charade. His likely successor — my opponent — is even more radical. So if you’re like me — and Stand with me. Fight back. Let’s win this. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine.
