name: Brad Finstad
subject: I’ve seen this chaos before—and I won’t let it happen again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress
body:
| | | | |
---
| Dear Friend, The violent chaos that erupted in Los Angeles isn’t new to me. I’ve seen this show before and it started right here in Minnesota. Five years ago, after the death of George Floyd, protests turned into riots. What began as calls for justice quickly spiraled into lawlessness. Cities were set ablaze. Small businesses were destroyed. Families locked their doors in fear. I’ll never forget watching my home state descend into something that looked more like Caracas or Kabul than the country we love. Now it’s been happening again—this time in LA. Radical activists are rioting to protect illegal immigrants accused of rape, assault, child exploitation, and drug trafficking. They’re torching police cars and assaulting federal officers—all to stop ICE from enforcing the law. Sound familiar? It should. Because we’ve lived it. That’s why I’m fighting back. I introduced the Save SBA from Sanctuary Cities Act—a bill that says if a city wants to ignore federal law and harbor criminal illegal aliens, they shouldn’t get a dime of federal business support. The bill passed the House. That’s a huge win. But the fight isn’t over. The radical left is already mobilizing to block it in the Senate and smear anyone who dares stand up for law and order. I need your help. If we don’t hold the line now, what happened in Minneapolis in 2020—and what’s been happening in LA—will be tomorrow’s reality in every American city. 👉[Rush a donation now to help me fight for the rule of law.](https://Finsta11160a6bc.link.bmesend.com/api/LinkHandler/getaction2?%3d%3d) And stay connected with me online:
👉[Facebook](https://Finsta11160a6bc.link.bmesend.com/api/LinkHandler/getaction2?%3d%3d)
👉 [X/Twitter](https://Finsta11160a6bc.link.bmesend.com/api/LinkHandler/getaction2?%3d%3d) We’ve seen what happens when leadership fails. I won’t let that happen again—not here, not anywhere. For America, Brad Finstad
---

name: Koslow for Nassau
subject: Koslow Newsletter #1
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Koslow for Nassau
body:
Seth Koslow for Nassau County Exec

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/45288d42af6a/koslow-newsletter-1?e=d16fb2f63d)
---
[|
---](https://koslowfornassau.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=85a59214080f8affeb931e7fd&id=e6899124dd&e=d16fb2f63d)
| | | | | **Newsletter #1**

# Welcome to Team Koslow!

We are excited to bring you our first installment of our **Volunteer Newsletter** , your go to place**for updates on our campaign, volunteer opportunities, and other local events.** We are confident that this race is going to be a sprint to the finish.
Nassau residents are waking up to Bruce Blakeman’s weak and inefficient leadership. They’ve seen him on CNN and News12 proving that he only cares about photo ops and higher office.
But highlighting the flaws of our opponent is simply not enough.**Nassau County needs to get to know Seth Koslow** , not just as a candidate for County Executive, but as **a father, a coach, and a former prosecutor.** Seth has spent his life in Nassau County and knows what steps need to be taken to make this a community that people aren’t chased out of by rising costs or a broken tax system.
Legislator Seth Koslow has been making the rounds across the county, but **our campaign needs your help** spreading word of his candidacy and of his _**Five Point Plan for a Better Nassau:**_
---
[|
---](https://koslowfornassau.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=85a59214080f8affeb931e7fd&id=9f0934d134&e=d16fb2f63d)
| [CLICK HERE TO READ SETH’S FULL PLAN](https://koslowfornassau.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=85a59214080f8affeb931e7fd&id=26e6b4f503&e=d16fb2f63d)
---
|
---
| **How YOU Can Help!**
---
| | | | | | | | | | | These early months of the campaign mark a crucial first step. If we don't come out strong, we risk getting drowned out by the noise. We don’t have the million dollar war chest that Bruce Blakeman has. What we _do_ have is a belief that when hard-working people come together, we can build enough momentum to win this election.
Here’s how you can help:

1. **Donations:** Every dollar this campaign collects will help us get lawn signs, pamphlets, and mailers across Nassau County. Donate below today!

2. **Volunteers:** Whether it’s an hour a week or an entire weekend, your time makes a difference in getting the word out. Join us today on the campaign trail!

3. **Community: Please forward this email to 3 friends** or family members. Bring someone new to your local Democratic Club meeting. Help us grow the movement!

---
| [CLICK HERE TO DONATE](https://koslowfornassau.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=85a59214080f8affeb931e7fd&id=fe176fc58f&e=d16fb2f63d)
---
| [SIGN UP TO PHONEBANK WITH US!](https://koslowfornassau.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=85a59214080f8affeb931e7fd&id=3a8657f28f&e=d16fb2f63d)
---
|
---
| **Koslow Golf Outing!**
---
|
---
| **Support Seth’s campaign before the July 11th deadline** and have a great day **golfing at a lower rate!** And if you don’t golf, **you can still join** fellow supporters for **cocktails and dinner!**
---
| [RSVP TO OUR NEXT FUNDRAISER](https://koslowfornassau.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=85a59214080f8affeb931e7fd&id=35c052d1f4&e=d16fb2f63d)
---
|
---
| **Koslow in the Community!**
---
|
---
| Seth returned to Zion Cathedral Church of God in Christ alongside Bishop White and Hempstead Town Supervisor Candidate Joe Scianablo.
---
|
---
| On June 2nd, Seth was joined by Congressman Tom Suozzi and former County Executive Laura Curran at the City Cellar in Westbury for a Spring Gala Fundraiser. The trio spoke about the unique threats that would come from a second term for Bruce Blakeman.
---
|
---
| Seth also stopped by Hope Day in Mineola alongside Legislative District 9 candidate Juleigh Chin to support local businesses and hear from constituents about their concerns and ideas for the district’s future.
---
| [CLICK HERE TO VOLUNTEER WITH US!](https://koslowfornassau.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=85a59214080f8affeb931e7fd&id=7fefceebc8&e=d16fb2f63d)
---
|
---
| **Follow Us On Social Media!**
---
| | | | | [](https://koslowfornassau.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=85a59214080f8affeb931e7fd&id=032d16239b&e=d16fb2f63d)
---
[](https://koslowfornassau.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=85a59214080f8affeb931e7fd&id=2ac9725455&e=d16fb2f63d)
---
[](https://koslowfornassau.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=85a59214080f8affeb931e7fd&id=8cd9c32e62&e=d16fb2f63d)
---
| Follow our campaign on social media by clicking the buttons above. Stay up to date on where Seth is going and his plan for a better Nassau. Make sure to follow and share his post! An easy way to help spread the message!
---
|
---
| **First Campaign Ad:****Seth Koslow is Fighting for You!**
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://koslowfornassau.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=85a59214080f8affeb931e7fd&id=0825dc26aa&e=d16fb2f63d)
| | | | | | | | | | | [WATCH AND SHARE OUR FIRST CAMPAIGN AD](https://koslowfornassau.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=85a59214080f8affeb931e7fd&id=b600200e1e&e=d16fb2f63d)
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
We appreciate everybody who has volunteered or donated thus far, **we could not do this without each and every one of you!**
As we look forward to the summer, let us also look forward to building the foundation for **a campaign** that is**capable of changing Nassau County for the better.**
After all, it’s time that Nassau County earned the leadership it deserves.
WE DESERVE BETTER!
Best regards, Sara Castelli Campaign Manager

---
| | | | | | | [|
---](https://koslowfornassau.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=85a59214080f8affeb931e7fd&id=e0bf8b1198&e=d16fb2f63d)

name: House GOP
subject: LA is burning and cops needs our help.
body:
We need your support to get law enforcement more resources

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aEVr/?__vbtrk=Mjk3MzczOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk3MzczOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend, you’ve seen the footage from Los Angeles.
* Foreign flags flying in American streets

* Police under siege

* Businesses destroyed

* Mobs terrorizing communities while politicians look the other way

_**[This is what happens when a border crisis becomes a homeland crisis.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aEVr/?__vbtrk=Mjk3MzczOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk3MzczOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aEVr/?__vbtrk=Mjk3MzczOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk3MzczOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_Los Angeles under siege_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aEVr/?__vbtrk=Mjk3MzczOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk3MzczOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_Rioters waving foreign flags during the riots_
House Republicans are fighting back.
**The Big Beautiful Bill in Congress includes the greatest _increase of funding_ in our history for both _border security_ and _deportation efforts_.**
Police groups all over the country, like The Fraternal Order of Police, are calling for the Big Beautiful Bill to be passed because our nation's cops need help.
They know that this legislation will give them what they need.
Fellow patriot, we are fighting to take our country back, and the Big Beautiful Bill isn’t just the first step towards that goal. The BBB is the central piece of legislation to help **Make America Great Again**.
That’s why House Republicans are reaching out to you right now.
_**_[We desperately need as many patriotic Americans as possible to become citizen cosponsors of the Big Beautiful Bill right now to help us get it through Congress and onto President Trump’s desk](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aEVr/?__vbtrk=Mjk3MzczOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk3MzczOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_!**_
Law enforcement can’t Make America Safe Again without support.
They’ve been abandoned by the Left, defunded by radicals, and overwhelmed by our wide open borders for years.
This bill is how we fix it. _This is how we fight back!_
Now is an opportunity to show that you stand with our police officers, with our Border Patrol, with every American who believes in law and order.
If you agree with our mission then please sign the petition and help us get this bill over the line.

Let’s restore sanity. Let’s secure the border. Let’s get to work.
[SIGN + SUPPORT THE BIG BEAUTIFUL BILL](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aEVr/?__vbtrk=Mjk3MzczOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk3MzczOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
We are grateful for every patriot that takes a stand with us today.

Your support helps us continue to fight every day for an America First agenda in Congress and the public square.
_For America,_
**THE HOUSE GOP**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aEVr/?__vbtrk=Mjk3MzczOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk3MzczOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: I want to win big
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
Our race has become a beacon of hope, an opportunity to chart the path out of this dark chapter in our nation's history.

| Peter, I don't just want to win this November — **I want to win big.**

Because as Democrats, the bigger we win in Virginia in 2025, the louder a message we'll send about the 2026 midterms. Voters are furious about the chaos coming out of Washington, and our race has become a beacon of hope, an opportunity to chart the path out of this dark chapter in our nation's history.

_And can I be honest for a minute?_ That's a lot of weight on my shoulders.

But I'm ready to seize the moment. There is light at the end of the tunnel. We just have to keep going and win big in 2025 — so we can win big in 2026, and 2027, and 2028, and beyond.

[_**I can't do it without you! clean_body: Our race has become a beacon of hope, an opportunity to chart the path out of this dark chapter in our nation's history. | Peter, I don't just want to win this November — I want to win big. Because as Democrats, the bigger we win in Virginia in 2025, the louder a message we'll send about the 2026 midterms. Voters are furious about the chaos coming out of Washington, and our race has become a beacon of hope, an opportunity to chart the path out of this dark chapter in our nation's history. And can I be honest for a minute? That's a lot of weight on my shoulders. But I'm ready to seize the moment. There is light at the end of the tunnel. We just have to keep going and win big in 2025 — so we can win big in 2026, and 2027, and 2028, and beyond. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Abigail Spanberger = * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: It’s official: Mikie won the Democratic primary in New Jersey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
|
#
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109957202/552791328/-90546733?refcode=AU_JC_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20250620_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTdjN2Q3OC0wOTRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hxrtZcXHhVehGOVC7dHWLLNkje56hOmrNUSxuILZOEc=) Team, I am so honored to be the official Democratic nominee for governor here in New Jersey. Thank you to everyone who played a part in this victory. I wouldn’t be here without this incredible grassroots team who chipped in, volunteered, and voted. And we can’t stop now. We know what we are up against. The general election is underway — and if recent history is any indication, it’s going to be an expensive, hard-fought race decided by a razor-thin margin. **[Will you help us get off to a strong start against Trump’s handpicked Republican nominee by splitting $10 between my campaign and Jason Crow today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109957203/552791329/-90546733?amount=10&refcode=AU_JC_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20250620_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTdjN2Q3OC0wOTRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hxrtZcXHhVehGOVC7dHWLLNkje56hOmrNUSxuILZOEc=)** | | | [DONATE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109957204/552791330/-90546733?refcode=AU_JC_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20250620_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTdjN2Q3OC0wOTRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hxrtZcXHhVehGOVC7dHWLLNkje56hOmrNUSxuILZOEc=)

I was raised to believe that we have an obligation to our community and our country.
It’s why I took my first oath to the Constitution as a teenager when I entered the Naval Academy.
It’s why I spent nearly a decade in the Navy as a helicopter pilot and Russian policy officer.
It’s why I went to law school, and became an outreach and reentry coordinator and a federal prosecutor.
It’s why I first ran for office — flipping a Republican-held congressional seat here in New Jersey that no one thought we could win at the time.
And it’s why I’m running to serve as our next governor. It’s too hard to get ahead in New Jersey, and too often, our kids have fewer opportunities than we did. The system feels broken, and Donald Trump’s agenda is only making it worse. I can’t accept that — and as governor, I won’t.
**But the fact is, New Jersey is now a battleground state, and Trump is already campaigning for my opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, a career politician who has promised to pass an abortion ban, defund public schools, and bring DOGE to New Jersey. So, truthfully, we won’t win this race unless we have a strong grassroots team behind us right from the start.**
**[If you’re with me in this fight, I would be incredibly grateful if you could become a Founding Donor to our general election campaign by splitting a donation between my campaign and Jason Crow today →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109957205/552791331/-90546733?amount=&refcode=AU_JC_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20250620_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTdjN2Q3OC0wOTRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hxrtZcXHhVehGOVC7dHWLLNkje56hOmrNUSxuILZOEc=)**

clean_body: | = Team, I am so honored to be the official Democratic nominee for governor here in New Jersey. Thank you to everyone who played a part in this victory. I wouldn’t be here without this incredible grassroots team who chipped in, volunteered, and voted. And we can’t stop now. We know what we are up against. The general election is underway — and if recent history is any indication, it’s going to be an expensive, hard-fought race decided by a razor-thin margin. = | | | = I was raised to believe that we have an obligation to our community and our country. It’s why I took my first oath to the Constitution as a teenager when I entered the Naval Academy. It’s why I spent nearly a decade in the Navy as a helicopter pilot and Russian policy officer. It’s why I went to law school, and became an outreach and reentry coordinator and a federal prosecutor. It’s why I first ran for office — flipping a Republican-held congressional seat here in New Jersey that no one thought we could win at the time. And it’s why I’m running to serve as our next governor. It’s too hard to get ahead in New Jersey, and too often, our kids have fewer opportunities than we did. The system feels broken, and Donald Trump’s agenda is only making it worse. I can’t accept that — and as governor, I won’t. But the fact is, New Jersey is now a battleground state, and Trump is already campaigning for my opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, a career politician who has promised to pass an abortion ban, defund public schools, and bring DOGE to New Jersey. So, truthfully, we won’t win this race unless we have a strong grassroots team behind us right from the start. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you so much for your support, Mikie Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States | mailto:info@jasoncrowforcongress.com | Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

name: Richard Carlbom
subject: How do we move forward?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Minnesota Democratic–Farmer–Labor Party
body:
The assassination of Speaker Emerita Melissa and Mark Hortman, the shooting of Senator John and Yvette Hortman left us heartbroken, terrified, and left with an unfathomable loss. | | | ****
---
Peter, A week ago today we had a town hall with former VA Secretary Dennis McDonough, Senator Amy Klobuchar, and Representative Kelly Morrison. We heard powerful stories from veterans and took hard and complicated questions. Two hours later the thirteenth Humphrey Mondale dinner began. The reception filled quickly and by 6:15PM Senator Klobuchar started our speaking program before 1511 attendees. We celebrated labor, farmers, democracy defenders, public service, organizers, and my friend Mike 'Kenner" Kennedy. We raised money to "Fund the Field," which is our earliest and largest investment in organizing, ever. I got to personally thank Melissa and Mark Hortman for being with us, and her leadership, specifically. Hours later our world changed forever. The assassination of Speaker Emerita Melissa and Mark Hortman and the shooting of Senator John and Yvette Hoffman left us heartbroken, terrified, and left with an unfathomable loss. We are so thankful Senator Hoffman and Yvette are recovering. And we are deeply grateful to law enforcement for their actions that saved others. How do we move forward at this time? What do we do to support one another? Melissa Hortman was a workhorse, not a show horse. She built teams that won and delivered. She had a unique and outsized leadership presence that will be missed. And she prepared her team with confidence to do the work. So, we must do the work. We will lock arms and move forward together. We will door knock, listen to voters, and do our best to advocate for working families. We will also garden, bake, mountain bike, pet a dog, and do the work that seeks justice and peace. We will use the ballot box to settle our political differences and debate policy on the House floor. We will do our best to serve Minnesotans. We will love our neighbor. We will respect our differences. We will celebrate hard work and public service. LFG was her phrase. Now it's our call to action. Thank you, Richard Carlbom

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | Paid for by Minnesota Democratic–Farmer–Labor Party
---

Minnesota Democratic–Farmer–Labor Party
255 Plato Blvd
St. Paul, MN 55107
United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/zG8DACPocUah9MBCHeNnaQ2?unsubscribedata=Z8uvWdH9BZB0HG3W1kiC7eCqgur90kU6AvLdD7L794etucvaVAgQoup8bY0GXiOnyOjVKyaaM6VRiphqyxhPn5XYt4E1YS53F4TJYbdwKXnlbcfEG3w0sBxyTVGhmVPBSODCCiXgYLFIIbkIpXBEp2lEB8JAvLB8p5SMAWPVWRtAZM0iQGgsllntIjDVQll8JFe7AhCeDPVpYua5SH7P%2BYWNbcNeUlDh7wV8WCP3QKsGRtuTTbpONUuO5sqO5bKC%2FpxmbwGuAT8bES%2BDOoX6yoC%2FQMJ58YcfWMrhnQzNKA0Pgrg%2FLDWpy3Kis%2Bpx1tLerlNXxuyEmYKtBqYXCsFQBbMcSWTno8GKozvzokJCY%2FSg8cj14Y39jaJ5sdMOPTRFcQ0c%2FCKmeSGThHcmJn5%2B1q3yEQicbZDrg4iNkmHoxAlkcBZ5QLVNNSj8aG1qOT6E).

name: Scott Peters
subject: Millions of Americans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Peters for Congress
body:
---
| | Peter,

Did you know that Medicare and Medicaid cover nearly 1 in 3 Americans? These critical social safety nets have helped keep countless individuals and their families afloat for generations, including millions of seniors, pregnant women, and people with disabilities – and they are important resources we can’t afford to lose.

I’ve always stood against Republicans’ attempts to slash funding for these programs, but **the latest cuts from Trump and the GOP majorities in Congress are dangerously close to becoming reality. Millions of Americans are at risk of losing their health care coverage.**

[I’m calling on you to join me in fighting back now. Add your name here to prove that a majority of Americans do not support deep cuts to Medicare and Medicaid:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109958168/552794856/2133941958?refcode2=3d312bf4-0c4e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&refcode=SP_EM_PT_180DO_250620_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDMxMmJmNC0wYzRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pFOyR4Rm3BeCMRiAn7gct79QLhavaNSyYME5aQ82GiQ=&emci=8a20626d-0a4e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=3d312bf4-0c4e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=5258741)
| | [PROTECT HEALTH CARE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109958169/552794864/2133941958?refcode2=3d312bf4-0c4e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&refcode=SP_EM_PT_180DO_250620_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDMxMmJmNC0wYzRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pFOyR4Rm3BeCMRiAn7gct79QLhavaNSyYME5aQ82GiQ=&emci=8a20626d-0a4e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=3d312bf4-0c4e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=5258741)
---

The landscape of American health care changed forever nearly 60 years ago when President Johnson signed into law the Social Security Act amendment, which created Medicare and Medicaid. It’s hard to name another government program that has transformed more lives.

No one should have to choose between staying out of poverty and seeking the health care they need. Simply put: Medicare and Medicaid save lives and provide an invaluable peace of mind for so many.

[We must defend these lifeline programs and keep working to expand access to quality, affordable health care for Americans everywhere. Add your name here to stand with me:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109958173/552794874/2133941958?refcode2=3d312bf4-0c4e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&refcode=SP_EM_PT_180DO_250620_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDMxMmJmNC0wYzRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pFOyR4Rm3BeCMRiAn7gct79QLhavaNSyYME5aQ82GiQ=&emci=8a20626d-0a4e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=3d312bf4-0c4e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=5258741)
| [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109958176/552794880/2133941958?refcode2=3d312bf4-0c4e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&refcode=SP_EM_PT_180DO_250620_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDMxMmJmNC0wYzRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pFOyR4Rm3BeCMRiAn7gct79QLhavaNSyYME5aQ82GiQ=&emci=8a20626d-0a4e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=3d312bf4-0c4e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=5258741)

Scott

These critical social safety nets have helped keep countless individuals and their families afloat for generations, including millions of seniors, pregnant women, and people with disabilities – and they are important resources we can’t afford to lose. I’ve always stood against Republicans’ attempts to slash funding for these programs, but the latest cuts from Trump and the GOP majorities in Congress are dangerously close to becoming reality. Millions of Americans are at risk of losing their health care coverage. | | The landscape of American health care changed forever nearly 60 years ago when President Johnson signed into law the Social Security Act amendment, which created Medicare and Medicaid. It’s hard to name another government program that has transformed more lives. No one should have to choose between staying out of poverty and seeking the health care they need. Simply put: Medicare and Medicaid save lives and provide an invaluable peace of mind for so many. | Thanks for adding your voice. Scott | | | = | As a leader among Democrats in Congress, Scott Peters has one of the strongest track records of achieving progressive reforms and getting things done. He’s committed to protecting our environment, improving access to affordable healthcare, implementing compassionate immigration reforms and protecting reproductive freedom. Democrats in swing districts like Scott’s rely on grassroots supporters like you.**= | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Scott Peters for Congress Scott Peters for Congress PO Box 22074 San Diego, CA 92192 United States

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: What Elon accomplished
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Now that Elon Musk has officially left the Trump administration, there’s a lot of talk out there about what exactly he and DOGE accomplished.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250620-5165-footer&t=1&akid=5165%2E420207%2Eki9ifz)
Peter,
Now that Elon Musk has officially left the Trump administration, there’s a lot of talk out there about what exactly he and DOGE accomplished. Here’s my answer:
**Nothing good.**
Despite promising to save the government trillions of dollars each year, in reality he managed to cut only a tiny fraction of that amount. And in doing so, he did an incredible amount of harm.
Thousands of critically important federal employees fired or laid off. Countless aid programs eliminated, leading to an untold number of deaths across the world. Seniors worried about whether they’ll still get the Social Security checks they’re rightfully owed. The list goes on and on.
It’s going to be an enormous challenge to fix the problems Elon caused. And although the Trump administration has absolutely no appetite to do so, it’s essential that the next Democratic administration, with the help of Democratic majorities in Congress, rebuild the agencies Elon gutted to be stronger and more effective than ever.
We can strengthen and expand Social Security. We can expand Medicare and make it a truly universal health care system. And we can rebuild the regulatory agencies like the CFPB that have been essentially shut down.
**But first, we have to build a government that actually puts the needs of working people ahead of billionaires like Musk.**
I’m working every day to make sure that happens, but I can’t do it alone. I don’t take corporate PAC money, and I don’t seek out billionaires to rely on. That means I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to pitch in and power my campaign.
[**So Peter, if you’re with me in the fight to fix the damage Elon has done and rebuild our government for working people, can I count on you to pitch in $3 or more to help grow our progressive movement?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250620-1?refcode=em20250620-5165&amount=3&refcode2=5165_420207_ki9ifz&akid=5165%2E420207%2Eki9ifz)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250620-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250620-5165&refcode2=5165_420207_ki9ifz&akid=5165%2E420207%2Eki9ifz)**
These are big problems we’re facing, and they won’t go away just by electing a new president. But a better world is possible if we fight for it.
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250620-5165-footer&t=2&refcode2=5165_420207_ki9ifz&akid=5165%2E420207%2Eki9ifz)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

In a broadcast that—just like his term as Governor—was rife with technical difficulties, Newsom failed to explain anything and took no responsibility... **While Angelenos, Californians, and the nation watched, Newsom went on a deranged 8-minute rant, making excuses for violent rioters and looters, railing about saving our democracy, and calling Trump a tyrant.** You and I know the Truth: calling in the National Guard, restoring law and order, and protecting Los Angeles doesn’t make Trump a tyrant; it makes him the leader that California needs in this moment. The real tyrant is the man who has all but explicitly endorsed these riots for political gain...the man who shut down schools, small businesses, and churches for years...the most authoritarian governor in our nation. Yes, Gavin Newsom is the TYRANT. And this is all his fault. And if you and I don’t stand up and demand an end to 15 years of unchecked Democrat rule, then the tyranny will NOT end with Gavin Newsom leaving office in 2027. The insanity, the riots, the radicalism won’t stop until it IS stopped.** ** **[That’s why I’m asking you to join my campaign today.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=45578e750cb14983a226c8321b5a79b8&_e=11QYWnFENl5ObzpnZ5XOlvff_nIY71co4rr6ku1GCJHt_ZzXAQOevXUH4GAvlaqxG3egtcaiV7vUyBAlgXPmnR-CIPtxlp_h6yaZwpMKnL0sL8tvmYUtxD1Twr2b8go1kVlJOX0WLyJG8Cuty4qDOnT1afgQVtQqrRsg2ukPoyec-DZpvEnjM0RaWCQ204s5hFgyOvG4f1Ms-ne8K8yB3g8W4UX3BsRsNxSqGRXAeUu9AKY2eXtfc8yeHAyEafmpqWtdxyNa7jVc2_-46B3eMir1VQTn48cHO88JHhy7zpD3_sWa3Ch2rCzzzqoo3cCmjsFuA-1w5J0wAKNI4N-cb6ly9sOGsWJuh_K_w2aRRFlf0sEbVogwL57oUu8KtzXe8ciW2VdYGNOWHxY5gWOET6cRGqYyPTgaS5vr9Q4yPX7q8UP4EO5mCPryqice1pVQ2t0ATLtnQJr2EjduG-lFnSAJ4SjBl2vBx_W_p5t5ZG-X1Y6xjsG-9nV2kb7xvObm23SNGUFNNKrArZA3m0NsiMoKg1OxXikrl25ilXe29Anym8MfTfzxk83gJPucMfzFcdpnWnf5_4wP-wi2Sp_BtHTb32ZT7fDlBX-SYyFNtEkBCzD0goyemSCSDRPzsVl6g-lenepQ1PqxxodeNgqMNxIof2iIvC23kgrLWv419sER6hDoSH36shafGDNagQzgZN8HDuKMw3_Din3W6Wtg_nA7nd0Xzf3GE1XN3ZHfjzjZ9Z9zvaZTuiPKhs3mGj1B)** These L.A. riots were avoidable, and if I were Governor right now it would have been avoided. Once you let a situation like this get out of control, it feeds on itself. Gavin Newsom knows this; but he let it happen anyway. And as I said, the tyranny won’t end when he leaves office if we don’t demand real change. Would Kamala Harris handle this any better? Of course not! We need **_real_** leadership in California. clean_body: This is ALL Newsom’s fault.| | | | | - | | Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m livid. I’m frustrated. I’m appalled. Because after days of rioting, looting, chaos, and violence in Los Angeles, Governor Gavin Newsom finally addressed California and the nation in primetime. In a broadcast that—just like his term as Governor—was rife with technical difficulties, Newsom failed to explain anything and took no responsibility... While Angelenos, Californians, and the nation watched, Newsom went on a deranged 8-minute rant, making excuses for violent rioters and looters, railing about saving our democracy, and calling Trump a tyrant. You and I know the Truth: calling in the National Guard, restoring law and order, and protecting Los Angeles doesn’t make Trump a tyrant; it makes him the leader that California needs in this moment. The real tyrant is the man who has all but explicitly endorsed these riots for political gain...the man who shut down schools, small businesses, and churches for years...the most authoritarian governor in our nation. Yes, Gavin Newsom is the TYRANT. And this is all his fault. And if you and I don’t stand up and demand an end to 15 years of unchecked Democrat rule, then the tyranny will NOT end with Gavin Newsom leaving office in 2027. The insanity, the riots, the radicalism won’t stop until it IS stopped. These L.A. riots were avoidable, and if I were Governor right now it would have been avoided. If we had proper leadership in this state, we would work WITH ICE and the Federal government to enforce immigration policy. We would have clamped down on the agitators IMMEDIATELY. Once you let a situation like this get out of control, it feeds on itself. Gavin Newsom knows this; but he let it happen anyway. He’s more focused on collecting sound bites for his foolish Presidential campaign than he is on keeping Californians safe. And as I said, the tyranny won’t end when he leaves office if we don’t demand real change. Would Kamala Harris handle this any better? Of course not! We need real leadership in California. That’s why I’m running for Governor. Friend, it’s not just the riots; EVERYTHING is falling apart all around us in this once great state. Crime is up. Homelessness is exploding. Public schools are failing. Housing is unaffordable. Businesses and families are fleeing. This election is our last best hope to save California. We can create a new era of bold, common-sense leadership that will make California Golden Again. So I'm calling on every proud patriot who wants to turn things around: Join me—and let's get to work. Steve Hilton Republican Candidate for Governor of California DONATE P.S. Our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is right around the corner. We need to put out a strong report to show the radical Democrats how powerful our movement to Make California Golden Again is. . **Even a small donation of $5 adds up if everyone chips in. | | | | | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026 FPPC ID#1480425 Please add mailto:info@stevehiltonforgovernor.com "info@stevegarvey.com" to your email contacts to make sure our updates are making it into your inbox. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Absolutely terrible idea
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Trump’s reconciliation bill is going through Congress — the one with all the tax breaks for millionaires and billionaires and all the cuts to Medicaid and other services people depend on.
#

Trump’s reconciliation bill is going through Congress — the one with all the tax breaks for millionaires and billionaires and all the cuts to Medicaid and other services people depend on.
It’s a grab bag of the worst stuff you can think of, and it’s only getting worse.
If that bill goes through as it’s currently written, it will put millions of acres of public lands up for sale. Land that generations of Americans have had access to, where they can hunt, fish, camp, hike, and enjoy.
It’s another giveaway to the wealthy and big corporations. Logging, mining, drilling interests want that land to exploit. The super wealthy want to take land from the public, restrict access to it, and build mansions on it.
It’s an absolutely terrible idea, and we’ve got to stop it.
The good news is millions of Americans of all political affiliations are against this. Republicans and Democrats alike love our public lands and they don’t want them taken away. In especially divisive times, this unites a lot of us.
[**So, if you’re with me on this and you want to see our public lands defended and expanded — please, add your name here and tell Congress to stop this ridiculous plan to sell off millions of acres of it.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/public_lands_em_june25/?source=em250620-1-600&akid=6100%2E6688874%2EmKh3Dc)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/public_lands_em_june25/?source=em250620-1-600&akid=6100%2E6688874%2EmKh3Dc)**
Nobody wants this. Please, sign on and help us stop it.
Thank you,
Mark

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=6100%2E6688874%2EmKh3Dc).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Indiana GOP
subject: Leading the Nation in Healthcare Reform
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | _**Leading the Nation in Healthcare Reform**_
---
Friends, Governor Mike Braun held a ceremonial signing for 10 groundbreaking health care reform bills, positioning Indiana as a national leader in lowering costs and increasing transparency. These new laws bring major change, requiring hospitals to clearly post prices, banning anti-competitive physician noncompete contracts, cutting prescription drug costs, and holding nonprofit hospitals and insurers more accountable. The reforms empower patients, drive competition, and ensure Hoosiers get better care at lower prices. “I promised Hoosiers I would take on the big health care industry and get solutions to the problems making health care unaffordable. My partners in the General Assembly and I have enacted landmark health care solutions to bring transparency, accountability, and competition to our health care system. Indiana is now the national leader in health care reform and lowering prices for patients.” — Governor Mike Braun The Indiana Republican Party is proud to announce the 2026 State Convention, an essential step in shaping the future of our state’s leadership. In accordance with the Indiana Election Code and the Rules of the Indiana Republican Party, and as authorized by the Indiana Republican State Central Committee, the convention will be held on Saturday, June 20, 2026, at the Grand Wayne Convention Center in Fort Wayne. Delegates from across Indiana will convene to nominate our Party’s candidates for Secretary of State, Treasurer of State, and State Comptroller (Auditor of State). The convention will take place June 19–20, 2026, at 120 W. Jefferson Blvd., Fort Wayne, IN 46802. The Indiana Republican Party is also excited to announce the launch of our brand-new website. Designed with Hoosiers in mind, the updated site is faster, easier to navigate, and packed with tools to stay informed, get involved, and support conservative leadership across Indiana. Visit our new site to explore upcoming events, sign up for updates, and learn more about our mission to keep Indiana strong, connected, and thriving. As always, thank you for being a part of our team. Please feel free to reach out if there's anything I can assist with.
---
| |
---
| | Lana Keesling, Indiana GOP Chairwoman
---
|
---
|
---
# **_2026 Convention Official Call_**
---
June 19, 2025 TO ALL INDIANA REPUBLICANS: In compliance with the provisions of the Indiana Election Code and pursuant to the Rules of the Indiana Republican Party, adopted by the Indiana Republican State Central Committee, and pursuant to the resolutions of said Committee, a State Convention will be held on Saturday, June 20, 2026, for the purpose of nominating a candidate for each of the following offices: **Secretary of State** **Treasurer of State** **State Comptroller (Auditor of State)** All matters pertaining to the holding of a State Convention not provided for by law shall be controlled by the Rules of the Indiana Republican State Central Committee and by such rules as may be adopted by the convention.

_**Governor Braun Invests in the Future of Indiana Agriculture**_

Hoosier farmers feed America, and Indiana is recognized nationwide for its innovation in agriculture. Governor Mike Braun spoke to the outstanding young leaders at the Indiana FFA State Convention, highlighting the state’s commitment to supporting the next generation of farmers. With programs that equip young people for success, the future of Indiana agriculture is strong and full of promise. "The future of Indiana agriculture is bright!" \- Governor Braun via [X.](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/yDIPv5Pe52Bk_6L56X9PLevcer7SAKRTynqex5j2fMg8l7ZLyvr_rfqwWOMSNpvF375dhtZ8OmN9Zf6axNHrjKgrZoiPgg6b3Qzik8fstFII2niVScqlmGGq_YOAAwtB66bRZhAoIcWYSRmvlhbxE7wyriqz6PGAdgQBnC0c1sHPLqxAxnoKSPK-3z6uAtvEhB0pQXHPRhdwUzCqaBmLg-ULbYvmVu7rGgVR4N5LUM4eyAkTMiV-m3eakE8ZuX_kGL28Ja7eleZEYnTjL-HYmNYmLO60EhmCHoRXPe9V0w-9Z92YLJw31aTpBC4Wx79IMDJTrj3hC4tnVI67LVQ2rKSI6C5DCkl5Pu3-Oid7BUC1KaspQ0voL8CCwgSgsqrqxwkHOtKVzD39dl09pbXmdTGyiT9BAYV_wIhP4lFHkw/MWm0l2VEPQEzU1MDjq8pHa_z8v9wvX8E/10)

_**Rudy Yakym Protects Hoosier Jobs by Ending California’s Emissions Overreach**_

Congressman Rudy Yakym is defending Hoosier jobs by helping end California’s overreach on national emissions standards. He joined House Republicans in passing resolutions to repeal EPA waivers that allowed California to impose extreme zero-emission rules, which threatened Indiana’s RV industry and thousands of local jobs. Yakym is committed to protecting Indiana workers and preserving the state’s manufacturing strength.

These new laws bring major change, requiring hospitals to clearly post prices, banning anti-competitive physician noncompete contracts, cutting prescription drug costs, and holding nonprofit hospitals and insurers more accountable. The reforms empower patients, drive competition, and ensure Hoosiers get better care at lower prices. “I promised Hoosiers I would take on the big health care industry and get solutions to the problems making health care unaffordable. clean_body: I’m counting on YOU to add your name to save me. | My God, Peter... Has it really come to this? I always knew the price I could one day pay for standing by the truth and the side of my good friend, our 45th and 47th President. But what the radical Democrats and the Deep State are trying to do to those of us who’ve REFUSED to surrender to tyranny will destroy our once free Republic forever. Today, all due to bogus state-level charges schemed up by a Democrat Attorney General in Arizona, I'm staring down the possibility of spending the rest of my years in PRISON! My crime? Helping to defend Donald J. Trump from one of the most vile witch hunts in American history. And on top of it all, because the Democrats concocted these sham criminal charges at the state level , President Trump won’t even be able to issue a federal pardon to save me. But rest assured, while things may look bleak, I will NEVER,EVER SURRENDER! My whole life, I’ve always been known as a fighter. And at 80 years old, I’m still fighting back against these Deep State goons! And while the President cannot save me from the Democrats’ vindictive scheme, there is ONE thing that still can... ...The collective voice of MILLIONS of patriots like YOU. That’s why today, I’m asking you to ADD YOUR NAME to the Peter, the leftist thugs who had me unjustly booked in one of the most violent jails in America filed my mugshot under booking # 2313757. So, how fitting would it be to collect2,313,757 petition signatures from true America patriots like you demanding they DROP ALL CHARGES? Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

clean_body: | | | I have some good news and bad news for you. Thanks to the support of conservatives like you, we hit our mid-month fundraising goal. Supporters from across the Nation donated their hard earned dollars to support our fight to keep North Carolina RED and hold onto our America First Senate Majority. However, there is some bad news. In 2020, Democrats spent $84,859,944 to try and take back North Carolina and are already devising plans to spend even more in 2026. This means we have a lot of ground to make up. With Democrats in charge, Americans will face higher taxes, woke DEI policies, open borders, and yet another impeachment attempt of President Trump. That is why we need to keep our foot on the gas. Thank you, Abby (Team Tillis) | | Paid for by the Thom Tillis Committee Copyright © 2025 Thom Tillis Committee, All rights reserved.You are receiving this email because you support Thom Tillis Committee. . | | |

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Bernie says Dems should break from billionaires — he’s right
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, many
Democratic voters are pissed, and we understand why.

The Democratic Party is filled with far too many out-of-touch, do-nothing
incumbents who join their Republican colleagues in catering to corporate
special interests instead of the working people they were elected to
represent.

On top of that, Democratic leadership is utterly failing to put up a fight
against Trump and his fascist administration.

A new poll dropped showing that the vast majority of Democrats (70
percent!) support bold progressives like AOC and Bernie Sanders’
aggressive fight against Trump and Elon Musk.

This week, Bernie and seven fellow senators issued a call for the
Democratic Party to “begin cleaning our own house” and break away from
billionaires like Musk and the corporate interests who keep working
families down by banning super PACs and “dark money” from Democratic
primaries.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250620?refcode=em20250620-36776&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36776_1203867_7o27CG&akid=36776%2E1203867%2E7o27CG ]The Washington Post: Bernie Sanders, seven other senators urge
Democrats to break with billionaire donors. The Vermont independent and
his colleagues are demanding that Democrats “begin cleaning our own house”
by restricting the influence of wealthy donors and powerful corporate
interests.

Justice Democrats has been calling for Democrats to clean house, reject
corporate Super PACs, and fight harder for the working class since our
founding — and if they won’t, then they deserve to be primaried by
candidates who will.

We’ve already launched our first 2026 Democratic primary challenger —
Donavan McKinney, who’s running against multimillionaire Shri Thanedar in
MI-13 — and Bernie just endorsed him this week!

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250620?refcode=em20250620-36776&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36776_1203867_7o27CG&akid=36776%2E1203867%2E7o27CG ]Help us elect Donavan and recruit other progressive, working-class
candidates to replace the feckless Democrats doing little to nothing for
us in Congress: pitch in a grassroots contribution of $5 or
more now.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250620?refcode=em20250620-36776&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36776_1203867_7o27CG&akid=36776%2E1203867%2E7o27CG ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250620-36776-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36776_1203867_7o27CG&akid=36776%2E1203867%2E7o27CG

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36776%2E1203867%2E7o27CG

This week, Bernie and seven fellow senators issued a call for the Democratic Party to “begin cleaning our own house” and break away from billionaires like Musk and the corporate interests who keep working families down by banning super PACs and “dark money” from Democratic primaries. [ ]The Washington Post: Bernie Sanders, seven other senators urge Democrats to break with billionaire donors. The Vermont independent and his colleagues are demanding that Democrats “begin cleaning our own house” by restricting the influence of wealthy donors and powerful corporate interests. Justice Democrats has been calling for Democrats to clean house, reject corporate Super PACs, and fight harder for the working class since our founding — and if they won’t, then they deserve to be primaried by candidates who will. We’ve already launched our first 2026 Democratic primary challenger — Donavan McKinney, who’s running against multimillionaire Shri Thanedar in MI-13 — and Bernie just endorsed him this week! [ ]Help us elect Donavan and recruit other progressive, working-class candidates to replace the feckless Democrats doing little to nothing for us in Congress: pitch in a grassroots contribution of $5 or more now. [ ]Contribute $5 In solidarity, Justice Democrats Contribute to Justice Democrats:

name: LCV Membership Team
subject: URGENT: Senate set to vote to sell off public lands. This is time sensitive:
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTI2MzY4OTkS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjI0MDk2MDA0NgS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Peter — the Senate is barreling towards a vote on the most
anti-environmental legislation in history. If this horrible bill becomes law, it
would: Sell off millions of acres of public lands to the highest bidder; Ban cheaper clean energy; Slash funding to reduce air pollution in schools; and Create a “pay-to-play” system for corporate polluters to get approval for dirty energy projects. We’re turning up the pressure through peaceful local protests and frontpage news
coverage, bringing activists to meet with members of Congress on Capitol Hill,
and mobilizing people in key states and districts right now. We NEED to keep up the pressure on a small number of fence-sitting Republican
senators. But our campaign needs support from LCV members to keep going. Right now, you can make a difference and fight this attack on our environment:
because this moment is so important, a group of donors has agreed to TRIPLE
MATCH all gifts to our Summer Membership Drive. Renew your membership today for just $5 and your gift will go THREE TIMES as far to defend public lands >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Pwb7C7R~ MEMBERSHIP STATUS FOR Peter

Deadline: June 30
Goal: $40,000 from new and renewed members
Match Offer: TRIPLE MATCH!
Status: PENDING

RENEW NOW >> https://links.messages.lcv. Please don’t wait. This vote could spell disaster for public lands and clean
energy — and it could happen any day now. We need to keep the pressure on senators until the very end. We need your help as this climate-destroying bill gets closer and closer to Trump’s desk — and your renewed membership gift of just $5 will be matched 3X to support our efforts to stop this public lands disaster in its tracks. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/7RYwsXb_ Thank you for being with us in this fight for our public lands and our climate
future, Peter. — LCV Membership Team This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=12636899&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjI0MDk2MDA0NgS2&spReportId=MjI0MDk2MDA0NgS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=12636899&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjI0MDk2MDA0NgS2&spReportId=MjI0MDk2MDA0NgS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/pNy7f3_

name: Christina Bohannan
subject: We have to stay strong all month long
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
I want to talk to you about our first official deadline.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109960369/552802316/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjY5NzAxOS0xMzRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e2EVwIeRQde24ccIoazhRwCse93c_9T66V9vZK8xblY=)

Peter,

Thanks to so many of you, we’re coming off an incredible campaign launch! But today I want to talk to you about our first official deadline.

In just 10 short days, we’ll reach June 30 and our first FEC end-of-quarter deadline. Our fundraising numbers from the first few weeks of this campaign will be public for Republicans — and the entire country — to see.

**That’s why every single day between now and June 30 is absolutely crucial.** This will likely be the most competitive and expensive House race in 2026. Mariannette Miller-Meeks is starting off with a multimillion-dollar campaign war chest, and national Republicans are more than ready to flood this district with outside money to keep her in Congress and their majority secured.

But we have something Mariannette Miller-Meeks doesn't: a grassroots team that’s ready to do the work, every day, to build something better. So here’s my question: Will you help us keep up our momentum by chipping in today?
[**→ Yes, I’ll donate now**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109960370/552802319/-1606373703?refcode=em25_250620_FRNMM_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250620_FRNMM_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=66697019-134e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjY5NzAxOS0xMzRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e2EVwIeRQde24ccIoazhRwCse93c_9T66V9vZK8xblY=)
The road to the House majority runs through Iowa and I’m ready to fight for it. With your help, we’ll show the country that this race is one to watch and that we’re in it to win.

Thank you for everything,

Christina

Christina Bohannan is a mom, law professor, former engineer and state representative. She's running for Congress to defeat Mariannette Miller-Meeks and flip IA-01 blue.

clean_body: I want to talk to you about our first official deadline. | = Peter, Thanks to so many of you, we’re coming off an incredible campaign launch! But today I want to talk to you about our first official deadline. In just 10 short days, we’ll reach June 30 and our first FEC end-of-quarter deadline. Our fundraising numbers from the first few weeks of this campaign will be public for Republicans — and the entire country — to see. That’s why every single day between now and June 30 is absolutely crucial. This will likely be the most competitive and expensive House race in 2026. Mariannette Miller-Meeks is starting off with a multimillion-dollar campaign war chest, and national Republicans are more than ready to flood this district with outside money to keep her in Congress and their majority secured. But we have something Mariannette Miller-Meeks doesn't: a grassroots team that’s ready to do the work, every day, to build something better. So here’s my question: Will you help us keep up our momentum by chipping in today? = The road to the House majority runs through Iowa and I’m ready to fight for it. With your help, we’ll show the country that this race is one to watch and that we’re in it to win. Thank you for everything, Christina Christina Bohannan is a mom, law professor, former engineer and state representative. She's running for Congress to defeat Mariannette Miller-Meeks and flip IA-01 blue. Chip in to support her campaign today >> | = = | PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 722 Iowa City, IA 52240 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:
Excuse my language, but this sh*t is out of control

|
---
Y’all, what we’re seeing nationwide is downright DISGUSTING. _**Point blank, period.**_ **FIRST:** Representative LaMonica McIver was indicted on federal charges for simply conducting oversight at an ICE detention facility earlier this year. **THEN:** Senator Alex Padilla was violently dragged out of Kristi Noem’s press conference, thrown to the ground, and handcuffed — just for standing up for California. **NOW:** Trump spent the weekend rolling tanks through Washington and making his wannabe dictator dreams a reality. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109960496/552802704/-31074794?refcode=250620_Jasmine_Review&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmMwY2NmMC0xMzRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WarKc8t1PJoqnhrb1UClpIQSzGkMYeg8Vo3BN4hiTfM=)** Excuse my language, _**but this shit is out of control.**_ [**Enough is enough. name: Flip the Senate
subject: Thom Tillis has got to go.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SMP, www
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109960525/552802766/-896966196?refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20250620_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGZiOTk0MC0xMzRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O9UqFD6t9ogEIlUvPN24NMUm2FnUNQvC6iglcuqB4dI=)
Team, It seems like $900 billion in Medicaid cuts wasn’t enough for North Carolina Senator Thom Tillis. He just went even further by backing **even more** cuts to Medicare that could rip away health care from _over 2 million_ North Carolinians. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109960526/552802767/2034376778?refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20250620_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGZiOTk0MC0xMzRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O9UqFD6t9ogEIlUvPN24NMUm2FnUNQvC6iglcuqB4dI=) Why is he doing this? To fund _more_ tax breaks for billionaires. **That’s right.** Thom Tillis would rather hand out giveaways to the ultra-wealthy than protect health care for seniors, working families, and children in his own state. This is the kind of ruthless, upside-down policymaking we’re fighting tooth and nail to stop. And with Trump’s latest spending bill already passed in the House, the Senate could vote **any day now.** **We’re not going to stop until we’ve flipped the Senate. name: Finance Team (via Benson HQ)
subject: In the blink of an eye
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=431%2E181023%2Eyqy8Rn)
| **Our campaign is facing a public fundraising deadline in just one month, and it’ll be used as a test of our grassroots strength.

[Can you chip in $10 now to help us pass this test with flying colors?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q22025.rGq0NW&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250620_PM1_V1_S1&amount=10&t=2&akid=431%2E181023%2Eyqy8Rn)** | [DONATE](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q22025.rGq0NW&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250620_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=431%2E181023%2Eyqy8Rn)
---
One month. That’s how much time we have left before all of our fundraising numbers will be made public.
**Our July 20 fundraising deadline is when we’ll close the books on our fundraising report and publicly disclose not just how much we’ve raised — but how many donors have contributed to our campaign.**
In a state as competitive as Michigan, everyone will be eyeing the numbers we report to see if Jocelyn has what it takes to win — so we have no choice but to post the strongest report possible.
GOP candidate John James has already received $5 million in super PAC support from the DeVos family, so we must show we have the resources to fight back.
If we don’t? Political experts could start doubting the longevity of our movement, and with Jocelyn fighting for a better vision for Michigan, we can’t leave it up to chance.
[**We know one month seems like a long time, but this deadline will be here in just the blink of an eye. So, can you chip in $10 or whatever you can right now? Your contribution today will make hitting our fundraising goals possible.**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q22025.rGq0NW&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250620_PM1_V1_S1&amount=10&t=4&akid=431%2E181023%2Eyqy8Rn)

clean_body: | Our campaign is facing a public fundraising deadline in just one month, and it’ll be used as a test of our grassroots strength. | One month. That’s how much time we have left before all of our fundraising numbers will be made public. Our July 20 fundraising deadline is when we’ll close the books on our fundraising report and publicly disclose not just how much we’ve raised — but how many donors have contributed to our campaign. In a state as competitive as Michigan, everyone will be eyeing the numbers we report to see if Jocelyn has what it takes to win — so we have no choice but to post the strongest report possible. GOP candidate John James has already received $5 million in super PAC support from the DeVos family, so we must show we have the resources to fight back. If we don’t? Political experts could start doubting the longevity of our movement, and with Jocelyn fighting for a better vision for Michigan, we can’t leave it up to chance. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | Thank you, Finance Team Jocelyn Benson for Governor

name: Katie Porter
subject: Housing is the #1 issue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39819%2E3422442%2EplZlOz)
Dear Derek,
To bring down costs for families, we need to address the high cost of housing. For most Californians, it is their #1 monthly expense.
**Yet, too few of our politicians are making housing their #1 issue.**
We need a heck of a lot more housing in every part and pocket of this state, and we’re not going to get there unless our leaders get serious about streamlining the approvals process and making it faster and cheaper to get construction done.
It’s not enough for our elected officials to support the right policy; they need to have the right priority.
I am going to be a housing governor. I’ll bring together workers, businesses, and consumers to get it done.
**[But first, I need to get there. Will you chip in $5 to support my campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250620_1_ak?refcode=em20250620-39819&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39819_3422442_plZlOz&akid=39819%2E3422442%2EplZlOz)**
Thanks,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250620-39819&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39819_3422442_plZlOz&akid=39819%2E3422442%2EplZlOz)**

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=39819&t=5&akid=39819%2E3422442%2EplZlOz)

Katie Porter for Governor 2026

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene (DOGE Chair)
subject: Signatures Needed to Codify DOGE Cuts
body:
Side by side with Elon Musk as the head of the DOGE Subcommittee, I’ve been working tirelessly to expose and eliminate the rampant waste, fraud, and abuse in government.
| | | | Dear Friend,
Side by side with Elon Musk as the head of the DOGE Subcommittee, I’ve been working tirelessly to expose and eliminate the rampant waste, fraud, and abuse in government.
To date, the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) has already identified $163 billion in savings since President Trump’s second term began, which includes cutting funds for overseas abortions, radical NGOs, and government-run media. **Now it’s time to cut that wasteful spending for good.**
In fact, now that our national debt has eclipsed $37 TRILLION, there has never been a better time.
_**[I’m asking you, Friend, to co-sign this letter with me to help ensure these critical DOGE cuts are written into the FY26 budget](http://email.email.greene4congress.com/c/eJxcks1u2zAQhJ-GutGQV9SPDzokEZxTjbZo0uYk0ORKZsq_kpQN5-kLyapb9Lozmm8wIjdeq-HakvqRAJyUjASAFA8E4Ll5u1aD_PX8SCv4TrE75B-zCE-r8wx3rxX8wXyKzfjyHn8yly7s69t5e3enq8e7d0Vu0HCl52vdZbJt6oHLIcN2W5c5K7c1FNmpZQC5kCUehWgkkwM7yuooy7pkchCM5ZlqIYcyryCHvCi3u03e7IbdTjQotwMTuyNh-QLajAHRIhPOjgFj3AhnMt2eUvJx6bUnsI8opoCbi7IB5ewgsDc8vLugkCZ-1S7QWw6N1KPzGqk7Y6DeaZWUUNxGKuaP0thLZ3vDL8L1dhK9dCP12KPp_xQmxT7MvKDsSIouhQkJVFMyvUGpJkOKbp1oOUY3BYGk6KzQ_brhKgluPFejJUV3i6Yrnyf1bwmNU5yLYO8xqUVbCH8rrXnOJrTpxqL-0B0-vrz8-HYgUPVWK0mK7r_j8nCKzsLr02f-Wmahlf6itFaxqgnLx-UPzIufW_gdAAD__761y6k)**_**.**

[CO-SIGN THE LETTER](http://email.email.greene4congress.com/c/eJxckstu2zAQRb-G2tGQRu-FFk4EZ5WiKFAX6UagyZHMlK-QlA336wvJqltkO3M15-CKTDslx1tH6icCcJYiEACS7wnAS_N2q0bx8fJEK_hBsf-S_l6W8LwlL_DIGs72-jU00_f38Kuw8Vp8e7tkj3S8OXxkN-QONZNqmdZ9IrqmHpkYE-yyukyLMqshT84dr0fgVXEqRYMs46eMiTatWVZldVUVrE1kBymUaQUppHmZtbu0ace25Q2KbCx4eyJFuoJ2k0c0WHBrJo8h7LjVierOMbqweh0IHALy2ePuKo1HsSQIHDTz79ZLpJHdlPX0focG6tA6hdRe0FNnlYySS2YC5ctHcRqENYNmV24HM_NB2Ik6HFAPf4VJfvALz0szkbyPfkYC1Rz1oFHIWZO83ypah8HOniPJe8PVsHW4rTjTjsnJkLy_n6Ybn0X5v4TCOSwiODiMct2thH9K2z1rIpp4Z9GfR2cCe91_LHqDUVKQvP80XB9O3hs4Pn9lxzLxnXBXqZQMVU2KdFr_wNL4pYM_AQAA___6KsvU)
Our country’s future is at stake, and while the DC Swamp squanders hundreds of billions, hard working American families are struggling. We must act to stop this civilizational suicide and put America First.
_Here’s what this effort will achieve_ :
* Secure $163 billion in permanent savings.
* End funding for wasteful foreign aid and ideologically driven programs.
* Hold Congress accountable to the will of the people.

There is a strong coalition in Congress that is fighting to codify these cuts, but there are still some Republican holdouts and your voice is essential to send a clear message to Washington.
**__**

clean_body: Side by side with Elon Musk as the head of the DOGE Subcommittee, I’ve been working tirelessly to expose and eliminate the rampant waste, fraud, and abuse in government. | | | | Dear Friend, Side by side with Elon Musk as the head of the DOGE Subcommittee, I’ve been working tirelessly to expose and eliminate the rampant waste, fraud, and abuse in government. To date, the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) has already identified $163 billion in savings since President Trump’s second term began, which includes cutting funds for overseas abortions, radical NGOs, and government-run media. Now it’s time to cut that wasteful spending for good. In fact, now that our national debt has eclipsed $37 TRILLION, there has never been a better time. . Our country’s future is at stake, and while the DC Swamp squanders hundreds of billions, hard working American families are struggling. We must act to stop this civilizational suicide and put America First. Here’s what this effort will achieve : Secure $163 billion in permanent savings. End funding for wasteful foreign aid and ideologically driven programs. Hold Congress accountable to the will of the people. There is a strong coalition in Congress that is fighting to codify these cuts, but there are still some Republican holdouts and your voice is essential to send a clear message to Washington. . In Liberty, | | Marjorie Taylor Greene _**

name: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez
subject: Rural communities depend on public broadcasting
body:
| | | **_POLITICO:_**
_**‘Catastrophic’: Rural public media stations brace for GOP cuts**
NPR and PBS member stations with smaller budgets will struggle to stay on the air if Congress nixes current funding, public media executives warn._
---

Peter – Last week, I voted against a hyperpartisan package that guts federal funding for nonpartisan, independent public broadcasting, a critical resource that rural communities like ours rely on every day.

The House Majority’s plan will force public radio and television stations across the country to close, including 14 here in Washington. We depend on public broadcasting for so much: quality local journalism, educational children’s programming, and even lifesaving emergency alerts.

_Peter, I’m all for tackling waste and making sure our tax dollars are used efficiently, but that doesn’t mean compromising our safety, health, or general well-being._

**I’ll continue calling out D.C.’s misplaced priorities and getting things done for Southwest Washington – but to keep this work going, I need your help defending this seat.** [Will you rush in $10 to get us back on track before our next public reporting deadline? name: Team Hirono
subject: Trump’s $600 million war chest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, we all know that Donald Trump is aiming to make an impact in the 2026 midterm elections to protect and expand the GOP’s Senate majority. But how much of an impact? Well, just take a look: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109961067/552804597/-171743829?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20250620_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmIyM2VkOC0xNjRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b0Eg3-FseDn5c-fZXNFrUGYBPXO72Ef47l3rQKToai0=) That’s right:**Donald Trump’s political operation is planning to spend at least $600 million to elect more Republicans to the Senate next year.** We know what a Senate Republican majority looks like, Peter — tax cuts for billionaires and scraps for everyone else. That’s why it’s more important than ever that we elect more Democrats to the Senate who will stand up to the GOP’s billionaire-first agenda and put working families first. Trump and his allies are already gearing up for the midterm elections, which means we don’t have any time to waste. name: VoteVets
subject: Democrats Call In Military Veterans to Try to Flip the House
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
What we’ve learned over the last 20 years is Veterans win races other people can’t. Veterans reach people other candidates can’t.
#
Peter: The news is not good lately.
Los Angeles. Iran. Trump’s budget bill. The list goes on.
But our work goes beyond any one issue or any single news week. To find a way out of this, VoteVets continues to look to the future. And there is light at the end of the tunnel if you try to find it. Look:
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-june25.e5pwgQ&refcode=em250620-1-120&t=1&akid=34453%2E3013755%2EhBUmBJ)
What we’ve learned over the last 20 years is Veterans win races other people can’t. Veterans reach people other candidates can’t. And at this very moment, across the country, Veterans are rising to the challenge.
VoteVets has worked tirelessly to find and support Veterans in the battleground districts that will determine control of the House in 2026. VoteVets candidates are winning their primaries around the country. From congressional races to gubernatorial to municipal — we have a strong slate that is only getting stronger.
There is hope, Peter. But these candidates are going to need a lot of help to get over the finish line.
One of the most fundamentally important things VoteVets does is raise resources for these campaigns and for hard-hitting advertisements that win races. And we’re asking you, once again, to chip in and help us finish the job.
[**Please, if you have anything to spare, make a donation to VoteVets. We have to win the House to have any shot at checking Trump’s power and rolling back the damage he’s inflicted. Everything is riding on this. Please.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-june25.e5pwgQ&refcode=em250620-1-120&t=2&akid=34453%2E3013755%2EhBUmBJ)

The GOP is in chaos.
Ken Paxton, the indicted far-right Attorney General, is leading John Cornyn by 16 points in a GOP-funded poll.

name: KAREN CRNKOVICH FOR JOHNSON COUNTY COMMISSION
subject: Subject: I’m Running — And I Need You With Me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAREN CRNKOVICH FOR JOHNSON COUNTY COMMISSION * 32104 W 111th St * Olathe, KS 66061-8479 * USA
body:
I have BIG news — this past week, I officially filed to run for Chair of the Johnson County Board of Commissioners.

| | | | | |
---
|
---
| | | | | Hello Peter,I have _**BIG news**_ — this past week, I officially filed to run for Chair of the Johnson County Board of Commissioners._**Why am I doing this?**_ Because I love this community. Because I care deeply about our families, our neighborhoods, and our future. And because it’s time for common-sense leadership that puts YOU first, not big government spending and higher taxes.Over the last few years, I’ve listened to thousands of Johnson County residents, and the concern I hear most often is loud and clear: _**our property taxes are out of control.**_ Let’s look at the facts:
* The County budget has grown by a staggering 50% in just five years

* Meanwhile, inflation (CPI) rose (still a large amount) by only **13.1%** , and population grew **3.8%**

_**That’s not growth. That’s government bloat.**_ We cannot afford another four years of blank checks, pet projects, and radical priorities. We need:
* Stronger accountability
* Smarter spending
* Real transparency
* And leaders who will fight for tax relief and public safety

That’s why I’m **stepping up** _**.**_ But I cannot do this alone.Right now, I need your help to send a message — to **Mike Kelly** and his spend-happy cronies — that Johnson County is ready for a new direction.Will you join me in this fight?Your donation — whether it’s $25, $50, or even $100 — will go directly toward building a winning campaign that puts taxpayers first and restores fiscal sanity to our county government.**👉**[**DONATE TODAY**](https://kcforjoco.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d540da3225ec5b2797f3018d2&id=ecd9ffec2f&e=7320325a61)**Every dollar counts. Every voice matters. And with your support, I know we can win this — together.**_With gratitude,
Karen Crnkovich
Candidate for Johnson County Commission Chair_
**PS: Click**[**here**](https://kcforjoco.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d540da3225ec5b2797f3018d2&id=b291ffe6de&e=7320325a61)**to view the Press Release we sent out on Wednesday! Happy Reading!**

---
