Dear Friends -
Today I am launching a new project, and I wanted you, my amazing readers at Let's Address This, to be the first to hear about it. That project is "_[Islam Today](https://substack.com/redirect/0699e5a0-36b1-4e69-8e3a-7d52af353b1b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ ," and below I explain why I am diving into this exciting new initiative.
To be sure--I will continue to write and report on critical human rights issues on a daily basis on _Let 's Address This with Qasim Rashid_. This new project, Islam Today, is not by any means a replacement of Let's Address This--it is _separate from and in addition to_ Let's Address This. So why am I diving into this new project? **Let 's Address This.**
[Subscribe To Islam Today](https://substack.com/redirect/0699e5a0-36b1-4e69-8e3a-7d52af353b1b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Origin Stories
Let me start with a short story.
The first letter to the editor I ever published was shortly after 9/11. It was a piece calling out anti-Muslim and Islamophobic bigotry sweeping the nation in the wake of the Afghan war, the impending invasion of Iraq, and the so-called Patriot Act (used to target and discriminate against Americans who were Muslim). I was heart-warmed by the response. Readers sent me notes of appreciation and gratitude because the short letter helped them better understand Islam and Muslims, and recognize that our enemy wasn't a faith or 1.6B people, but that our enemy was disinformation and fear.

I understood first hand the true power of the Jihad of the Pen for justice and humanity, against violence, disinformation, hate, and fear.
So I decided, I could not stop my advocacy there.
## Building the platform
I built on that experience and fostered a small online platform on YouTube, then Facebook, then Twitter, to continue to counter hateful disinformation. And that once modest platform is now literally millions of followers committed to universal human rights for people of all faiths and no faith, economic, social, and climate justice, and yes, dad jokes. (You'll know if I write a dad joke because it will be _apparent_).
I addressed the "Obama is a Muslim" conspiracies in 2010, debunked the "creeping Shariah" movement in 2011 and 2012, condemned the proposed Muslim ban in 2015, the actual Muslim ban in 2017, dismantled Daesh (ISIS) and Taliban extremism throughout, rebuked hijab bans and attacks on Sikhs and Hindus _perceived_ to be Muslim, advocated against antisemitism, and for the rights of atheists to _not_ believe--and more. I hosted a podcast on Islamic history that garnered more than 100,000 downloads, testified before the US Commission on International Religious freedom on the persecution of faith minorities in Muslim majority nations, spoke directly to then U.S. Religious Freedom Ambassador at Large at a public forum to stop bombing Yemen, and traveled to the UAE on an international peace conference to champion universal religious freedom globally.
[Subscribe To Islam Today](https://substack.com/redirect/0699e5a0-36b1-4e69-8e3a-7d52af353b1b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Expanding advocacy
And as I expanded my platform to discuss more than the singular topic of Islam, I've proudly marched in movements to combat fascism, stood on picket lines to combat economic injustice, launched campaigns for U.S. Congress, raised money for dozens of people funded candidates, and built my legal practice as a human rights lawyer.
But throughout, one of the most common requests I've received is to revive my writing and scholarship on Islam, Islamic history, Prophet Muhammad (sa), American Muslims, the Muslim world today--and how all of it ties into modern day United States of America. And as we see the ongoing genocide in Gaza, the ongoing devastation of women's rights in Afghanistan, the war consuming Sudan, and the war drums beating to invade Iran, I feel now is as critical a time as any to revive my roots once more with the intellectual Jihad of the Pen against injustice.
## Reviving roots
Truth be told, I'm deeply passionate about these topics, and hold a sincere desire to continue to write about them. And unlike 23 years ago when I had an obscure email address with no one paying attention to my work, I am now privileged to have a robust and growing platform that reaches hundreds of millions of readers annually. I recognize this honor, and this opportunity to combat the immense amounts of disinformation disseminated today. And so, I find a calling to in invest in education and resources to build bridges of understanding, dialogue, and interfaith unity and harmony--between Muslims and non-Muslims (including nonbelievers) alike.
So here's my ask of you.
[Subscribe To Islam Today](https://substack.com/redirect/0699e5a0-36b1-4e69-8e3a-7d52af353b1b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Join our Jihad of the Pen for Justice
The word _Jihad_ means _to struggle._ I ask you to join our intellectual Jihad of the Pen for justice, our _intellectual struggle for justice_.
Subscribe as a free or paid subscriber. As always, none of my content will sit behind a paywall. It seems counter-intuitive for a writer to admit this, but on this platform, readers receive no special benefits for being a paid subscriber. And likewise, readers suffer no restriction for being a free subscriber. Because I don't believe in requiring payment for access to education. Instead, I want readers to subscribe at the level they are comfortable--without any compulsion whatsoever. To those who are able to support this effort as a paid subscriber, I offer to you my immense gratitude for helping fuel this mission. To everyone who reads and shares my writing in general, I offer my immense appreciation to you for your trust and partnership.
You can expect 2-3 pieces per week, regular dialogues with people of different faiths (and no faith), and the fact-based verifiable content you already know me for. We might even revive that podcast on Islamic history I mentioned.
And, yes there will be dad jokes. (My cat was born in a mosque--he's a Meowslim).
## Closing Note
I often reflect that the first word of the Qur'an ever revealed to Islam's Founder Prophet Muhammad (sa) was _iqra_ , which means "to read" or "to recite." This is particularly significant be the Prophet Muhammad (sa) himself was unlettered--he could neither read no write.
I see _iqra_ as a call to action that drives every bit of what I do in how I respond to the challenges we face--read, recite, educate, understand, improve, and then get to work.
So I invite you to [subscribe to Islam Today](https://substack.com/redirect/0699e5a0-36b1-4e69-8e3a-7d52af353b1b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as a _reader_ committed to justice. Subscribe to increase your education. To combat disinformation. To advance your insights of Muslims and Islam. To acquire the tools to combat hate. To be a human who is more and better informed on a faith that more than 1.6 billion people globally adhere to. To know that when certain western politicians declare, "_I think Islam hates us_ ," it's a cruel ploy to dehumanize and divide us--a ploy we must stand firmly against.
But most of all, I invite you to subscribe because at the end of the day, I'm still at heart that idealistic 19 year old kid doing my best, writing one letter at a time, to create a more just and compassionate world for my family and yours. Thank you for your trust.
Now let's get to work, and wage that intellectual Jihad of the Pen--together.
With peace,
Qasim
* * *

I’m personally asking: Will you step up and chip in $15 before my End of Week Deadline in 48 hours? >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109961374/552805691/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250620_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWE2NDc1ZS0wZTRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bmvM88iorptzDPmiaia4DxhHGoTiG7jUaVInPGtBShI=)

MAGA Republicans just announced that they [raised $35 MILLION in a single night](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109961375/552805692/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250620_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWE2NDc1ZS0wZTRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bmvM88iorptzDPmiaia4DxhHGoTiG7jUaVInPGtBShI=) to stop Democrats from reclaiming our Democratic House Majority...

## Senate Parliamentarian Applying Byrd Rule to Strike Provisions of Big, Beautiful Bill

It was announced Friday that parliamentarian Elizabeth MacDonough had already nixed a number of provisions, and more are likely [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/4rLpkAmBIGRgeSR_641IMkqEKD5tLkKAWcMhlACZxndioCsBD-Zo_e0kwMfWiK1IqT0xjA36p-kExhW-GPPNdYKVv4zb6nRhjUO-X8T6DqYwxKouUbvIfGTUGc-CVoKdctfT8bqMw9DlKUeK2PPGD71HJWHEiq8a9cAi9XKSyOQWAZ3D2D_Ez2nWbg_ah7LW-T6ArP-oRsO-SDJLgM0R4kEhrUhof4zRP33qzfBhmN81u9ChBrR2euMqil6PJQHdP9MU0Rd0Fi_flqUj78hing59Wqb5sHPuzCDaVVxtH3OcyHJbhR-b7XpKpBg01BXqOVmi9lLYtvjml5I0fWaHJOT9DazYV7jpQ_dCLWVhYoCrB4b6MkyoVibNqE2WQdCgbr3N4Q98rzTxpuQmKzDEfwgJ3z_SEG7bQLEuidSpttTZh1toiWB5fjsIXIbjcyh4pO8sZyaP2keZMJajuEfaybqz4DdVihUQIsDgu3KhC1nDr8WC_t7cD2lJB1lKk5W9uiWnTTcXKHiajMnexgc7z9zRgcPvBeCiIrOQ2UVQ-4nfzjLG0CT90sY4mVvkiHbrTgTCXdA6XCVRkFXT1Uluy_c/mIm8h4fhPpN091w15pIwkzhpv41XFK2S/10)

name: AOC
subject: Bring it on.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
I will not leave an unfair world behind.
#
We have inherited an unfair world.
We have inherited a world where prior generations of leadership have set the table so that companies get richer and richer, and people's incomes stay the same or get even lower.
**I refuse to leave an unfair world to generations to come**.
_We_ will make sure that we leave a different world. One where people can work 40 hours a week, put food on the table, afford their housing, and live a decent life.
And if people want to call me “extreme” for believing that? **Bring it on**.
If you want to call me “extreme” for thinking any person should have rights over their body? **Bring it on**.
If you want to call me “extreme” for acknowledging the Congressional Budget Office assessment that immigrants brought in trillions of dollars in U.S. revenue and paid more taxes than Elon Musk or these other folks? **Bring it on**.
**We have nothing to fear**. There is nothing to fear in moving forward into a better future.
Our work must begin _now_ if we are to prevent the country from becoming a slush fund for Donald Trump and Elon Musk.
[Help power our town halls on the road, doing this complicated but essential work, by making a grassroots donation today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250620.4XmmOj&refcode=em20250620-9134-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9134%2E2526796%2E1OadZx)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250620.4XmmOj&refcode=em20250620-9134-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=9134%2E2526796%2E1OadZx)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250620?refcode=em20250620-9134-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=21&refcode2=9134_2526796_1OadZx&akid=9134%2E2526796%2E1OadZx)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250620-9134-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&akid=9134%2E2526796%2E1OadZx)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=9134%2E2526796%2E1OadZx) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=9134%2E2526796%2E1OadZx) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=9134%2E2526796%2E1OadZx)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=26&akid=9134%2E2526796%2E1OadZx)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=9134%2E2526796%2E1OadZx)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Our right to protest
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250620-1387-foote&t=1001&akid=1387%2E342411%2E-PqxZy ]Squad Victory Fund

Our First Amendment rights are under attack,
Peter.

Across the country, communities are courageously taking to the streets to
peacefully protest Trump's cruel anti-immigrant agenda. We are making it
clear: ICE has no place in our communities, and Trump must end the mass
deportations.

Trump’s response? Violence and intimidation. He’s called in the National
Guard and even deployed hundreds of Marines on American soil to silence
our voices.

Trump is willing to trample the Constitution to advance his hateful and
extreme agenda.

Now more than ever, we have to protect our freedom of speech and stand up
to Trump’s authoritarianism. We have a right and a responsibility to call
out this administration and demand justice for our immigrant communities.

The Squad is unwaveringly committed to protecting that right in Congress.
That’s why Rep. Ilhan Omar just introduced legislation to make law
enforcement violence against protesters a federal crime.

[1]As 75 Democrats Vote to Praise ICE, Ilhan Omar Wants to Hold Police
Accountable for Protest Abuses

We refuse to let Trump intimidate us. We are going to keep calling out his
abuses of power – in Congress, in the streets, and within our communities
– to protect our rights and our neighbors.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250620-movement.Ft0URI&refcode=em20250620-1387&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1387%2E342411%2E-PqxZy ]But they can’t protect our fundamental rights alone. Chip in
$3 today to help them fight back against Trump and secure
our First Amendment rights.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250620-movement.Ft0URI&refcode=em20250620-1387&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1387%2E342411%2E-PqxZy ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1387%2E342411%2E-PqxZy

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

MAGA Rep. Max Miller has been caught LYING about an alleged roadrage incident involving a man he claims waved a Palestinian flag at him.
Now a man has been charged with "aggravated menacing" on nothing but Miller's word - which he contradicts in his official police statement vs his viral video.
Here's what he said in his viral video:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f08a7cbb-4436-45eb-866e-a52ab60f6a9d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

name: Kim Schrier
subject: I've been outspoken since the beginning. Now we're seeing why.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109963156/552810429/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2FhMmVlYi0xYjRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uLbI-xNZMt2paA5YgTDc68lAGeBQIba-mjdhcZF4aV8=&emci=99cefadc-eb4d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=23aa2eeb-1b4e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

I want to take a moment to talk with you—not to ask for anything, but to share something that’s weighing heavily on me as a doctor, a mom, and your representative.

You may have seen the news: **Robert F. Kennedy Jr. removed all 17 members of the CDC’s vaccine advisory committee. These are experts whose job is to evaluate the safety and effectiveness of vaccines that protect millions of Americans and decide, based on the evidence, which ones to recommend and for whom.** They do this transparently—so the public can hear their deliberations—and with scientific integrity.

In their place, he appointed eight new members, many of whom rose to prominence not through medical leadership, but through spreading vaccine skepticism during the COVID-19 pandemic. These are people who elevated unfounded fears about life-saving mRNA vaccines, opposed school safety measures, and downplayed the very real toll of the virus, usually without any grounding in science or public health. To be clear, they are the fringe, not the mainstream, and now they are making decisions about which vaccines to recommend. Scared yet?

Peter, I’m a pediatrician, and I’ve taken care of tiny infants with pertussis who just stop breathing. The DTaP vaccine prevents this. I’ve done lots of spinal taps to rule out meningitis in babies. (Pneumococcal and HIB vaccines have dramatically reduced illness, disability, and death from meningitis.) I’ve had healthy patients hospitalized for flu and RSV.

I ran for Congress because I saw firsthand how political decisions were putting my patients at risk. But I never imagined just how bad things could get—with our institutions under threat, and with the Department of Health and Human Services used as a platform for extreme ideologies.

**This is dangerous.** Scaring parents from immunizing their children, against mountains of evidence that vaccines are safe and effective, isn’t just a political talking point, it's leading to declines in childhood vaccinations, and outbreaks of measles and other diseases we thought we had beaten. It is also putting our most vulnerable _—newborns, the elderly, immunocompromised people—directly at risk._

I’ve been calling out RFK Jr.’s BS from the beginning because I knew he was not qualified to make these kinds of decisions. I spoke with senators before his confirmation vote and pleaded with them to not confirm him as HHS secretary. But they did. And now he's proving exactly what we expected—he’s making public health decisions based on ideology, not science. He’s packing committees with fellow vaccine deniers. He’s pandering to the fringe wellness industry and getting rich by peddling unproven remedies. This endangers public health.

I’ll keep fighting in Congress to make sure decisions about your health are based on facts, not fear, and on data, not denial.

And, as always, _I’ll keep standing on the side of science, truth, and the health of our families._

Thank you for standing with me.

Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109963157/552810430/-1978405529?refcode=em25_250620_vaccin_enask_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250620_vaccin_enask_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=23aa2eeb-1b4e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2FhMmVlYi0xYjRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uLbI-xNZMt2paA5YgTDc68lAGeBQIba-mjdhcZF4aV8=)

name: George Whitesides
subject: Let’s shock the GOP establishment again.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109963205/552810619/1606932672?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTdjYWU3Mi0xYzRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sAAwfBtcMxj1NeC7gzmvZLy77dHelzlTIXqf8Y1hI48=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109963206/552810620/1606932672?refcode=em-6.20.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTdjYWU3Mi0xYzRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sAAwfBtcMxj1NeC7gzmvZLy77dHelzlTIXqf8Y1hI48=)

I’m glad I caught you before the weekend, Peter.

I know you’re receiving a lot of messages from candidates about the upcoming end-of-quarter deadline. Before I ask you to **[chip in $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109963207/552810621/1606932672?refcode=em-6.20.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTdjYWU3Mi0xYzRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sAAwfBtcMxj1NeC7gzmvZLy77dHelzlTIXqf8Y1hI48=)** today, I want to share more about why I’m in this fight.

Unlike many in Congress, I’m not a career politician. I didn’t think running for office was in the cards for me.

But when I witnessed our representatives disregard our community in favor of the MAGA agenda, I knew I had to step up.

**With support from people like you, I shocked the GOP establishment and defeated the last Republican representing Los Angeles County in Congress.**

Now, the Republicans’ majority is hanging by a thread. Only three seats separate control, which is why they’re going after first-term incumbents like me who flipped red seats.

I’m facing early attacks in a coordinated effort to flip CA-27 back to red, but I’m not backing down. I’m proud to be in this fight for the Antelope, Santa Clarita, and San Fernando Valleys, but being in Congress leaves much less time to raise the funds we need to hold this seat.

That’s why I’m asking:

**[Will you chip in $3, or any amount you’re comfortable with today, toward my end-of-quarter goal? All eyes will be on our FEC report to see if we have the grassroots strength to win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109963208/552810622/1606932672?refcode=em-6.20.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTdjYWU3Mi0xYzRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sAAwfBtcMxj1NeC7gzmvZLy77dHelzlTIXqf8Y1hI48=)**

clean_body: | = = I’m glad I caught you before the weekend, Peter. I know you’re receiving a lot of messages from candidates about the upcoming end-of-quarter deadline. Before I ask you to = today, I want to share more about why I’m in this fight. Unlike many in Congress, I’m not a career politician. I didn’t think running for office was in the cards for me. But when I witnessed our representatives disregard our community in favor of the MAGA agenda, I knew I had to step up. With support from people like you, I shocked the GOP establishment and defeated the last Republican representing Los Angeles County in Congress. Now, the Republicans’ majority is hanging by a thread. Only three seats separate control, which is why they’re going after first-term incumbents like me who flipped red seats. I’m facing early attacks in a coordinated effort to flip CA-27 back to red, but I’m not backing down. I’m proud to be in this fight for the Antelope, Santa Clarita, and San Fernando Valleys, but being in Congress leaves much less time to raise the funds we need to hold this seat. That’s why I’m asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, GW | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States

body:
| | | Hey team, it's Pat, the DSCC's Research Director -- and I need _your_ help.

From threatening to kick MILLIONS off their health care to _attacking_ our voting rights, Trump has proven that **nothing is off limits from his MAGA power grab.**

Nothing would make him happier than to see Democrats tuning out and falling silent. That's why **I've launched an URGENT Trump Approval Tracker to _prove_ that in every corner of the country, Americans are denouncing this administration!**

But I just checked my records and **your response is _MISSING_** \-- and without you, my data will be _incomplete_! **So please, confirm before midnight:**

Sen. John Kennedy **[fired back at woke Sen. Alex Padilla](https://substack.com/redirect/298e6339-b7e7-4a34-ae76-a890c5b7f97d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during a tense hearing on illegal immigration.
"Illegal immigration is illegal, duh..."
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/298e6339-b7e7-4a34-ae76-a890c5b7f97d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/298e6339-b7e7-4a34-ae76-a890c5b7f97d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Look, I think we all agree that we should target all violent criminals whether they're immigrants or not immigrants," Padilla said. "But here's an inconvenient truth for many, it's that immigrants documented and undocumented are critical to the success of our economy! Because the percentage of immigrants who are violent criminals are a very small percentage!"
**[Kennedy waited his turn, before returning fire](https://substack.com/redirect/298e6339-b7e7-4a34-ae76-a890c5b7f97d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , "I don't know how many foreign nationals came into our country illegally under President Biden; 8 million, 10 million, 12 million, I do know that it was a lot,... we probably added about 4 Nebraskas to the United States."
"Most Americans don't support illegal immigration, they think illegal immigration is illegal, duh... It doesn't make them racist, they look at the border like they look at the front door of their home. Most Americans lock their door at night. They don't do that because they hate everyone on the outside, they do it because they love everyone on the inside!"
Watch the tense showdown here:
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/298e6339-b7e7-4a34-ae76-a890c5b7f97d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# **[Trump's Push For America First](https://substack.com/redirect/0d628fca-96cd-4eb6-82f3-287323952ef0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0d628fca-96cd-4eb6-82f3-287323952ef0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
What we are seeing right now is truly historic.
President Trump has been pushing the limits on what is possible. I haven't seen anything like this since President Ronald Reagan.
But with this unbelievable push for an American First agenda, comes a few problems. Well, as President Trump said in a recent interview I had with him...
"There could be a little disruption. What we're doing is building a foundation for the future."
If you want to learn more about **[Trump's Great American Reset](https://substack.com/redirect/0d628fca-96cd-4eb6-82f3-287323952ef0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**, go ahead read this **[great article](https://substack.com/redirect/0d628fca-96cd-4eb6-82f3-287323952ef0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that just went up. It's filled with some valuable information about what's in store for America, and what we could potentially be up against.
**[Read The Great American Reset now.](https://substack.com/redirect/0d628fca-96cd-4eb6-82f3-287323952ef0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Yours Truly,
**SEAN HANNITY**

# Brave "detransitioner" rallies against trans surgeries for children, applauds crucial SCOTUS decision
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/222e6a3f-3aa6-42cf-887e-73a63eb2ce55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Chloe Cole, a detransitioner and outspoken advocate against transgender surgeries for children, **[applauded the Supreme Court's review of Tennessee's gender-care ban](https://substack.com/redirect/222e6a3f-3aa6-42cf-887e-73a63eb2ce55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**, saying if such a prohibition had been federal law during her childhood, she never would have undergone puberty blockers, hormones or a double mastectomy.
* **She told The Daily Wire the case matters deeply to her**, arguing a national ban could have spared her and her family years of abuse and harmful medical advice.
* **Cole spoke at a rally outside the Supreme Court as arguments in U.S. v. Skrmetti began** , aligning with Tennessee in asserting such laws protect children from irreversible treatments.
* She said in her speech:
> _" I'm somebody who went through this as a child, and I've seen just how absolutely horrific it is not to just go through the trend, the process of a medical transition, but to do so while you're still developing. I was put on puberty blockers, a chemical castration drug to stop my puberty, and weekly testosterone injections at the age of 13. And at 15 years old, I underwent an irreversible surgery to remove my breasts. Absolutely no child should ever be given the chance to go through any of this because it is abusive, it's detrimental to their development, and they deserve better."_
* **She emphasized parental manipulation by gender-care professionals** and the dangers around these invasive procedures, with things like puberty blockers and cross-sex hormones posing dangers to bone growth, voice damage, and infertility.

* * *
# Attacks on I.C.E. officers increased 500%: report
Reports of I.C.E agent assaults have sky-rocketed 500%, **[according to DHS data.](https://substack.com/redirect/7d823015-2369-4f8d-bdaf-e05eb59e7997?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* **Attacks Increased:** U.S. Department of Homeland Security reports a 500% surge in assaults on I.C.E agents, with personnel facing attacks while conducting arrests nationwide. The data came after anti-I.C.E rioters attacked an I.C.E facility in Portland last week, among many recent protests of a similar nature, most notably in LA, spanning nationwide.
* **DHS Assistant Secretary Tricia McLaughlin[told The Daily Wire ](https://substack.com/redirect/02dbab75-cf45-45f1-a53e-56afa28459c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**that I.C.E agents "put their lives on the line to protect and defend the lives of American citizens" and blamed Democrat leaders for contributing to the violence. Her statement comes after Democrats like Nashville Mayor Freddie O'Connell reportedly doxxed several I.C.E agents, putting them on the chopping block of angry protesters.
* **There is now an ongoing battle** between federal agents and Democratic leaders, with leaders like McLaughlin insisting that "there will be repercussions" for those who protect illegal immigrants and promote violence against law enforcement.

* * *
# Gavin Newsom is so scared of the woke mob he can't even call his wife a woman...
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/037b033c-dff1-485a-8168-2096c16580a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
California Gov. Gavin Newsom **[drew a lot of criticism](https://substack.com/redirect/02dbab75-cf45-45f1-a53e-56afa28459c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for referring to his wife as "First Partner" instead of "wife" or "First Lady" in a birthday post, prompting backlash on social media.
* **Critics, including Riley Gaines,** flocked to social media**** in disbelief at the severity of the woke terminology and excessive political correctness.
_" I can't even fathom my husband unironically calling me his partner????"_ Gaines wrote.
* **The term "First Partner" is not new**, as Newsom's wife, Jennifer Siebel Newsom, has used it officially for several years to promote gender inclusivity.
* **In an official statement** on the governor's website, Newsom's "partner" Jennifer weighed in. "Jennifer Siebel Newsom chose the title First Partner, as opposed to the traditional title of First Lady, to send a signal of inclusivity, recognizing that one day there will be a woman or LGBTQ+ Governor of California, and to elevate the importance of partnership and the need for, and benefits of, a caring, inclusive government."

| | POLL

clean_body: Hi, friend – it’s Haley Stevens, and I have a concerning update to share: The Hill just listed Michigan as one of the top five Senate seats most likely to flip in 2026. | = Hi, friend – it’s Haley Stevens, and I have a concerning update to share: The Hill just listed Michigan as one of the top five Senate seats most likely to flip in 2026. We were already a top target for the GOP, and this all but guarantees Republicans will be spending tens of millions of dollars to try and buy this seat. I'm reaching out personally because I need your help to fight back: = | = Here’s the good news: A recent poll showed me as the only Democrat likely to defeat Trump’s handpicked candidate Mike Rogers – the same Republican who benefited from the GOP’s $80 million war chest last year. Make no mistake, this race will be extremely close, and the Senate majority will likely run through Michigan. That’s why we can’t afford to sit back, friend. I’ve been a fighter my entire life. In 2018, I flipped a red district blue and helped take back the House. And now? I’m ready to keep standing up for every Michigander concerned about rising costs, erratic tariffs, and cuts to programs that working families have paid into their entire lives. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for being on this team. clean_body: Defend the Postal Service and protect mail-in voting >> | = We reached out last week because Donald Trump is once again pushing efforts to sabotage and privatize the USPS. This is yet another attack on a government service that millions of Americans rely on. We know you care deeply about protecting democracy and ensuring every American has access to trusted, secure mail-in voting – which is why we’re following up to give you another chance to complete our survey. | | Thank you for speaking up! New Dems FWD: \--------------------------- Trump is sabotaging the USPS as part of his scheme to privatize it – threatening American’s access to mail-in voting! Trump's administration changes are already making the USPS struggle to deliver the mail on time. Americans who rely on the USPS for their medications, bills, and even the tens of millions of voters who used it last year are now at risk of losing this critical service! | New Dems | | Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund www.newdemactionfund.com Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 910 17th St NW Suite 1050, Washington, DC 20006 In 2022, NewDems flipped more competitive seats from red-to-blue than any other ideological caucus. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Be real
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We’ve got a lot to do before 2026 if we’re going to check Trump’s power. And we NEED to check Trump’s power. Just look around.
#

Peter, I need to be real with you for a minute.
I won my campaign for senate thanks to the support of literally hundreds of thousands of people.
Now, I’m working to gear up. We’ve got a lot to do before 2026 if we’re going to check Trump’s power. And we NEED to check Trump’s power. Just look around.
But even for me, it takes a lot of resources to do that work. I’m going everywhere people need me, and I’m doing tons of media — podcasts, radio, influencers, magazines, newspapers, cable news. I’m showing up for candidates who need help, and I’m using my voice to pick fights we need to win.
None of that comes cheap. And we’re burning through resources faster than we’re raising them right now.
So, to help me keep this up, I’m hoping you’ll consider chipping in.
[**Please, make an $5 donation and help us show the entire country the strength of this team ahead of our FEC deadline on June 30th.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june25.8rdpPa&refcode=em250620-1-noimage&t=30&akid=3895%2E734936%2E_5PMCE)

subject: Venue Correction: Please Support WAGOP State Senate Candidates Chad Magendanz and Michelle Caldier
body:
Please Support WAGOP State Senate Candidates Chad Magendanz and Michelle Caldier (06.19.25) | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/wsrp/please-support-wagops-election-integrity-efforts-2699179?e=6a281f566d)

| | **Please Support WAGOP Candidates
Chad Magendanz (LD 5) and Michelle Caldier (LD 26) for State Senate**
**Bellevue** —Please turn out to support WAGOP candidates for state senate Chad Magendanz (LD 5) and Michelle Caldier (LD 26) at two separate, but equally notable events, ahead of the August Primary.

**On Saturday, June 21** , volunteers are asked to arrive at Summit Park in MAPLE VALLEY, WA, at 11 a.m. to support [Chad Magendanz](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=06fe703524&e=6a281f566d) in his bid for WA State Senate to represent LD 5. [Please see flyer](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=9a4818224f&e=6a281f566d).

**Next, Friday, June 27** , supporters are invited to attend a fundraising reception for [Michelle Caldier](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=49a3e49bd2&e=6a281f566d), who is running to clinch the WA State Senate seat representing LD 26. [Please see event flyer](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=bb79257e42&e=6a281f566d).

Both WA State Senate seats are critical to ending the Democrats’ supermajority in Olympia.

Hope to see you there. Thank you.

Best,

WAGOP Executive Director
Matthew Frohlich

President Trump has opened up a 2 week negotiation window for Iran. The hope is Iran will relent on their hardline position and agree to terms previously rejected. Top officials in Iran say there is "no room for talking" until Israel stops its attack. President Trump is trying to prevent war and U.S. involvement in Iran while emphatically maintaining Iran cannot have a nuclear bomb. In May 2024, there were around 64,000 illegal aliens released into our country. As of May 2025, that number is zero. This is what leadership looks like. The U.S. Navy has hit its recruiting goal for the third straight month, showing a new sense of moral and desire to serve the country. Former National Security Advisor Robert O'Brien joins me to discuss everything going on with Iran. It was President Biden who paid Iran $6 Billion for three hostages in September, it was only 3 weeks later that Hamas attacked Israel on October 7th. Israel has options to destroy the remaining nuclear sites in Iran but delivering a bunker buster bomb by a U.S. B2 or B52 is still the most effective way. Ambassador O'Brien takes us inside the situation room to give us first hand insight into how information is delivered to the president and how decisions are made.
Featuring:
**Ambassador Robert O'Brien**
Former National Security Advisor | Trump 45

name: Brent Hennrich
subject: Marie won’t stand up to Trump’s war games. I will.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington
body:
| | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMU_BeZcmRBr16dPjlrMKhhjiC51ataw3Peft1wIO87ITuWJ5QWjVHXUEZstLq4wB9KngBJRb5nVTYRC7_0X2LXrLDovg6HZWNAn9cCT753PS-_WU86drnXRN6VPkP_ZRosJG4XH1V-ERLojhx6k4gtjdX5eds19o_k32L-uqtxsIEcSwS0xZN-C1cBbjJoqszFlKRhyRiz8SmdbHvQO2DV4chyc6uX5irTcpKa9zNStURlC6B03op2v-egVYsOz6Taq2T0TtTCUCoyy6VjeBoms/4hi/ut_QKhQ7S32ywTjy9LYbZw/h0/h001.wa6VJJ2un1-uzeHl7KC2FHc7p3RS-hPMNcRLW8BmnxA)
---
Peter,
I'm going to say something simple that shouldn't be controversial: **If the United States is going to war, it should be debated and voted on in Congress, not decided by Donald Trump in the middle of the night on social media.** That's what the bipartisan War Powers Resolution introduced by Rep. Thomas Massie and Rep. Ro Khanna is about. It reaffirms that Congress, not the President, has the constitutional authority to decide when we send Americans into combat. **My opponent, Marie Gluesenkamp Perez, hasn't co-sponsored it. She hasn 't even acknowledged it.** And I want to know why. How many consultant-approved games of _" four-dimensional chess"_ do you have to be playing to say you're a reasonable, level-headed Democrat, then refuse to support a bill that simply upholds the Constitution? And if you believe in common sense and the rule of law, there's nothing more common sense than preventing American involvement in another forever war in the Middle East - especially without congressional authority. This is just one more example in a long line of Marie's political calculations masquerading as "pragmatism." She talks like she's just doing what regular people want--but nobody is asking us to go to war with Iran. A new YouGov poll found only 16% of Americans support that path. Sixteen percent. I'm running because I believe in our Constitution. I'm running because there's no donation, no endorsement, and no D.C. invite worth trading away the lives of working-class kids who will be sent off to die in another endless, unaccountable war. And if our representatives won't draw the line, if they meet this moment with silence, then we need to replace them with leaders who speak up. [**If you believe Congress should decide when we send Americans to war, chip in now. This campaign is for the families who keep sacrificing, while the people in power keep playing games with their lives.**](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUCWGt-q79MfbVLoBvJCfIb9FfywWymnkQaahkXO9HV45F-kqalTmYpcmQ7wJLcAIc0eJx_1CANVXky_JbUs-6e_mCgbqoms1TwA-RtNjJZTS-WyBulzXkScPutqiVFQuTuMlExa4xAi5h4eHp3NyFQuSwUh-yGFM0ZbcYtrs6mmKc7_rljB8NtQPogpxo3utxDFSTxf5cx-s_XXbxtqTrxTqrQS1II6oVQo_pXN7Mjnw_41fs2rHcZG7Dlxy2oIdv9U7jevbAZTXYr5uzQc8GRqj9IdE0trPlEa6fYMwbayQf_9wySOIUbLlN6XeDvCVwfBFUNHPNNzZAtSQioyNaBf/4hi/ut_QKhQ7S32ywTjy9LYbZw/h1/h001.hcdi3FE4rdIpqU1c2WZmcD5RgC62WtzGGtZamNrmalc) Let's Heal Washington!

# [I Will Stand For Our Freedom](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=165903992&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1OTAzOTkyLCJpYXQiOjE3NTA0NTg1MDcsImV4cCI6MTc1MzA1MDUwNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.h3j5TQFGlvn9Uv3kp4NJOR3Ke8yv7Pps1uxr5GsQuaU)
### As authoritarianism rises at home, I pledge to defend your constitutional rights--because democracy only lives when the people demand it.
| | [Melissa Chaudhry](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---
| Jun 20
---
| [](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=165903992&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1OTAzOTkyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1MDQ1ODUwNywiZXhwIjoxNzUzMDUwNTA3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzI2MDExMSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.iiCaMDEDkAj17p4Mwb8itENu5ubepxGXXYfrCtjxAW0&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/melissa4congress/p/i-will-stand-for-our-freedom?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

There are moments when the political weather shifts.
We are living through such a moment now.
In the past week:
* The U.S. government issued a [series of executive orders](https://open.substack.com/pub/loricorbetmann/p/breaking-trump-signs-executive-orders?r=5qg18q&utm_medium=ios) opening our skies to expanded commercial and surveillance activity--further privatizing and militarizing the air above us.
* Another [executive order](https://open.substack.com/pub/loricorbetmann/p/breaking-while-we-watched-musk-and?r=5qg18q&utm_medium=ios) laid new groundwork for the internet to serve the interests of governments and corporations first--not the rights and voices of ordinary people.
* The National Guard was activated by the Federal government without the consent of their state governor and deployed against the American people for the first time since 1965.
* And in a shocking scene, a sitting U.S. senator, Alex Padilla, was violently arrested--for the simple act of asking a question of the Secretary of Homeland Security, in his own home city.

These are not disconnected events. They are signals.
We are entering a new and disquieting phase of American life--one in which the foundational rights of free speech, free press, free assembly, and free inquiry are increasingly treated as inconveniences to be managed, not as sacred principles to be upheld.
Let me be clear:
I stand for the Constitution of the United States.
I stand for the Bill of Rights.
I stand for a government that answers to _We the People_ , not the other way around.
Our campaign--and my presence in public life--is and will remain a safe space for our core freedoms.
When I was 12, I was the only kid in my sixth-grade class who could recite the First Amendment verbatim. The Universal Declaration of Human Rights hung on my bedroom wall--not because a teacher assigned it, but because I believed, even then, that human dignity and liberty must be known, named, and defended.
That belief has never left me.
Freedom of speech. Freedom of the press. Freedom of religion. Freedom of assembly.
These are not abstractions. They are the living heart of any true republic. Without them, democracy becomes a shell.
I will stand for these freedoms--and for the people's right to hold power accountable--every day that I serve.
* * *
Authoritarianism thrives on silence and self-censorship.
It counts on good people to grow weary, to turn inward, to stop raising questions.
We must not oblige.
I will champion the American republic that my father and husband were injured defending--not a hollowed-out shell of democracy, but the living, breathing, participatory ideal that so many generations have struggled to build and protect.
**This is not about left or right.**
This is about whether we still believe in the promise that this nation was meant to _serve its people_ --not surveil, silence, or control them.
It is up to us to make it so.

clean_body: As authoritarianism rises at home, I pledge to defend your constitutional rights--because democracy only lives when the people demand it. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? As authoritarianism rises at home, I pledge to defend your constitutional rights--because democracy only lives when the people demand it. | | | Jun 20 | | | | | | | | | | | | There are moments when the political weather shifts. We are living through such a moment now. In the past week: The U.S. government issued a opening our skies to expanded commercial and surveillance activity--further privatizing and militarizing the air above us. Another laid new groundwork for the internet to serve the interests of governments and corporations first--not the rights and voices of ordinary people. The National Guard was activated by the Federal government without the consent of their state governor and deployed against the American people for the first time since 1965. And in a shocking scene, a sitting U.S. senator, Alex Padilla, was violently arrested--for the simple act of asking a question of the Secretary of Homeland Security, in his own home city. These are not disconnected events. They are signals. We are entering a new and disquieting phase of American life--one in which the foundational rights of free speech, free press, free assembly, and free inquiry are increasingly treated as inconveniences to be managed, not as sacred principles to be upheld. Let me be clear: I stand for the Constitution of the United States. I stand for the Bill of Rights. I stand for a government that answers to We the People , not the other way around. Our campaign--and my presence in public life--is and will remain a safe space for our core freedoms. When I was 12, I was the only kid in my sixth-grade class who could recite the First Amendment verbatim. The Universal Declaration of Human Rights hung on my bedroom wall--not because a teacher assigned it, but because I believed, even then, that human dignity and liberty must be known, named, and defended. That belief has never left me. Freedom of speech. Freedom of the press. Freedom of religion. Freedom of assembly. These are not abstractions. They are the living heart of any true republic. Without them, democracy becomes a shell. I will stand for these freedoms--and for the people's right to hold power accountable--every day that I serve. Authoritarianism thrives on silence and self-censorship. It counts on good people to grow weary, to turn inward, to stop raising questions. We must not oblige. I will champion the American republic that my father and husband were injured defending--not a hollowed-out shell of democracy, but the living, breathing, participatory ideal that so many generations have struggled to build and protect. This is not about left or right.** This is about whether we still believe in the promise that this nation was meant to serve its people --not surveil, silence, or control them. It is up to us to make it so. ? #VoteMelissa4Congress #ItsAMatterOfIntegrity You 're currently a free subscriber to "It's a Matter of Integrity" by Melissa Chaudhry. To support the mission and access the full experience, upgrade your subscription. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Melissa Chaudhry 6727 Martin Luther King Jr Way S, Suite M, #1117 Seattle, WA 98118 ? ?

U.S. Sen. Katie Britt (R-Montgomery) wants Congress to hold members of President Joe Biden’s administration accountable for covering up the president’s mental and physical decline.

The Senate Judiciary Committee heard testimony from former first-term Trump administration officials during a hearing on Biden’s decline on Wednesday. Democrats are currently boycotting the proceedings.

S. Senator Katie Britt, R-Alabama, and U.S. Representatives Mike Rogers, R-Alabama, chairman of the House Armed Services Committee, and Dale Strong, R-Alabama, represented the Alabama delegation at the 55th edition of the Paris Air Show.

The Paris Air Show, organized by SIAE, a subsidiary of the French Aerospace Industries Association, showcases aerospace manufacturers and suppliers from Alabama and across the globe. Last year, exports of aerospace products and parts remained Alabama’s top category, totaling $13.7 billion. The industry supports more than 45,000 jobs and generates $6 billion in economic activity annually in the state, spanning over 300 aerospace companies.

Democrats are currently boycotting the proceedings. | | S. Senator Katie Britt, R-Alabama, and U.S. Representatives Mike Rogers, R-Alabama, chairman of the House Armed Services Committee, and Dale Strong, R-Alabama, represented the Alabama delegation at the 55th edition of the Paris Air Show. The Paris Air Show, organized by SIAE, a subsidiary of the French Aerospace Industries Association, showcases aerospace manufacturers and suppliers from Alabama and across the globe. Last year, exports of aerospace products and parts remained Alabama’s top category, totaling $13.7 billion. name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: They couldn’t cancel this...
body:
I’ve written a lot of messages to patriots like you over the years... but never one quite like this.

[Unsubscribe](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj205z0suhpvlioqy2d7sntn4t8uj3zbes7926ft60aaqvc3kpb107oj17sxzxr40x0eoh42e9dwyjlmenvt2&__stmp=sy6eih&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
\- This tour went somewhere no one thought we’d reach - The Left’s strongholds are crumbling - This generation is choosing freedom - The comeback is happening — and YOU made it possible - This wasn’t just noise... - Packed crowds. Roaring students. The Left? Speechless. - We’re beating the Left. On their turf.

| | | [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=clt64yr0wtsvu6ka1sqwx3e76pm1a72hr6wh1yns6rwok3ntgj30vnsjn8jrqv1zwv6n4jdmpogciaj25akw7fqxia9a890svzvibdbkp5w2xj8gv67vr509544ayiu31yg9jxusjmta6fv0ix02v1itmpz2kjv0911iu7gjci3mfd4w4x1kdk0o7e45jyu7t4253iug1hm0qr7mvx0fx4kpv9s7mh6zuwfm3phjd2t40slxu3oie0d1wb169ppc6h5ypngmspz&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sy6eih&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, I’ve written a lot of messages to patriots like you over the years... but never one quite like this. Because I’ve never had this much good news to share. And I’ve never felt this much urgency to say one thing: **THANK YOU.** I don’t know if you’ve ever felt something just... _shift..._ while it was happening... But this spring on the American Comeback Tour? **I did.** And if you were standing where I stood — listening to the crowd roar before I walked up to the “Prove Me Wrong” table at our Spring Finale at UC Riverside... You would’ve felt this generational shift in real time, too.
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=clt64yr0wtsvu6ka1sqwx3e76pm1a72hr82whbzyocm86p4l9f465yt18pnmatc142jsyapn1c8yxxpjnfosjkmx8pmr8r3axoignh0ydtu0u37tofwid50t6ufmyas46sq2gquin1d8nbfxhl5o78nilme1dnoav85gajbz79lqenx2xqslw10khomtqbzl27jog0b3v56av2zzjw30einkoqy89b2uodvelmk93yn3bt7cipk49yu1tjpvtzof5ytwrbpty5c&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sy6eih&__onlt=h)
---
You may have seen the photos from the tour... caught some of the videos... read about the chants of _“USA!”_ from students... But let me tell you exactly what happened this spring: **Patriots like you helped launch the most powerful Conservative campus tour in American history.** It was BOLD. It was LOUD. And it was PACKED... From beginning to end. **And the American Comeback Tour’s Spring FINALE was in a place no one thought we’d ever touch: California.** The same state where Leftist professors shut down free speech... where mobs scream in the faces of our students... where conservative ideas aren’t just unpopular — _they’re punishable offenses._ And yet... We filled the campus quad at UC Riverside. Students came early. Packed shoulder-to-shoulder. Ringing around the “Prove Me Wrong” tent to hear the truth. And when I walked on stage and said: “It’s okay to love America...” They ERUPTED.
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=clt64yr0wtsvu6ka1sqwx3e76pm1a72hr9wmbelev103qyksab5ndjt55tb5ksqqzyay4qlnc3yumtgetjcpa36ww2n68x6iz29djknn5frkq9646skm350b7jtiysq5n9jhd7vnaf0esy46hpmxhqdoa7j0vb6ofr9ehzwozzhuci1x27i0o41xuisehefczneww4hp0r3ozc41nv580zbv5ve98ukp6kmnh80ws653qtrimavnd891r5bibjni4pfuu2iadjk&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sy6eih&__onlt=h)
---
It wasn’t just another great tour stop... **It was a BREAKTHROUGH.** Because this wasn’t the first stop in California this spring — it was the fourth IN MAY and the SIXTH of the tour. And each one was just as powerful... This wasn’t just another campus tour. _It was a line in the sand._ And every single time, the story was the same: The Left tried to dismiss us, hurl their obscenities, or shut us down... The students showed up anyway. And the truth rang out louder than ever before. _But let’s back up for a moment..._ Because while the California finale may have been the last stop of the Spring, this all started months ago. **Back in January, when we were laying out the calendar... These were the goals: Go BIGGER. Go BOLDER. Go DEEPER into Leftist territory.** We wanted to hit not just the battleground states... Not just the safe “Red” states... _But the ones the Left claimed as their own._ And then? We wanted to plant our flag. And because of patriots like you — that’s exactly what we did. **Let me give you the big picture:** ✅ 21 American Comeback Tour stops ✅ Overflow crowds with thousands of students ✅ Deep “Blue” states seeing young people rising up ✅ The Left rattled by a movement of young people who are rejecting them... _wholesale._ Students who had never once heard a Conservative speak in person... _finally heard one._ Students who were afraid to wear a cross or sport an American flag... _were loud, proud, and unashamed to stand for God and their country._ Students who were told they were alone... _realized they were part of something BIGGER than they ever imagined._ There are too many great stories, moments and pictures to pack into this one message... **But just look at what we're accomplishing:**
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=clt64yr0wtsvu6ka1sqwx3e76pm1a72hrn20vinkbnbkyidk3x6tq8t92y318r2e76rdy5xoqt0plqnza24mq82vhdnj8dm4adybw1xlw5pimr4d04nzr50j9o6uy8o6s3taa0vd2wmoxuqdgdrhvx6ep51lo3013ypd2pr241dybsu3v1n147286sz4ohlu8rzem91ytb00epwqbu7r8r33kakm7og8150gd52hebl33ta1al4v8g01oq29k7ml355swsrhjbr&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sy6eih&__onlt=h)
---
_Friend, this is why we fight..._ Not just for campus speeches. Not just for questions from students. **But for a generation-wide cultural reset — playing out in real time, in real places, in the hearts of real students.** This is why the American Comeback Tour matters. And I hope you know:**It wouldn’t exist without patriots like****YOU****.** Your support — your prayers, your belief in our students, your generous gifts — made all of this possible. Patriots like you put us on the road. You brought us onto these campuses. You sent us to the students who needed to hear our America First message the most. **You weren’t just watching this tour... You were powering it.** Now, let me be totally honest: _We’re not done. Not even close._ The American Comeback Tour may have just ended for the spring... But this summer? We’re preparing for something even BIGGER. We’re already mapping out new stops in the fall. New states. New targets in Leftist territory to break through. We’re building a plan to take this movement to the next level — to complete the cultural shift that started on this tour. To reach more students. To change more hearts and minds. **And raise up the boldest, most unapologetic generation of freedom-loving Americans since the founding of this country.** _I’m going to need you fighting alongside me, Friend._ Because now that we’ve tasted victory... now that we’ve seen what’s possible... We can’t back down. Not now. _Not ever._ Let’s keep building. Let’s keep pushing. Let’s keep GOING. The American Comeback is well underway. Let’s make sure it keeps rolling strong. **I can’t say “thank you” enough to the patriots like you who’ve helped make Turning Point USA the force it is today.** **Together, we’re SAVING America... one student at a time.**
---
For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=clt64yr0wtsvu6ka1sqwx3e76pm1a72hrovcpla4hyrfh6xrut7z0vtolcsiupd5cc6j3i7p2gq9ameug6u74okv7soa8jpocslz64izktng6x3pfdb0d515mch4y0m7wj1twfw6snvicqbog5x57dy8226k4sfbpftb939dwrzca0kxlgc1im2gg0frfl59fvv00p7hkkiaj10e3t9ys6sadg4n66c2hndpz25759f2eti739bccrd19yqz6tm21itqyfl33t8&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sy6eih&__onlt=h)
---
**P.S.** I’ve been doing this for over a decade now, Friend... **_But I’ve never seen momentum like THIS._** These students are ready. They’re hungry for the truth and our ideas. This country is shifting — In a way you can genuinely FEEL. **And the Left is terrified.** You can see it in their mobs... The way they lash out at us and our students... But it’s not working anymore. **Because you and I are reaching the next generation — campus by campus, state by state, student by student.** **And that’s why I’m asking you to stand with us again today. Because every dollar you give today will be MATCHED.** That means your gift of $50 becomes $100... $100 becomes $200... And your impact? DOUBLED. _So, if you believe in this mission... If you’re proud of what we’re accomplishing... If you want to go even BIGGER this fall..._ Then this is your moment to step up and fuel what comes next. Let’s take the American Comeback Tour to every corner of this country when it returns this fall... Let’s train thousands of students this summer at our events to become the LEADERS we need for our America First movement... And let’s make sure the Left NEVER thinks they can own the hearts of America’s young people again. **[We’re not done. Let’s go DEFEAT the Left once and for all. clean_body: I’ve written a lot of messages to patriots like you over the years... but never one quite like this. \- This tour went somewhere no one thought we’d reach - The Left’s strongholds are crumbling - This generation is choosing freedom - The comeback is happening — and YOU made it possible - This wasn’t just noise... - Packed crowds. Roaring students. The Left? Speechless. - We’re beating the Left. On their turf. | | | Friend, I’ve written a lot of messages to patriots like you over the years... but never one quite like this. Because I’ve never had this much good news to share. And I’ve never felt this much urgency to say one thing: THANK YOU. I don’t know if you’ve ever felt something just... shift... while it was happening... But this spring on the American Comeback Tour? I did. And if you were standing where I stood — listening to the crowd roar before I walked up to the “Prove Me Wrong” table at our Spring Finale at UC Riverside... You would’ve felt this generational shift in real time, too. You may have seen the photos from the tour... caught some of the videos... read about the chants of “USA!” from students... But let me tell you exactly what happened this spring: Patriots like you helped launch the most powerful Conservative campus tour in American history. It was BOLD. It was LOUD. And it was PACKED... From beginning to end. And the American Comeback Tour’s Spring FINALE was in a place no one thought we’d ever touch: California. The same state where Leftist professors shut down free speech... where mobs scream in the faces of our students... where conservative ideas aren’t just unpopular — they’re punishable offenses. And yet... We filled the campus quad at UC Riverside. Students came early. Packed shoulder-to-shoulder. Ringing around the “Prove Me Wrong” tent to hear the truth. And when I walked on stage and said: “It’s okay to love America...” They ERUPTED. It wasn’t just another great tour stop... It was a BREAKTHROUGH. Because this wasn’t the first stop in California this spring — it was the fourth IN MAY and the SIXTH of the tour. And each one was just as powerful... This wasn’t just another campus tour. It was a line in the sand. And every single time, the story was the same: The Left tried to dismiss us, hurl their obscenities, or shut us down... The students showed up anyway. And the truth rang out louder than ever before. But let’s back up for a moment... Because while the California finale may have been the last stop of the Spring, this all started months ago. Back in January, when we were laying out the calendar... These were the goals: Go BIGGER. Go BOLDER. Go DEEPER into Leftist territory. We wanted to hit not just the battleground states... Not just the safe “Red” states... But the ones the Left claimed as their own. And then? We wanted to plant our flag. And because of patriots like you — that’s exactly what we did. Let me give you the big picture: ✅ 21 American Comeback Tour stops ✅ Overflow crowds with thousands of students ✅ Deep “Blue” states seeing young people rising up ✅ The Left rattled by a movement of young people who are rejecting them... wholesale. Students who had never once heard a Conservative speak in person... finally heard one. Students who were afraid to wear a cross or sport an American flag... were loud, proud, and unashamed to stand for God and their country. Students who were told they were alone... realized they were part of something BIGGER than they ever imagined. There are too many great stories, moments and pictures to pack into this one message... But just look at what we're accomplishing: Friend, this is why we fight... Not just for campus speeches. Not just for questions from students. But for a generation-wide cultural reset — playing out in real time, in real places, in the hearts of real students. This is why the American Comeback Tour matters. And I hope you know:It wouldn’t exist without patriots likeYOU. Your support — your prayers, your belief in our students, your generous gifts — made all of this possible. Patriots like you put us on the road. You brought us onto these campuses. You sent us to the students who needed to hear our America First message the most. You weren’t just watching this tour... You were powering it. Now, let me be totally honest: We’re not done. Not even close. The American Comeback Tour may have just ended for the spring... But this summer? We’re preparing for something even BIGGER. We’re already mapping out new stops in the fall. New states. New targets in Leftist territory to break through. We’re building a plan to take this movement to the next level — to complete the cultural shift that started on this tour. To reach more students. To change more hearts and minds. And raise up the boldest, most unapologetic generation of freedom-loving Americans since the founding of this country. I’m going to need you fighting alongside me, Friend. Because now that we’ve tasted victory... now that we’ve seen what’s possible... We can’t back down. Not now. Not ever. Let’s keep building. Let’s keep pushing. Let’s keep GOING. The American Comeback is well underway. Let’s make sure it keeps rolling strong. I can’t say “thank you” enough to the patriots like you who’ve helped make Turning Point USA the force it is today. Together, we’re SAVING America... one student at a time. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA P.S. I’ve been doing this for over a decade now, Friend... But I’ve never seen momentum like THIS. These students are ready. They’re hungry for the truth and our ideas. This country is shifting — In a way you can genuinely FEEL. And the Left is terrified. You can see it in their mobs... The way they lash out at us and our students... But it’s not working anymore. Because you and I are reaching the next generation — campus by campus, state by state, student by student. And that’s why I’m asking you to stand with us again today. Because every dollar you give today will be MATCHED. That means your gift of $50 becomes $100... $100 becomes $200... And your impact? DOUBLED. So, if you believe in this mission... If you’re proud of what we’re accomplishing... If you want to go even BIGGER this fall... Then this is your moment to step up and fuel what comes next. Let’s take the American Comeback Tour to every corner of this country when it returns this fall... Let’s train thousands of students this summer at our events to become the LEADERS we need for our America First movement... And let’s make sure the Left NEVER thinks they can own the hearts of America’s young people again. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 To Unsubscribe by email, please reply to this message with Unsubscribe as the Subject Line. .

name: Team Deb Haaland
subject: Help us build our Yard Sign Fund today! 🪧
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Our Yard Sign Fund is a great way for folks who don’t live in New Mexico to help us provide yard signs to in-state supporters.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=2723%2E400544%2ExdArO9)
You don’t have to live in New Mexico to make a real difference in this election.
**Team Deb just launched our NEW yard signs, and we’re counting on your support to help us get them to New Mexicans across the state early.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250620_yardsigns_na?amount=25&refcode=em20250620-2723&refcode2=2723_400544_xdArO9&akid=2723%2E400544%2ExdArO9)
Each sign is a billboard for Deb’s campaign that helps build local momentum and show undecided voters that Deb has serious grassroots support.
But printing and delivering thousands of signs to every corner of New Mexico takes serious resources, so we’re counting on your help to blanket the state this yard time season.
**That’s why we’re launching our Early Bird Yard Sign Fund right now. It’s a great way for folks who don’t live in New Mexico to help us provide yard signs to in-state supporters early on.**
**[Will you pitch in $25 — or anything you can — to help us build our Yard Sign Fund today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250620_yardsigns_na?amount=25&refcode=em20250620-2723&refcode2=2723_400544_xdArO9&akid=2723%2E400544%2ExdArO9)**
**[Donate $25 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250620_yardsigns_na?amount=25&refcode=em20250620-2723&refcode2=2723_400544_xdArO9&akid=2723%2E400544%2ExdArO9)**
The more signs we distribute, the more votes we can count on, and the more folks recognize Deb as the leader New Mexico needs.
Thank you for doing your part to support Deb’s campaign!
— Team Haaland
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250620-2&t=2&refcode2=2723_400544_xdArO9&akid=2723%2E400544%2ExdArO9)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=2723%2E400544%2ExdArO9)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=2723%2E400544%2ExdArO9)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

name: Jessica Mackler, EMILYs List
subject: This fight is full of highs and lows. But I never feel alone.
body:
Some days, this work breaks your heart. Other days, it lifts you up. But this community reminds me why we fight. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109965715/552818838/86887870?recurring=true&amount=15&refcode=WUEFE653_20250620_JMFOTL_PL_v1s2&sourceid=1056429&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2U0YWZkMC0yNjRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E9obBVXA1naK7MI8RBD9s9iEbf0wWO9LnVmwJuTSsBM=) Hi Peter,

Over the past two weeks, I've written statements I never imagined I'd have to write.

Some have been joyful — celebrating hard-fought wins and major milestones for Democratic pro-choice women. Others have been devastating — responding to heartbreaking news and deeply personal attacks on our rights, our candidates, and our communities.

These are the highs and lows of this fight. And through all of it, I've felt stronger knowing this movement — especially our Friends of the List community — is standing right alongside me.

I know it can feel like the ground is always shifting beneath us, but your support is what keeps us steady. You power our work in moments of crisis, and you help us plan, build, and win for the long haul.

That's why we set an ambitious goal: bring in **5,000 new Friends of the List** in one week. We're almost there, and every new recurring gift moves us closer to long-term strength.
****[**There are just a _few hours_ left to reach this ambitious goal. Will you help us get there by becoming a Friend of the List before midnight tonight?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109965721/552818844/86887870?recurring=true&amount=15&refcode=WUEFE653_20250620_JMFOTL_PL_v1s2&sourceid=1056429&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2U0YWZkMC0yNjRlLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E9obBVXA1naK7MI8RBD9s9iEbf0wWO9LnVmwJuTSsBM=)****

clean_body: Some days, this work breaks your heart. Other days, it lifts you up. But this community reminds me why we fight. | = Hi Peter, At EMILYs List, our Friends of the List don't just show up when it's easy — they sustain us through the hardest moments and the biggest opportunities. **= | = Over the past two weeks, I've written statements I never imagined I'd have to write. Some have been joyful — celebrating hard-fought wins and major milestones for Democratic pro-choice women. Others have been devastating — responding to heartbreaking news and deeply personal attacks on our rights, our candidates, and our communities. These are the highs and lows of this fight. And through all of it, I've felt stronger knowing this movement — especially our Friends of the List community — is standing right alongside me. I know it can feel like the ground is always shifting beneath us, but your support is what keeps us steady. You power our work in moments of crisis, and you help us plan, build, and win for the long haul. That's why we set an ambitious goal: bring in 5,000 new Friends of the List in one week. We're almost there, and every new recurring gift moves us closer to long-term strength. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Jessica Mackler (she/her/hers) President, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? | | Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m livid. I’m frustrated. I’m appalled. [**And if you feel the same way about what’s happening in California right now, then I need you to join my campaign.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=29fe7d011d774780b140be1679ceae2b&_e=dl9kvIT8cVzCqEfzL4POH51ozn05oZrtdBySLK_x38jbkPK0x_-BgPFDBKN1JUXv7H8eNzxMEho-Umj1SmfwR8cHbPJbM2XapUvCxkoqZBAwQl-0nW7I_Yp6xlFUiKUjl8dCDabyYf6WPuw0O_ynHtvHGr7t3FR3TYhHmpsoYo5glRptfRmofFcOFnYnrYa0v4Tnjjw8lHmqQwG0ZRmXKzUuHx5Ow-azGxSZpS2rdsCgTpnV5F5V5uHvGOZiQz4GubbzUoyN-2euXQ9klS_QE09hrd2ZFEJqnoW7MSSMzKyf_agwjmFR6sQx2dhvqviX1v06OSs5vNInGLf59HFIPEG7aE91cZ7A1fBGfTRhKBm-AZjSvnOr-Sr5mMkpMxUOwe9-68f01yn9IliZZaoTzeZBrWJGpluMDjKeGCK4J12XBjMHEKHofd_ssnGiHFxiGiAegZoYJzhg85MXhQLWDq6S9FLDfQp54VKiVBNvCry7Ym4TejCWBpGtnjgcrirFPxXawNFXH4-7b49MVDZ_lrJe4ACNf8LyyrPrSJABOuKORCIoYPofT0geg7-SEUJe84VY2wtEKktq640FfShO23Mkq09E2Cb2dlmZgvGVsPHnnC9oc--iAhpGibwrA409NWkBN6BggBGZhEk4vYKHOK72HmFxE15DELe6uoY-W3IAPT7DA2a1qwufAHGbjdLHTssnWT6w5JFOhkKEPOnf0jWf8hNE7YliDFmsqTVKrLG_Mc6Qv29McHuvjGb0Mc4x) Because after days of rioting, looting, chaos, and violence in Los Angeles, Governor Gavin Newsom finally addressed California and the nation in primetime. In a broadcast that—just like his term as Governor—was rife with technical difficulties, Newsom failed to explain anything and took no responsibility... **While Angelenos, Californians, and the nation watched, Newsom went on a deranged 8-minute rant, making excuses for violent rioters and looters, railing about saving our democracy, and calling Trump a tyrant.** You and I know the Truth: calling in the National Guard, restoring law and order, and protecting Los Angeles doesn’t make Trump a tyrant; it makes him the leader that California needs in this moment. The real tyrant is the man who has all but explicitly endorsed these riots for political gain...the man who shut down schools, small businesses, and churches for years...the most authoritarian governor in our nation. Yes, Gavin Newsom is the TYRANT. And this is all his fault. And if you and I don’t stand up and demand an end to 15 years of unchecked Democrat rule, then the tyranny will NOT end with Gavin Newsom leaving office in 2027.
