clean_body: I’m livid. I’m frustrated. I’m appalled.| | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m livid. I’m frustrated. I’m appalled. Because after days of rioting, looting, chaos, and violence in Los Angeles, Governor Gavin Newsom finally addressed California and the nation in primetime. In a broadcast that—just like his term as Governor—was rife with technical difficulties, Newsom failed to explain anything and took no responsibility... While Angelenos, Californians, and the nation watched, Newsom went on a deranged 8-minute rant, making excuses for violent rioters and looters, railing about saving our democracy, and calling Trump a tyrant. You and I know the Truth: calling in the National Guard, restoring law and order, and protecting Los Angeles doesn’t make Trump a tyrant; it makes him the leader that California needs in this moment. The real tyrant is the man who has all but explicitly endorsed these riots for political gain...the man who shut down schools, small businesses, and churches for years...the most authoritarian governor in our nation. Yes, Gavin Newsom is the TYRANT. And this is all his fault. And if you and I don’t stand up and demand an end to 15 years of unchecked Democrat rule, then the tyranny will NOT end with Gavin Newsom leaving office in 2027. The insanity, the riots, the radicalism won’t stop until it IS stopped. These L.A. riots were avoidable, and if I were Governor right now it would have been avoided. If we had proper leadership in this state, we would work WITH ICE and the Federal government to enforce immigration policy. We would have clamped down on the agitators IMMEDIATELY. Once you let a situation like this get out of control, it feeds on itself. Gavin Newsom knows this; but he let it happen anyway. He’s more focused on collecting sound bites for his foolish Presidential campaign than he is on keeping Californians safe. And as I said, the tyranny won’t end when he leaves office if we don’t demand real change. Would Kamala Harris handle this any better? Of course not! We need real leadership in California. That’s why I’m running for Governor. Friend, it’s not just the riots; EVERYTHING is falling apart all around us in this once great state. Crime is up. Homelessness is exploding. Public schools are failing. Housing is unaffordable. Businesses and families are fleeing. This election is our last best hope to save California. We can create a new era of bold, common-sense leadership that will make California Golden Again. So I'm calling on every proud patriot who wants to turn things around: Join me—and let's get to work. Steve Hilton Republican Candidate for Governor of California DONATE P.S. Our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is right around the corner. We need to put out a strong report to show the radical Democrats how powerful our movement to Make California Golden Again is. . **Even a small donation of $5 adds up if everyone chips in. | | | | | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026 FPPC ID#1480425 Please add mailto:info@stevehiltonforgovernor.com "info@stevegarvey.com" to your email contacts to make sure our updates are making it into your inbox. Peter, your contributions make a real difference in the work we’re doing to help create a truly representative democracy.
Thanks to supporters like you, this movement has helped:
* Expose and dismantle decades of gerrymandering efforts by Republicans in several states.
* Bring together a national fair maps movement that has led to dramatically fairer maps. The 2022 midterms were held under what _The_ _New York Times_ called _“the fairest House map of the last 40 years.”_
* Support in-state partners in map drawing and analysis, and call out partisan efforts to gerrymander by helping to build out the best-in-class mapping technology.
* Hold extreme Republicans accountable for attempts to undermine voting rights and dilute voters’ political power.

**As A.G. Holder said: “The threat to fair maps continues.”**
[**That’s why we’re asking you to make a contribution to the NDRC today — will you make a donation and continue building on the progress we’ve made in the fight for fair maps and a truly representative democracy?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109966518/552821523/-1156862612?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_AGQuote_email_20250620-NDRC-Tier1-AGQuote-NOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250620-NDRC-Tier1-AGQuote-NOR_&utm_campaign=AGQuote&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk1Zjc5NDkzLTJhNGUtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=C2OTeRlicFWocdSpJTs8jpwmfGSIuZKghhfGdTCneq8=)

We get it, Peter — all of us have specific issues that we care about.
Whether you’re focused on reproductive rights, climate change, or protecting the right to vote, the future of every issue that impacts our day-to-day lives depends on one big thing — whether lawmakers represent the people they serve.
We can build a democracy that’s truly representative — where voters pick their leaders and not the other way around.
[**Together, let’s build a stronger, fairer democracy that truly works for the people.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109966525/552821530/-1156862612?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_AGQuote_email_20250620-NDRC-Tier1-AGQuote-NOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250620-NDRC-Tier1-AGQuote-NOR_&utm_campaign=AGQuote&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk1Zjc5NDkzLTJhNGUtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=C2OTeRlicFWocdSpJTs8jpwmfGSIuZKghhfGdTCneq8=)

clean_body: Here’s why we’re asking you to contribute to the NDRC today: | | = Peter, your contributions make a real difference in the work we’re doing to help create a truly representative democracy. Thanks to supporters like you, this movement has helped: Expose and dismantle decades of gerrymandering efforts by Republicans in several states. Bring together a national fair maps movement that has led to dramatically fairer maps. The 2022 midterms were held under what The New York Times called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.” Support in-state partners in map drawing and analysis, and call out partisan efforts to gerrymander by helping to build out the best-in-class mapping technology. Hold extreme Republicans accountable for attempts to undermine voting rights and dilute voters’ political power. As A.G. Holder said: “The threat to fair maps continues.” = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = We get it, Peter — all of us have specific issues that we care about. Whether you’re focused on reproductive rights, climate change, or protecting the right to vote, the future of every issue that impacts our day-to-day lives depends on one big thing — whether lawmakers represent the people they serve. We can build a democracy that’s truly representative — where voters pick their leaders and not the other way around. = Thanks for your support, The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. name: GOTV PAC
subject: Trump is coming for your health care… again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25]
Peter,
Trump and his MAGA enablers in Congress are once again trying to gut Medicaid, even though millions of their own voters rely on it to survive.
We wish we were kidding, but the House GOP recently passed Trump's "One Big Beautiful Bill," slashing Medicaid in ways that the Congressional Budget Office says will rip health coverage away from 7.8 million Americans .
Even insurrectionist fanboy Josh Hawley — yes, that Josh Hawley — tried to warn them: "Our voters support social insurance programs." But the Republican Party doesn't listen to working people anymore — they listen to billionaires, lobbyists, and the Heritage Foundation.
Here's the truth: These cuts would hit hardest in the exact counties where Trump made his biggest gains — places where 1 in 4 residents are on Medicaid, and that includes districts we need to win back if we're going to take back the House in 2026.
That's where GOTV PAC comes in.
We're already deep in the fight in places like Virginia , where we're supporting grassroots Democrats running to hold the House of Delegates this November and give the entire country the first indication of how voters REALLY feel about Trump's agenda.
But we can't hold the line if we fall short on fundraising. Will you chip in $15 or more today to help us defeat Trump's Medicaid-slashing majority and build progressive power in Virginia and beyond? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email06202025&amount=25]

* * *
Friend, this is urgent: The DOJ just formally demanded that Colorado Secretary of State Jena Griswold hand over every record from the 2024 federal election and retain all remaining data from 2020 — enough files to fill Mile High Stadium. **Let us be clear: this is a fishing expedition aimed at stirring doubt, spreading disinformation, and intimidating election officials.** And folks, this is just the tip of the iceberg. Similar DOJ demands have been sent to states like North Carolina, Arizona, and Oregon, all under the guise of Trump’s executive order. The DOJ is using its power to undermine democracy, not protect it – and that’s exactly why Democratic Secretaries of State matter. When federal agencies turn authoritarian, these state officials are the last line of defense: they protect voter rolls, uphold fair rules, and stand up under pressure. name: 2025 Voter Verification Notice
subject: Only *ONE NUMBER* is acceptable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:

name: David Hogg
subject: No war with Iran (sign the petition)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Let’s be loud enough that they can’t ignore us.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250620-1&t=1&akid=2281%2E587540%2EkSwj-4)
Peter, let me say this as clearly as I can:
**Any Democrat who supports war with Iran needs to be primaried. Period.**
We’re done playing nice while politicians sell out our future and put our lives at risk. We grew up with two disastrous wars that drained trillions of dollars, killed hundreds of thousands, and left our generation traumatized. Now they want to do it all over again?
No. **We are _not_ going back.**
We’ve seen too many Democrats hedging — or worse, openly signaling support for a Trump-backed war with Iran. **So today, I’m asking folks like you to stand with me and make this personal for every elected Democrat even thinking about backing this war:**
**[Add your name to the petition and pledge to support primary challenges for every Democrat who supports war with Iran. Let’s be loud enough that they can’t ignore us.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/sign/em_ms_lwd_20250620_1_iran_pt?source=em20250620-2281&akid=2281%2E587540%2EkSwj-4)**
**[Add your name »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/sign/em_ms_lwd_20250620_1_iran_pt?source=em20250620-2281&akid=2281%2E587540%2EkSwj-4)**
We’ve heard all the talk about “ending forever wars.” But now, when it matters most, some Democrats are folding — and sounding more like Trump than true leaders. If they’re willing to spend trillions to bomb another country, but won’t lift a finger to guarantee healthcare, housing, or education for the American people — they don’t belong in office.
**That’s why I co-founded Leaders We Deserve.** We’re not just fighting Republicans — we’re holding every failed politician accountable. We’re recruiting and electing young, unapologetically progressive candidates who won’t rubber-stamp the next endless war. And _we’re building a deep well of grassroots power_ to challenge anyone who does.
This pledge is just the beginning. But it’s how we show them we’re serious. That we’ve had enough. That we’re ready for a better future — one that invests in people, not war.
**[Add your name now: Any Democrat who supports war with Iran must face a primary.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/sign/em_ms_lwd_20250620_1_iran_pt?source=em20250620-2281&akid=2281%2E587540%2EkSwj-4)**
**[Add your name »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/sign/em_ms_lwd_20250620_1_iran_pt?source=em20250620-2281&akid=2281%2E587540%2EkSwj-4)**
In solidarity,
David
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250620-1&t=2&refcode2=2281_587540_kSwj-4&akid=2281%2E587540%2EkSwj-4)**

name: Senator Tom Cotton
subject: China has access to our military bases
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
Will you join our mission and stand up to China?

|
---

Patriot - there's a national security threat hiding in plain sight.

This is Senator Tom Cotton. I wanted to talk with you about the fact that the Chinese Communist Party owns and operates more than 80 stores on our most sensitive military installations.

My friend, former Green Beret, and strong conservative Pat Harrigan (R-NC 10) is fighting with me to stop this insanity.

But Pat and I need reinforcements to stand up to China and spread this message far and wide across our country so everyone knows what's at stake.

Patriot, **[in the next 30 minutes will you please add your signature to our Stand Up to China Petition?](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=19c17f0e181940f4a0e556b1a810d447&_e=uFWicRKbMuUZWiwatWRktcGjtn5YsKSQTAqbMskn5x49bOsQP-XfU8SqsylMgQdBrmvwYCcGWOZxSiUs-pIo6TThNzjQK-wzSxRP0lzmm_Px9Zb6s8ev9nDHwWXwyI54fn1v8vNmKf21iIHn9UbN6Oz42TK23Hs5JbgnyEE6kQnWJZl-LafAnCIHkshaHg5xrbzZYTFyHWsIBtUyA_EDohZmGdEF1mWHg8ZTgGKDqkHOl0RnhmvA0SW_IY8sGFANCJyNkoJAd73XSU0KXctpPUkdJo4ipdhdGd45KwShPBG9lFkkH7xPeS3lnnBl5ZNxDOXp5O1NKp5BJnQ0-zMA4kk8wQ3TqOBHP_s8u-YjTIB0bWcTZR6Ggn4kmFCuQgB5am9lkAj4t6pla8UHItwy1RzbKff60FtQnBfr0QWPFxAwwbB7ago3JZy4DPeYIfWFpPe27XoAuGQumTvWN_XAzy2Qe0zHht2mpN9GXood4rWOwhEa1eCtJhchYcqRi_GYJluUt7kyAu5UfSXfgTXHwTHkPjuP8gJpJQmjMt5U8T8%3D)**

### **Hi I 'm Kristi, I'm Committing A War Crime For A Photo Op**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/15940ba0-99a1-4fb0-bf22-59bd03708a44?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
###### **Article 14 of the Geneva Convention** "precludes any treatment during detention that humiliates prisoners"
`Full Blue Amp ACCESS For Just $1.32/Week!`
_**To get Truth corporate media ignores. From a former Biden ad guy & former Emmy-winning MSNBC anchor who know how DC works & Tell You What's Really Going On**_
_**Amplify Good. Support Indy Media!**_
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.dcWHv7BF4lIsRfny1W13l-P1Bo4hMRyKafmzvniTq8M?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=166401433)
I feel like murdering the 14-month old puppy in a gravel pit for "misbehaving" really should've been a sign Kristi Noem shouldn't run Homeland Security. Killing animals _is_ one way method therapists use to determine sociopathy in children, you know.
Yet, Noem is--in theory--an adult. Sure, one whose face seems like a Superfund site for an outbreak of botulism. And who seemingly tried to infect us all with COVID by removing all coronavirus restrictions at the Sturgis motorcycle rally in South Dakota during the height its spread (annnd..it shockingly became a super-spreader event).
In Noem's defense, Norman Bates said, "It's not like my mother is a maniac or a raving thing. She just goes a little mad sometimes. We all go a little mad sometimes. Haven't you?" Ok, that was a bad example. How about "all work and no play makes Jack a dull boy?" Yeah, that also...doesn't help.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d5e55b99-67d4-44df-9987-6812a568226b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Well, in any case, welcome to Kristi Noem's America--where the Department of Homeland Security is no longer about protecting Americans from threats, but actually _posing_ the biggest threat! DHS is turning the whole damn country into a boot camp of [cruelty, criminality and constant attacks on the U.S. Constitution](https://substack.com/redirect/e104d387-46f2-4f86-8267-768981bff946?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Let's go back to the adorable little dog she killed for a second. Noem didn't just execute her dog. She bragged about it. In her book. As a leadership anecdote. Kristi Noem _wanted you to know_ she had what it takes to pull the trigger--on innocence. On empathy. On a tiny, yapping puppy named Cricket who just wanted to chase birds.
**If that 's not a metaphor for the The Trump Administration, I don't know what is.**
So, of course Noem's DHS isn't prioritizing homeland security. I'm not sure she even knows the meaning. Like habeas corpus, which she apparently thought was name for the Ecuadorian offshoot of MS-13. So instead of protecting the homeland, Noem's turned the agency into the rabid attack dog she wanted Cricket to be. To pursue political foes and redefine "public safety" as "protecting white conservative feelings."
What used to be an agency that (at least on paper) coordinated against foreign and domestic threats at home now has a new mission: _purity enforcement_. That's what Project 2025 wants. That's what Trump wants. That's what Noem the narcissist, who thinks every public appearance is a costume ball, is eager to deliver.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d1c211cd-3098-4b8b-8a5e-d4ebe3be0e7d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
She wants to throw the Constitution in a shallow pit and put a bullet in it, with the same, cold Cricket grin. Because, this is about what happens when **cruelty becomes a qualification for public service**. When loyalty to low-rent Cosa Nostra means more than the rule of law. When our fake tough guy President, a giant bone spur with a jello gelatin physique, has turned shooting a dog into _a resume builder_.
[| | | Tony Michaels 8dSen. Alex Padilla handcuffed and detained after challenging DHS Secretary Kristi Noem -- democracy just took another hit in LA.
---
| 89| | 29|
---|---|---|---](https://substack.com/profile/30899422-tony-michaels/note/c-125264475)
**In other words: We 're all Cricket now.**
Noem's had ICE assault and/or arrest Congress members and a Mayor for, uh..walking. And..talking. She refuses to answer questions in front of Congress. She just issued a regulation requiring elected officials to give 24 hours notice before inspecting ICE facilities--a violation of their constitutional oversight role. But if it makes you feel better, Kristi doesn't just commit crimes against the Constitution:
> South Dakota Gov. Kristi Noem's daughter received unusual treatment in an application for her real estate appraiser license, including an extra opportunity to obtain it after failing to meet federal requirements, the former director of a state appraiser agency told lawmakers Tuesday.
So, yeah, she's drowning in depravity like she was on the Titanic. Though sadly, in this scenario, it seems Rose chucked Jack to make room for Kristi on that door.
The reality is that in Kristi Noem's DHS, we're all being judged not based on any real threat we may pose, [but by our obedience ](https://substack.com/redirect/e25fa96f-571c-49fd-8a95-e87ea142e3f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)to the mushroom dic-tator. If we step outta line, bark at the wrong billionaire, or, say, try to share truth instead of Putin points, there may be a gravel pit waiting. Metaphorically, for now, at least for U.S. citizens.
[So we fight for our neighbors, friends and family](https://substack.com/redirect/890bed72-16df-4ddc-b72e-59200535e711?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) who aren't so lucky, because what Noem's doing right now is some serious brownshirt shit. But also because, if not, it gets worse. It's Newton time, in particular, his Third Law of Motion:
> For every action, an equal and opposite reaction. Meaning when object 1 pushes object 2, object 1 gets pushed back with equal force but in the opposite direction
Noem started with immigrants to see how much we'd stomach. Every time we look away, say nothing, normalize the detached degradation of who and what we are as a people, Noem will see it as a sign, and push fascism further down into the gravel pit.
Because not only is Kristi Noem and utterly awful human being. She's one sick puppy.
* * *
### **THIS WEEK ON AMPED UP:**
On this week's _Amped Up_ , Cliff and David were joined by NYU historian and authoritarianism expert **Dr. Ruth Ben-Ghiat** , and let's just say--if you weren't nervous about America's flirtation with fascism before... you may be now.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ee573ed4-4ec0-4b71-ba66-026eadc524c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
From Mussolini to MAGA, Dr. Ben-Ghiat laid out the terrifying parallels between historical strongmen and the current Trump regime. What we're witnessing isn't random chaos--but a calculated dismantling of democracy. But it wasn't all doom.
She sees hope in the growing protest movement, the legal system's still pushing back and signs of elite defection, and [Republican-on-Republican violence over a potential war with Iran](https://substack.com/redirect/4eca8843-8136-40a3-a496-1d6c4a8059d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), which she explains in more precise detail.
From the quiet defiance of the military to the power of youth-led politics and Gen Z's bullshit radar, the episode was a reminder democracy ain't dead, but _is_ on life support. So we all _must be_ the defibrillator, and _[Ruth explains in the livestream how we do that.](https://substack.com/redirect/f05fb2fe-c1ce-4125-a760-71a819e04fef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_

TIMELINE: Trump's Rejected Takeover of the California National Guard
* **June 7, 2025** - Trump issues memo federalizing **2,000 National Guard troops** in response to L.A. unrest after ICE raids.
* **June 9, 2025** - Trump signs second memo adding **2,000 more troops** , bypassing Gov. Newsom's authority.
-> **First time since 1965** president federalized state Guard w/out governor consent.
* **June 12, 2025** - U.S. District Judge **Charles Breyer** grants California a **temporary restraining order (TRO)** to return control of the Guard to the state.
* **Later that day** - The **9th Circuit Court of Appeals** **stays the TRO** , allowing Trump to keep the troops under federal command temporarily.
* **June 19, 2025** - A **three-judge 9th Circuit panel** extends the stay, ruling:
* Trump _likely_ acted within legal bounds under **10 U.S.C. § 12406**
* BUT courts **can review** federalization decisions for **bad faith or absurdity**
* California's concerns were **" too speculative"** to override Trump's authority
* **Next steps** :
* Further **District Court proceedings** expected
* California may seek a **full 9th Circuit (en banc)** review
* **Supreme Court** challenge remains possible

body:
Tell Trump and House Republicans: Keep your hands off our children’s lunches.

Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=P7YirKwkPaHkj39ltDtt9InzEB4bQF1BFrBXuogwK04uRmAXCNvotvRxE7AxAmXCpjp19M1jHZkr2qxxCtRxQrJ%2BGkLY3fslhkt%2FITlh113lvEG%2Fp2V6vIBKeDJqxA0imXV4hApJQ7cVUf7mWa4pN%2BXTPvzfUh9Qu0asqLosaRLqOFl1j53CpP8wjaMoDjmbFATwY1kEFOvNXxPjPjHbds2w0x4%2BcGBleL7jBuIxScZ3ksW6sWk64T1qS8vfuhGcqGLqC7G%2B7jHWcpPEF4qM%2BCNm2L3PNHzHML7K5yyKj7jiACD%2FnLWYszQmS5uTv%2BeMxKmJHKhrjzwyNonAdfHjnSAX2zf09n9g3ku4FKjmCboCDh%2F%2FOBzi5ntm%2F1uaDf1F6u%2F3YnKjlbP4bBs3QAEusWK38ZGD3JJJ2AmvGyTV3sI%3D)

| |

Last month, House Republicans passed a budget that would gut free and reduced-price lunches for millions of kids, including thousands here in Southern New Mexico. Let that sink in: they're cutting meals for children while handing out even more tax breaks to billionaires. And somehow, they're also just fine with Donald Trump throwing himself a $25 to $45 million taxpayer-funded birthday parade. It's disgraceful — and it's exactly the kind of upside-down leadership we're fighting to stop. Kids deserve to eat. Families deserve peace of mind. Schools deserve support, not more budget cuts. Gabe knows this firsthand. He grew up benefiting from free and reduced-price lunch. It helped him stay focused, stay healthy, and succeed. That's why he's fighting to protect these programs — **because every child in New Mexico and across the country deserves that same chance.** This budget isn't just heartless — it's a statement of House Republicans' priorities. And we know where ours are. clean_body: Tell Trump and House Republicans: Keep your hands off our children’s lunches. Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Last month, House Republicans passed a budget that would gut free and reduced-price lunches for millions of kids, including thousands here in Southern New Mexico. Let that sink in: they're cutting meals for children while handing out even more tax breaks to billionaires. And somehow, they're also just fine with Donald Trump throwing himself a $25 to $45 million taxpayer-funded birthday parade. It's disgraceful — and it's exactly the kind of upside-down leadership we're fighting to stop. Kids deserve to eat. Families deserve peace of mind. Schools deserve support, not more budget cuts. Gabe knows this firsthand. He grew up benefiting from free and reduced-price lunch. It helped him stay focused, stay healthy, and succeed. That's why he's fighting to protect these programs — because every child in New Mexico and across the country deserves that same chance. This budget isn't just heartless — it's a statement of House Republicans' priorities. And we know where ours are. | | — Team Vasquez | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.** | = = Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from Gabe Vasquez for Congress, . We've officially entered the general election and we now have a complete Democratic ticket. To meet the urgency of this moment, my team is making crucial investments, launching a statewide bus tour, and airing a brand new TV and digital ad.

Your contribution today would enable us to reach more undecided voters across the Commonwealth.

clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. = ** Another Successful Hoosier Hospitality Dinner in the Books, Democrats Come Out For No Kings Day Protests Hundreds of Hoosiers made their way to downtown Indianapolis last Friday for our annual Hoosier Hospitality Dinner and fellowship with Democrats across the state. Attendees heard from Terre Haute Mayor Brandon Sakbun, Evansville Mayor Stephanie Terry, Chair Karen Tallian, and Ambassador Joe Donnelly. Michigan Governor Gretchen Whitmer and Congressman André Carson also delivered video messages. Let’s build on the momentum to elect more Hoosier Democrats in 2026! On top of this, thousands of Hoosiers in dozens of cities across the state took to the streets to protest against the Trump Administration and the cuts at the Statehouse. Over 7,000 were reported to have come out in Indianapolis, with thousands more in locations throughout Indiana. Rural Indiana in particular showed out. Hundreds attended events in locations such as Warsaw, LaGrange, Peru, Nashville, and many other Hoosier cities. We are building momentum toward CHANGE in Indiana! Thousands of Pre-K Slots Eliminated For Hoosier Children With Republican Budget A budget is a sign of your priorities, and it’s clear where this Republican state government’s priorities really lie: with millionaires over working families. The On My Way Pre-K program has been a life changing program for thousands of Hoosier families, and we should only be expanding it. However, this year, Republicans cut back the number of Pre-K slots in the program from over 6,000 to just 2,500 per year. This is a shameful move to jeopardize the early education of our children so the wealthy can have another handout. Let’s elect more Democrats in 2026 and make Pre-K universal in our state. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. On the childcare issue, Democrats are fighting to expand Pre-K accessibility and affordability. Rep. Carey Hamilton wore about how Republican cuts to our Pre-K system take away opportunities from the Hoosier families that need it most. Instead, millionaires will get a handout to send their kids to private schools and middle class families struggle to pay for childcare and Pre-K tuition. It’s time for leaders who will protect early education access for our children and for future generations. We know an investment in our children now pays long term dividends down the road. People’s Town Hall Series We have more upcoming People’s Town Hall events! Sign up for our event in Fort Wayne in Early July, and our event in Valpo tomorrow! VALPARAISO — Saturday, June 21, 2025 at 10-11:30 AM CT. Laborers Local 81, 3502 Enterprise Ave, Valparaiso, IN 46383 FORT WAYNE – Tuesday, July 8, 2025 at 6:00-7:30 PM ET Allen County Public Library Theater, 900 Library Plz, Fort Wayne, IN 46802 Information on County Party events, Town Halls, protests, volunteer opportunities, and more can be found on our Make Your Voice Heard! Submit Public Input on Upcoming Indiana Projects INDIANAPOLIS PUBLIC SCHOOLS – IPS is taking comments about the recent legislative session, and the creation of the Indianapolis Local Education Alliance by lawmakers. IN DEPT OF ENVIRONMENTAL MANAGEMENT — IDEM is seeking public comment on current environment regulations. This is to implement Braun’s executive order this spring to weaken regulations. ** Upcoming Candidate Trainings Join the National Democratic Training Committee on Tuesday, June 24th from 6-7 pm ET for a free virtual live training on The Secrets to Fundraising Emails.
